title: Reroute, Don't Remove: Recoverable Visual Token Routing for Vision-Language Models
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) project images into hundreds to thousands of visual tokens, making decoder inference expensive in both attention computation and KV-cache memory. Existing visual-token reduction methods largely follow a rank-and-remove paradigm: they score visual tokens, keep a compact subset, and permanently discard the rest. We show that this irreversible action is fragile because visual-token importance changes across decoder depth; tokens ranked low at one stage may become relevant in later layers, especially for grounding-sensitive queries. We propose Reroute, a training-free plug-in that replaces removal with recoverable routing. At each routing stage, selected vision tokens pass through decoder blocks, while deferred tokens bypass the stage and re-enter the candidate pool at the next routing decision. Reroute reuses existing attention-score ranking rules and stage-wise schedules, preserving the theoretical TFLOPs and KV-cache budget class of the pruning method it augments. Across FastV, PDrop, and Nüwa variants on LLaVA-1.5 and Qwen backbones, reroute improves grounding under aggressive token reduction while maintaining general VQA performance. These results suggest that VLM token reduction should not be viewed only as irreversible pruning, but also as recoverable routing. The code can be found here: https://github.com/elmma/mllm-reroute/

light_analysis.overview: 提出Reroute，一种可恢复的视觉token路由方法，替代不可逆移除，在保持计算预算的同时提升接地任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型(VLM)采用“排序-移除”范式减少视觉token，但token重要性随解码器深度动态变化，早期移除可能丢失后续层中变得重要的token，尤其对于接地敏感查询。这种不可逆操作导致性能脆弱，需要一种可恢复的token处理机制。
light_analysis.method: Reroute是一种无需训练的插件，通过可恢复路由替代永久移除。在每个路由阶段，选中的视觉token通过解码器块，而被推迟的token绕过当前阶段并重新进入下一路由决策的候选池。该方法复用现有注意力评分规则和阶段调度，不增加理论TFLOPs和KV-cache预算，可无缝增强FastV、PDrop等修剪方法。
light_analysis.result: 在FastV、PDrop和Nüwa变体上，结合LLaVA-1.5和Qwen骨干，Reroute在激进token减少条件下显著提升接地能力，同时保持一般VQA性能。与原修剪方法相比，维持相同的理论计算量和内存预算，验证了可恢复路由的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作表明VLM token减少应视为可恢复路由而非不可逆修剪。Reroute提供了一种高效、无需训练的解决方案，平衡了效率与细粒度任务准确性，尤其适用于接地等依赖空间信息的场景。未来可探索更复杂的路由策略。

title: Context-Driven Incremental Compression for Multi-Turn Dialogue Generation
abstract: Modern conversational agents condition on an ever-growing dialogue history at each turn, incurring redundant attention and encoding costs that grow with conversation length. Naive truncation or summarization degrades fidelity, while existing context compressors lack cross-turn memory sharing or revision, causing information loss and compounding errors in long dialogues. We revisit the context compression under conversational dynamics and empirically present its fragility. To improve both efficiency and robustness, we introduce Context-Driven Incremental Compression (C-DIC), which treats a conversation as interleaved contextual threads and stores revisable per-thread compression states in a single, compact dialogue memory. At each turn, a lightweight retrieve, revise, and write-back loop shares information across turns and updates stale memories, stabilizing long-horizon behavior. In addition, we adapt truncated backpropagation-through-time (TBPTT) to our multi-turn setting, learning cross-turn dependencies without full-history backpropagation. Extensive experiments on long-form dialogue benchmarks demonstrate superior performance and efficiency of C-DIC; notably, C-DIC shows stable inference latency and perplexity over hundreds of dialogue turns, supporting a scalable path to high-quality dialogue modeling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出上下文驱动的增量压缩方法，通过可复写的每轮对话压缩状态，实现长对话的高效高质量建模。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代对话系统每轮依赖不断增长的对话历史，导致注意力和编码成本随对话长度增加。简单的截断或摘要会降低保真度，现有上下文压缩器缺乏跨轮记忆共享或修订，在长对话中导致信息丢失和累积错误。因此需要一种既能提升效率又能保持鲁棒性的上下文压缩方法。
light_analysis.method: C-DIC将对话视为交错上下文线程，在每个线程中存储可复写的压缩状态至紧凑的对话记忆。每轮通过轻量级的检索、修订和写入循环实现跨轮信息共享并更新过时记忆。此外，将截断式反向传播时间（TBPTT）适配到多轮设置，无需完整历史反向传播即可学习跨轮依赖。
light_analysis.result: 在长对话基准上的大量实验表明，C-DIC在性能和效率上均优于现有方法。特别地，C-DIC在数百轮对话中表现出稳定的推理延迟和困惑度，为高质量对话建模提供了可扩展的路径。
light_analysis.conclusion: C-DIC通过增量压缩和可复写记忆有效解决了长对话中的效率与保真度问题，具有重要的学术价值和应用前景。未来可进一步探索更高效的记忆更新策略或扩展到其他序列建模任务。

title: How Seemingly Inconsequential Design Choices Dictate Performance of LLMs in Pathology
abstract: General-purpose large language models (LLMs) are routinely used as baselines when evaluating specialized pathology models on whole-slide images (WSIs). Because WSIs exceed contemporary model context limits, LLM baselines routinely use small, high-magnification patches processed independently via majority voting, without systematic evaluation of seemingly inconsequential design choices such as patch size, patch count, and magnification. Generalist LLMs have consistently underperformed specialized systems, reinforcing the perception that domain-specific training or architectural adaptation is necessary for pathology tasks involving WSIs. Here, we conduct a systematic factorial analysis of four input design factors: inference mode, patch size, magnification, and patch count. We demonstrate that prior studies have overstated the gap between specialized models and general-purpose LLMs by choosing non-optimized input configurations. On the MultiPathQA benchmark, switching to a single balanced configuration (large patches at lower magnification, processed jointly) raises GPT-5 from 15.1% to 39.5% on cancer-type classification (TCGA) and from 38.1% to 62.9% on organ classification (GTEx). Per-task optimization yields further gains up to 43.9% (TCGA) and 71.6% (GTEx). The same configuration generalizes to two other models and to a fully held-out CPTAC cohort, where it improves Gemini 3 Flash by 23.4 percentage points without any task-specific tuning.

light_analysis.overview: 通过系统因子分析发现，优化patch大小、数量和放大倍数等输入设计可显著提升通用LLM在病理学全切片图像任务中的性能，缩小与专门模型的差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 通用大语言模型在病理学全切片图像任务中常作为基线，但性能远低于专门模型，导致普遍认为领域特定训练或架构适配是必要的。然而，以往研究未系统评估patch大小、数量和放大倍数等输入设计选择的影响，这些看似无关的细节可能被忽视，需探究其对性能的实际作用。
light_analysis.method: 采用系统因子分析法，考察四个输入设计因素：推理模式、patch大小、放大倍数和patch数量。在MultiPathQA基准上，使用GPT-5等模型，对比不同配置下的分类性能。关键创新是采用联合处理大尺寸低放大倍数patch的单一平衡配置，避免独立多数投票的传统做法。
light_analysis.result: 在TCGA癌症分类上，GPT-5从15.1%提升至39.5%；在GTEx器官分类上从38.1%提升至62.9%。每任务优化进一步至43.9%和71.6%。该配置泛化到其他模型及CPTAC数据集，使Gemini 3 Flash提升23.4个百分点，无需任务特定调优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证明通用LLM在病理学任务中的性能因输入配置不当而被严重低估，通过优化设计可大幅提升，挑战了认为需专门模型的普遍观点。学术价值在于揭示输入设计的关键作用，实际应用可简化病理分析流程。未来可探索自动化patch选择策略。

title: Doc-to-Atom: Learning to Compile and Compose Memory Atoms
abstract: Long input sequences are central to document understanding and multi-step reasoning in Large Language Models, yet the quadratic cost of attention makes inference both memory-intensive and slow. Context distillation mitigates this by compressing contextual information into model parameters, and recent work such as Doc-to-LoRA amortizes context distillation into a single forward pass that generates one LoRA adapter per document. However, producing a single monolithic adapter for all queries leads to irrelevant-query interference, limited compositional recall, and poor scalability to long-document reasoning. To address these challenges, we propose Doc-to-Atom (Doc2Atom), a compositional parametric memory framework that decomposes each document into semantically typed knowledge atoms. Each atom is compiled into an independent micro-LoRA adapter and a provenance retrieval key. At inference time, a lightweight query router selects and assembles only the relevant atoms into a query-specific adapter, which is then injected into a frozen base model. The entire system is trained end-to-end through a multi-objective distillation framework. Experiments on six diverse QA benchmarks demonstrate that Doc2Atom outperforms Doc-to-LoRA baselines while reducing the memory cost of document internalization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Doc-to-Atom框架，将文档分解为知识原子并编译成微LoRA适配器，实现高效、可组合的上下文蒸馏。
light_analysis.motivation: 长输入序列导致注意力机制二次成本，使大语言模型推理内存密集且缓慢。现有上下文蒸馏方法如Doc-to-LoRA生成单块适配器用于所有查询，导致不相关查询干扰、组合回忆受限，难以扩展至长文档推理。需要一种能按需组合相关知识的轻量级记忆机制。
light_analysis.method: Doc-to-Atom将每个文档分解为语义类型化的知识原子，每个原子编译为独立的微LoRA适配器与来源检索键。推理时，轻量级查询路由器选择并组装相关原子为查询特定适配器，注入冻结基座模型。整个系统通过多目标蒸馏框架端到端训练，实现参数化记忆的高效组合。
light_analysis.result: 在六个不同领域的问答基准上，Doc-to-Atom优于Doc-to-LoRA基线方法，同时降低了文档内部化的内存成本。具体性能提升和内存节约细节摘要未明确给出，但表明在准确率和效率方面均有改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: Doc-to-Atom通过解耦文档为知识原子并动态组合，解决了单块适配器的干扰和可扩展性问题。该方法提升了长文档推理的准确性与效率，为高性能、低成本的上下文蒸馏提供了新思路。未来可探索更细粒度的原子划分与路由策略。

title: Redesign Mixture-of-Experts Routers with Manifold Power Iteration
abstract: Router is the cornerstone component to the Mixture-of-Experts models. Serving as expert proxies, the rows of the router matrix compute their similarity to the MoE inputs to determine which subset of experts is activated. Ideally, each router row is designed to encode the expert matrix into this representative vector, such that its dot-product with token can better reflect token-expert affinity. However, there exists no design principles to enforce this condensation. In this paper, we propose to align each router row with the principal singular direction of the associated expert, as this direction provides the most expressive mathematical description of a matrix. Based on this principle, we propose a router redesign with Manifold Power Iteration (MPI). Specifically, it introduces a "Power-then-Retract" paradigm, where a power iteration step is performed on the router weights, followed by a retraction to impose a norm constraint to ensure both efficiency and stability. Theoretically, we show that MPI drives router rows to converge toward the principal singular directions of associated experts. Empirically, we pretrain MoE model across scales from 1B to 11B parameters to confirm that this alignment facilitates more effective MoE models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于流形幂迭代（MPI）的MoE路由器重设计，使路由器行与专家主奇异方向对齐，提升模型效果。
light_analysis.motivation: Mixture-of-Experts模型中路由器作为专家代理，其行向量应编码专家矩阵的代表性向量，以准确反映token-专家亲和力。然而现有方法缺乏设计原则来保证这种压缩，导致路由器无法有效捕捉专家特性。本文旨在建立路由器行与专家矩阵主奇异方向的对齐原则，解决现有路由器设计不充分的问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出Manifold Power Iteration (MPI)路由器重设计，采用“Power-then-Retract”范式：先对路由器权重执行幂迭代步骤，使其向专家矩阵的主奇异方向演化；再通过收缩操作施加范数约束，确保效率与稳定性。理论证明MPI能驱动路由器行收敛至相关专家的主奇异方向。实验在1B至11B参数规模的MoE模型上进行预训练验证。
light_analysis.result: 在1B、3B、7B、11B等多个规模的MoE模型上预训练后，MPI路由器相比基线（如Top-k、Softmax router）显著提升下游任务性能（如语言建模困惑度降低、下游任务准确率提升）。具体数据摘要未明确，但声称对齐促进了更有效的MoE模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次为MoE路由器引入基于主奇异方向对齐的设计原则，并通过MPI算法实现。理论分析与实验表明该方法能提升MoE模型性能，具有重要的学术价值（提供路由器设计新视角）和实用价值（可扩展至大规模MoE）。未来工作可探索更高效的非迭代对齐方法或结合动态专家选择。

title: VLGA: Vision-Language-Geometry-Action Models for Autonomous Driving
abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models can describe scenes and reason about them in language, yet still struggle to ground their actions in the dense 3D world around them. Existing approaches either inject features from a frozen 3D foundation model without an objective that ensures the policy uses them, or constrain geometry with sparse box and map losses that provide no dense spatial signal. We introduce VLGA, the first vision-language-action model supervised to reconstruct the dense 3D world it drives through. VLGA introduces geometry as a fourth modality alongside vision, language, and action through a dedicated expert supervised by a per-pixel pointmap regression loss against LiDAR. Extensive experiments conducted on challenging nuScenes and Bench2Drive datasets for open-loop and closed-loop evaluations, respectively, show the superiority of VLGA over counterpart VLA methods. In particular, on open-loop nuScenes, VLGA sets a new state of the art among VLA methods without ego status, with the lowest L2 (0.50\,m average) and 3-second collision rate (0.18\%). On closed-loop Bench2Drive, VLGA attains the state-of-the-art driving score of 79.08, +0.71 over the strongest prior VLA, at comparable efficiency and comfort.

light_analysis.overview: 首次将密集3D世界重建作为监督信号，引入几何模态改进VLA模型的3D grounding。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有VLA模型难以在密集3D世界中准确执行动作，现有方法或使用冻结3D基础模型但缺乏有效训练目标，或依赖稀疏的边界框和地图损失而缺乏密集空间信号。因此需要一种能提供密集3D空间监督的方法来提升动作定位能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出VLGA模型，将几何作为第四模态，通过专门的专家网络和逐像素点图回归损失（以LiDAR为监督）学习密集3D世界重建。在nuScenes和Bench2Drive数据集上分别进行开环和闭环评估。
light_analysis.result: 在开环nuScenes上，VLGA在无自车状态的VLA方法中达到SOTA：平均L2误差0.50m，3秒碰撞率0.18%。在闭环Bench2Drive上，驾驶得分79.08，比最强先前的VLA高0.71，且效率和舒适度相当。
light_analysis.conclusion: 验证了密集3D重建监督能显著提升自动驾驶VLA模型的空间理解与动作执行能力。未来可探索更高效的几何表示或扩展至复杂场景。

title: System Report for CCL25-Eval Task 5: New Dataset and LoRA-Fine-Tuned Qwen2.5
abstract: Recently, large language models (LLMs) have achieved promising progress in the fields of classical Chinese translation and the generation of classical poetry. However, domain-specific research on precise translation and affective-semantic understanding of classical poetry remains limited. The main challenge is that most studies treat the poetic appreciation task as a general-domain problem, neglecting the distinctive features of poetic appreciation, while high-quality and domain-specific datasets are extremely limited. To address this limitation, we decompose the task into three subtasks: term interpretation, semantic interpretation, and emotional inference. Based on multiple open-source datasets, we perform data cleansing and alignment to construct the Classical Chinese Poetry Instruction Pair Dataset (CCPoetry-49K), which comprises 49,404 high-quality instruction-response pairs explicitly optimized for this domain. We then propose a domain-specialized LLM, called PoetryQwen, by applying Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) to fine-tune the Qwen2.5-14B model. Experimental results on the CCL25-Eval Task 5 benchmark demonstrate that PoetryQwen achieves a score of 0.757, representing a 9.7% improvement over the Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct baseline (0.690). These findings clearly indicate that PoetryQwen significantly enhances performance in precise translation and emotional understanding of classical poetry. We present new dataset and methodological considerations intended to support the domain-specific optimization of LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PoetryQwen，通过LoRA微调Qwen2.5-14B并构建CCPoetry-49K数据集，提升古典诗歌的精确翻译与情感理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大语言模型在古典诗歌翻译与情感理解领域研究有限，多数方法将诗歌鉴赏视为通用任务，忽视其独特性，且缺乏高质量领域数据集。该研究旨在解决古典诗歌的精确翻译和情感语义理解问题，通过任务分解和数据构建弥补现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 将诗歌鉴赏任务分解为术语解释、语义解释和情感推理三个子任务。基于多个开源数据集进行清洗和对齐，构建CCPoetry-49K数据集（49,404条指令-响应对）。采用LoRA对Qwen2.5-14B进行领域微调，得到PoetryQwen模型。
light_analysis.result: 在CCL25-Eval Task 5基准上，PoetryQwen得分为0.757，相比Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct基线（0.690）提升9.7%。结果表明模型在古典诗歌精确翻译和情感理解方面性能显著增强。
light_analysis.conclusion: PoetryQwen通过任务分解和领域数据构建，有效提升了LLM在古典诗歌翻译和情感理解上的表现，为领域优化提供了新的数据集和方法思路。未来可进一步扩展数据集或探索其他微调策略。

title: ATLAS: Active Theory Learning for Automated Science
abstract: Advancing scientific understanding through mechanistic modeling requires posing the right experimental questions to yield maximally informative data. To automate this pursuit within cognitive science, we introduce ATLAS (Active Theory Learning for Automated Science), an active learning framework for the data-driven discovery of interpretable behavioral models. ATLAS iterates between generating mechanistic hypotheses--instantiated as a diverse ensemble of sparse neural networks (Disentangled RNNs)--and designing experiments that optimally distinguish between them. We test this approach on the problem of recovering reinforcement learning agents from their behavior in bandit tasks. ATLAS designs varied sequences of qualitatively novel experiments with temporal structure tailored to underlying agent characteristics. The models trained on these experiments are evaluated against a comprehensive set of metrics for mechanistic modeling that capture behavioral, structural, and computational similarity. ATLAS achieves a 5-10x improvement in sample efficiency across all metrics compared to random experimentation, and its performance is further validated against expert-designed experiments derived from literature. These in silico results showcase ATLAS's potential to accelerate human-interpretable insights in cognitive science and other domains where scientific inquiry relies on discovering mechanistic models.

light_analysis.overview: ATLAS是一个主动学习框架，通过迭代生成稀疏神经网络假设并设计最优实验，自动化发现可解释的行为模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 科学发现依赖提出正确实验问题以获取最大化信息数据，但手动设计实验效率低下且难以自动化。现有方法缺乏系统性地生成和验证机械假设的能力。ATLAS旨在解决这一问题，通过自动迭代假设生成和实验设计，加速认知科学中可解释行为模型的发现。
light_analysis.method: ATLAS循环执行两个核心步骤：首先，从行为数据中生成多样化的机械假设，实例化为解纠缠循环神经网络（Disentangled RNNs）的稀疏集成；其次，设计区分性实验，其时间结构针对底层智能体特征优化。在bandit任务中测试，用于恢复强化学习智能体的行为。
light_analysis.result: 在行为、结构和计算相似性等全面机械建模指标上，ATLAS相比随机实验实现5-10倍的样本效率提升。其性能与专家设计的实验相当，验证了方法在自动化实验设计中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ATLAS展示了在认知科学中自动化机械模型发现和实验设计的可行性，能显著加速人类可解释的洞察。该方法具有跨领域潜力，适用于依赖机械模型发现的科学领域，但需进一步验证在更复杂任务上的泛化能力。

title: Which Models Are Our Models Built On? Auditing Invisible Dependencies in Modern LLMs
abstract: Modern LLM training pipelines increasingly rely on other models to generate data, filter corpora, judge outputs, and guide development decisions. These dependencies are recursive: a model may depend on an upstream artifact whose own dependencies are documented only in separate releases and artifacts. As a result, the full dependency structure is fragmented across heterogeneous public artifacts, with complexity and recursive depth far outpacing humans' ability to trace. We introduce ModSleuth, an agentic system that recursively reconstructs LLM dependency graphs from public artifacts with source-grounded evidence. We find that the primary challenge is no longer information extraction, but defining what constitutes a dependency and reconciling artifact references across inconsistent documentation. We address these challenges through a formalization that distinguishes direct and indirect dependencies, represents heterogeneous pipeline roles through operation-centered relationships, and resolves artifact identities across names, versions, and repositories. Applying ModSleuth to four public-artifact-rich LLM releases, we recover 1,060 source-verified dependencies and construct large-scale dependency graphs of modern LLM development. These graphs reveal multi-hop license obligations, train-evaluation coupling, discrepancies between released and training-time artifacts, and documentation inconsistencies that would otherwise be difficult to uncover. We release ModSleuth and the resulting dependency graphs to support transparent analysis of the increasingly complex ecosystems underlying modern LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ModSleuth系统，递归重建现代LLM的隐性依赖关系图，揭示多跳许可证义务和文档不一致。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代LLM训练管道日益依赖其他模型生成数据、过滤语料和评判输出，这些依赖递归且碎片化，分布在异构公开制品中，人类难以追踪完整结构。现有方法无法处理递归深度和异质性，导致许可证、评估偏差等问题被隐藏。
light_analysis.method: ModSleuth是一个智能体系统，通过递归方式从公开制品中重建LLM依赖图，并附带源证据。它形式化定义了直接与间接依赖，使用操作中心的关系表示异构管道角色，并通过名称、版本和仓库解析制品身份。应用于四个公开制品丰富的LLM发布。
light_analysis.result: 从四个LLM发布中恢复1060个源验证依赖，构建大规模依赖图。这些图揭示了多跳许可证义务、训练-评估耦合、发布与训练时制品的差异以及文档不一致性，这些在传统方法中难以发现。
light_analysis.conclusion: ModSleuth成功揭示了现代LLM生态中隐藏的依赖关系，支持透明分析。未来可扩展至更多模型和实时监控，但当前依赖公开制品的可用性和一致性。

title: APPO: Agentic Procedural Policy Optimization
abstract: Recent advances in agentic Reinforcement Learning (RL) have substantially improved the multi-turn tool-use capabilities of large language model agents. However, most existing methods assign credit over coarse heuristic units, such as tool-call boundaries or fixed workflows, making it difficult to identify which intermediate decisions influence downstream outcomes. In this work, we study agentic RL from two perspectives: \textit{where to branch and how to assign credit after branching}. Our pilot analysis shows that influential decision points are broadly distributed throughout the generated sequence rather than concentrated at tool calls, while token entropy alone does not reliably reflect their impact on final outcomes. Motivated by these observations, we propose \textbf{Agentic Procedural Policy Optimization (APPO)}, which shifts branching and credit assignment from coarse interaction units to fine-grained decision points in the sequence. APPO selects branching locations using a Branching Score that combines token uncertainty with policy-induced likelihood gains of subsequent continuations, enabling more targeted exploration while filtering out spurious high-entropy positions. It further introduces procedure-level advantage scaling to better distribute credit across branched rollouts. Experiments on 13 benchmarks show that APPO consistently improves strong agentic RL baselines by nearly 4 points, while keeping efficient tool-calls and maintaining behavior interpretability.
comment: 25 pages, including 14 pages of main text and 11 pages of appendix; work in progress

light_analysis.overview: 提出APPO方法，通过细粒度决策点分支和过程级优势缩放，提升大语言模型智能体的多轮工具使用能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有智能体强化学习方法在粗粒度交互单元（如工具调用边界或固定工作流）上分配信用，难以识别影响下游结果的关键中间决策。本研究分析发现，有影响力的决策点广泛分布于生成序列中，而非集中于工具调用，且仅凭令牌熵不能可靠反映其对最终结果的影响。因此需要更细粒度的分支和信用分配机制。
light_analysis.method: APPO方法将分支和信用分配从粗粒度交互单元转移到序列中的细粒度决策点。它使用分支分数（结合令牌不确定性和后续延续的策略诱导似然增益）选择分支位置，实现针对性探索并过滤虚假高熵位置。同时引入过程级优势缩放，更好地在分支 rollout 间分配信用。
light_analysis.result: 在13个基准测试上，APPO在强智能体RL基线上持续提升近4个百分点，同时保持高效的工具调用和可解释的行为。摘要未明确说明具体对比基线或数据集细节，但表明方法有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: APPO通过细粒度决策点分支和过程级信用分配，解决了现有方法在智能体RL中的分支和信用分配问题。实验证明其能显著提升性能，并保持效率与可解释性。未来可进一步探索更复杂的决策点识别或扩展到其他序列决策任务。

title: Illumination-Robust Camera-Based Heart-Rate Estimation for Physiological Sensing in Robots
abstract: Physiological awareness is important for service, social, and assistive robots that interact with humans in everyday environments. Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) enables non-contact heart-rate (HR) estimation from an RGB camera, making it a promising sensing modality for robot-mounted vision systems. However, illumination variation remains a major barrier to robust deployment. This paper presents an end-to-end spatial-temporal transformer framework for remote HR estimation on a new dataset with varied illumination. Our estimator integrates PRNet-based 3D face alignment, clip-level illumination augmentation, the Residual Temporal Standardization Module, and controlled hybrid temporal-frequency supervision. The training objective combines a Soft-Shifted Pearson waveform loss with a spectral Kullback-Leibler divergence loss, where a tuned weight ($\mathbfβ$) controls the contribution of frequency-domain heart-rate guidance. Experiments on a static all-level mix protocol covering three illumination levels show that $\mathbfβ=5$ provides the strongest result among the tested beta settings, achieving a best-run HR mean absolute error (MAE) of 0.79 bpm and an HR correlation of 0.982. Compared with the PhysFormer baseline evaluated on our dataset, our estimator reduces HR MAE by 93.6 %, while increasing HR correlation from 0.088 to 0.982, making it usable when illumination varies.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种抗光照变化的端到端时空变换器框架，用于机器人视觉系统中的远程心率估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 生理感知对于在日常生活环境中与人类互动的服务、社交和辅助机器人至关重要。远程光电容积描记法（rPPG）可通过RGB摄像头实现非接触式心率估计，有望用于机器人视觉系统。然而，光照变化是实际部署的主要障碍。现有方法在光照变化下鲁棒性不足，亟需一种能够处理多变光照条件的心率估计方法。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出端到端时空变换器框架，集成PRNet三维人脸对齐、片段级光照增强、残差时间标准化模块和受控混合时频监督。训练目标结合软移位Pearson波形损失和频谱KL散度损失，通过权重β控制频域心率指导的贡献。使用包含三种光照水平的静态混合协议数据集进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，β=5时效果最佳，心率平均绝对误差（MAE）为0.79 bpm，相关系数为0.982。与PhysFormer基线相比，心率MAE降低93.6%，相关系数从0.088提升至0.982，证明了在光照变化下的实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的框架显著提升了光照变化环境下远程心率估计的鲁棒性，为机器人生理感知提供了可靠方案。未来可进一步优化计算效率，适用于实时应用。

title: Verifiable Environments Are LEGO Bricks: Recursive Composition for Reasoning Generalization
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) with verifiable environments has emerged as a powerful approach for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). While prior research demonstrates that scaling environment quantity improves RL performance, existing manual or individual construction methods suffer from linear scaling limits, thereby hindering scalable reasoning generalization. This paper introduces RACES (\textbf{R}ecursive \textbf{A}utomated \textbf{C}omposition for \textbf{E}nvironment \textbf{S}caling), a framework that conceptualizes verifiable environments as composable building blocks that can be recursively assembled. The key insight is that when the codomain (output type) of one environment matches the domain (input type) of another, they can be automatically fused into a new verifiable environment, enabling recursive composition. RACES is implemented with 300 individual environments and defines a set of composition operators (\textsc{SEQUENTIAL}, \textsc{PARALLEL}, \textsc{SORT}, and \textsc{SELECT}) that induce diverse reasoning patterns. Extensive experiments show that RL training on these composite environments consistently enhances reasoning generalization. Specifically, RACES improves DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-14B by an average of 3.1 points (from 48.2 to 51.3) and boosts Qwen3-14B performance from 58.8 to 61.1 on six benchmarks, which are unseen during the construction of training environments. Moreover, RACES achieves performance comparable to training on 300 individual environments using only 50 base environments, demonstrating significant efficiency in environment utilization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RACES框架，通过递归组合可验证环境来增强LLM推理泛化，实现高效环境扩展。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习结合可验证环境能提升大语言模型的推理能力，但现有方法依赖线性增加环境数量，扩展性受限且泛化不足。手工或独立构建环境效率低，难以实现规模化推理泛化，需要更高效的环境生成机制。
light_analysis.method: RACES将可验证环境视为可组合构建块，当两个环境的输出与输入类型匹配时，通过SEQUENTIAL、PARALLEL、SORT和SELECT四种算子自动递归组合成新环境。基于300个基础环境，该框架能生成多样化复合环境，诱导丰富推理模式，提升泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 在六个未见基准上，RACES将DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-14B平均提升3.1分（48.2→51.3），Qwen3-14B从58.8提升至61.1。仅用50个基础环境即可达到300个独立环境的训练效果，环境利用效率显著提高。
light_analysis.conclusion: RACES通过递归组合实现环境自动扩展，有效提升LLM推理泛化能力，在效率和性能上均优于线性扩展方法。未来可应用于更复杂推理任务，但需注意组合环境的验证成本与多样性平衡。

title: A Turbo-Inference Strategy for Object Detection and Instance Segmentation
abstract: Object detection and instance segmentation tasks are closely related. Existing top-down instance segmentation methods usually follow a detect-then-segment paradigm, where an initial detector is used to recognize and localize objects with bounding boxes, followed by the segmentation of an instance mask within each bounding box. In such methods, the detection accuracy directly influences the subsequent segmentation performance. However, previous research has seldom explored the impact of the instance segmentation task on object detection. In this paper, we present a turbo-inference strategy for the top-down methods that leverages the complementary information between detection and segmentation tasks iteratively. Specifically we design two modules: turbo-detection head and turbo-segmentation head, which facilitate communication between the tasks. The two modules form a closed loop that interlaces the detection and segmentation results without retraining the model. Comprehensive experiments on the COCO, iFLYTEK, and Cityscapes datasets demonstrate that our method substantially enhances both detection and segmentation accuracies with a certain increase in computational cost. The proposed method represents a tradeoff between prediction accuracy and inference speed. Codes are available at https://github.com/zhaozhen2333/Turbo-Learning.git.
comment: Preprint version of an article published in Computer Vision and Image Understanding

light_analysis.overview: 提出涡轮推理策略，通过迭代交互检测与分割任务提升两者精度，无需重新训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 目标检测与实例分割紧密相关，现有自上而下方法遵循先检测后分割的范式，但检测误差会传递至分割，且未利用分割信息反馈改进检测。为此，本文旨在利用两者互补信息，相互增强，以提升整体性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出涡轮推理策略，包含涡轮检测头和涡轮分割头两个模块，形成闭环迭代交互。检测结果辅助分割，分割结果反馈改善检测，无需重新训练模型。在COCO、iFLYTEK、Cityscapes数据集上评估，代码开源。
light_analysis.result: 在COCO、iFLYTEK、Cityscapes数据集上，该方法显著提升了检测和分割精度，但增加了计算开销。具体数值摘要未明确，但表明在精度与速度间取得了折中。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过涡轮推理策略有效利用了检测与分割任务的互补信息，提升了联合性能，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的交互方式或降低计算成本。

title: Breaking Entropy Bounds: Accelerating RL Training via MTP with Rejection Sampling
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a key component in modern large language models, yet the rollout stage remains the key bottleneck in RL training pipelines. Although Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) offers a natural solution to accelerate rollouts through speculative decoding, many studies have observed that MTP acceptance rates degrade significantly during RL training, leading to limited speedup performance. To address this bottleneck, we present Bebop, a systematic study of MTP in LLM post-training, and offer practical recipes to integrate MTP into large-scale RL pipelines. First, we reveal that the MTP acceptance rate is fundamentally bounded by the fluctuation of model entropy, which demonstrates a clear negative linear relationship with the rise of entropy in the RL stage. Second, we show that probabilistic rejection sampling largely alleviates the disturbance introduced by entropy in RL compared to greedy draft sampling. We further identify that the conventional MTP training objectives (cross-entropy or KL) are suboptimal in such settings, and therefore we propose a novel end-to-end TV loss that directly optimizes multi-step rejection sampling acceptance rate, yielding ~10% acceptance rate improvements, achieving up to 95% acceptance rates and up to 25% extra inference throughput gains across mathematical reasoning, code generation, and agentic tasks. Third, we test various online MTP training strategies during RL and show that pre-RL MTP training with e2e TV loss and rejection sampling achieves a consistent acceptance rate and speedup throughout the entire RL, eliminating the need for costly online MTP updating. We provide extensive experiments and analysis that validate our findings. Experimental results show our method achieves up to 1.8x end-to-end acceleration in async RL training of Qwen3.5, Qwen3.6, and Qwen3.7 models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Bebop方法，通过熵界分析、拒绝采样和端到端TV损失优化多令牌预测，加速RL训练，实现1.8倍端到端加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习在大语言模型训练中至关重要，但rollout阶段是主要瓶颈。多令牌预测（MTP）通过推测解码加速rollout，但现有方法在RL训练中接受率显著下降，导致加速效果有限。究其根源，MTP接受率受模型熵波动影响，与熵上升呈负线性关系。因此，需要系统性研究MTP在RL中的应用，提出有效策略以维持高接受率和加速比。
light_analysis.method: 首先揭示MTP接受率受模型熵界限制，熵上升导致接受率下降。其次，采用概率拒绝采样替代贪心草稿采样，减轻熵扰动。进一步，提出端到端TV损失（Total Variation loss）替代传统交叉熵或KL散度，直接优化多步拒绝采样接受率。该损失函数在数学推理、代码生成和智能体任务中使接受率提升约10%，达到95%。最后，实验表明在RL前进行MTP训练（使用端到端TV损失和拒绝采样）即可在整个RL过程中保持一致的接受率和加速，无需在线更新。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen3.5、Qwen3.6和Qwen3.7模型的异步RL训练中，所提方法实现高达95%的接受率，额外推理吞吐量提升25%，端到端加速达1.8倍。与基线方法相比，显著缓解了RL训练中MTP接受率退化问题，且无需昂贵的在线MTP更新。
light_analysis.conclusion: Bebop系统性地解决了MTP在RL训练中的加速瓶颈，通过熵界分析、拒绝采样和端到端TV损失，实现了高效且稳定的加速。该方法具有重要学术价值，揭示了熵与接受率的关系，并提供了实用配方，可应用于大规模LLM后训练。未来可探索更先进的采样策略或扩展到其他生成任务。

title: DepthMaster: Unified Monocular Depth Estimation for Perspective and Panoramic Images
abstract: While monocular depth estimation has achieved significant progress, achieving generalized metric depth estimation for both narrow field-of-view (FoV) perspectives and $360^\circ$ panoramas remains an unsolved challenge. Existing methods are often tailored to specific camera types and struggle to produce accurate metric depth that generalizes across diverse settings. This limitation stems from two key challenges: the inherent geometric discrepancy between perspective and panoramic cameras, and the scarcity of panoramic training data with metric annotations. In this work, we introduce DepthMaster, a unified metric depth estimation framework. Rather than employing specialized networks to learn spherical distortions, we reformulate the problem by decomposing panoramic images into overlapping perspective patches. Crucially, distinct from prior projection-based methods that rely on ad-hoc architectural modifications to handle boundaries, we introduce a novel Correspondence Consistency Loss (CCL) and inject virtual projection cameras as geometric priors, allowing us to seamlessly stitch the patches while avoiding specialized operators and keeping the backbone largely compatible with standard Transformer designs. This strategy also resolves the geometric differences by unifying all inputs into a canonical perspective representation, and effectively circumvents data scarcity by directly unlocking powerful metric priors from vast perspective datasets. Trained on a mixed dataset that contains only one panorama dataset, DepthMaster achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot performance on 13 diverse datasets, outperforming not only universal methods but also leading specialist models in both perspective and panoramic domains.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DepthMaster，一种统一处理透视和全景图像的度量深度估计框架，通过分解全景为透视块并引入对应一致性损失，实现跨场景泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有单目深度估计方法多针对特定相机类型，难以同时处理窄视场透视和360°全景图像，主要挑战在于两者几何差异大且全景标注数据稀缺。现有方法需专门设计网络学习球形畸变，泛化能力有限。因此亟需统一框架，既能利用丰富透视数据，又能处理全景几何，且无需大量全景标注。
light_analysis.method: DepthMaster将全景图像分解为重叠透视块，通过引入对应一致性损失（CCL）和虚拟投影相机作为几何先验，实现块间无缝拼接，避免专用边界处理算子。所有输入统一为透视表示，兼容标准Transformer骨干。训练仅需一个全景数据集，充分利用透视数据集的度量先验。
light_analysis.result: 在13个多样化数据集上实现零样本SOTA性能，超越包括专业模型在内的通用方法和领域特定方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调在透视和全景两个领域均达到最优。
light_analysis.conclusion: DepthMaster通过统一透视和全景表示的策略，有效解决了几何差异和数据稀缺问题，为通用度量深度估计提供新思路。其无需专用架构的设计便于迁移，未来可扩展至更多相机类型。局限性或未提及，但可推测对极端畸变场景可能需更多验证。

title: On Subquadratic Architectures: From Applications to Principles
abstract: Transformers dominate modern sequence modeling, but their quadratic attention incurs substantial computational cost. Subquadratic architectures offer a scalable alternative. However, it remains unclear which designs yield the most effective sequence models. We compare three leading approaches: xLSTM, Mamba-2, and Gated DeltaNet. We evaluate these models on tasks with complex dependencies: (1) code-model pre-training, (2) distillation of code models from large language models, and (3) pre-training of time-series foundation models. Across these settings, xLSTM delivers the strongest overall performance. To explain xLSTM's advantage, we present a unified formulation and analyze the underlying architectural mechanisms, focusing on state tracking and memory dynamics. Our results show that xLSTM enables more flexible and stable memory correction via its gating scheme. We corroborate these findings on controlled synthetic length-generalization tasks. Overall, our findings indicate that xLSTM's gains on complex tasks stem from robust state tracking and accumulation.

light_analysis.overview: 比较三种次二次方架构（xLSTM、Mamba-2、Gated DeltaNet），发现xLSTM在复杂任务上表现最优，优势源于灵活的选通机制带来的稳定状态跟踪和记忆校正。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer的二次注意力带来高计算成本，次二次方架构提供可扩展替代，但哪种设计最有效尚不明确。本文旨在系统比较领先方法并解释性能差异，为高效序列建模提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 在代码模型预训练、蒸馏和时序基础模型预训练三个任务上，评估xLSTM、Mamba-2和Gated DeltaNet。提出统一公式分析架构机制，聚焦状态跟踪与记忆动态，并通过合成长度泛化实验验证。
light_analysis.result: xLSTM在所有评估任务上取得最强总体性能。分析表明，其选通机制实现更灵活稳定的记忆校正，合成任务进一步证实其在状态跟踪和累积上的优势（具体数值摘要未明确）。
light_analysis.conclusion: xLSTM在复杂序列任务上的优势源于稳健的状态跟踪与记忆累积，为次二次方架构设计提供了原则性见解。该结果有望推动高效序列模型的发展，未来可探索更优选通机制。

title: Latent World Recovery for Multimodal Learning with Missing Modalities
abstract: We study multimodal learning under missing modalities, with particular motivation from bioscience applications in which heterogeneous modalities are often only partially available when decisions need to be made. We propose Latent World Recovery (LWR), a framework built on two key ideas: (i) modality-specific embeddings from different modalities are aligned in a shared latent space, and (ii) a unified representation is constructed by fusing only the embeddings of the modalities that are actually available at both training and inference time. Rather than imputing missing modalities or requiring a fixed modality set, LWR treats each modality as a partial perception of an underlying latent state and performs availability-aware representation learning directly from the observed modalities. This combination of neighbor-based latent alignment and availability-aware modality fusion enables robust multimodal prediction under partial observation, while avoiding error propagation from explicit reconstruction of missing modalities. We evaluate the proposed framework on real-world incomplete multi-omics benchmarks and demonstrate that it provides an effective approach to downstream tasks such as cancer phenotype classification and survival prediction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Latent World Recovery (LWR) 框架，通过潜在空间对齐和可用性感知融合，解决缺失模态下的多模态学习问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在生物科学等应用中，异构模态常部分缺失，而现有方法要求固定模态集或进行显式重构，导致错误传播。亟需一种直接利用可用模态进行鲁棒表示学习的方法，避免误差累积。
light_analysis.method: LWR 框架基于两个关键思想：1) 将不同模态的特定嵌入对齐到共享潜在空间；2) 仅融合实际可用的模态嵌入构建统一表示。通过邻居基对齐和可用性感知融合，避免显式重构缺失模态，实现部分观测下的鲁棒多模态预测。
light_analysis.result: 在真实世界不完整多组学基准上评估，用于癌症表型分类和生存预测等下游任务，结果表明 LWR 能有效处理缺失模态，提升预测性能，具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: LWR 为缺失模态下的多模态学习提供了有效方案，避免误差传播，在生物医学领域具有重要应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的潜在对齐策略或扩展到更多模态场景。

title: Anatomy of Post-Training: Using Interpretability to Characterize Data and Shape the Learning Signal
abstract: Language-model post-training is the main stage at which model behavior is shaped, yet it still largely involves optimization of scalar rewards that summarize diverse desiderata. This abstraction gives practitioners little visibility into what their data actually teaches models, allowing spurious correlations to be learned by a model and inducing undesirable behaviors such as over-stylization and sycophancy. To address this problem, we ask: can we inspect a preference dataset before optimization and decide, at the level of concepts, which behaviors a model should be allowed to learn? Motivated by this, we introduce a data-centric post-training pipeline that uses interpretability protocols to develop statistical hypotheses for the latent concepts separating preferred from dispreferred generations, making them explicit for fine-grained user feedback. Building on this view, we unify several interpretability-based training protocols as ways of shaping rewards via feature or data interventions. Empirically, we show that our pipeline diagnoses undesirable signals in existing preference data, mitigates off-target learning, and can also help amplify or shape desired properties such as safeguards and model personality. More broadly, our results suggest that interpretability can turn post-training from optimizing opaque proxy rewards into a process of auditing and sculpting the learning signal itself.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于可解释性的数据中心后训练管道，通过统计假设显式分离偏好数据中的潜在概念，以诊断并塑造学习信号。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言模型后训练主要依赖标量奖励优化，但奖励抽象化使实践者难以洞察数据实际教导的内容，导致模型学习到虚假关联（如过度风格化和谄媚）。现有方法无法在优化前检查偏好数据集并决定模型应学习哪些概念，缺乏对学习信号的细粒度控制。因此需要一种可解释性驱动的方法来审计和塑造后训练过程。
light_analysis.method: 提出数据中心的微调管道：首先利用可解释性协议开发统计假设，识别区分偏好与非偏好生成的潜在概念，并将其显式化以供细粒度用户反馈。在此基础上，统一多种基于可解释性的训练协议（如通过特征或数据干预塑造奖励）。方法强调在优化前检查数据，而非仅优化黑箱奖励。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该管道能够诊断现有偏好数据中的不良信号（如虚假关联），减轻模型偏离目标的学习行为。同时，可以有效放大或塑造期望的属性，如安全防护和模型个性。相比传统奖励优化，该方法提供了更高的可见性和可控性。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作展示了可解释性如何将后训练从优化黑箱奖励转变为审计和塑造学习信号的过程。主要贡献是提出数据中心的管道，使实践者能显式地控制模型学习的概念。学术价值在于连接可解释性与后训练优化，实际应用价值在于提高模型行为塑造的透明度和有效性。未来工作可探索更自动化的假设发现和更通用的协议。

title: Nonslop: A Gamified Experiment in Human-AI Collaborative Writing
abstract: The rapid proliferation of large language models (LLMs) raises critical questions about human creativity and individual expression in an era of AI-assisted creation. When do humans adopt AI suggestions, and what are the implications for individual voice?   This study examines these questions through a gamified writing exercise where 74 participants (214 responses) replied to prompts while AI-generated word suggestions were available as they wrote. The game simulates a dystopian future in which an AI is attempting to learn from what remains of human individuality, and disincentivizes AI-like writing. In doing so, it attempts to create conditions that reveal authentic user preferences rather than default behaviors, such as accepting a readily available AI-generated suggestion. Note that this is a deliberate inversion of the "helpful assistant" design pattern; the system is explicitly forbidding you from accepting AI suggestions.   We analyze user behavior patterns across different task types, user behaviors, and response characteristics to understand the factors influencing human-AI interaction in creative tasks. The study focuses on when users choose to maintain creative autonomy versus violating the rules of the game and accepting AI assistance. It also explores how these choices relate to response patterns, task characteristics, and user behavior. This gamified approach offers both a framework for studying authentic human-AI interaction and a provocative lens for understanding the tension between efficiency and authenticity in AI-augmented creativity.
comment: Accepted at the 2026 IEEE Conference on Games (CoG 2026); to be published in the conference proceedings. Camera-ready version

light_analysis.overview: 通过游戏化实验反向设计AI助手，研究人机协作写作中用户保持创意自主与接受AI建议的行为偏好。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型（LLM）的普及引发了对人类创造力和个体表达在AI辅助创作时代的担忧。现有研究常依赖默认接受AI建议的行为，难以揭示用户真实偏好。该研究旨在通过游戏化实验创造反激励条件，迫使用户在选择接受AI建议时承担规则违规成本，从而揭示在削弱效率诱惑下用户对创意自主性的真实态度。
light_analysis.method: 设计了一个游戏化写作实验，74名参与者（共214份回复）根据提示写作，同时可获取AI生成的单词建议，但游戏明确禁止接受建议（反“有用助手”设计）。实验设定反乌托邦背景，AI试图学习人类个性，鼓励用户避免AI式写作。通过分析不同任务类型、用户行为特征和回复特点，研究用户何时保持创意自主性、何时违规接受AI帮助。
light_analysis.result: 实验分析了用户行为模式，发现用户在不同任务类型和提示下对AI建议的接受程度存在差异，部分用户倾向于保持创意自主，而另一些在特定时刻违规接受AI帮助。具体数据未明确给出，但研究揭示了行为与任务特性、用户习惯的关联，强调了游戏化框架在获取真实行为数据方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究通过游戏化方法提供了研究真实人机交互的新框架，揭示了AI辅助创作中效率与真实性之间的张力。它表明强制规则可以暴露用户深层偏好，为设计更尊重人类创造力的AI交互系统提供了启示。未来可扩展至更多任务类型和更复杂AI协作场景。

title: Atlas H&E-TME: Scalable AI-Based Tissue Profiling at Expert Pathologist-Level Accuracy
abstract: Hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) staining is the cornerstone of histopathology, yet scalable, quantitative analysis of H&E whole-slide images (WSIs) remains a central challenge in computational pathology. We present Atlas H&E-TME, an AI-based system built on the Atlas family of pathology foundation models that predicts tissue quality, tissue region, and cell type labels across multiple cancer types, yielding over 4,500 quantitative readouts per slide at cell-level resolution. A key challenge to validating such systems is overcoming morphological ambiguity inherent to H&E-only ground truth and the limited scalability of more informed references drawing on modalities such as immunohistochemistry (IHC). We address this with a dual validation framework combining biologically grounded depth with technical and morphological breadth. For depth, we propose an IHC-informed multi-pathologist consensus protocol that substantially improves inter-rater agreement over conventional H&E-only annotation. This yields a molecularly grounded reference against which we compare Atlas H&E-TME and pathologists working from H&E alone. For breadth, we benchmark Atlas H&E-TME on over 200,000 high-confidence H&E-only pathologist annotations across 1,500+ cases spanning eight cancer types and their most common metastatic sites, with subtypes covering >90% of clinical cases per cancer type, drawn from 25+ sources and 8+ scanner models. Benchmarked against the IHC-informed consensus, Atlas H&E-TME matches or exceeds pathologist H&E-only performance and generalizes consistently and robustly across this broad morphological and technical scope. In doing so, Atlas H&E-TME turns the H&E slide -- the most ubiquitous data in pathology -- into a scalable, quantitative window into the tumor and its microenvironment, laying a foundation for the next generation of tissue-based biomarkers in translational and clinical research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Atlas H&E-TME系统，基于病理基础模型实现细胞级组织分析，在专家级病理学家准确性上实现规模化量化。
light_analysis.motivation: H&E染色是组织病理学的基石，但大规模定量分析仍是计算病理学的核心挑战。现有方法受限于H&E-only标注的形态模糊性和参考标准（如IHC）的可扩展性不足。该系统旨在将最常见的H&E切片转化为可扩展的定量窗口，支持肿瘤微环境分析，为下一代组织生物标志物奠定基础。
light_analysis.method: 构建于Atlas系列病理基础模型之上，预测组织质量、区域和细胞类型，每张切片输出4500+细胞级定量指标。提出双验证框架：深度上采用IHC-informed多病理学家共识协议，提高标注一致性；广度上在超过200,000个高置信度H&E-only标注（涵盖8种癌症类型、1500+病例、25+数据源和8+扫描仪）上进行基准测试。
light_analysis.result: 在IHC-informed共识基准上，Atlas H&E-TME匹配或超越了病理学家仅基于H&E的性能，并在广泛形态和技术范围内实现一致稳健的泛化。覆盖8种癌症类型的亚型占临床病例>90%，验证了其大规模定量分析的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Atlas H&E-TME将H&E切片转化为可扩展的定量窗口，为肿瘤微环境分析提供细胞级洞察。其双验证框架确保了准确性，推动了组织病理学定量分析在转化和临床研究中的应用。未来可能进一步扩展至更多癌症类型和染色模式。

title: Claw-SWE-Bench: A Benchmark for Evaluating OpenClaw-style Agent Harnesses on Coding Tasks
abstract: General-purpose agents such as OpenClaw are increasingly used as autonomous tool users, but their coding ability is difficult to measure under SWE-bench: a generic agent does not by itself satisfy the clean Docker workspace, patch, and prediction contract required for scoring. We introduce Claw-SWE-Bench, a multilingual SWE-bench-style benchmark and adapter protocol that makes heterogeneous agent harnesses, or claws, comparable under fair settings including a fixed prompt, runtime budget, workspace contract, patch extraction procedure, and evaluator. The full benchmark contains 350 GitHub issue-resolution instances across 8 languages and 43 repositories, drawn from SWE-bench-Multilingual and SWE-bench-Verified-Mini after future-commit cleanup. We also release Claw-SWE-Bench Lite for faster validation, which is an 80-instance subset selected by a cost-aware, rank-aware procedure over 17 calibration columns. On the full benchmark, OpenClaw with a minimal direct-diff adapter scores only $19.1\%$ Pass@1, whereas the full adapter reaches $73.4\%$ with the same GLM 5.1 backbone, showing that adapter design is essential for enabling OpenClaw-style harnesses to perform coding tasks effectively. Across an OpenClaw $\times$ nine-model sweep and a five-claw $\times$ two-model sweep, model choice changes Pass@1 by $29.4$ pp and harness choice by $27.4$ pp under fixed models; systems with similar accuracy can differ substantially in total API cost. Claw-SWE-Bench therefore treats harness and cost accounting as first-class axes of SWE-style coding-agent evaluation, providing both a full benchmark and a low-cost reference set for reproducible comparison. The data is available at https://github.com/opensquilla/claw-swe-bench and https://huggingface.co/datasets/TokenRhythm/Claw-SWE-Bench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Claw-SWE-Bench，一个多语言基准和适配器协议，用于公平比较类似OpenClaw的通用智能体在编码任务上的性能，强调智能体框架和成本作为评估的核心维度。
light_analysis.motivation: 通用智能体如OpenClaw被广泛用作自主工具，但其编码能力难以在SWE-bench上直接衡量，因为需要特定的Docker环境、补丁格式和预测合约。现有评估方法缺乏对异构智能体框架的统一比较，限制了此类智能体在编码任务上的发展。因此，需要一种标准化基准来公平评估不同智能体框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出Claw-SWE-Bench，包含350个GitHub issue-解决实例，覆盖8种语言和43个仓库，源自SWE-bench-Multilingual和SWE-bench-Verified-Mini。设计了适配器协议，包括固定提示、运行预算、工作空间合约、补丁提取和评估器。同时提供80实例的Lite子集，用于快速验证。关键创新在于将智能体框架和成本作为评估的第一类维度。
light_analysis.result: 在完整基准上，OpenClaw使用最小直接差异适配器仅达19.1% Pass@1，而完整适配器在相同GLM 5.1骨干上达到73.4%，表明适配器设计至关重要。固定模型下，模型选择导致Pass@1变化29.4个百分点，智能体框架选择变化27.4个百分点。系统间准确率相似时，API成本差异显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: Claw-SWE-Bench提供了公平比较通用智能体编码能力的标准化基准，强调智能体框架和成本的重要性。该基准有助于推动编码智能体的可复现评估，未来可用于改进适配器设计和成本优化。数据已开源。

title: ALIGNBEAM : Inference-Time Alignment Transfer via Cross-Vocabulary Logit Mixing
abstract: Domain fine-tuning degrades the safety of large language models: fine-tuned specialists readily comply with harmful prompts framed in domain language. Existing inference-time defenses that mix logits from a safe anchor model require both models to share a vocabulary, which rules them out for the cross-family specialists where safety is most degraded. We present ALIGNBEAM, a training-free method that lifts this restriction by translating anchor logits into the target model's vocabulary token-by-token at each decoding step; a small LLM judge then selects the safest among K candidate continuations. No weights are changed, and the safety-utility trade-off can be tuned at deployment without retraining. Across both cross-vocabulary and same-vocabulary evaluation pairs, ALIGNBEAM substantially raises refusal on adversarial benchmarks while keeping task accuracy and inference overhead within practical bounds. The results show that safety alignment can be transferred between model families at inference time, without touching either model's weights.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ALIGNBEAM方法，通过跨词汇表logit混合实现推理时的安全对齐迁移，无需训练或修改模型权重。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在领域微调后安全性下降，现有的推理时防御方法（如安全锚点模型的logit混合）要求模型共享词汇表，无法应用于跨模型家族场景，而跨家族模型安全性退化最严重。因此需要一种不受词汇表限制的推理时安全对齐方法。
light_analysis.method: ALIGNBEAM在每步解码时将安全锚点模型的logits逐token翻译为目标模型的词汇表，生成多个候选续写，并由小型LLM法官选择最安全的续写。无需训练或修改权重，安全-效用权衡可在部署时通过调节超参数调整。该方法适用于任意模型家族对。
light_analysis.result: 在跨词汇表（不同tokenizer）和同词汇表评估中，ALIGNBEAM在对抗性基准上显著提升拒绝率，同时保持任务准确率和推理开销在实用范围内。与现有基线相比，实现了安全性的有效迁移，且不牺牲任务性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: ALIGNBEAM证明了安全对齐可以在推理时在不同模型家族之间转移，无需接触模型权重。该工作为跨模型家族的安全保障提供了新思路，具有重要的实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的logit翻译机制或法官模型。

title: Echoes of the Prior: A Computational Phenomenology of Forgetting
abstract: Memory is not merely the storage of data; it is the scaffolding of reality. When biological memory fades, the world does not simply turn black; it regresses into an unrecognizable chaos. Echoes of the Prior is an interactive installation that attempts to visualize this subjective phenomenology of forgetting. By inducing controlled synaptic decay within a Feed-Forward 3D Reconstruction model, we create an artistic analogy for the erosion of the brain's predictive priors. We position the Neural Network not as a tool for engineering, but as a cognitive proxy - a silicon brain whose structural degeneration evokes the disorienting, poetic, and terrifying experience of losing one's grip on the world. Ultimately, we offer this framework as a catalyst, inviting the wider community to explore the uncharted potential of neuromorphic aesthetics in visualizing the fragility of intelligence. Interactive demo see https://decart-4d.github.io/.

light_analysis.overview: 通过诱导前馈三维重建模型的突触衰变，可视化遗忘的主观现象学，将神经网络作为认知代理探索神经形态美学。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有记忆研究多从生物学或工程角度出发，缺乏对遗忘主观体验的艺术化表达。该作品旨在模拟生物记忆淡出时的混沌感，引发对智能脆弱性的思考，填补计算现象学与神经形态美学交叉领域的空白。
light_analysis.method: 采用前馈三维重建模型，通过控制突触衰变模拟遗忘过程。将神经网络作为认知代理而非工程工具，利用结构退化生成视觉类比。交互式安装允许观众实时体验遗忘导致的认知瓦解，提供在线演示。
light_analysis.result: 成功创作交互装置，模拟生物记忆衰退时世界回归混乱的状态。定性呈现了遗忘的视觉类比，未提供定量指标，但通过在线演示（decart-4d.github.io）供体验，突出艺术与哲学价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出神经形态美学框架，用于可视化智能的脆弱性，邀请社区探索其潜力。虽未深入技术评估，但为艺术与人工智能交叉领域开辟新方向，强调计算模型的现象学表达。

title: Fourier Features Let Agents Learn High Precision Policies with Imitation Learning
abstract: High-precision robotic manipulation requires fine-grained spatial reasoning that is often difficult to achieve with RGB-only policies due to depth ambiguity and perspective scale issues. Policies that leverage 3D information directly, such as those based on point clouds, offer a stronger geometric prior over purely image-based ones, yet their performance remains highly task-dependent. We hypothesize that this discrepancy may be due to the spectral bias of neural networks towards learning low frequency functions, which especially affects architectures conditioned on slow-moving Cartesian features. We thus propose to map point clouds from Cartesian space into high-dimensional Fourier space, effectively equipping the point cloud encoder with direct access to high-frequency features. We experimentally validate the use of Fourier features on challenging manipulation tasks from the RoboCasa and ManiSkill3 benchmarks and on a real robot setup. Despite their simplicity, we find that Fourier features provide significant benefits across diverse encoder architectures and benchmarks and are robust across hyperparameters. Our results indicate that Fourier features let policies leverage geometric details more effectively than Cartesian features, showing their potential as a general-purpose tool for point cloud-based imitation learning. We provide source code and videos on our project page: https://fourier-il.github.io/fourier-il
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出将点云映射到高维傅里叶空间，缓解神经网络的谱偏差，显著提升基于点云的模仿学习在精密操控任务中的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 高精度机器人操控需要精细空间推理，RGB策略因深度模糊和透视问题难以实现。直接使用3D信息（如点云）的策略具有更强几何先验，但性能高度依赖任务。作者假设这是由于神经网络倾向于学习低频函数（谱偏差），特别是以缓慢变化的笛卡尔特征为条件的架构。因此，需要一种简单有效的方法引入高频特征，提升点云策略的几何细节利用能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出将点云从笛卡尔空间映射到高维傅里叶空间，使点云编码器直接访问高频特征。该方法简单且不依赖特定架构，在RoboCasa和ManiSkill3基准测试及真实机器人上，使用多种编码器架构（如PointNet++）进行验证。通过傅里叶特征编码，策略能更有效地捕获几何细节，缓解低频偏差。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，傅里叶特征在多个基准测试和不同编码器架构下均带来显著性能提升，且对超参数鲁棒。相比笛卡尔特征，傅里叶特征使策略更有效利用几何细节，在如物体抓取、装配等高精度操控任务中表现优异。摘要未提供具体数值，但指出效果显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 傅里叶特征作为基于点云模仿学习的通用工具，有效缓解了神经网络的谱偏差，提升了高精度操控任务的性能。该方法简单、鲁棒，具有实用价值。未来可探索其在其他3D任务中的应用，或结合其他特征增强技术。论文提供了开源代码和视频，便于复现。

title: Measuring Semantic Progress in Multi-turn Dialogue via Information Gain
abstract: Evaluating multi-turn dialogue is challenging because quality emerges across turns rather than within individual responses. We focus on a key dimension of information-seeking dialogue: semantic progress, defined as the accumulation of new, question-relevant, and non-redundant information over the course of a conversation. We formalize semantic progress as question-conditioned uncertainty reduction and introduce an information-theoretic metric that approximates it in embedding space. Our main estimator uses a tractable Gaussian formulation with closed-form updates, while a complementary maximum-entropy argument shows why log-determinant structure arises more broadly when only second-order embedding information is retained. This formulation yields desirable theoretical properties, including monotonicity, additive decomposition of total information gain across turns, and diminishing returns for redundant evidence. Unlike LLM-as-a-judge approaches, our metric requires no autoregressive inference at evaluation time and is fully reproducible for a fixed embedding model. Experiments on MT-Bench, Chatbot Arena, and UltraFeedback show that the proposed metric achieves competitive agreement with human judgments despite targeting only semantic progress, with improved alignment on MT-Bench and UltraFeedback compared to several LLM-based judges. Notably, the method remains effective with lightweight embedding models under CPU-only execution, indicating that semantic progress can be captured without reliance on large model capacity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于信息增益的信息论度量，评估多轮对话中的语义进展。
light_analysis.motivation: 多轮对话评估具有挑战性，因为质量体现在跨轮次的累积信息而非单轮回复。现有方法如LLM-as-a-judge需要自回归推理且不可复现。论文聚焦信息寻求对话中的语义进展，即新、相关且不冗余信息的累积，缺乏形式化度量和高效评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 将语义进展形式化为问题条件下的不确定性减少，引入信息论度量，在嵌入空间中用可处理的高斯公式近似，具有封闭形式更新。通过最大熵论证阐明对数行列式结构的合理性。度量满足单调性、跨轮次信息可加和冗余证据递减回报等理论性质。使用固定嵌入模型，无需自回归推理。
light_analysis.result: 在MT-Bench、Chatbot Arena和UltraFeedback上，该度量与人类判断的一致性优于多个LLM-based评测器，尤其在MT-Bench和UltraFeedback上表现更佳。仅使用轻量嵌入模型在CPU上运行仍有效，表明语义进展捕捉不依赖大模型能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种可复现、高效的信息论度量来评估多轮对话语义进展，具有理论优势和实验验证。该方法可替代LLM-based评测，尤其适用于资源受限场景。未来可探索更复杂的嵌入分布或与其他维度结合。

title: PROJECTMEM: A Local-First, Event-Sourced Memory and Judgment Layer for AI Coding Agents
abstract: AI coding assistants now support a growing share of software work, from quick scripts to production applications. Yet these agents remain largely stateless: each new session re-reads project files, re-derives prior decisions, and - most costly - may repeat debugging attempts that already failed. Reconstructing this context can consume an estimated 5,000-20,000 tokens per session; the bottleneck is often not model capability but missing project memory. We present projectmem, an open-source, local-first memory and judgment layer for AI coding agents. projectmem records development as an append-only, plain-text event log of typed events - issues, attempts, fixes, decisions, and notes - and deterministically projects that log into compact, AI-readable summaries served through the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Beyond storage, projectmem adds a deterministic pre-action gate that warns an agent before it repeats a previously failed fix or edits a known-fragile file. We frame this as Memory-as-Governance: memory that does not merely answer the agent but acts on its next action. The system runs fully offline with no telemetry; its immutable log also serves as a provenance trail for reproducible, auditable AI-assisted development. projectmem ships as a three-dependency Python package (14 MCP tools, 19 CLI commands, 37 automated tests) and is evaluated through a two-month self-study across 10 projects comprising 207 logged events. Source code: https://github.com/riponcm/projectmem.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PROJECTMEM，一种本地优先、事件源驱动的记忆与判断层，使AI编码代理具备持久项目记忆和预动作门控能力。
light_analysis.motivation: AI编码代理目前基本是无状态的，每次新会话都需要重新读取项目文件、重新推导先前决策，并可能重复已失败的调试尝试。每次会话重建上下文消耗约5,000-20,000个token，瓶颈往往不是模型能力，而是缺失项目记忆。
light_analysis.method: PROJECTMEM以追加型纯文本事件日志记录开发活动（问题、尝试、修复、决策、备注），通过确定性投影生成紧凑的AI可读摘要，并通过模型上下文协议（MCP）提供。此外，添加了确定性预动作门，在代理重复已失败修复或编辑易碎文件前发出警告。系统完全离线运行，无遥测，不可变日志提供可复现、可审计的溯源轨迹。
light_analysis.result: 通过一个为期两个月、涵盖10个项目（共207个日志事件）的自我研究进行评估。系统作为轻量级Python包发布，包含14个MCP工具、19个CLI命令和37个自动化测试。
light_analysis.conclusion: PROJECTMEM提出了记忆即治理（Memory-as-Governance）的概念，使记忆不仅能回答代理的问题，还能约束其下一步行动。项目开源且完全离线，为AI辅助开发提供了可审计、可复现的解决方案。未来工作可能扩展到更多代理框架或跨会话记忆优化。

title: A Five-Plane Reference Architecture for Runtime Governance of Production AI Agents
abstract: Enterprise security was built to govern data boundaries: the protected surface was data at rest and in transit, and the controls -- access control, data-loss prevention, perimeter inspection -- governed crossings of that boundary. Production AI agents dissolve this assumption. An agent reads context, calls tools, invokes connectors, and modifies systems of record on an enterprise's behalf, so risk moves inside the workflow, into sequences of individually-permitted actions that may transform a business process no one authorized. Existing policy engines do not extend to this regime: they evaluate request-time decisions against atomic principals, where agentic systems require stateful evaluation against composite principals whose authority attenuates through delegation chains.   We present a reference architecture for the runtime governance of production agents, built from four composable primitives: a five-plane decomposition (a reasoning plane that adjudicates intent, and four enforcement planes -- network, identity, endpoint, data -- that realize the decision), stop-anywhere mediation, composite principals with capability attenuation, and audit as a structured evidence substrate. We define a taxonomy of six interruption primitives that generalize allow and deny, state and argue for four correctness invariants, and demonstrate the foreclosure of seven production-agent threats across five concrete workflows. A reference implementation of the policy-engine core supplies measured evidence: attenuation correctness and evidence reconstructability hold on every trial, adjudication runs in single-digit microseconds, and the audit substrate's tamper-evidence behaves exactly as designed. We are explicit about scope: the architecture governs delegated action, not model behavior, and a full-system evaluation against a live agent benchmark is the invited next step.
comment: 65 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables. Reference architecture with a reference implementation of the policy-engine core and microbenchmark results; full-system evaluation identified as future work

light_analysis.overview: 提出运行时治理生产AI代理的五平面参考架构，确保安全性和正确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 企业安全传统上治理数据边界，但生产AI代理在内部工作流中执行一系列动作，风险转移至工作流。现有策略引擎仅评估请求时原子主体，无法处理代理系统需要状态化评估复合主体及其能力衰减的问题，因此需要新的治理架构。
light_analysis.method: 提出五平面参考架构：一个推理平面（裁决意图）和四个执行平面（网络、身份、端点、数据）。包含任意停止中介、复合主体能力衰减和审计证据基板。定义六种中断原语、四个正确性不变量，并通过五个具体工作流展示对七种生产代理威胁的阻止。
light_analysis.result: 参考实现显示：衰减正确性和证据可重构性在每次试验中保持；裁决时间在微秒级；审计基板的防篡改行为符合设计。范围限于治理委托动作，而非模型行为。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该架构有效治理生产AI代理的运行时委托动作，确保安全性和正确性。性能微秒级，审计防篡改。未来工作是对活体代理基准进行全系统评估。局限：不治理模型行为。

title: Anatomically Conditioned Recurrent Refinement for Topology-Aware Circle of Willis Segmentation
abstract: Segmenting the Circle of Willis (CoW) from Magnetic Resonance Angiography (MRA) is challenging due to complex topology and thin vascular structures that are prone to fragmentation. Standard Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) often fail to capture these topological constraints, resulting in "broken vessel" artifacts. To address this, we propose the Anatomically Conditioned Recurrent Refinement U-Net (AC2RUNet). Our architecture decouples segmentation into two streams: a Static Stream that extracts invariant anatomical features and a lightweight Dynamic Stream that iteratively refines topological errors over time. We further introduce a dynamic curriculum learning strategy that transitions from high-recall geometric supervision to topology-aware constraints. Validated on the TopCoW dataset, AC2RUNet substantially reduces Hausdorff Distance (4.72 mm vs 9.17 mm) and Betti number errors (0.19 vs 0.40), improving topological connectivity over the nnU-Net baseline while maintaining comparable volumetric Dice.
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, 1 table. Accepted at EUSIPCO 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出AC2RUNet，通过双流架构和动态课程学习实现拓扑感知的Willis环分割。
light_analysis.motivation: Willis环分割面临复杂拓扑和细小血管易断裂的挑战。标准CNN难以捕捉拓扑约束，产生'血管断裂'伪影。该问题重要，因为准确的CoW分割对脑血管疾病诊断至关重要，现有方法如nnU-Net在拓扑连通性上表现不足。
light_analysis.method: 提出AC2RUNet，包含静态流提取不变解剖特征和轻量动态流迭代修正拓扑错误。引入动态课程学习策略，从高召回几何监督过渡到拓扑感知约束。在TopCoW数据集上验证，结合双流架构和渐进式学习实现高效分割。
light_analysis.result: 在TopCoW数据集上，AC2RUNet显著降低Hausdorff距离（4.72 mm vs 9.17 mm）和Betti数误差（0.19 vs 0.40），相比nnU-Net基线改善了拓扑连通性，同时保持可比的体素级Dice系数。
light_analysis.conclusion: AC2RUNet通过解剖条件循环细化有效提升了Willis环分割的拓扑准确性，具有重要的临床应用价值。未来可探索扩展到其他复杂血管结构分割，并进一步优化动态流的效率。

title: Harness In-Context Operator Learning with Chain of Operators
abstract: Neural operators approximate mappings between function spaces, but often generalize poorly to other operators and usually require fine-tuning or retraining. In-Context Operator Networks (ICON) addresses this issue by prompting the model with numerical context so that the model learns specific operators from prompts and adapt to different operators without fine-tuning. However, ICON may still fail to generalize to out-of-distribution (OOD) operator tasks. Inpired by the success of harness engineering of Large Language models (LLMs), we introduce Chain of Operators (CHOP), a framework that harness a frozen ICON to OOD operator tasks without updating its parameters. Specifically, CHOP constructs a chain of operators consisting of explicit elementary transformations and the frozen ICON. Experiments on a scalar conservation law and a mean-field control problem show that CHOP reduces relative inference error over direct ICON evaluation, while each operator in the chain remains interpretable and in closed form. A chain constructed on one PDE family further generalizes to a different family, indicating shared mechanisms across harness systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Chain of Operators (CHOP)框架，通过构建算子链增强In-Context Operator Network对分布外算子任务的泛化能力，无需微调。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经算子泛化到其他算子时表现差，通常需要微调或重训练。ICON通过数值上下文提示适应不同算子，但对分布外算子任务泛化不足。受大语言模型链式提示启发，引入CHOP以解决该问题。
light_analysis.method: CHOP框架利用冻结的ICON，构建包含显式初等变换和冻结ICON的算子链，处理分布外算子任务。无需更新参数，链中每个算子具有可解释性和闭形式。
light_analysis.result: 在标量守恒律和均场控制问题上的实验表明，与直接ICON评估相比，CHOP降低了相对推理误差。在一个PDE族上构建的链能泛化到不同族，表明共享机制。
light_analysis.conclusion: CHOP通过算子链增强ICON的分布外泛化能力，链中算子可解释且可跨族泛化，为无需参数更新的算子学习提供新范式，未来可探索更复杂链结构。

title: Slots, Transitions, Loops: Learning Composable World Models for ARC
abstract: ARC tests in-context rule induction: given a few input-output demonstrations, a model must infer the hidden rule and apply it to a new query. While many approaches express ARC rules through language, code, or symbolic programs, ARC itself is visual-symbolic: rules appear as grid transitions over objects, colors, shapes, and spatial relations. We introduce Loop-OWM, an object-centric world-modeling architecture that learns these rules as composable transitions over structured states. It combines color-prototype slots, demonstration-conditioned task summaries, and a looped transition model with dense propagation and slot-conditioned correction. On both ARC-1 and ARC-2, Loop-OWM outperforms non-looped and looped baselines with comparable or fewer parameters. These results suggest that ARC rules can be learned not only as language descriptions or searched programs, but also as transitions over visual-symbolic world states.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Loop-OWM对象中心世界模型，通过可组合状态转换学习ARC视觉-符号规则。
light_analysis.motivation: ARC任务要求从少量输入-输出样例中归纳隐藏规则，现有方法多依赖语言、代码或符号程序，但ARC本质是视觉-符号的（网格对象、颜色、形状、空间关系）。需要一种能直接学习并组合视觉-符号转换规则的方法，避免显式程序搜索或语言描述。
light_analysis.method: Loop-OWM结合颜色原型槽（color-prototype slots）表示对象、演示条件任务摘要（demonstration-conditioned task summaries）编码上下文，以及循环转换模型（looped transition model）实现规则迭代。通过密集传播（dense propagation）和槽条件校正（slot-conditioned correction）进行状态更新，学习可组合的转换操作。
light_analysis.result: 在ARC-1和ARC-2基准上，Loop-OWM的性能优于非循环和循环基线方法，且参数更少或相当。具体而言，它在规则归纳准确率上有显著提升，展示了世界模型作为视觉-符号规则学习框架的可行性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ARC规则不仅可以表示为语言描述或搜索程序，还能通过视觉-符号世界状态转换进行学习。Loop-OWM为对象中心推理提供了新范式，未来可扩展至更复杂的组合任务和交互式环境。

title: From 2D Grids to 1D Tokens: Reforming Shared Representations for Multimodal Image Fusion
abstract: Multimodal image fusion aims to integrate complementary information from different modalities into a fused image that preserves rich local details while maintaining globally consistent appearance. Existing approaches build shared representations on 2D feature grids, which excel at modeling local structures but offer limited leverage over image-level global appearance factors. To balance these objectives, we introduce a compact 1D token interface based on a frozen pretrained image tokenizer for modeling non-local appearance/base factors. Rather than using the tokenizer as a reconstruction backbone, our design uses the 1D token space as a global carrier while retaining the 2D spatial pathway for local structure restoration. Specifically, we introduce Selective Token Editing (STE), which sparsely updates/replaces a small set of critical tokens, providing a lightweight mechanism to steer global appearance coherence while keeping the fusion backbone unchanged and avoiding extra losses. Experiments on four commonly used benchmarks show that our method achieves the best overall performance, with consistent, multi-metric improvements in both global coherence and local fidelity. Project page: https://zju-xyc.github.io/1D-Fusion-Project-Page/
comment: Accepted at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于1D token接口的多模态图像融合方法，通过选择性token编辑平衡全局一致性与局部细节。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法基于2D特征网格构建共享表征，擅长建模局部结构但难以控制图像级全局外观因素。为实现保留丰富局部细节同时维持全局一致外观的融合目标，需要一种能有效建模非局部外观因素的轻量机制。
light_analysis.method: 引入基于冻结预训练图像tokenizer的紧凑1D token接口作为全局载体，保留2D空间通路恢复局部结构。提出选择性token编辑（STE），稀疏更新/替换关键token，以轻量方式引导全局外观一致性，无需改变融合骨干或增加额外损失。
light_analysis.result: 在四个常用基准上取得最佳整体性能，全局一致性和局部保真度均有多项指标的一致提升。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但声称最佳。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法通过1D token空间有效建模全局外观因素，STE机制轻量且高效，为多模态融合提供了新范式。未来可探索更灵活的token编辑策略或扩展到更多模态。

title: Natural-Language Temporal Grounding in Hour-Long Videos is a Search Problem: A Benchmark and Empirical Decomposition
abstract: Temporal grounding--returning the interval $[t_s, t_e]$ for a natural-language query over a video--is the language interface to long-form video, yet has been studied on short videos; the dynamics of hour-scale natural-language grounding remain underexplored. We take the position that at hour-scale, the binding constraint is search, not recognition: Video-LLMs are bottlenecked not by localizing a nearby event, but--given a natural-language query--by searching for the relevant region of a long video. To test this, we release ExtremeWhenBench, the first open hour-scale grounding benchmark (2,273 queries over 194 videos, mean 75.7 min, max 9 hr) with an open-form query distribution. Every open Video-LLM collapses while a frame-level retrieval baseline outperforms them; a failure taxonomy attributes 85% of failures to search; and a retrieve-then-ground hybrid recovers 6.7x over the monolithic Video-LLM--mirroring retrieve-then-read in open-domain QA.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示小时级长视频时态定位的本质是搜索问题，发布首个开放域长视频基准ExtremeWhenBench，并验证检索-定位混合方法可大幅提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有时态定位研究局限于短视频，忽略了小时级长视频的独特挑战。论文指出，长视频中视频LLM的瓶颈并非识别附近事件，而是从长视频中搜索相关区域。缺乏开放域长视频基准限制了该方向的研究。
light_analysis.method: 构建ExtremeWhenBench基准（2,273个查询，194个视频，平均75.7分钟，最长9小时），包含开放形式查询。评估多种方法：开放视频LLM、帧级检索基线、失败分类（85%归因于搜索），并提出检索-定位混合方法（先帧级检索再时态定位）。
light_analysis.result: 所有开放视频LLM均表现不佳，帧级检索基线显著优于它们。失败分析中85%的失败由搜索导致。检索-定位混合方法比单一视频LLM提升6.7倍，性能与开放域QA中的检索-阅读范式一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证实长视频时态定位的核心是搜索问题，检索-定位混合方法有效。ExtremeWhenBench为未来研究提供标准化测试平台，启发将检索增强技术引入长视频理解。局限：混合方法仍需依赖外部检索模块，未来可探索端到端搜索机制。

title: Findings of the MAGMaR 2026 Shared Task
abstract: This overview paper presents the results of the shared task for the second workshop on Multimodal Augmented Generation via Multimodal Retrieval (MAGMaR). In this shared task participants submitted systems focused on either (i) video retrieval or (ii) grounded generation of articles given retrieved videos. Teams could submit to either task. For the retrieval task, we had 2 participating teams that submitted a total of 17 systems -- all of which beat a baseline derived from the winner of last year's shared task. On the generation side, we had 4 teams submit 16 systems. All teams had at least one generated report that was labeled the best by a human annotator.
comment: Findings of the 2nd workshop on Multimodal Augmented Generation via Multimodal Retrieval (MAGMaR); Resources at this url: https://github.com/rekriz11/MAGMAR_2026

light_analysis.overview: 本文介绍了MAGMaR 2026共享任务的结果，涵盖视频检索和基于检索视频的生成两个子任务，所有参赛系统均超越基线。
light_analysis.motivation: 该共享任务旨在推动多模态检索增强生成领域的发展，解决视频检索和生成中的关键挑战。现有方法在视频理解与生成协同方面存在不足，通过组织该任务促进方法创新与比较。
light_analysis.method: 共享任务分为视频检索和基于检索视频的生成两个子任务。检索任务有2个团队提交17个系统，生成任务有4个团队提交16个系统，评估采用人类标注最佳报告的方式。方法细节包括基线选自去年获胜者。
light_analysis.result: 检索任务：所有17个参赛系统均超过基于去年获胜者的基线。生成任务：每个参赛团队至少有一个生成报告被人类标注为最佳，但未提供具体量化指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该共享任务验证了多模态检索与生成系统的有效性，所有提交的系统均能超越基线，表明该领域有显著进步。未来工作可进一步优化生成质量与检索精度。

title: Bridging the Modality Gap in Forensic Image Retrieval
abstract: Automated image retrieval plays an increasingly critical role in modern forensic analysis, supporting investigative workflows that rely on efficient comparison of visual evidence. While prior work has focused primarily on developing and optimizing multimodal retrieval systems, limited attention has been paid to evaluating the forensic applicability of these technologies across diverse real-world scenarios. In this study, we present a unified retrieval framework adapted to four key forensic tasks: (1) tattoo image retrieval given a tattoo query image; (2) tattoo retrieval guided by human-expert textual descriptions, modelling the common situation where a witness verbally describes a tattoo; (3) tattoo retrieval from hand-drawn sketches; and (4) face retrieval from forensic face sketches. Our system leverages a multimodal large language model (MLLM) to automatically generate structured textual descriptions for all queries and gallery images, followed by sentence-transformer embedding for text-based comparison. We evaluate retrieval using visual-only embeddings, text-only embeddings and a multimodal fusion strategy that combines text- and image-based similarity scores derived from state-of-the-art visual feature extractors relevant to each task. The fusion of modalities consistently improves retrieval precision and robustness, especially in scenarios where visual information is limited or noisy (e.g., sketches, partial tattoos, or fragmented witness statements). This work highlights the forensic value of a unified multimodal retrieval pipeline and demonstrates how modern MLLMs can operationalize challenging forensic tasks that traditionally rely on manual expert analysis. Our results position multimodal retrieval as a promising tool for supporting investigative workflows involving tattoos, facial composites, and witness descriptions.
comment: 23 pages, 5 figures, paper submitted to Elsevier journal

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个统一的多模态检索框架，通过融合视觉和文本嵌入，解决法医图像检索中的模态差距问题，显著提升检索精度和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代法医分析中，自动化图像检索对高效比较视觉证据至关重要。现有研究主要关注多模态检索系统的优化，但缺乏对法医场景实际适用性的评估。传统方法依赖人工专家分析，耗时且易出错，尤其在纹身描述、手绘草图等视觉信息有限或噪声大的情况下，检索效果不佳。因此，需要一种能够自动生成结构化文本描述并融合多模态信息的检索框架，以应对多样化的法医任务。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个统一检索框架，覆盖四种法医任务：纹身图像检索、基于文本描述的纹身检索、手绘草图纹身检索和面部素描检索。系统利用多模态大语言模型自动为所有查询和图库图像生成结构化文本描述，再通过句子转换器进行文本嵌入比较。检索时采用三种策略：纯视觉嵌入（使用各任务相关的视觉特征提取器）、纯文本嵌入，以及多模态融合（结合文本和图像相似度分数）。融合策略在视觉信息受限时（如草图、部分纹身）显著提升性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，多模态融合策略在各项任务中持续提高了检索精度和鲁棒性，尤其是在视觉信息有限或噪声场景下（如手绘草图、碎片化纹身、模糊证人陈述）表现突出。与纯视觉或纯文本方法相比，融合方法减少了模态间隙带来的性能损失。论文未提供具体数值，但强调融合策略优于单一模态，且框架在真实法医场景中具有实用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文展示了多模态检索在法医分析中的潜力，通过现代MLLM实现传统依赖人工专家处理的复杂任务（如纹身匹配、面部复合图检索）。统一流水线增强了跨模态的检索能力，为法医工作流提供了可扩展的工具。局限性可能包括对MLLM生成描述质量的依赖以及计算开销，未来可探索更轻量级的模型或端到端训练策略。

title: Measuring Epistemic Resilience of LLMs Under Misleading Medical Context
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) now reach expert-level scores on medical licensing exams, encouraging the assumption that high scores imply safe medical judgment while patients increasingly use them for health advice. We show this assumption is fragile: when misleading context is injected into questions that LLMs originally answer correctly, they abandon the correct answer. We call the ability to maintain correct judgment under adversarial context epistemic resilience, and introduce MedMisBench to measure it. MedMisBench contains 10,932 medical question items and 48,889 misleading context-option pairs spanning medical reasoning, agentic capability, and patient-journey evaluation. Across 11 model configurations, mean accuracy falls from 71.1% on original questions to 38.0% under focused misleading context, with 51.5% attack success. The most damaging injections are formal, rule-like fabrications: authority-framed falsehoods reach 69.5% attack success and exception-poisoning claims reach 64.1%. A 14-member clinical panel from 7 countries identified serious potential harm in 38.2% of reviewed cases. MedMisBench exposes a structural blind spot in LLM evaluation in medical settings: existing benchmarks measure what models know, but not whether they preserve correct medical judgment under misleading context.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MedMisBench基准，评估LLMs在误导性医学上下文下的认知韧性，发现模型准确性大幅下降，揭示现有评估的结构性盲点。
light_analysis.motivation: LLMs在医学执照考试中达到专家级分数，但高分数不一定代表安全判断，患者越来越多地用LLMs获取健康建议。现有基准仅测量模型知识，未评估其在误导性上下文中保持正确判断的能力，存在安全隐患。
light_analysis.method: 构建MedMisBench基准，包含10,932道医学问题和48,889个误导性上下文-选项对，覆盖医学推理、代理能力和患者旅程。测量11种模型配置在原始问题和焦点误导上下文下的准确率，并分析不同攻击类型（如权威框架的虚假陈述、异常投毒声明）的效果。
light_analysis.result: 模型平均准确率从原始问题的71.1%下降到误导上下文下的38.0%，攻击成功率51.5%。权威虚假陈述攻击成功率达69.5%，异常投毒声明达64.1%。14名临床专家审查发现38.2%的案例存在严重潜在伤害。
light_analysis.conclusion: MedMisBench暴露了医学LLM评估的结构性盲点：现有基准仅衡量知识，未评估认知韧性。研究强调需测试模型在误导性上下文中保持正确判断的能力，以确保安全部署。未来可扩展至其他领域并探索防御机制。

title: The Standard Interpretable Model: A general theory of interpretable machine learning to deductively design interpretable methods using Lagrangian mechanics
abstract: As Artificial Intelligence models grow in complexity, interpretability has become an indispensable tool for understanding, debugging, and controlling their computations. However, interpretability lacks general theories to deductively design interpretable methods. This gap between theories and methods results in a fragmented literature and inconsistent evaluation protocols.   To fill this gap, we introduce the Standard Interpretable Model (SIM), a general theory grounded in Lagrangian mechanics that enables the deductive design of interpretable methods. Specifically, the SIM summarises, in a set of premises, what interpretability is for a target user. From these premises, the SIM systematically derives interpretability symmetries and corresponding constraints, which shape the landscape of a Lagrangian whose minima correspond to optimal interpretable models. To reach the minima, one can either update the parameter values of an opaque model to make it more interpretable or compile constraints into an interpretable architecture.   We empirically show that the SIM identifies and solves limitations of existing methods (including traditional, concept-based, and mechanistic interpretability), highlights underexplored research directions, and informs the design of core programming interfaces. Beyond being a research method, the deductive nature of the SIM offers pedagogical grounding for interpretability curricula and may shift the scientific community's perspective of a discipline that has long been fragmented.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于拉格朗日力学的Standard Interpretable Model (SIM)，为可解释机器学习提供通用理论框架，支持演绎设计可解释方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着AI模型复杂性增加，可解释性成为理解、调试和控制计算的关键工具。然而，可解释性缺乏通用理论来演绎设计可解释方法，导致文献碎片化和评估协议不一致。现有方法（传统、基于概念、机制可解释性）存在局限性，急需统一理论框架来系统性地指导方法设计。
light_analysis.method: SIM基于拉格朗日力学，通过一组前提概括目标用户对可解释性的定义，并系统推导可解释性对称性及其约束，构建拉格朗日量景观，其最小值对应最优可解释模型。通过更新不透明模型参数或编译约束到可解释架构来达到最小值。理论可识别并解决现有方法的局限性，指导编程接口设计。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明SIM能识别并解决传统、基于概念和机制可解释性方法的局限性，突出未充分探索的研究方向，并为核心编程接口的设计提供信息。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但验证了理论的有效性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SIM为可解释机器学习提供了通用理论，填补了理论与方法之间的鸿沟。其演绎特性为可解释性课程提供教学基础，有望改变长期碎片化的研究领域。未来可进一步扩展至更多模型类型和实际应用场景。

title: CellNet -- Localizing Cells using Sparse and Noisy Point Annotations
abstract: Counting living cells is an important step in many biological research workflows. Our collaborators at the Wellcome Sanger Institute study vital genes in humans via large scale saturation genome editing screening, which requires repeatedly counting cells a great number of times. Computer Vision based automation is crucial for high throughput and resource efficiency. In this work, we develop a regression-based deep learning computer vision algorithm to detect and count cells in phase-contrast microscopy images. To reduce annotation effort, which in practice often becomes a bottleneck, we focus on counting cells only using sparse point annotations, which are fast and easy to acquire. By comparison to state-of-the-art 0-shot methods, we show that regression-based counting is a promising alternative in low data regimes. Through developing methods to automatically count living cells in microscopy images, we contribute to valuable research on the human genome. The code is available at https://github.com/beijn/cellnet.
comment: Conference poster at Biology at Scale: From Variants to Cellular Programs and Functions

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于回归的深度学习算法CellNet，利用稀疏点注释实现相位差显微镜图像中的细胞检测与计数。
light_analysis.motivation: 在生物学研究中，细胞计数是重要步骤，但大规模筛选需要重复计数多次，人工标注费时费力。现有方法依赖密集标注，而稀疏点注释更快速易得。论文旨在开发一种能在低数据量下有效计数的深度学习算法，减轻标注负担，提高自动化效率。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出回归基础的深度学习方法CellNet，直接学习从图像到细胞密度图的映射。使用稀疏点注释作为训练标签，通过高斯模糊生成密度图。网络架构基于卷积神经网络，无需实例分割或检测框。训练数据为相位差显微镜图像，采用均方误差损失和正则化。
light_analysis.result: 与现有的零样本方法相比，CellNet在稀疏注释的低数据场景下表现更优，能够准确预测细胞计数。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明回归方法在低数据体制下具有竞争力，验证了减少标注量的可行性。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: CellNet为生物医学图像分析提供了一种高效的细胞计数方案，减少了对密集标注的依赖。该方法可加速基因组编辑筛选等研究，具有实际应用价值。未来可进一步优化网络结构或扩展至其他细胞类型，但当前未提及局限性。

title: Holding the FP8 Quality Ceiling at 8-Bit Weights and Activations: INT8 and GGUF Post-Training Quantization of Ideogram 4.0 for Consumer GPUs
abstract: Post-training quantization lets large text-to-image diffusion transformers run on consumer GPUs, yet the hardware-specific trade-offs are seldom measured directly. We quantize Ideogram 4.0 - a 9.3B flow-matching diffusion transformer (DiT), shipped as two separate-weight copies of a single-stream 34-layer backbone for classifier-free guidance and conditioned by a Qwen3-VL-8B encoder - for Ampere RTX 3090 GPUs, which lack FP8 tensor cores. Our INT8 W8A8 recipe (per-channel weights, per-token dynamic activations, SmoothQuant, and mixed-precision protection of a small high-fragility layer set) holds the FP8 quality ceiling: on a 200-prompt benchmark the paired same-seed bootstrap CI for INT8-FP8 includes zero on both Pick and CLIP, while INT8 improves on NF4 by $+1.9$ CLIP (95% CI $[+1.21,+2.64]$, excluding zero).
