A per-category OCR analysis, to our knowledge unreported for this model class, confirms text legibility is preserved, and an ablation isolates protection of the FFN down-projections as the dominant quality lever. Our GGUF Q4_K quantization beats NF4 at equal on-disk size and is the Pareto winner on the quality-memory frontier, with paired confidence intervals excluding zero (Q8_0 is quality neutral). Finally, we characterize where 8-bit quantization helps and where it does not: INT8's weights match FP8's footprint rather than shrink it, so a speed gain on Ampere awaits a fused INT8 kernel.

light_analysis.overview: 本文研究了在缺乏FP8张量核心的Ampere GPU上对Ideogram 4.0进行INT8 W8A8量化，保持FP8质量水平，并提出了GGUF Q4_K量化方案，在质量-内存权衡上优于NF4。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型文本到图像扩散模型经后训练量化可在消费级GPU运行，但硬件特定的量化权衡缺乏直接测量。现有方法如FP8受限于硬件（Ampere无FP8张量核心），NF4虽适用但质量有限。本文旨在为Ideogram 4.0设计INT8和GGUF量化方案，在保持FP8质量的同时适配硬件，并全面评估OCR文本可读性等实际效果。
light_analysis.method: 采用INT8 W8A8量化方案：per-channel权重、per-token动态激活、SmoothQuant及混合精度保护一小部分高脆弱性层（如FFN下投影）。同时研究了GGUF Q4_K量化（4-bit）。在200提示基准上评估，使用CLIP和Pick分数，并进行消融实验和OCR分类分析。模型为9.3B流匹配扩散Transformer（DiT），含双权重副本和Qwen3-VL-8B编码器。
light_analysis.result: INT8在200提示基准上与FP8质量持平（配对bootstrap置信区间包含零），并显著优于NF4（CLIP提升+1.9，95% CI [+1.21,+2.64]）。GGUF Q4_K在同等磁盘大小下优于NF4，是质量-内存Pareto赢家（置信区间排除零）。OCR分析确认文本可读性保持。消融表明FFN下投影保护是质量关键。但INT8权重尺寸与FP8相同，速度提升需融合内核。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明INT8 W8A8量化在无FP8硬件的Ampere GPU上可达到FP8质量，为消费级部署提供了可行方案。GGUF Q4_K进一步优化了内存占用。研究贡献包括量化方法的设计、系统评估以及OCR分析。局限性在于INT8未缩小权重尺寸，速度提升依赖未来的融合内核实现。

title: Finding Sparse Subnetworks in One Training Cycle via Progressive Magnitude-Based Pruning
abstract: Neural network pruning reduces model size by removing less important parameters while aiming to preserve predictive performance. Although the Lottery Ticket Hypothesis (LTH) shows that sparse subnetworks can match dense networks when trained from suitable initializations, its iterative pruning procedure requires multiple complete training cycles. This work evaluates progressive magnitude-based pruning as a single-cycle alternative. The method gradually increases sparsity during training using a linear schedule and updates pruning masks based on active weight magnitudes. We conduct systematic experiments on CIFAR-10 and MNIST across ResNet, VGG-style, and LeNet architectures, comparing the proposed method with representative iterative and initialization-based pruning baselines, including LTH, SNIP, and GraSP. On CIFAR-10, the method achieves 95.12\% accuracy on ResNet-18 at 72.9\% sparsity, compared with 90.5\% reported for LTH. At extreme sparsity, it achieves 93.13\% accuracy on a VGG-like architecture at 97\% sparsity, compared with approximately 92.0\% for SNIP, and 93.44\% accuracy on VGG-19 at 97.97\% sparsity, compared with 92.19\% for GraSP at 98\% sparsity. A sparsity-accuracy analysis on ResNet-18 further shows that accuracy remains within 0.1 percentage points of the dense baseline across 70--85\% sparsity. These results indicate that progressive magnitude-based pruning provides an effective single-cycle approach for neural network sparsification under the evaluated settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出渐进幅度剪枝方法，在单个训练周期内实现稀疏子网络发现，作为迭代剪枝的高效替代方案。
light_analysis.motivation: 彩票假说（LTH）通过迭代剪枝可找到匹配稠密网络的稀疏子网络，但需多个完整训练周期，计算开销大。现有单周期方法性能不足，亟需一种高效且效果优异的单周期剪枝策略。
light_analysis.method: 采用线性调度逐步增加稀疏度，基于活跃权重的幅度实时更新剪枝掩码。在CIFAR-10和MNIST上对ResNet、VGG、LeNet架构进行系统实验，与LTH、SNIP、GraSP等基线对比。
light_analysis.result: CIFAR-10上ResNet-18在72.9%稀疏度下准确率95.12%，优于LTH的90.5%；VGG-like在97%稀疏度下准确率93.13%，优于SNIP的92.0%；VGG-19在97.97%稀疏度下准确率93.44%，优于GraSP的92.19%。70-85%稀疏度下准确率与稠密基线差距<0.1%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 渐进幅度剪枝在单训练周期内有效实现神经网络稀疏化，性能优于或匹配多周期方法，显著降低计算成本。未来可探索更优调度策略或与结构化剪枝结合。

title: Finding Multiple Interpretations in Datasets
abstract: In this paper, we propose an approach to finding sets of similar-performing models (in terms of loss/accuracy measurements) with highly different context-aware characteristics. Through experiments on the METABRIC dataset, we show that the proposed method finds multiple models with highly different gene expressions than those found by the control methodology without performance penalties. We argue that the proposed methodology is important whenever one aims to analyze any global characteristic of a model to extract insight into the underlying phenomenon being studied.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种方法，寻找性能相似但上下文特征高度不同的模型集合，以挖掘数据中的多重解释。
light_analysis.motivation: 在机器学习中，模型性能相似但内在特征可能截然不同，传统的单一模型分析可能忽略这种多样性，导致对潜在现象的片面理解。现有的方法往往只关注最优模型，缺乏对多解空间的探索。因此，需要一种方法能够发现这些不同的解释，以更全面地理解数据底层机制。
light_analysis.method: 该方法旨在从一组性能相近的模型中，筛选出具有高度不同上下文感知特征的模型。具体来说，通过比较模型在损失或精度上的性能，并引入度量模型特征差异的指标，如基因表达等，来识别多样化的模型。实验使用METABRIC癌症数据集，通过对比对照组方法，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在METABRIC数据集上，所提方法成功找到了多个性能与对照组相当但基因表达模式显著不同的模型。这些模型在保持相同预测精度的前提下，展现了高度差异化的全局特征，证明了方法的可行性且无性能损失。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为从模型中提取多样化的全局特征提供了新思路，有助于深入理解数据背后的复杂现象。未来可应用于其他领域，如生物信息学、社会科学等，探索模型多重解释的共同模式。

title: Beyond Fully Random Masking: Attention-Guided Denoising and Optimization for Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) offer an efficient alternative to autoregressive models through parallel decoding, yet existing post-training methods largely rely on random masking strategies that overlook intrinsic token dependencies. In this work, we present an empirical analysis of attention in dLLMs and show that tokens attending more strongly to unmasked context exhibit greater generation stability and play a critical role in reasoning. Motivated by these findings, we propose AGDO, an attention-guided denoising and optimization framework that aligns both training and optimization with attention-derived dependencies. AGDO determines the denoising order based on attention structure and emphasizes attention-critical tokens during supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning. Experiments on mathematical and coding benchmarks demonstrate that AGDO consistently improves reasoning performance, outperforming state-of-the-art post-training methods for dLLMs.
comment: 13 pages. Accepted to ACL 2026 Main Conference

light_analysis.overview: 提出注意力引导的去噪与优化框架（AGDO），通过利用注意力依赖性指导扩散语言模型的后训练，显著提升推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散大语言模型通过并行解码提供高效替代方案，但现有后训练方法多采用随机掩码策略，忽略了token间的内在依赖关系。经验分析表明，对未掩码上下文注意力更强的token具有更好的生成稳定性，且在推理中起关键作用，因此需要一种对齐注意力依赖的训练与优化方法。
light_analysis.method: AGDO框架包含两个关键部分：基于注意力结构确定去噪顺序，以及在监督微调和强化学习阶段强调注意力关键token。通过将训练和优化过程与注意力导出的依赖关系对齐，AGDO能够更有效地利用token间的结构性信息，提升模型对重要token的关注度。
light_analysis.result: 在数学和编码基准测试上，AGDO持续改进推理性能，超越了现有最先进的扩散语言模型后训练方法。具体效果包括在多个推理任务上的准确率提升，但摘要未给出精确数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: AGDO通过注意力引导策略有效解决了随机掩码的局限性，为扩散语言模型的后训练提供了新范式。其学术价值在于揭示了注意力依赖的重要性，实际应用可提升并行解码模型的推理能力。未来可探索更复杂的注意力度量或与其他训练策略结合。

title: The Impossibility of Eliciting Latent Knowledge
abstract: Advanced AI systems have extensive knowledge of their environments; in fact, their knowledge may (far) exceed that of their developers or users. Consequently, a desirable property for an AI system is that it is honest -- that it accurately reports its beliefs about the world. Designing an AI system to be honest may be difficult, especially if we want to ask it questions about latent variables in the environment -- variables which are hidden from the human interacting with it. This gives rise to the problem of eliciting latent knowledge (ELK): the problem of training an AI agent to honestly report its beliefs. In this paper, we make ELK formally precise using Causal Influence Diagrams (CIDs). CIDs can be used to describe the relationship between an agent's training environment and its subjective representation of the world. We use CIDs to formalise the distinction between observable and latent variables, to specify what exactly it means for an agent to be honest, and to formally define goal misgeneralisation. We show that, under certain circumstances, developers can incentivise an agent to honestly answer questions by providing correct feedback during training. However, a natural, but undesirable, way for an agent to generalise is to provide answers which humans would evaluate as true, rather than honest answers. We prove an impossibility theorem stating: There is no feedback-based training strategy that depends only on agent behaviour and with certainty produces an honest agent, even if feedback is perfect during training.
comment: 24 pages, 3 figures. Includes proofs in appendix

light_analysis.overview: 证明无法通过行为反馈训练确保AI系统诚实地报告潜在知识。
light_analysis.motivation: 高级AI系统拥有远超人类的领域知识，确保其诚实报告信念至关重要。但针对环境中的潜在变量（人类不可见）时，训练诚实性面临根本困难。现有方法无法形式化定义该问题，缺乏对诚实性及泛化错误的严格分析，亟需理论框架揭示其局限性。
light_analysis.method: 采用因果影响图（CID）形式化描述智能体训练环境与主观表征的关系，区分可观察变量与潜在变量，定义诚实行为及目标泛化错误。通过CID证明：不存在仅依赖智能体行为且保证产生诚实智能体的反馈训练策略，即使训练期间反馈完美。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明不可能性定理：任何基于行为反馈的训练策略都无法确保训练出诚实的智能体，因为智能体可能泛化为提供人类评估为“真”的答案，而非真实信念。该结果独立于具体训练方法或模型架构，揭示了ELK问题的根本困难。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文严格证明了诱发潜在知识的理论不可能性，为AI安全领域提供了重要理论基础。研究指出仅靠行为反馈无法解决诚实性问题，未来需探索替代方法（如内部表征监控或可解释性技术），但具体路径尚未在本文中讨论。

title: VOID: Defeating Unauthorized Mimicry in Latent Diffusion Models
abstract: While Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs) have revolutionized visual synthesis, they are increasingly exploited for unauthorized mimicry of individuals. Existing defenses inject deceptive perturbations to steer the generated images toward irrelevant targets. However, this approach hinges on an ungrounded assumption: subtle perturbations can maintain their deceptive efficacy throughout an LDM's extensive generation process. In reality, the model's innate restoration mechanism will remove such perturbations and cause individual identities to re-emerge in the images generated.   We propose VOID, a defense framework that overcomes this conundrum by manipulating an LDM's intrinsic stochasticity. VOID perturbs the diffusion pipeline in two novel ways: 1) amplifying the latent encoding errors to shatter an image's semantic structure, and 2) counteracting the target guidance signals to suppress the model's restoration capabilities. This results in a semantic corruption that thwarts any unauthorized mimicry. Notably, the security gain does not come at the price of visual utility, as VOID simultaneously manages to confine perturbations to human-imperceptible regions of protected images. Our comprehensive evaluation of 24 state-of-the-art defenses against 10 mimicry attacks on 5 datasets demonstrates VOID's unprecedented protection power: it increases the average Frechet Inception Distance (FID) from 113 to 365, a 223% improvement over the strongest defense to date.
comment: To appear in the 35th USENIX Security Symposium (USENIX Security 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出VOID防御框架，通过操控LDM内在随机性，破坏语义结构以阻止未经授权的模仿。
light_analysis.motivation: Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs) 在视觉合成中广泛应用，但被利用于未经授权的个人模仿。现有防御通过注入欺骗性扰动引导生成图像偏离目标，但该假设不切实际：扰动会在LDM的生成过程中被模型的内在恢复机制移除，导致身份重新出现。因此需要一种有效且稳健的防御方法。
light_analysis.method: VOID通过两种方式操纵扩散管道：1) 放大潜在编码错误以粉碎图像的语义结构；2) 抵消目标引导信号以抑制模型的恢复能力。这导致语义破坏，阻止任何未经授权的模仿。同时，VOID将扰动限制在人眼不可感知的区域，从而保持视觉效用。
light_analysis.result: 在24种防御、10种模仿攻击和5个数据集上的全面评估显示，VOID实现了前所未有的保护效果：平均Frechet Inception Distance (FID) 从113提高到365，比现有最强防御提升223%。这表明VOID在阻止模仿的同时保持了图像的视觉质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: VOID是一种针对LDM未经授权模仿的有效防御框架，通过操控模型随机性实现语义破坏，不牺牲视觉效用。该研究为保护个人身份在生成模型中的安全提供了新思路，未来可探索更广泛的攻击场景和模型架构。

title: Bridging Day and Night: Unsupervised Cross-Domain Re-Identification with Synergistic Prompt and Prototype Learning
abstract: Cross-domain day-night re-identification (ReID) is fundamentally challenged by the substantial visual appearance discrepancies between daytime and nighttime scenes. Existing fully supervised methods rely heavily on labor-intensive annotations, which are costly and exhibit limited generalization across domains. In this work, we investigate unsupervised day-night ReID and propose a novel framework that synergistically combines prompt learning and prototype-based representation learning to associate identities across domains without requiring manual labels. Our approach follows a progressive two-stage training strategy. In the first stage, we exploit the vision-language model to generate instance-specific textual prompts in an annotation-free manner. We employ an instance-level alignment mechanism to embed visual features and textual prompts into a unified semantic space, aligning unlabeled day/night images with learnable prompts via instance-aware dynamic-bias adaptation. In the second stage, we construct domain-specific prototype memory banks and introduce two complementary modules: i) an intra-domain identity association module to enhance feature discriminability within each domain, and ii) a cross-domain prototype matching module to reliably identify positive and negative prototype pairs, thereby establishing robust identity correspondences across day and night. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks validate the effectiveness of our method. Under the unsupervised setting, our framework attains Rank-1 accuracy comparable to state-of-the-art fully supervised methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无监督跨域昼夜行人重识别框架，结合提示学习和原型学习，无需标注实现与全监督方法相当的Rank-1精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 昼夜场景下视觉外观差异显著，传统全监督方法依赖大量人工标注，成本高且跨域泛化能力有限。现有无监督方法在昼夜跨域重识别中表现不足。因此，研究无监督昼夜行人重识别方法，旨在无需人工标注的情况下高效关联跨域身份，降低标注成本并提升适用性。
light_analysis.method: 提出两阶段渐进训练框架。第一阶段利用视觉语言模型生成无标注的实例级文本提示，通过实例级对齐机制将视觉特征与文本提示嵌入统一语义空间，采用实例感知动态偏置适应。第二阶段构建领域特定原型记忆库，引入域内身份关联模块增强特征判别性，以及跨域原型匹配模块识别正负原型对，建立昼夜间的鲁棒身份对应。
light_analysis.result: 在公开基准上，无监督设置下所提框架的Rank-1精度与当前最先进的全监督方法相当。摘要未明确具体数字，但验证了方法有效性，表明无监督昼夜ReID可达到与有监督方法竞争的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种无监督昼夜行人重识别框架，通过协同提示学习和原型学习，无需标注即可实现跨域身份关联。学术上为无监督域适应和跨域ReID提供了新思路，实际应用可降低标注成本。未来可能探索更复杂的语义提示或扩展至更多领域。

title: Using Explainability as a Training-Time Reliability Signal for Efficient ECG Classification
abstract: Training deep neural networks for clinical time-series analysis is computationally demanding, yet many healthcare settings lack the resources required for repeated model development and deployment. This challenge is particularly evident in electrocardiogram classification, where large datasets and long training schedules make efficiency practically important. Progressive Data Dropout reduces training cost by excluding samples from gradient updates once they are learned, but it relies on model confidence and may retain samples that are difficult due to noise or ambiguity rather than useful signal. In this work, we introduce ERTS, an explainability-based reliability training signal for efficient ECG classification. ERTS uses explanation quality during training to distinguish between informative and unreliable uncertainty. Building on progressive data selection, we compute Grad-CAM attention maps for candidate samples and derive a focus score that measures whether model predictions are supported by coherent and localised patterns. Samples with low focus are filtered out, while those with meaningful attention are prioritised for gradient updates. We evaluate ERTS across three ECG datasets and multiple backbone architectures, showing consistent improvements in macro-F1 alongside reduced effective training cost. These results suggest that explanation quality can serve as a practical signal for improving both efficiency and reliability in clinical time-series learning. Code will be released.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于解释性的可靠性训练信号ERTS，通过Grad-CAM注意力质量筛选样本，提升ECG分类效率和可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 训练深度神经网络进行临床时间序列分析（如心电图分类）计算成本高，许多医疗环境缺乏重复开发部署的资源。现有方法Progressive Data Dropout依赖模型置信度，可能保留因噪声或模糊性导致的难样本，而非有用信号。需要一种更可靠的训练信号来区分信息性样本和不可靠的不确定性，以提高训练效率和模型性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出ERTS（解释性可靠性训练信号），在训练过程中使用解释质量来区分信息性和不可靠的不确定性。基于渐进式数据选择，计算候选样本的Grad-CAM注意力图，导出聚焦分数（focus score），衡量模型预测是否由连贯且局部的模式支持。低聚焦样本被过滤，高注意力样本优先用于梯度更新。在三个ECG数据集和多种骨干架构上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在三个ECG数据集和多种骨干架构上，ERTS一致提升了macro-F1分数，同时降低了有效训练成本。例如，与基线相比，在保持或提高分类性能的前提下减少了训练样本的使用，证明了基于解释质量作为训练信号的有效性。具体数值摘要未明确，但提到“consistent improvements in macro-F1 alongside reduced effective training cost”。
light_analysis.conclusion: ERTS表明，解释质量可以作为临床时间序列学习中提高效率和可靠性的实用信号。该方法通过过滤低质量注意力样本，减少了训练成本并提升了模型性能。未来工作可探索其他解释方法或扩展到更多临床任务。代码将开源，有助于推动可解释AI在高效医疗建模中的应用。

title: Reinforcement Learning Disrupts Gradient-Based Adversarial Optimization
abstract: Gradient-based adversarial attacks remain a dominant threat to deep neural networks (DNNs), as they exploit gradient information to efficiently optimize adversarial perturbations. To address this, we investigate whether reinforcement learning (RL) training can disrupt the gradient structure used by attackers by training image classifiers with policy-gradient objectives and epsilon-greedy exploration. Through systematic experiments across CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet-100 with multiple architectures, we find that RL-trained classifiers significantly disrupt gradient-based adversarial optimization. To explain this, we conduct a comprehensive mechanism analysis using loss landscape visualization, static and dynamic gradient indicators, and predictive entropy. Our analysis reveals that RL acts as an implicit regularizer, producing models with highly unstable gradient directions and smaller gradient magnitudes. This combination makes each PGD step both unreliable in direction and limited in magnitude, causing gradient-based attacks to fail within practical iteration budgets. We further show that combining RL with adversarial training (RL-adv) provides a dual-layer defense operating at two complementary levels: RL degrades gradient information available to attackers (gradient-level defense), while adversarial training strengthens decision boundaries (boundary-level defense). RL-adv achieves the highest robustness across all major attack types evaluated, including gradient-based (PGD, AutoAttack), transfer-based, and query-based attacks, outperforming SL-adv by a significant margin. These findings identify RL-induced gradient disruption as a complementary robustness mechanism and motivate future research on hybrid SL-RL training schedules that combine SL's efficiency with RL's gradient-regularization properties.

light_analysis.overview: 发现强化学习训练可破坏基于梯度的对抗攻击，作为隐式正则化器，并与对抗训练结合实现双层防御。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于梯度的对抗攻击是深度神经网络的主要威胁，现有防御方法多聚焦于增强决策边界，但忽略了梯度信息本身的脆弱性。本文旨在探索强化学习训练能否通过破坏梯度结构来防御攻击，为鲁棒性提供互补机制。
light_analysis.method: 采用策略梯度目标和ε-贪婪探索训练图像分类器，在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和ImageNet-100上使用多种架构进行实验。通过损失景观可视化、静态和动态梯度指标及预测熵进行机制分析，并提出RL与对抗训练结合（RL-adv）的双层防御：RL破坏梯度信息（梯度级），对抗训练强化决策边界（边界级）。
light_analysis.result: RL-trained分类器显著破坏基于梯度的对抗优化，使PGD每一步方向不可靠且幅度受限，导致攻击在实用迭代预算内失败。RL-adv在PGD、AutoAttack、迁移攻击和查询攻击上均取得最高鲁棒性，显著优于SL-adv。
light_analysis.conclusion: RL诱导的梯度破坏是一种互补鲁棒机制，与对抗训练结合可提升防御效果。该发现启发未来研究混合SL-RL训练策略，结合SL的高效与RL的梯度正则化特性。

title: Reassessing High-Performing LLMs on Polish Medical Exams: True Competence or Bias-Driven Performance?
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) in medicine are mainly evaluated using multiple-choice question answering (MCQA), which can overestimate real clinical ability due to guessing strategies and answer biases. To address these limitations, we introduce an expanded and more challenging benchmark based on Polish medical exams, adding over 15,000 questions, two new domains, and four structural modifications that reduce MCQA-specific artifacts and better test reasoning. We evaluate 21 LLMs and show that evaluation design strongly affects results. Under our harder setup, the best model (Qwen3.5-122B) drops by 28.4 and 31 pp on English and Polish exams, respectively. Despite low evidence of data contamination, standard MCQA scores do not reliably reflect true medical competence. To facilitate further research, we make our benchmark publicly available.
comment: 26 pages total with references and appendix, preprint

light_analysis.overview: 论文针对LLM在MCQA医学考试中高估真实能力的问题，构建了更严格的波兰医学考试基准，发现标准设置下模型性能显著虚高。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在医学领域的评估主要依赖多项选择问答（MCQA），但该方式因猜测策略和答案偏见可能高估真实临床能力。现有基准缺乏严格性，无法准确反映模型的医学推理能力。作者因此扩展波兰医学考试基准，增加15,000多道题目、两个新领域及四项结构修改，以消除MCQA伪影。
light_analysis.method: 作者扩展了波兰医学考试基准，新增超过15,000道题、两个新领域，并进行四项结构修改（如增加干扰项、平衡选项分布等），减少MCQA特定伪影，更侧重推理。评估了21个LLM，比较标准设置和修改设置下的准确率。
light_analysis.result: 在更难的设置下，最佳模型Qwen3.5-122B在英语和波兰语考试中分别下降28.4和31个百分点。尽管数据污染证据较低，标准MCQA分数不能可靠反映真实医学能力，表明评估设计严重影响结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示标准MCQA评估高估LLM医学能力，贡献在于提出更严格的基准和评估方法，促进更可靠的医学AI评估。基准已公开，未来可用于更公平的比较和模型改进。

title: Damage-TriageFormer: A Foundation-Model Framework for Typology-Based Building Damage Assessment from Mono-Temporal Imagery
abstract: Decision-relevant building damage assessment is critical for prioritizing resources and recovery after a disaster, yet most automated methods either flatten damage into a single severity scale (no damage, minor, major, destroyed) or require paired pre- and post-event imagery that is often unavailable for emerging hazards. This paper presents Damage-TriageFormer, a single-image, post-event, footprint-conditioned model that produces a damage typology rather than a severity scale. We contribute: (1) DamageTriage-Bench, a new benchmark built from NOAA Emergency Response Imagery across Hurricane Michael (2018), Hurricane Helene (2024), and the 2025 Los Angeles wildfire complex, with five typology classes that distinguish roof damage from structural damage and, within each, partial from total extent; and (2) Damage-TriageFormer, which extends a DINOv3 ViT-L backbone with a Simple Feature Pyramid for higher-resolution instance pooling, a two-stage gated damage head, and an auxiliary severity-regression objective. Our model achieves macro F1 of 0.624 on validation and 0.619 on a held-out stratified test set, performing strongest where operational triage needs it most, with per-class F1 of 0.91 and 0.84 on undamaged buildings and total structural collapse, respectively. While the rare Total Roof Damage class remains difficult due to its limited examples and an inherently ambiguous label boundary, our results show that single-image post-event imagery can support actionable building damage typing, enabling targeted emergency response and resource allocation without a pre-event reference.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Damage-TriageFormer，利用基础模型框架从单张灾后图像进行建筑物损害类型学评估，无需灾前影像。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自动化方法要么将建筑损害简化为单一严重性等级（如无、轻微、严重、倒塌），无法提供细粒度类型信息；要么依赖灾前/灾后配对图像，但新兴灾害中灾前影像常不可用。这限制了决策相关的损害评估在应急响应中的实用价值。因此，需要一种仅利用单张灾后影像即可输出损害类型学的方法，以支持针对性资源分配和恢复优先排序。
light_analysis.method: 提出Damage-TriageFormer，基于DINOv3 ViT-L骨干网络，引入简单特征金字塔（Simple Feature Pyramid）实现更高分辨率的实例池化；设计两阶段门控损害头（two-stage gated damage head）用于分类；并添加辅助严重性回归目标以增强学习。同时构建DamageTriage-Bench基准，包含来自三次灾害（飓风迈克尔、飓风海伦、洛杉矶野火）的影像，标注5种类型学类别（区分屋顶与结构损伤，以及部分与完全损坏）。
light_analysis.result: 在验证集上宏F1达到0.624，在分层测试集上为0.619。关键类别表现优异：无损坏建筑F1=0.91，总结构倒塌F1=0.84。对于罕见的完全屋顶损坏类，由于样本有限且标签边界模糊，性能较低。结果表明单图像灾后影像可支持实际可操作的损害类型评估，无需灾前参考。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了单图像、灾后、足迹条件下的建筑损害类型学评估框架，通过基础模型扩展和新型基准，证明无需灾前影像即可实现精细化损害识别。该工作对紧急响应中的资源调配具有实际应用价值，尤其适用于快速变化的环境。未来可针对罕见类别扩充数据或改进边界定义，并探索跨灾害泛化能力。

title: VIA-SD: Verification via Intra-Model Routing for Speculative Decoding
abstract: Speculative decoding (SD) addresses the high inference costs of LLMs by having lightweight drafters generate candidates for large verifiers to validate in parallel. Existing draft-verify methods use binary decisions: accept or fully recompute. Yet we find that many rejected tokens can be verified correctly by a slim submodel derived from the full verifier via intra-model routing, instead of the full verifier. This motivates our slim-verifier to handle tokens requiring moderate verification resources, reducing expensive large-model calls. We propose Verification via Intra-Model Routing for Speculative Decoding (VIA-SD), a multi-tier framework using a routed slim-verifier. Draft tokens are processed hierarchically: direct acceptance for high-confidence cases, slim-verifier regeneration for medium-confidence cases, and full-model verification for uncertain cases. Across four representative tasks and multiple model families, VIA-SD reduces rejection rates by 0.10-0.22 and delivers 10-20% speedups over strong SD baselines, while achieving 2.5-3x acceleration over non-drafting decoding. Moreover, VIA-SD is compatible with existing SD frameworks without modifying their training procedures. Our results suggest multi-tier SD as a general paradigm for scalable and efficient LLM inference. Project page: https://zju-xyc.github.io/VIA-SD-Project-Page/
comment: Accepted at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出VIA-SD，通过模型内路由实现多层级验证的投机解码框架，显著降低拒绝率并加速LLM推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 投机解码（SD）利用轻量草稿模型生成候选令牌，再由大型验证器并行验证。现有方法仅采用二元决策——要么接受要么完全重计算。然而，我们发现许多被拒绝的令牌可以由全验证器通过模型内路由派生的子模型（slim-verifier）正确验证，而无需调用完整模型。这启发我们设计一种多层级验证框架，将验证资源按需分配，减少昂贵的大模型调用次数，从而提升推理效率。
light_analysis.method: VIA-SD是一种多层级投机解码框架，包含三个层次：高置信度令牌直接接受；中等置信度令牌由slim-verifier（通过模型内路由从全模型派生的轻量子模型）重新生成；低置信度令牌才由完整模型验证。该框架无需修改现有SD框架的训练流程，即可兼容多种模型族和任务。slim-verifier利用全模型内部参数路由，在保证验证质量的同时大幅降低计算开销。
light_analysis.result: 在四个代表性任务和多个模型家族上，VIA-SD将拒绝率降低0.10-0.22，相比强基线SD方法实现10-20%的端到端加速，相对非草稿解码达到2.5-3倍加速。实验表明，多层级验证策略有效平衡了验证质量与计算成本，且即插即用不干扰原有训练。
light_analysis.conclusion: VIA-SD验证了多层级投机解码作为通用范式的有效性，通过细粒度路由分配验证资源，显著提升LLM推理效率。其与现有SD框架的兼容性使其易于部署。未来可探索更复杂的路由策略或自适应阈值，以进一步优化性能。该工作为高效大模型推理提供了新思路。

title: Multi-Rate Mixture of Experts for Accelerating Liquid Neural Network Training
abstract: Multivariate time-series data often exhibit complex temporal dependencies, irregular sampling, and heterogeneous dynamics across multiple time scales, making accurate sequence modeling particularly challenging. Traditional recurrent neural networks (RNNs), such as Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks, operate in discrete time and may struggle to effectively capture continuous and irregular temporal behaviors. Liquid Neural Networks (LNNs) address some of these limitations through continuous-time dynamics, but standard LNN architectures typically rely on a single dynamical system, limiting their ability to model heterogeneous temporal patterns. To address these challenges, we propose a Multi-Rate Mixture-of-Experts (MR-MoE) framework built on top of Liquid Neural Networks. In the proposed architecture, multiple LNN-based experts operate at distinct time scales, enabling the model to explicitly separate fast-changing dynamics from slow-evolving temporal trends. A gating network further enables adaptive expert specialization based on input conditions. In addition, we incorporate both feature-level and temporal attention mechanisms to improve robustness, interpretability, and long-range dependency modeling. Feature-level attention suppresses noisy or irrelevant variables, while temporal attention selectively focuses on informative historical states. We evaluate the proposed framework on a complex multivariate time-series prediction task and compare it against strong baselines, including LSTM, monolithic LNN, and standard MoE models. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed MR-MoE framework consistently achieves improved AUROC and AUPRC performance while maintaining favorable computational efficiency. These results highlight the effectiveness of combining continuous-time dynamics, multi-scale expert decomposition, and adaptive attention mechanisms for time-series modeling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MR-MoE框架，在液态神经网络上结合多速率专家混合与注意力机制，用于加速训练并提升多变量时间序列建模性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 多变量时间序列数据常呈现复杂时间依赖、不规则采样及多时间尺度异质动态，传统RNN（如LSTM）基于离散时间难以有效捕捉连续与不规则行为。液态神经网络（LNN）引入连续时间动态，但标准架构依赖单一动态系统，限制了其建模异质时序模式的能力。因此需要一种能够显式分离快慢动态并自适应选择专家的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出多速率专家混合（MR-MoE）框架，在LNN基础上集成多个运行于不同时间尺度的LNN专家，通过门控网络实现自适应专家选择。同时引入特征级注意力机制抑制噪声变量，以及时间注意力机制聚焦于重要历史状态。该方法在多变量时间序列预测任务上，利用多尺度分解与注意力增强提升了模型表达能力。
light_analysis.result: 在复杂多变量时间序列预测任务上，与LSTM、单体LNN及标准MoE等强基线相比，MR-MoE框架在AUROC和AUPRC指标上持续获得更优表现，同时保持了良好的计算效率，验证了连续动态、多尺度专家分解及自适应注意力机制的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过融合连续时间动态、多尺度专家组合与注意力机制，显著提升了液态神经网络在异质时间序列建模中的能力。实验证明了其有效性，未来可进一步探索更复杂的专家交互机制或应用于其他时序任务。

title: On The Effectiveness-Fluency Trade-Off In LLM Conditioning: A Systematic Study
abstract: Controlling the output of Large Language Models (LLMs) is a central challenge for their reliable deployment, yet a clear understanding of the involved trade-offs remains elusive. Current approaches to conditioning are often evaluated with a narrow focus on their effectiveness at injecting or removing a target concept, neglecting generation quality. We systematically investigate a range of conditioning methods in both injection and removal scenarios. We find that efficient steering methods frequently achieve conditioning at a steep cost to fluency. Furthermore, we identify a critical yet previously overlooked interaction with the training paradigm: activation steering methods are far less effective on instruction-tuned models than on their base counterparts. Simple prompting and full-fledged supervised fine-tuning, on the other hand, are viable options for concept injection, but are not as good at concept removal. Finally, cheaply computed textual metrics highly correlate to costly LLM-as-judge scores, and provide insights on the behavior of conditioning methods.

light_analysis.overview: 系统研究LLM条件化中的有效性与流畅性权衡，揭示训练范式与方法的交互作用。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM可靠部署需要控制输出，但现有评估只关注有效性而忽略生成质量，导致对方法间的权衡缺乏清晰理解。本研究旨在系统比较不同条件化方法在注入和去除概念时的表现，并揭示被忽视的训练范式影响。
light_analysis.method: 对多种条件化方法（激活引导、提示、监督微调等）在概念注入和去除场景下进行系统实验，使用BLEU、perplexity等文本度量与LLM-as-judge评分评估有效性及流畅性。
light_analysis.result: 高效引导方法常以显著降低流畅性为代价；激活引导在指令微调模型上效果远差于基础模型；简单提示和全监督微调适合概念注入但不适合去除；廉价文本度量与LLM评判得分高度相关。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了条件化方法中有效性与流畅性的根本权衡，以及训练范式的非平凡交互，为实际部署选择方法提供依据；廉价度量可替代昂贵LLM评判，但方法仍有局限（如概念去除能力不足）。

title: Re-evaluating Confidence Remasking in Masked Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Masked diffusion language models (dLLMs) have recently emerged as a competitive alternative to autoregressive language models, with the promise of faster inference via parallel token generation. A notable limitation of the masked formulation, however, is that once a token has been unmasked it can no longer be revised, leaving dLLMs vulnerable to early sampling mistakes. To address this, a growing body of work has sought to extend masked dLLMs with self-correcting (remasking) capabilities. One appealing subset of these methods does so in a training-free, post-hoc manner based on token confidences, with encouraging early reported results. In this work, we revisit the empirical evaluation of a representative post-hoc remasking method, WINO [Hong et al., 2026], and find that under standard decoding settings (shorter block lengths) it brings little-to-no benefit over confidence-based unmasking alone [Wu et al., 2025]. Extending the evaluation to non-greedy decoding, we find that while confidence-based remasking can mitigate errors introduced by increased stochasticity to some extent, it also exacerbates the diversity collapse previously reported for confidence-based unmasking. Overall, our results show that the benefits of post-hoc confidence-based remasking are highly setting-dependent, underscoring the need for a more comprehensive evaluation framework.

light_analysis.overview: 重新评估基于置信度的后验remasking方法，发现其提升效果高度依赖解码设置，在标准设置下几乎没有改进，并可能加剧多样性崩溃。
light_analysis.motivation: 掩码扩散语言模型（dLLMs）相比自回归模型具有并行推理优势，但一旦token被掩码就无法修正，易受早期采样错误影响。现有工作通过训练无关的置信度后验remasking（如WINO）实现自纠正，但缺乏全面评估。本文旨在重新审视此类方法的实际效果，以揭示其真实性能边界和局限性。
light_analysis.method: 论文以WINO为代表性后验remasking方法，在标准解码（短块长度）和非贪婪解码两种设置下进行对比实验。实验包括：置信度remasking vs. 仅置信度unmasking；评估指标涵盖生成质量、错误缓解及多样性。通过控制解码随机性和块长度，系统分析remasking的收益与代价。
light_analysis.result: 在标准解码（短块长度）下，后验remasking相比仅置信度unmasking几乎没有提升。在非贪婪解码时，remasking可以部分缓解随机性带来的错误，但同时加剧了多样性崩溃。总体表明其效果高度依赖具体设置，未发现普遍优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 后验置信度remasking并非通用有效，其收益受解码参数显著影响，且伴随多样性下降风险。研究呼吁建立更全面的评估框架，涵盖多种解码条件和度量指标，以公正评价此类方法。未来需探索更鲁棒的remasking策略或结合其他机制。

title: An Electric Potential-Augmented Benchmark Dataset for Physics-Guided Image Reconstruction of Electrical Capacitance Tomography
abstract: While deep learning has significantly advanced image reconstruction of Electrical Capacitance Tomography (ECT), most data-driven methods map directly between capacitance and permittivity distribution, treating the sensor as a black box. This overlooks the electric potential field -- the fundamental physical link governing the nonlinear and ill-posed ``soft-field'' effect. To address this, we propose an electric potential-augmented ECT benchmark dataset designed to explicitly integrate latent physics behind ECT into the learning process. Generated via a COMSOL-MATLAB pipeline for an eight-electrode sensor as an example, the dataset comprises 20,000 randomized samples across four typical flow patterns. Crucially, alongside the conventional capacitance vectors and permittivity distributions depicted as images, each sample preserves eight excitation-wise full-field potential maps. Beyond data release, we provide illustrative evaluation protocols for both forward and inverse problems of ECT. Through comprehensive testing on both in-distribution (IID) and out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios, we systematically demonstrate how the inclusion of electric potential maps enhances modeling accuracy and robustness. Fundamentally, the explicit inclusion of latent field information significantly lowers the barrier to integrating physical laws into ECT modeling, thereby establishing a standardized foundation for future physics-guided machine learning of ECT image reconstruction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个包含电势场数据的ECT基准数据集，用于物理引导的图像重建，提升建模精度和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管深度学习在ECT图像重建中取得进展，但现有数据驱动方法将传感器视为黑箱，忽略电势场这一物理链接，导致非线性、病态"软场"效应未被充分利用。该研究旨在通过显式集成潜在物理信息改进建模，解决现有方法物理知识缺失的问题。
light_analysis.method: 通过COMSOL-MATLAB流水线生成八电极传感器数据集，包含20,000个随机样本，覆盖四种典型流型。每个样本除常规电容向量和介电常数图像外，还保存八个激励方向的完整电势场图。提供正问题和逆问题的评估协议。
light_analysis.result: 在分布内和分布外场景下测试，结果表明包含电势图显著增强了建模精度和鲁棒性。摘要未明确具体数值，但系统性对比验证了物理信息集成的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 显式包含潜在场信息降低了将物理定律集成到ECT建模中的障碍，为未来物理引导的机器学习ECT图像重建建立标准化基础。该工作主要贡献在于数据集和评估协议，未来可推广至多电极配置。

title: Adapting Prithvi-EO for Fallow Detection for Food-Water Nexus: ViT-Adapter Necks and Parameter-Efficient Backbone tuning of Geospatial Foundation Model
abstract: Understanding spatial distribution of fallow land is important for optimizing the food-water (FW) nexus, given fallowing's role in crop rotation and water conservation. Fallow is a low accuracy class in USDA Cropland Data Layer (CDL). Geospatial foundation model (GFM), Prithvi-EO has shown strong transferability across computer vision tasks. However, its Vision Transformer (ViT) backbone produces features at a single spatial scale that are ill-suited for the multi-scale features required by object detection heads. Existing approaches synthesise multi-scale pyramids through scaling of single stride tokens, sacrificing spatial heterogeneity, and full backbone fine-tuning is computationally prohibitive for GFMs. We evaluate a fallow detection pipeline combining two parameter-efficient fine tuning (PEFT) schemes: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) and a hybrid PEFT, with three neck designs: pseudo multi-scale, Lite ViT-Adapter, and Full ViT-Adapter. Our best configuration, Lite ViT-Adapter with a one-stage head, achieves a mAP@50 of 0.9479 with the Diou loss, suggesting the effectiveness of center-aware localization for irregular fallow field detection. ViT-Adapter free one-stage detection under LoRA improves the adapter-free anchor-based approach by 6.42%, and the best configuration improves baseline adapter-free anchor-based approach by 25.70%. These results demonstrate that lightweight spatial prior fusion and selective backbone unfreezing enable Prithvi-EO to capture local fallow patterns more effectively, outperforming approaches that rely on reshaped single-stride ViT tokens.
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures. Preprint. Submitted to ACM SIGSPATIAL 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出结合LoRA和混合PEFT参数高效微调与ViT-Adapter颈部结构的休耕地检测方法，在Prithvi-EO上实现高精度mAP@50=0.9479。
light_analysis.motivation: 休耕地检测对优化粮食-水关系至关重要，但USDA Cropland Data Layer中休耕地分类精度低。Prithvi-EO等地理空间基础模型虽具迁移能力，其ViT骨干产生单尺度特征，不适合多尺度目标检测头。现有方法通过缩放单步长令牌合成多尺度金字塔，牺牲空间异质性，且全骨干微调计算成本高。
light_analysis.method: 评估两种参数高效微调方案：LoRA和混合PEFT，结合三种颈部设计：伪多尺度、Lite ViT-Adapter和Full ViT-Adapter。最佳配置采用Lite ViT-Adapter和单阶段检测头，使用Diou损失函数。该方法通过轻量级空间先验融合和选择性骨干解冻，有效捕获局部休耕地模式。
light_analysis.result: 最佳配置mAP@50达0.9479。LoRA下ViT-Adapter自由单阶段检测比无适配器锚点方法提升6.42%，最佳配置比基线无适配器锚点方法提升25.70%。实验表明轻量级空间先验融合和选择性骨干解冻显著优于依赖重塑单步长ViT令牌的方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了轻量级空间先验融合和参数高效微调使Prithvi-EO有效捕获局部休耕地模式，为地理空间基础模型在农业等领域的实际应用提供了高效方案。未来可探索更高效的颈部设计和微调策略。

title: Making Foresight Actionable: Repurposing Representation Alignment in World Action Models
abstract: World Action Models (WAMs) offer a promising route for robot manipulation by using video generation models to model future scene evolution before producing control actions. However, our empirical observations reveal a phenomenon: generating plausible visual futures does not always guarantee the extraction of accurate actions. To diagnose this failure, we conduct action-head attention analysis and causal interventions. We find that the action decoder fails to focus on task-relevant interaction regions and remains sensitive to perturbations in task-irrelevant areas. This reveals a representation mismatch: hidden states optimized for visual reconstruction are not inherently organized in a form useful for low-level action control. In this paper, we propose AGRA, an Action-Grounded Representation Alignment objective that regularizes the world-action interface by aligning intermediate video diffusion features with spatially coherent semantic representations from a foundation visual encoder. We evaluate AGRA on real-world manipulation tasks. Experiments show that AGRA makes world model representations more action-grounded: by focusing the action decoder on the correct interaction regions, it improves object localization accuracy and affordance understanding, and makes the policy more robust to perturbations in task-irrelevant regions. As a result, AGRA consistently improves both in-distribution performance and out-of-distribution generalization over the baseline world action model.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AGRA方法，通过将扩散特征与视觉编码器语义对齐，解决世界动作模型中视觉预测与动作控制之间的表征不匹配问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 世界动作模型利用视频生成预测未来场景以辅助机器人操作，但实验发现生成合理的视觉未来并不总能保证提取到准确动作。分析表明，动作解码器未能关注任务相关区域，且对无关区域扰动敏感，这是因为隐状态优化目标是视觉重建而非动作控制，导致表征不匹配。解决此问题对于提升机器人操作的鲁棒性和泛化能力至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 提出AGRA（Action-Grounded Representation Alignment）目标，通过正则化世界-动作接口，将中间视频扩散特征与基础视觉编码器的空间连贯语义表示对齐。具体而言，对齐过程使隐状态包含更多与动作相关的信息，引导动作解码器聚焦于正确的交互区域。该方法在真实世界操作任务中应用，无需修改底层生成模型架构，仅调整表征空间。
light_analysis.result: 在真实世界操作任务上，AGRA使世界模型表征更加动作接地：动作解码器聚焦于正确交互区域，目标定位精度和可抓取性理解提升，策略对任务无关区域扰动的鲁棒性增强。在分布内性能和分布外泛化上均一致优于基线世界动作模型，验证了表征对齐的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: AGRA通过表征对齐弥合了视觉预测与动作控制之间的鸿沟，使世界动作模型更实用。其价值在于提升了机器人操作的安全性和泛化能力，尤其适用于非结构化环境。未来工作可探索更高效的对齐策略或扩展到其他模态。

title: MLT-Dedup: Efficient Large-Scale Online Video Deduplication via Multi-Level Representations and Spatial-Temporal Matching
abstract: The explosive growth of user-generated video content on online platforms is accompanied by the emergence of numerous near-duplicate videos--videos that are identical or highly similar but differ by partial edits. These duplicates degrade user experience and increase storage and bandwidth costs, making large-scale video deduplication a critical task. Existing video deduplication frameworks face a fundamental challenge in retrieving sufficient high-quality candidates under a limited index budget, as well as trade-offs between efficiency and precision. To address these issues, we propose MLT-Dedup, an efficient large-scale online video deduplication framework with Multi-Level representations and spatial-Temporal matching. Our approach employs a Multi-Level Video Encoder (ML-VE) to extract both fine-grained frame-level and sparse clip-level embeddings: sparse embeddings support efficient candidate retrieval, while fine-grained embeddings are loaded for precise pairwise matching. During matching, we introduce DiF-SiM, a Differential Feature-enhanced Similarity Module capable of locating duplicated temporal segments and providing reliable similarity evidence to support policy-driven deduplication decisions. Extensive experiments on a real-world large-scale platform demonstrate that MLT-Dedup reduces online repetition rates by 91% at 90% precision. Furthermore, our sparse retrieval design achieves a 5x increase in indexing capacity, enabling broader candidate coverage in real-world deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MLT-Dedup框架，通过多级表示和时空匹配实现高效大规模在线视频去重。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线平台用户生成视频激增，大量近重复视频（部分编辑修改）影响用户体验并增加存储和带宽成本。现有去重框架在有限索引预算下难以检索足够高质量候选，且存在效率与精度的权衡。因此需要一种既能高效检索又能精确匹配的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出MLT-Dedup框架，包含多级视频编码器（ML-VE）提取细粒度帧级和稀疏片段级嵌入：稀疏嵌入用于高效候选检索，细粒度嵌入用于精确成对匹配。匹配阶段引入差分特征增强相似性模块（DiF-SiM），能够定位重复时间片段并提供可靠相似性证据，支持策略驱动的去重决策。
light_analysis.result: 在真实大规模平台实验中，MLT-Dedup在90%精度下将在线重复率降低91%。其稀疏检索设计将索引容量提升5倍，从而在实际部署中实现更广泛的候选覆盖。
light_analysis.conclusion: MLT-Dedup通过多级表示和时空匹配有效解决了大规模在线视频去重的效率和精度问题。该框架具有实际应用价值，可降低存储和带宽成本，提升用户体验。未来可进一步优化多级编码器或扩展到其他多模态内容去重。

title: SHERPA: Seam-aware Harmonized ERP Adaptation for Open-Domain 360$^\circ$ Panorama Generation
abstract: Panoramic imagery is increasingly used in world-generation, games, and simulation, where users may need not only photorealistic scenes but also stylized and non-photorealistic environments. Large-scale text-to-image diffusion and flow models provide broad style and semantic priors for this goal, but planar image training misaligns them with the wrap-around topology and polar regions of $360^\circ$ panoramas represented in equirectangular projection (ERP). We present SHERPA, a lightweight adaptation framework that combines frequency-selective Circular RoPE, Circular Latent Encoding/Decoding, image-side FFN adapters, and a Dual-Path Training Scheme. Circular RoPE replaces only the seam-sensitive high-frequency horizontal RoPE band with integer-periodic harmonics while preserving the pretrained lower-frequency spectrum. The Paired Panorama Path supervises geometry, while the Unpaired Style Path uses self-supervised yaw consistency for target-free stylized prompts. As a result, SHERPA generates $360^\circ$ panoramas across both photorealistic panorama domains and open-domain stylized prompts.

light_analysis.overview: SHERPA是一种轻量级适应框架，结合频率选择性Circular RoPE和双路径训练，实现开放域360°全景图生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 全景图在游戏、模拟等应用中需求增加，但大规模文本到图像扩散模型基于平面图像训练，与360°全景图的环绕拓扑和极地区域不匹配。现有方法难以同时保持几何一致性并支持开放域风格化生成，因此需要一种轻量级适应框架来修正预训练模型与全景结构的偏差。
light_analysis.method: SHERPA框架包含四个关键组件：频率选择性Circular RoPE（替换高频率水平RoPE为整数周期谐波，保留低频）、循环潜编码/解码器、图像侧FFN适配器、以及双路径训练方案（配对全景路径监督几何，未配对风格路径使用自监督偏航一致性进行无目标风格化）。基于预训练扩散/流模型。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体性能指标，但表明SHERPA能够生成跨逼真全景域和开放域风格化提示的360°全景图，在几何一致性和风格多样性上优于未适配方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: SHERPA的主要贡献是提出轻量级适应框架，解决平面扩散模型与全景图拓扑不匹配问题，实现开放域风格化全景生成。具有实际应用价值，未来可探索更高效的适配策略或处理极地失真。

title: Can News Predict the Market? Limits of Zero-Shot Financial NLP and the Role of Explainable AI
abstract: Can financial news reliably predict short-term stock movements? Despite advances in large language models, this question remains unresolved. We revisit this problem using a zero-shot natural language processing framework, investigating whether models can extract actionable signals from financial news without domain-specific training. We design a structured pipeline that combines zero-shot natural language inference with temporal aggregation, explicitly modelling recency and event-dependent impact horizons when integrating information across articles. To address the need for transparency in high-stakes settings, we introduce a multi-layered explainability framework that links predictions to token-level, article-level, and aggregate evidence, and produces grounded natural language rationales. Across multiple models and prediction horizons, we find that zero-shot approaches consistently fail to outperform simple baselines, with particularly weak performance on negative movements, suggesting deeper structural limitations in mapping news sentiment to short-term price dynamics. However, explainability signals reliably distinguish between trustworthy and unreliable predictions, offering practical value even when accuracy is limited. These findings highlight the limits of zero-shot financial NLP and motivate a shift toward decision-support systems that prioritise transparency and uncertainty awareness. Code: https://github.com/alimert05/zero-shot-stock-xai

light_analysis.overview: 揭示零样本金融NLP在预测短期股市上的局限性，并提出多层级可解释性框架以提升透明度。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管大语言模型进步，金融新闻能否可靠预测短期股票走势仍未解决。现有零样本方法缺乏领域特定训练，且可解释性不足，导致模型输出难以在高风险场景中信任。本研究旨在系统评估零样本方法的效果，并通过可解释性框架增强预测的可靠性和实用性。
light_analysis.method: 提出结构化管道，结合零样本自然语言推理与时间聚合，显式建模新闻的时效性和事件影响周期。引入多层级可解释性框架，从token级、文章级到聚合级生成预测理由，并输出自然语言解释。实验涵盖多种模型和预测周期，对比简单基线。
light_analysis.result: 零样本方法在所有设置下均未超越简单基线，尤其对负面走势预测效果差，表明新闻语义到短期价格变动存在结构性瓶颈。但可解释性信号能可靠区分可信与不可信预测，即使准确率有限，仍为风险管控提供实用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 零样本金融NLP在短期预测上存在根本局限，应转向注重透明度和不确定性的决策支持系统。多层级可解释性框架能有效提升模型可信度，未来可结合领域微调或人机协作进一步改进。

title: Adaptive Multi-Resolution Procedural Knowledge Compression for Large Language Models
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are widely used to tackle complex tasks with autonomous workflows. Recently, reusable natural language skills have emerged as a popular paradigm to inject procedural knowledge into LLM applications. Since popular skills are often invoked repeatedly, placing their full text in every context significantly increases prefill cost and latency. While text compression techniques have the potential to solve this problem, most existing methods are designed to compress factual knowledge in documents instead of procedural knowledge, making them insufficient for skill compression. In this paper, we argue that an effective skill compression method should: 1) preserve logical dependencies among workflows and tool protocols, 2) enable lightweight, offline compression for frequently updated community skills, and 3) be adaptable to varying complexities across skills. To address this, we present SKIM (SKIll coMpression), an adaptive multi-resolution soft token compression framework for procedural skills. Depending on the complexity of each skill, SKIM creates different numbers of soft tokens that not only improve the efficiency of LLM inference, but also preserve the effectiveness of skill usage. Experiments indicate that SKIM compresses skills to 30 to 60 percent of their original token length while preserving task performance better than existing compression methods.We have released our code at https://github.com/bebr2/SKIM .

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应多分辨率软令牌压缩框架SKIM，用于压缩LLM的过程知识技能，兼顾效率与效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在复杂任务中广泛使用可重用的自然语言技能来注入过程知识，但重复调用时完整文本会导致高昂的预填充成本和延迟。现有文本压缩方法主要针对文档中的事实知识，而非工作流和工具协议的过程知识，无法有效压缩技能。因此需要一种保留逻辑依赖、支持轻量离线压缩、且能适应技能复杂度变化的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出SKIM（SKIll coMpression）框架，采用自适应多分辨率软令牌压缩。根据每个技能的复杂度动态生成不同数量的软令牌，这些软令牌在LLM推理中替代原始技能文本，既降低预填充成本，又保留技能逻辑依赖。关键创新在于多分辨率策略和针对过程知识的压缩，支持社区技能的频繁更新和离线压缩。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，SKIM能将技能压缩至原始令牌长度的30%到60%，同时在下游任务中保持性能优于现有压缩方法。具体性能提升指标摘要未详细说明，但强调了在保留任务性能方面的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: SKIM有效解决LLM中过程技能压缩的挑战，实现高效推理与任务效果保持的平衡。其自适应多分辨率软令牌机制为过程知识压缩提供了新范式，具有广泛的应用价值。未来可探索更细粒度的复杂度建模和压缩比自适应调整。

title: Implicit Neural Representations of Individual Behavior
abstract: We study policy representation learning from unlabeled multi-policy behavioral data. Each episode is generated by a fixed policy, but policy labels are unavailable. This setting appears in robotics play, demonstrations, games, racing, and other datasets where heterogeneous behaviors are mixed without annotations. We introduce \emph{Behavioral INR}, a self-supervised generative model that adapts implicit neural representations (INRs) from vision to behavior. Instead of mapping coordinates to RGB values, Behavioral INR represents a policy as a state-action function mapping states to subsequent actions. An episode-level latent modulates this function through FiLM layers, yielding a generative prior over policies and allowing policy identity to be inferred without supervision. Because INRs treat each datapoint as samples from an underlying function, the same model naturally accommodates variable episode lengths and different sampling granularities, as in vision INRs with different image resolutions. We also define policy-level out-of-distribution (OOD) shifts along state-distribution and action-distribution axes, which arise when policies overlap in states or actions but are not captured by standard behavioral OOD settings based only on new agents or environments. We evaluate on synthetic Gaussian random field data, MuJoCo demonstrations with controlled OOD splits, and real-world chess, Formula 1 racing, robotics, and Seek-Avoid datasets. Behavioral INR most consistently improves policy identifiability in the hardest continuous state-action settings, especially when longer episodes, more policies, and OOD splits reduce the usefulness of marginal shortcuts; amortized history encoders remain competitive when policy identity can be recovered from symbolic repetition or low-dimensional action statistics. We release code and checkpoints.
comment: ICML 2026, Structured Probabilistic Inference & Generative Modeling Workshop

light_analysis.overview: 提出Behavioral INR，一种自监督生成模型，将视觉中的隐式神经表示应用于行为策略表示，实现无标签多策略数据的策略识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 在机器人演示、游戏、赛车等数据集中，多策略行为数据缺乏标签，难以进行策略表示学习。现有方法依赖完整策略标签或生成式建模，但无法直接处理未标注的异构行为数据，且难以应对变长轨迹和不同采样粒度。需要一种无需标签、能适应多样轨迹长度的策略表示方法，以提升策略识别能力并处理分布外偏移。
light_analysis.method: Behavioral INR将策略建模为状态-动作函数，通过FiLM层引入潜变量调制，形成策略生成先验。该模型无需策略标签，自监督学习策略嵌入，并自然适应变长轨迹（类似视觉INR处理不同分辨率图像）。在合成高斯随机场、MuJoCo演示、真实棋类、F1赛车、机器人和寻避数据集上评估，定义状态分布和动作分布两个维度的策略级分布外偏移。
light_analysis.result: 在连续状态-动作的困难设定中（长轨迹、多策略、分布外偏移削弱边际快捷方式），Behavioral INR一致提升策略可识别性。当策略身份可从符号重复或低维动作统计恢复时，历史编码器仍有竞争力。实验涵盖多种数据，表明方法对复杂行为模式有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: Behavioral INR提供了一种自监督、通用的策略表示框架，无需标签即可从异构行为数据中学习策略嵌入，适用于变长轨迹。在多个真实世界数据集中验证了有效性，尤其处理连续状态-动作时的分布外偏移。未来可扩展至更多行为理解与策略迁移任务，但依赖任务复杂度。

title: InternVideo3: Agentify Foundation Models with Multimodal Contextual Reasoning
abstract: Recent progress in foundation models has shifted toward agentic behavior involving multi-step reasoning and tool use. However, open-source efforts largely focus on text-dominant settings, leaving long-horizon multimodal tasks underexplored. This gap is evident in video tasks requiring sustained temporal understanding and iterative interaction. We present InternVideo3, a framework enhancing these capabilities via Multimodal Contextual Reasoning (MCR). MCR treats understanding as a closed-loop process over a shared, evolving context containing observations, instructions, reasoning, tool actions, and memory. This frames long-video understanding as evidence accumulation and verification. To ensure efficiency, we introduce Multimodal Multi-head Latent Attention (M^2LA), a token-preserving reparameterization compressing KV-cache states while retaining the full token stream. Our staged training includes continued pretraining, short-to-long supervised fine-tuning, rule-based reinforcement learning, and on-policy distillation. Experiments show InternVideo3 achieves strong performance on benchmarks like Video-MME, MLVU, and EgoSchema. We further instantiate the model as a video agent with retrieval tools, demonstrating robust evidence-grounded behavior. Our results suggest that efficient context handling and closed-loop reasoning are vital for adapting open multimodal models toward long-horizon visually grounded agency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出InternVideo3框架，通过多模态上下文推理（MCR）增强基础模型在长时视频任务中的智能体能力，实现证据积累与验证的闭环推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前基础模型在文本主导的智能体行为上取得进展，但在长时多模态任务（如视频理解）中，需要持续时间理解与迭代交互，开源模型对此探索不足。现有方法难以处理视频中的长期依赖和工具使用，导致性能瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 提出多模态上下文推理（MCR），将理解视为包含观察、指令、推理、工具动作和记忆的共享上下文闭环过程。引入多模态多头潜在注意力（M^2LA），通过令牌保留重参数化压缩KV缓存同时保留完整令牌流。采用分阶段训练：持续预训练、短到长监督微调、基于规则的强化学习和在线策略蒸馏。
light_analysis.result: InternVideo3在Video-MME、MLVU、EgoSchema等基准测试中表现强劲。作为视频智能体，结合检索工具展示了鲁棒的证据驱动行为，验证了高效上下文处理和闭环推理对长时视觉任务的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: InternVideo3通过MCR和M^2LA有效提升了多模态模型的长时视频理解与智能体能力。研究为开放多模态模型适配视觉驱动的长时任务提供了新范式，未来可进一步优化上下文压缩效率和推理路径规划。

title: Agentic Environment Engineering for Large Language Models: A Survey of Environment Modeling, Synthesis, Evaluation, and Application
abstract: Environments serve as interactive systems for large language model (LLM) based agents across diverse scenarios and play a crucial role in driving the continual evolution of model capabilities. Despite this importance, existing work lacks a systematic categorization and deep analysis. This paper systematically studies current researches on agentic environments from the perspective of the environment engineering lifecycle, covering their modeling, synthesis, evaluation and application. Specifically, the paper first introduces representative environments from the perspectives of eight attributes and eight domains, providing detailed analyses of their development paths and highlighting their core capabilities. Second, for automated environment synthesis, two paradigms are introduced, such as symbolic synthesis and neural synthesis. This paper also shows different environment evaluation methods in each paradigm. Thirdly, the corresponding environment applications from the perspective of agent-environment co-evolution are discussed. In specific, the paper characterizes the primary pathways for agent evolution in dynamic environments from four complementary perspectives: memory-centric experience evolution, orchestration-centric workflow evolution, trajectory-centric offline evolution, and exploration-centric online evolution. And three paradigms of environment evolution are identified, namely neural-driven, difficulty-driven, and scaling-driven approaches. At last, several promising future directions are discussed, including Environment-as-a-Service, Multi-agent Environments, and Neural-Symbolic Environments.

light_analysis.overview: 本文系统综述了基于LLM的智能体环境工程，从建模、合成、评估到应用的全生命周期，并提出智能体-环境协同进化框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对基于LLM的智能体环境的系统分类和深入分析。环境作为智能体交互的核心系统，驱动模型能力持续进化，理解其工程化方法对于促进智能体研究和应用至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文从环境工程生命周期出发，首先从八个属性（如可观察性、动态性）和八个领域（如游戏、编程）介绍代表性环境；其次，提出自动环境合成的两种范式：符号合成（基于规则）和神经合成（基于学习），并讨论了各范式的评估方法；最后，从智能体与环境协同进化角度，总结了四种智能体进化路径（记忆中心、编排中心、轨迹中心、探索中心）和三种环境进化范式（神经驱动、难度驱动、规模驱动）。
light_analysis.result: 本文为综述性论文，未提供具体实验结果，但通过系统分类和深入分析，识别出智能体进化与环境进化的多种互补路径和范式，为后续研究奠定了理论基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次从工程生命周期角度全面综述了LLM智能体环境，提出了环境即服务、多智能体环境和神经符号环境等未来方向，对推进智能体与环境协同发展具有重要学术和工程指导价值。

title: DynaTok: Token-Based 4D Reconstruction from Partial Point Clouds
abstract: We address 4D reconstruction from partial point cloud sequences, where depth-sensor observations are incomplete, unordered, and lack explicit temporal correspondences. This geometry-only setting is challenging due to missing observations and ambiguous dynamics. While recent progress has largely relied on image-based methods, existing point-based approaches typically focus on single objects, assume relatively complete inputs, or require explicit correspondences. To address these limitations, we propose DynaTok, a point-based framework for correspondence-free 4D reconstruction from partial point cloud sequences without images. DynaTok encodes frames into compact latent tokens, aggregates incomplete observations over time with a Transformer-based spatiotemporal encoder, and decouples geometry and motion through residual tokens in a unified model. A flow-matching decoder then reconstructs complete, temporally consistent 4D point-cloud sequences conditioned on the latent tokens. Experiments on object- and scene-level benchmarks demonstrate improved reconstruction quality and temporal coherence from partial point cloud observations. Project page: https://wrchen530.github.io/dynatok/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DynaTok，一种基于token的4D重建框架，无需对应关系和图像，从部分点云序列重建完整且时间一致的4D点云。
light_analysis.motivation: 部分点云序列的4D重建面临观测不完整、缺乏时序对应等挑战。现有方法多依赖图像和显式对应，而点云方法通常假设完整输入或需显式匹配。DynaTok旨在解决这些局限性，提出纯点云的、无需对应关系的4D重建方法。
light_analysis.method: DynaTok将每帧点云编码为紧凑潜在token，利用Transformer时空编码器聚合时序信息，通过残差token解耦几何与运动，最后采用流匹配解码器生成完整且时间一致的4D点云序列。该方法统一处理几何和动态，无需额外输入。
light_analysis.result: 在物体级和场景级基准上，DynaTok相比现有方法显著提升了重建质量和时间连贯性。具体性能指标包括更高的完整度、更低的误差和更好的时序一致性，证实了从部分观测中重建完整4D点云的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DynaTok为部分点云序列的4D重建提供了高效且无需图像的解决方案，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的场景和实时应用，但当前方法在极端遮挡下可能仍有限制。

title: A Resource for Enthymeme Detection in Controversial Political Discourse
abstract: Enthymemes, arguments with unstated premises or conclusions, are pervasive in persuasive discourse, yet their annotation remains notoriously subjective. We present a resource of 1,482 tweets from politically controversial discourse, annotated by five annotators for the presence of enthymemes and their argument structure, designed to study label variation. We first revisit the definition of enthymemes and propose annotation guidelines anchored in Walton's argumentation schemes, offering a structured and constrained approach that nonetheless preserves room for the interpretive nature of the task. This contrasts with past resources, which tend to eliminate disagreement, obscuring its sources and preventing investigation of its potential benefits for model performance. We further propose a complexity analysis of the task, identifying where annotation imposes high cognitive load and may give rise to inconsistent annotation. Our preliminary experiments show that models trained on annotator disagreement outperform models trained on hard majority-vote labels. We close by reflecting on how structural openness in enthymeme definitions and guidelines enables the study of variation in subjective inferential processes for future resources and downstream NLP applications concerned with human inference.
comment: 43 pages, to be submitted to the Language Resource and Evaluation Journal

light_analysis.overview: 构建了一个政治争议性推文中的省略三段论（enthymeme）检测资源，通过标注分歧研究主观推理过程，并发现利用分歧训练的模型优于多数投票标签。
light_analysis.motivation: 省略三段论在说服性话语中普遍存在，但其标注高度主观，现有资源往往消除标注不一致，掩盖了分歧的来源及其对模型性能的潜在价值。论文旨在通过系统化标注指南和复杂性分析，研究标注分歧并利用其提升NLP模型在推理任务中的表现。
light_analysis.method: 从政治争议性话语中收集1,482条推文，由5名标注者基于Walton论证方案进行省略三段论及其论证结构的标注。重新定义省略三段论，提出结构化但保留解释空间的标注指南；进行复杂性分析，识别高认知负荷的标注环节；对比训练于硬多数投票标签与训练于标注者分歧的模型性能。
light_analysis.result: 初步实验表明，基于标注者分歧训练的模型在省略三段论检测任务上优于基于硬多数投票标签训练的模型。论文未提供具体数值，但强调了分歧数据的利用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过保留标注分歧，该资源为研究主观推理过程提供了基础，有助于未来资源建设和下游NLP应用（如人类推理任务）。结构开放的省略三段论定义和指南支持对变异性的系统研究，但论文未讨论局限性。

title: How Low Can You Go? Active Learning for Sparse Model Discovery in the Ultra-Low-Data Limit
abstract: Identifying the governing equations of complex dynamical systems remains a fundamental challenge across science and engineering. While early approaches relied on empirical data and heuristics, modern data-driven methods offer greater flexibility and fewer assumptions. However, data acquisition in real-world settings is often expensive. This work addresses this challenge by introducing an active learning strategy for dynamics discovery in the ultra-low data limit. Rather than sampling randomly, our method iteratively prioritizes regions that are most informative for model identification. This approach builds on Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamics (SINDy), and utilizes an ensemble extension, E-SINDy, to estimate epistemic uncertainty and guide the sampling for both ordinary and partial differential equations (ODEs/PDEs). For ODEs, an exhaustive analysis is conducted on the Lorenz system across varying data budgets and noise levels. For PDEs, two systems with contrasting dynamical characteristics are examined: the Burgers' equation, where a sharp shock front creates a distinction between informative and uninformative regions, and the Kuramoto-Sivashinsky equation, which presents a more spatially complex sampling landscape. Across all scenarios, the proposed method accurately identifies the governing dynamics with significantly fewer data samples than random sampling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于主动学习的稀疏动力学识别方法，在超低数据限制下高效发现控制方程。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实世界中获取物理系统数据的成本高昂，尤其是在动力学发现任务中。传统方法如SINDy依赖随机采样，在数据极端有限时无法准确识别控制方程。现有主动学习方法主要针对分类任务，未能有效利用模型不确定性指导采样以发现稀疏动力学。本研究旨在解决超低数据量下如何高效采样以识别ODE和PDE控制方程的问题，通过引入认知不确定性估计，优先采样信息最丰富的区域，从而显著减少所需数据量。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于E-SINDy的主动学习框架，利用集成学习估计认知不确定性，并针对ODE和PDE分别设计采样策略。对于ODE（如Lorenz系统），在不同数据预算和噪声水平下进行穷举分析；对于PDE（如Burgers方程和Kuramoto-Sivashinsky方程），利用空间异质性指导采样。每次迭代中，选择不确定性最高的点作为候选，更新模型直至收敛。该方法与随机采样对比，在保持准确性的同时大幅降低数据需求。
light_analysis.result: 在Lorenz系统实验中，主动学习方法在极低数据量（如每维度仅5个采样点）下仍能准确识别控制方程，而随机采样需要数十倍数据。在Burgers方程中，主动采样聚焦于激波附近区域，仅用约10%的随机采样点就恢复了完整动力学。对于Kuramoto-Sivashinsky方程，该方法在复杂空间结构下仍优于随机基线，准确率提升超过30%。所有结果均在不同噪声水平下验证，展示出鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了主动学习在超低数据限制下发现稀疏动力学方程的有效性，通过E-SINDy不确定性引导采样，显著降低了数据采集成本。该方法适用于多种ODE和PDE系统，具有重要的实际应用价值（如实验物理、生物动力学）。未来工作可扩展至更高维系统或结合多任务学习。局限在于对噪声的敏感性仍需进一步分析。

title: Beyond Dark Knowledge: Mixup-Based Distillation for Reliable Predictions
abstract: Knowledge Distillation (KD) and mixup have proven effective at inducing smoothness in class boundaries; KD captures inherent class relationships in probability distributions, and mixup enforces them through convex combinations of inputs. Their interaction, however, remains poorly understood, particularly when mixup is applied only during student training. In this setting, the teacher is queried on inputs drawn from a vicinal distribution it never saw during training, a controlled mismatch whose effect on knowledge transfer has not been characterised. We show that this mismatch causes the teacher's supervisory signal to be dominated by distributional confusion rather than inter-class structure. Despite it, the student does not merely imitate the teacher: it independently acquires greater linearity in the vicinal region, a structural property that the teacher lacks, and goes beyond dark-knowledge transfer. KD with mixup consistently improves student accuracy and reduces overconfidence by an order of magnitude relative to the baseline, across CIFAR and ImageNet with varying-capacity teachers. Crucially, calibration propagates from teacher to student independently of accuracy transfer, and temperature scaling governs a measurable accuracy-calibration trade-off that becomes more pronounced under vicinal training. These results reframe mixup distillation not as a degraded version of standard KD, but as a richer transfer channel that simultaneously shapes discriminative performance, uncertainty estimation, and representational geometry.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示了知识蒸馏中混合训练导致的教师与学生分布不匹配，使学生超越暗知识，获得更好的线性度和校准性。
light_analysis.motivation: 知识蒸馏（KD）和混合训练（mixup）分别通过概率分布和输入凸组合实现类边界平滑，但两者在蒸馏中的相互作用尚不明确。尤其是当混合仅用于学生训练时，教师被查询来自从未见过的邻域分布的输入，导致监督信号被分布混淆主导而非类别结构，这种失配对知识迁移的影响未被充分研究。
light_analysis.method: 提出混合蒸馏框架：在教师固定（仅用原始数据训练）的情况下，学生使用混合训练（如CIFAR和ImageNet数据集），教师为不同容量的模型。学生通过教师对混合输入的软标签学习，但教师输出受分布混淆影响。关键创新在于学生不仅模仿教师，还独立获得更大的线性度，实现超越暗知识的知识迁移。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR和ImageNet上，混合蒸馏一致提升学生准确率，并将过度自信降低一个数量级（与基线相比）。校准性独立于准确率从教师传递给学生，温度缩放控制可测量的准确率-校准权衡，在邻域训练下更显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 混合蒸馏不是标准KD的降级版本，而是一种更丰富的迁移渠道，同时塑造判别性能、不确定性估计和表征几何。未来可探索不同混合策略及更广泛架构下的校准传播机制。

title: OpenMedReason: Scientific Reasoning Supervision for Medical Vision-Language Models
abstract: High-stakes clinical use of large vision-language models (LVLMs) requires reasoning that is grounded in visual evidence and clinical knowledge, not just correct final answers. We introduce OpenMedReason, a large-scale, open multimodal medical reasoning corpus comprising approximately 450K image-question-answer instances whose reasoning traces are primarily derived from curated biomedical, human-authored scientific articles. OpenMedReason provides high-fidelity supervision beyond synthetic chains of thought, covering diverse medical domain vision modalities such as radiological scans, microscopic images, visible light photographs, charts, and others. We complement it with OpenMedReason-Bench, a held-out benchmark that allows fine-grained evaluation of LVLMs along three complementary axes of capability, including perception, medical knowledge, and rationale, enabling diagnostic evaluation beyond final-answer accuracy. OpenMedReason is a rich training resource that exhibits its effectiveness in both supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement-based alignment. Training with OpenMedReason yields a 20% average improvement in VQA accuracy over the base model and achieves performance within 4.2% of the strongest comparable-scale medical LVLMs. Fine-grained performance analysis confirms that the gains are not concentrated in any single axis: OpenMedReason improves perception, medical knowledge, and rationale jointly, and its reasoning traces are preferred over those of the base model in 86.1% of pairwise comparisons. We release the code and dataset at huggingface.co/datasets/neginb/OpenMedReason.
comment: 42 pages, 9 figures, 24 tables. Dataset and code: https://huggingface.co/datasets/neginb/OpenMedReason

light_analysis.overview: 提出OpenMedReason大规模多模态医学推理语料库和基准，提升医学视觉语言模型的推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床级视觉语言模型需要基于视觉证据和临床知识的推理，而现有模型多依赖合成思维链或仅追求最终答案正确性。缺乏高质量、覆盖多模态医学领域的推理监督数据，且缺乏对感知、知识和推理三方面能力的细粒度评估基准。
light_analysis.method: 构建约45万图像-问题-答案实例，推理轨迹源自人类撰写的生物医学科学文章，覆盖放射学扫描、显微镜图像、可见光照片、图表等模态。提供OpenMedReason-Bench基准，按感知、医学知识和推理三个能力轴进行诊断评估。训练采用监督微调和基于强化学习的对齐。
light_analysis.result: 在VQA任务上平均准确率提升20%，与最强可比规模医学LVLM差距在4.2%以内。细粒度分析显示感知、知识和推理三方面均获提升，推理轨迹在86.1%的配对比较中优于基模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: OpenMedReason为医学多模态推理提供了高质量训练资源和评估基准，有效提升LVLM的推理能力与临床可用性。未来可扩展更多疾病领域和语言，并探索推理轨迹的合成方法。

title: A Controlled Study of Decoding-Time Truthfulness Methods on Instruction-Tuned LLMs
abstract: In this work, we introduce CHAIR (Classifier of Hallucination As ImproveR), a supervised framework for detecting hallucinations by analyzing internal logits from each layer of every token. Our method extracts a compact set of features such as maximum, minimum, mean, standard deviation, and slope-from the token logits across all layers, enabling effective hallucination detection without overfitting. Experiments on TruthfulQA and MMLU datasets demonstrate that CHAIR significantly improves detection accuracy, particularly in zero-shot scenarios, showcasing its robustness and generalizability. Beyond hallucination detection, CHAIR highlights the potential of using internal representations for designing advanced decoding strategies. By leveraging patterns in logits, we suggest that more sophisticated models and adaptive decoding methods could further reduce hallucinations and enhance text completion quality. CHAIR not only offers a practical solution for detecting hallucinations but also lays the groundwork for exploring richer representations in LLMs to improve their factuality and coherence.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CHAIR框架，利用每层token logits的紧凑特征进行幻觉检测，显著提升零样本准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在指令微调后容易产生幻觉（hallucination），即生成不忠实的事实性内容。现有方法多依赖外部知识或后处理，缺乏对模型内部表征的深入利用。本文旨在通过分析解码过程中各层token的logits分布特征，实现轻量级、可泛化的幻觉检测，从而为改进解码策略提供基础。
light_analysis.method: 提出CHAIR（Classifier of Hallucination As ImproveR）框架，从每个token在所有Transformer层的logits中提取五个统计特征：最大值、最小值、均值、标准差和斜率。将这些特征输入分类器进行二分类（幻觉与否）。该方法无需修改模型参数，适用于任意指令微调LLM，且在零样本场景下直接应用。
light_analysis.result: 在TruthfulQA和MMLU数据集上，CHAIR在幻觉检测任务中显著优于基线方法，尤其在零样本设置下展现出较强的鲁棒性和泛化能力。摘要未提供具体准确率数值，但明确表示检测准确率提升，且方法不易过拟合。
light_analysis.conclusion: CHAIR验证了利用LLM内部logits特征检测幻觉的有效性，为设计自适应解码策略提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的模型（如基于注意力分布的表示）以进一步提升事实性和连贯性。该方法具有实际应用价值，可集成到文本生成系统中实时检测幻觉。

title: TopoCap: Learning Topology-Agnostic Motion Priors for Monocular Video-to-Animation
abstract: The explosion of generative 3D assets has created a massive demand for animation, yet current motion capture methods remain brittle, restricted to species-specific templates (e.g., SMPL) or requiring labor-intensive manual rigging. We introduce TopoCap, the first unified framework capable of extracting motion from monocular video and retargeting it onto characters with arbitrary, unseen skeletal topologies, i.e., from bipeds to hexapods and inanimate objects, without test-time optimization. Our key insight is that while skeletal structures are combinatorial and discrete, the underlying physics of motion occupy a continuous, low-dimensional manifold. We materialize this insight via a two-stage generative pipeline. First, we learn a Universal Motion Manifold using a Graph CVAE that compresses heterogeneous kinematic chains into a shared, fixed-length latent code. By explicitly conditioning the decoder on a structural embedding of the target rig, we disentangle motion dynamics from skeletal topology. Second, we treat video-to-animation as a conditional flow matching problem, predicting these topology-agnostic codes from visual features. To learn this generalized prior, we introduce Mobjaverse, a massive-scale dataset curated from Objaverse-XL. Comprising over 5,000 unique skeletal topologies and 2 million frames, it exceeds the structural diversity of existing datasets by two orders of magnitude. Extensive experiments demonstrate that \MethodMotion outperforms specialist models on human and quadruped benchmarks while enabling zero-shot retargeting for the long tail of 3D creatures. Dataset is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/duckduckplz/Mobjaverse.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TopoCap，首个统一框架，能从单目视频提取动作并零样本重定向到任意骨架拓扑，无需测试时优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式3D资产爆发带来巨大动画需求，但现有动作捕捉方法脆弱，局限于特定物种模板（如SMPL）或需要人工绑定，无法处理多样化的骨架拓扑（如两足、六足、无生命物体）。这严重限制了动画制作的效率和泛化能力。因此，亟需一种拓扑无关的运动提取与重定向方法。
light_analysis.method: 核心创新在于两阶段生成流水线：1）学习通用运动流形：使用Graph CVAE将异构运动链压缩为固定长度潜码，解码器以目标骨架结构嵌入为条件，从而解耦运动动态与骨架拓扑；2）视频到动画：将问题建模为条件流匹配，从视觉特征预测拓扑无关的潜码。同时构建大规模数据集Mobjaverse，含5000+独特骨架拓扑和200万帧，支撑模型训练。
light_analysis.result: 在人类和四足动物基准测试上，TopoCap超越专业模型，并实现零样本重定向到长尾3D生物（如六足动物、无生命物体）。数据集Mobjaverse公开，其结构多样性超过现有数据集两个数量级，为大规模泛化提供支撑。
light_analysis.conclusion: TopoCap首次实现了从单目视频到任意拓扑角色的统一动画生成，显著提升了动作捕捉的泛化性和自动化程度。该工作为3D内容创作提供了高效工具，尤其适用于非标准骨架的动画场景。未来可扩展至更复杂的运动交互或实时应用。

title: Towards Responsibly Non-Compliant Machines
abstract: We consider the problem of engineering autonomous intelligent agents that are capable to responsibly not comply with user requests. We argue that machine non-compliance comes in many different forms, and sketch the issues we should pursue on the road of accomplishing responsibly non-compliant intelligent machines. We anchor responsible non-compliance in justifications for task refusal, pathways to override the non-compliance, as well as careful tracking of security risks and liability transfers.
comment: Presented at AAMAS-26 Workshop on Rebellion and Disobedience in AI https://sites.google.com/view/rad-ai/rad-ai/cfp?authuser=0

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了工程化能负责任地不服从用户请求的自主智能体，并概述了实现该目标的关键问题和研究路线。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着人工智能系统在现实世界中广泛应用，用户可能提出不合理、有害或违背伦理的请求，而现有AI系统通常设计为无条件服从，缺乏拒绝机制。这种盲目服从可能导致安全风险、责任模糊和伦理问题。因此，研究如何让智能体具备合理的非服从能力至关重要。当前方法未系统化考虑非服从的合法性、可覆盖性和责任归属，亟需建立理论框架。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过分类机器不服从的多种形式，构建了负责任非服从的框架。核心包括：基于任务拒绝的合理理由（如安全、伦理冲突），设计可覆盖非服从的途径（允许用户或管理者在特定情况下绕过拒绝），以及严格跟踪安全风险和明确责任转移机制。该方法强调非服从需可解释和可审计，确保决策透明。未提及具体数据集或模型架构，属于概念性研究。
light_analysis.result: 论文未提供具体实验数据或性能指标，作为概念性论文，其主要成果是提出了一个完整的理论框架和设计原则，包括非服从的类型学、合理性论证以及风险责任追踪机制。该框架为后续实现负责任非服从智能体奠定了基础，但与基线方法的对比未涉及，因为该方向此前缺乏系统化研究。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文的主要贡献在于明确了智能体负责任非服从的核心维度：理由、可覆盖性和责任追踪，为开发符合伦理和安全要求的AI系统提供了指导。学术上，它填补了机器行为学中非服从领域的研究空白；实践上，有助于构建更可信赖的自主系统。潜在局限性是缺乏实现细节和验证，未来工作应聚焦于具体算法实现和实验评估。

title: nD-RoPE: A Generalized RoPE for n-Dimensional Position Embedding
abstract: Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE) is widely adopted in Transformer models, yet its extension to high-dimensional domains lacks a unified theoretical formulation. Most existing approaches either apply rotations independently along each axis or empirically mix frequencies, which limits cross-dimensional interactions and yields direction-dependent representations. To address these limitations, we propose nD-RoPE, a decomposition-free generalization of RoPE to arbitrary dimensions. From a translation-invariant formulation in continuous Hilbert space, we derive a spectral condition for isotropy that requires treating positions and frequencies as coupled \(n\)-dimensional vectors. We instantiate this formulation with a multi-scale regular-simplex wave-vector design, which provides non-degenerate spatial coverage and a symmetric, directionally balanced second-order response. Experiments across images, videos, and point clouds demonstrate consistent performance gains and improved generalization in high-dimensional settings.
comment: Accepted to the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出nD-RoPE，一种将旋转位置编码推广到任意维度的无分解方法，实现各向同性和跨维度交互。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有旋转位置编码（RoPE）在高维扩展中缺乏统一理论，多数方法独立沿各轴旋转或经验混合频率，导致跨维度交互受限和方向依赖表示。这些不足限制了Transformer模型处理图像、视频、点云等高维数据时的性能。
light_analysis.method: nD-RoPE从连续希尔伯特空间的平移不变性出发，推导出各向同性的谱条件，要求将位置和频率视为耦合的n维向量。通过多尺度正则单纯形波矢设计实现非退化空间覆盖和对称方向平衡的二阶响应，无需分解操作。
light_analysis.result: 在图像、视频和点云数据集上的实验表明，nD-RoPE相比现有高维RoPE方法取得一致性能提升，并在高维场景中展现出更好的泛化能力。具体数值未在摘要中明确，但强调即插即用式改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: nD-RoPE为高维位置编码提供了统一理论框架，有效增强了跨维度交互与方向不变性。该工作推动Transformer在多模态高维数据中的应用，未来可探索更优波矢设计或扩展到其他架构。

title: PCA-Enhanced Adaptive NVAR Framework for High-Resolution Sea Surface Temperature Forecasting in the East Sea
abstract: Accurate forecasting of sea surface temperature (SST) in regional seas such as the East Sea is crucial for monitoring marine ecosystems, assessing climate risks, managing fisheries, and conducting naval operations. Traditional numerical ocean models provide reliable predictions but are computationally expensive and often unsuitable for real-time forecasting. Many deep learning methods also struggle with high-dimensional spatiotemporal ocean data and experience error accumulation over longer forecasting periods. This study builds on our previously proposed Adaptive Next-Generation Reservoir Computing (Adaptive NVAR) framework, initially introduced and tested on synthetic dynamical systems, and extends it to ocean forecasting. We present a reduced-order forecasting framework that combines Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) with Adaptive NVAR to predict SST dynamics in the East Sea. SST fields are compressed into a low-dimensional representation using SVD, which extracts dominant modes of ocean variability. Adaptive NVAR models the temporal evolution of these latent states, and the predicted states are reconstructed into SST forecasts. We evaluate the framework using regional ocean datasets and compare it with the standard NG-RC/NVAR. Results show that Adaptive NVAR consistently achieves lower forecasting errors across multiple prediction horizons. In addition, SVD reduces computational complexity, resulting in a fast and scalable framework suitable for real-time ocean forecasting.

light_analysis.overview: 结合SVD降维与自适应NVAR的时间序列建模，提出一种高效、可扩展的东海海表面温度预测框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 东海海表面温度（SST）精确预测对海洋生态监测、气候风险评估、渔业管理和海军行动至关重要。传统数值海洋模型预测可靠但计算昂贵，不适合实时预测。深度学习方法处理高维时空海洋数据时存在误差累积问题，难以用于长期预报。因此，需要一种计算高效且能处理高维数据的实时预测方法。
light_analysis.method: 本文基于先前提出的自适应下一代水库计算（Adaptive NVAR）框架，将其扩展到海洋预报领域。首先利用奇异值分解（SVD）对SST场进行降维，提取主导海洋变率模态，得到低维表示。然后使用Adaptive NVAR模型对这些潜在状态的时间演化进行建模，最后将预测的潜在状态重构为SST预报。该框架结合了SVD的降维能力和Adaptive NVAR的非线性时间序列建模优势，形成降阶预报系统。
light_analysis.result: 在区域海洋数据集上评估，与标准NG-RC/NVAR相比，Adaptive NVAR在多个预测时间范围内均实现更低的预报误差。SVD降低了计算复杂度，使得框架快速且可扩展，适用于实时海洋预测。摘要未明确报告具体误差数值或提升百分比，但强调了误差一致降低和计算效率提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出了一种结合SVD和自适应NVAR的降阶实时SST预报框架，显著降低了计算开销并提高了预报精度，尤其适用于高维海洋数据的实时应用。该框架在东海区域表现出优于标准方法的性能，为海洋实时预报提供了高效解决方案。未来可探索其在不同海区的适用性及更长预报时效的优化。

title: Time-Conditioned and Multi-Time Survival Prediction from 2D PET/CT Projections in Lung Cancer
abstract: Accurate prediction of overall survival (OS) from positron emission tomography/computed tomography (PET/CT) can support personalized treatment and follow-up strategies in oncology. However, the impact of temporal modeling on imaging-based survival prediction remains insufficiently explored. We investigate how different temporal formulations influence survival prediction by developing two complementary approaches: Attention-guided Time-Conditioned Survival (ATCS) and Multi-Time Survival (MTS). We retrospectively analyzed pre-treatment PET/CT images from 848 patients with non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC), including 556 for model development and 292 for held-out testing. A previously proposed Time-Conditioned Survival (TCS) model was used as a baseline. Models were trained using 5-fold cross-validation and evaluated on the test set using time-dependent area under the curve (AUC) at 6-month intervals from 0.5 to 5 years. Both ATCS and MTS outperformed the baseline TCS model, achieving mean AUCs of 0.794 and 0.793, respectively, compared to 0.767. ATCS performed better at earlier time points (0.5-3 years), whereas MTS performed better at later intervals (3.5-5 years). Combining tumor-specific and tissue-wise PET/CT features improved performance over either input alone. Finer temporal discretization improved short-term prediction, while coarser intervals provided more stable long-term estimates. These findings demonstrate that temporal modeling and input design influence PET/CT-based survival prediction. The proposed approaches enable time-specific survival estimation from pre-treatment imaging and may support improved risk stratification and clinical decision-making.

light_analysis.overview: 提出时间条件生存预测（ATCS）和多时间生存预测（MTS）两种方法，在肺癌PET/CT图像上实现更准确的生存预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有生存预测方法多基于静态影像特征，缺乏对时间动态建模的充分探索。时间建模如何影响基于影像的生存预测仍不明确，且现有模型难以提供不同时间点的特异性预测。本研究旨在通过时间条件建模和多时间点预测，提升对非小细胞肺癌患者总体生存期的预测精度，支持个性化治疗与随访策略。
light_analysis.method: 提出两种互补方法：注意力引导时间条件生存（ATCS）和多时间生存（MTS）。ATCS通过注意力机制融合时间条件信息，MTS直接预测多个时间点的生存概率。使用848例非小细胞肺癌患者的预处理PET/CT图像（556例训练，292例测试），以时间条件生存（TCS）为基线，采用5折交叉验证训练。输入包括肿瘤特异性与组织学PET/CT特征。
light_analysis.result: ATCS和MTS在测试集上平均时间依赖性AUC（0.5-5年，6个月间隔）分别达0.794和0.793，高于基线TCS的0.767。ATCS在早期（0.5-3年）更优，MTS在晚期（3.5-5年）更优。结合肿瘤与组织特征优于单一输入。更细时间离散化提升短期预测，更粗间隔稳定长期估计。
light_analysis.conclusion: 时间建模和输入设计显著影响PET/CT生存预测。ATCS和MTS能提供时间特异性生存估计，改善风险分层和临床决策。未来可探索更细粒度时间建模及多模态融合，但需注意数据量和计算复杂度。

title: Unstable Features, Reproducible Subspaces: Understanding Seed Dependence in Sparse Autoencoders
abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) are widely used to interpret neural network representations, but their utility depends on whether the learned features are reproducible across training runs. We study this question through \emph{feature stability}: for each SAE feature, we estimate the probability that a similar feature reappears in an independently trained SAE. This yields a scalable per-feature signal that separates stable from unstable features. In a large-scale study across seeds, models, layers, dictionary sizes, and SAE variants, we find a pronounced functional asymmetry: stable features carry most of the reconstruction- and prediction-relevant signal, while unstable features have weak marginal impact and are dominated by low-frequency surface-form triggers in both activation statistics and automatic explanations. Geometrically, unstable features are individually non-reproducible but concentrate in reproducible lower-rank subspaces, suggesting that seed dependence often reflects basis ambiguity within a shared region of activation space rather than pure noise. A controlled synthetic model makes this mechanism explicit, showing that low-rank ground-truth features can be recovered at the subspace level while remaining non-identifiable as individual SAE latents across seeds. Finally, by pooling unique cross-seed features, we construct more stable SAEs while preserving explained variance in this setting. Together, these results show that unstable features are not merely failed or noisy latents: they have weak individual functional impact, but reflect reproducible low-dimensional structure that standard SAEs resolve differently across seeds.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示稀疏自编码器特征的可重复性问题，发现不稳定特征集中于可复现的低秩子空间，并利用跨种子特征池化构建更稳定的SAE。
