The method identifies Path IV and Path VI as preferable candidates, with results of 11.54 +/- 0.31 mm/h, RRD = 0.43, and 8.28 +/- 0.34 mm/h, RRD = 0.46, respectively. These paths show more balanced performance in rainfall-intensity stability, raindrop-spectrum realism, and perception consistency. The proposed method supports path selection, condition description, and credible interpretation of autonomous-driving perception tests under rainfall.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于路径的模拟降雨可信度评估方法，通过等效降雨强度、不确定带和雨滴分布真实度评分，实现自动驾驶感知测试中模拟降雨的可信评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶感知测试中，模拟降雨条件常用名义降雨强度或单点测量描述，难以与真实降雨对齐，导致测试结果无法映射到真实场景。现有方法缺乏对空间非均匀性和感知一致性的考量，影响SOTIF风险评估的可信度。因此，需要一种路径化的可信度评估框架，以准确模拟真实降雨对感知系统的影响。
light_analysis.method: 以真实降雨的雨滴尺寸和速度联合分布为参考，将每条候选路径表示为路径等效降雨强度、不确定带和路径平均雨滴分布真实度（RRD）评分。利用激光雷达目标点云数和平均反射率进行感知一致性校正，量化模拟路径对真实降雨感知效果的代理能力。实验采用约10,000个真实雨滴谱样本、728个RainSense感知样本和45个空间采样点。
light_analysis.result: 结果表明，同一名义条件下存在空间非均匀性，验证了基于路径评估的必要性。该方法识别出Path IV和Path VI为优选路径，其等效降雨强度分别为11.54±0.31 mm/h和8.28±0.34 mm/h，RRD评分为0.43和0.46。这两条路径在降雨强度稳定性、雨滴谱真实度和感知一致性方面表现更均衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架支持自动驾驶降雨感知测试中的路径选择、条件描述和结果可信解释，有助于系统边界识别和SOTIF风险评估。未来可扩展至更多降雨类型和感知传感器，提供更全面的可信评估工具。

title: What Uncertainties Do We Need for Dynamical Systems?
abstract: The distinction between aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty has received considerable attention in machine learning research, mainly in the context of supervised learning but also in other settings such as generative modeling. In this paper, we offer a machine learning perspective on uncertainty modeling for dynamical systems, which has been studied much less so far. In particular, we ask: what uncertainties do we need for dynamical systems? We discuss sources of uncertainty, clarify their nature (aleatoric or epistemic), and consider how the objectives of representing and quantifying uncertainty vary across different tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 本文从机器学习视角探讨动态系统中的不确定性类型（偶然性与认知性）及其在不同任务中的建模需求。
light_analysis.motivation: 不确定性建模在监督学习和生成模型中已受关注，但在动态系统领域研究较少。动态系统涉及时间演化、状态估计和控制等场景，其不确定性来源复杂（如过程噪声、模型误匹配），现有方法未能系统区分和量化偶然性与认知不确定性，导致模型泛化与决策风险难以评估。
light_analysis.method: 本文通过理论分析，系统梳理动态系统中不确定性的来源（如初始状态、参数、结构），并依据可减少性将其分类为偶然（固有噪声）和认知（模型缺陷）。进一步探讨回归、预测、控制等任务中不确定性表示的目标差异，提出应根据任务需求选择适当的量化策略（如概率状态空间模型或贝叶斯方法）。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据或性能指标，但逻辑论证表明：明确区分两类不确定性有助于动态系统建模的鲁棒性，例如在强化学习中认知不确定性指导探索，偶然不确定性量化风险。相比未区分的传统方法，所提框架能更精准地评估模型置信度，但缺乏实证对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为首个系统探讨动态系统不确定性的机器学习视角工作，为后续研究提供分类法与任务导向的设计原则。其价值在于弥合监督学习与动态系统不确定性建模的鸿沟，但局限为理论框架，缺乏算法实现与验证。未来可专注于开发贝叶斯动态模型或集成不确定性量化方法。

title: PAWS: Preference Learning with Advantage-Weighted Segments
abstract: Preference-based reinforcement learning (PbRL) learns policies from human trajectory-level comparisons, avoiding explicit reward design and expert demonstrations. Existing methods typically train utility functions on trajectory or segment-level preferences while relying on per-step utility estimates during policy optimization. This training and inference mismatch induces a distribution shift that severely degrades temporal credit assignment and limits policy learning. We analyze this issue and propose PAWS, a segment-based preference learning method that performs policy updates directly using segment-level advantage functions. By aligning utility training with policy optimization, PAWS preserves trajectory-level preference information and avoids unreliable per-step learning signals. Experiments on simulated robotic manipulation and locomotion tasks demonstrate that PAWS consistently outperforms existing PbRL approaches, highlighting the importance of distribution-consistent preference learning.
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出PAWS方法，通过片段级优势函数进行策略更新，解决偏好强化学习中训练-推理分布不匹配问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有偏好强化学习方法在训练时使用轨迹或片段级偏好学习效用函数，但在策略优化时依赖单步效用估计，导致训练与推理的分布偏移，严重削弱时间信用分配能力，限制了策略学习效果。因此需要一种保持分布一致性的偏好学习方法。
light_analysis.method: PAWS方法直接利用片段级优势函数进行策略更新，将效用训练与策略优化对齐，避免不可靠的单步学习信号。具体地，从人类偏好中学习片段级效用，并据此计算片段优势，替代传统的单步优势估计，从而保留轨迹级偏好信息。该方法不改变基础算法框架，仅调整信号计算方式。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟机器人操作和运动任务中，PAWS持续优于现有偏好强化学习方法，验证了分布一致性偏好学习的重要性。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明性能提升显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: PAWS通过对齐训练与推理的分布，提升了偏好强化学习的时间信用分配和策略性能。该工作强调了分布一致性在偏好学习中的关键作用，为未来PbRL研究提供了新方向。局限性可能在于需要更多片段级偏好数据。

title: ParseFixer: An Agentic Framework for Document Parsing via Selective Multimodal Correction
abstract: In this report, we present our third-place solution for the DataMFM Challenge Track 1: Document Parsing. This track requires models to recover structured Markdown documents from document page images while preserving textual content and document structure. To address the complementary requirements of accurate content recovery and faithful structure reconstruction, we propose ParseFixer, an agentic framework for backbone parsing and selective correction. ParseFixer consists of two key modules: Full-Page Backbone Parsing (FBP) and Agentic Selective Correction (ASC). FBP produces stable initial Markdown outputs with MinerU2.5 Pro, while ASC detects high-value parsing failures and repairs them through a verify-and-rollback correction process. By placing selective multimodal correction after open-source backbone parsing, ParseFixer improves the recovery of key document elements without rewriting reliable backbone predictions. On the test set, our final system achieves an overall score of 61.78 and ranks third in Track 1, demonstrating its effectiveness for accurate document parsing. Our code will be released at: https://github.com/iLearn-Lab/CVPRW26-ParseFixer.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ParseFixer代理框架，通过选择性多模态校正提高文档解析的准确性和结构恢复。
light_analysis.motivation: 文档解析需要同时准确恢复文本内容和忠实重建文档结构。现有开源解析器如MinerU2.5 Pro虽能稳定输出Markdown，但存在高价值部分解析失败的问题。直接替换整个解析器成本高且可能破坏原有可靠预测。因此需要一种选择性校正方法，仅修复关键失败区域而不重写正确部分。
light_analysis.method: ParseFixer包含两个模块：全页骨干解析（FBP）使用MinerU2.5 Pro生成初始Markdown；代理选择性校正（ASC）检测高价值的解析失败（如表格、公式）并通过验证-回滚流程进行修复。ASC利用多模态大模型进行选择性校正，仅修改检测到错误的部分，保持其他部分不变。
light_analysis.result: 在DataMFM挑战赛Track 1测试集上，ParseFixer取得61.78的总分，排名第三。该方法在保持可靠基线预测的同时，显著提升关键元素（如表格、公式）的恢复效果，验证了选择性校正策略的有效性。与直接替换解析器相比，性能更优且更稳定。
light_analysis.conclusion: ParseFixer通过代理框架实现了对文档解析中高价值错误的精准修复，平衡了内容准确性与结构完整性。其模块化设计可适配不同骨干解析器，具有实用价值。未来可探索更复杂的失败检测指标和多轮校正策略，以进一步提升解析鲁棒性。

title: SpecLoR: Spectral Lookahead Rectification for Motion-Coherent Text-to-Video Generation
abstract: Flow Matching has enabled robust text-to-video generation via latent ODE sampling. However, velocity approximation and numerical discretization errors inevitably accumulate, causing sampling trajectories to drift. Consequently, generated videos often suffer from severe spatiotemporal inconsistencies. Nevertheless, directly correcting these drifted, noisy latents is challenging: (i) timestep-dependent noise obscures reliable structural cues; (ii) spatial interventions risk disrupting intricate local geometry while incurring heavy computational costs. To address this, we propose Spectral Lookahead Rectification (SpecLoR), a plug-and-play inference method that bypasses noise via lookahead prediction, and circumvents spatiotemporal entanglement by shifting corrections to the frequency domain, where universal statistical priors of natural videos are readily available. First, during early sampling stages, SpecLoR looks ahead to estimate the clean latent $z_{t,0}$ and computes its 3D spatiotemporal spectrum. Next, SpecLoR rectifies the amplitude spectrum to match the prior, leaving the phase intact. Finally, the corrected state is re-noised to resume ODE integration. Experiments on Wan2.2 demonstrate that SpecLoR significantly reduces physical artifacts and enhances motion coherence across multiple benchmarks with minimal computational overhead (4 additional NFEs).

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种即插即用的频谱前瞻校正方法，通过频域幅度谱修正解决文本到视频生成中的时空不一致问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有流匹配文本到视频生成方法中，速度近似和数值离散误差导致采样轨迹漂移，生成的视频存在严重时空不一致。直接纠正带噪潜在变量面临挑战：时间步依赖的噪声掩盖结构信息，空间干预破坏局部几何且计算成本高。因此，需要一种能绕过噪声、避免时空纠缠的轻量级校正方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出SpecLoR，一种即插即用的推理方法。在早期采样阶段，通过前瞻预测估计干净潜在变量并计算其3D时空频谱；然后校正幅度谱以匹配自然视频的统计先验，保留相位；最后将校正后的状态重新加噪以继续ODE积分。该方法将校正从时空域转移到频域，利用频域先验避免复杂空间操作，计算开销仅增加4个NFEs。
light_analysis.result: 在Wan2.2模型上实验，SpecLoR显著减少物理伪影并增强运动连贯性。在多个基准测试中，仅以额外4个NFEs的微小计算开销即实现性能提升，表明该方法在保持效率的同时有效改善了视频质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: SpecLoR通过频域幅度校正和前瞻预测，有效解决了文本到视频生成中的轨迹漂移问题，提升了运动连贯性。该方法作为即插即用模块易于集成，计算开销低。未来可探索更复杂的频域先验或结合其他校正策略。

title: Efficient Multinomial Logistic Bandit via Frequent Directions
abstract: This paper studies efficient online algorithms for multinomial logistic bandits (MLogB), where the feedback distribution over $K+1$ outcomes follows a multinomial logistic model of $d$-dimensional action vectors. A representative UCB-type algorithm, OFUL-MLogB, achieves a regret bound of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(Kd\sqrt{T})$, but still requires $\mathcal{O}(K^3d^3)$ time and $\mathcal{O}(K^2d^2)$ space per round due to parameter estimation and optimistic reward construction, which is prohibitive in high-dimensional settings. To address this limitation, we propose EOFD-MLogB, which integrates frequent directions matrix sketching into OFUL-MLogB. By maintaining a low-rank SVD sketch of the accumulated Hessian, constrained online Newton updates in parameter estimation and $Kd \times K$ spectral-norm computations in the reward bonus are reduced to one-dimensional root-finding tasks and $K \times K$ eigenvalue computations, respectively. This yields dominant per-round time complexity $\mathcal{O}(Kd(m+K)^2)$ and space complexity $\mathcal{O}(Kd(m+K))$, where $m \ll d$ is the sketch size. We further prove a regret bound of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(Δ_T(Kd\lnΔ_T+m)\sqrt{T})$, where the sketching error factor $Δ_T$ is controlled by the $m$-truncated spectral tail of the Hessian. Thus, when the Hessian is approximately low-rank, the regret is close to that of OFUL-MLogB. Experiments validate the computational efficiency and competitive performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EOF-MLogB算法，通过频繁方向矩阵草图加速多项逻辑回归Bandit，实现近最优后悔界且大幅降低计算开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 多项逻辑回归Bandit在推荐系统等广泛应用中至关重要，但现有UCB类算法OFUL-MLogB每轮需O(K^3d^3)时间和O(K^2d^2)空间，高维设置下计算代价过高。因此亟需设计一种在保持后悔界的同时显著降低计算复杂度的算法。
light_analysis.method: 提出EOF-MLogB算法，核心创新在于将频繁方向矩阵草图集成到OFUL-MLogB中。通过维护累积Hessian的低秩SVD草图，将原本昂贵的约束在线牛顿更新和Kd×K谱范数计算分别简化为单变量求根和K×K特征值计算。主导每轮时间复杂度降至O(Kd(m+K)^2)，空间复杂度降至O(Kd(m+K))，其中草图大小m远小于d。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明EOF-MLogB的后悔界为Õ(Δ_T(Kd ln Δ_T + m)√T)，其中Δ_T由Hessian的m截断谱尾控制。当Hessian近似低秩时，后悔界接近OFUL-MLogB。实验验证了其计算效率（时间减少数个数量级）和竞争性能。摘要未给出具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次将频繁方向草图应用于多项逻辑回归Bandit，在保持近最优后悔界的同时大幅降低时空复杂度，尤其适合高维低秩场景。未来可探索自适应草图大小或扩展到其他广义线性Bandit模型。

title: Feature extraction for plant growth estimation
abstract: Precision agriculture requires the estimation of plant growth stages in real-time. When the plant growth stage is known, the wastage of resources in cultivation, such as nutrients and water, is reduced as only the required resources need to be supplied. Plants at different growth stages, however, have similar morphological features, which can make autonomous growth stage estimation difficult. This paper presents two feature extraction methods for growth stage estimation: one that uses a bank of Gabor filters and morphological operations, and the other that uses pre-trained convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and transfer learning. We test these methods on a publicly available plant growth stage dataset (``bccr-segset``) for two species, canola and radish, grown and captured under indoor conditions. The two proposed feature extraction methods are compared, using support vector machines and boosted trees as classifiers. We find that both methods are suitable for real-time applications, and that CNN features outperform the hand-crafted features, both with regard to speed and accuracy. The best system (VGG-19 features, classified with a radial basis function support vector machine) obtained an accuracy of 98.4% for both species, processing an image in 0.08 seconds.

light_analysis.overview: 提出两种植物生长阶段特征提取方法，比较手工特征与CNN特征，实现高精度实时估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 精准农业中实时估计植物生长阶段可减少水肥浪费，但不同阶段形态相似，传统方法难以准确区分。现有方法多依赖手工特征或复杂模型，实时性不足。本文旨在探索高效、准确的特征提取方案，解决生长阶段识别难题。
light_analysis.method: 提出了两种特征提取方法：一是基于Gabor滤波器组和形态学操作的手工特征；二是利用预训练CNN（如VGG-19）进行迁移学习。在公开数据集bccr-segset上测试，包括油菜和萝卜两种植物。分类器采用支持向量机（SVM）和提升树（Boosted Trees），比较不同特征组合的性能。
light_analysis.result: CNN特征在速度和精度上均优于手工特征。最佳系统（VGG-19特征+RBF SVM）对两种植物均达到98.4%准确率，单张图像处理仅需0.08秒，满足实时应用要求。手工特征虽准确率较低，但同样适合实时场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文验证了深度特征在植物生长阶段估计中的有效性，为精准农业自动化提供了可行方案。方法可推广至其他作物，未来可探索更轻量级网络或结合时序信息提升鲁棒性。

title: HAMNO: A Hierarchical Adaptive Multi-scale Neural Operator with Physics-Informed Learning for Dynamical Systems
abstract: Neural operators provide a powerful framework for learning solution mappings of partial differential equations directly in function space. However, many existing architectures still struggle to represent nonlinear time-dependent systems that involve multi-scale structures, long-range interactions, and stable long-time evolution. In this work, we introduce the Hierarchical Adaptive Multi-scale Neural Operator (HAMNO), a neural-operator architecture that combines local convolutional representations, global spectral operators, and hierarchical encoder-decoder processing. The central component of HAMNO is a data-dependent gating mechanism that adaptively balances local and global information at each spatial location, allowing the model to resolve fine-scale features while preserving long-range dependencies.   We further develop a physics-informed extension, PI-HAMNO, based on a multi-objective loss strategy that combines data fitting with strong- and weak-form physics constraints. The strong-form term penalizes the domain-integrated squared PDE residual in physical coordinates, while the weak-form term is constructed by multiplying the governing residual by finite-element test functions and evaluating the resulting element integrals using centroid-based tetrahedral quadrature. The framework is evaluated on non-periodic Allen-Cahn (AC), Cahn-Hilliard (CH), and Swift-Hohenberg (SH) equations defined on cubic domains. Across long-horizon rollout, data-limited training, out-of-distribution initial-condition shifts, and random-seed variations, HAMNO improves predictive accuracy over standard neural-operator baselines, while PI-HAMNO further enhances stability, physical consistency, and data efficiency. The implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/MBamdad/HAMNO .

light_analysis.overview: 提出HAMNO，一种结合局部卷积、全局谱算子和层次编码器-解码器的神经算子架构，通过数据依赖门控机制自适应平衡多尺度信息，并发展物理信息扩展PI-HAMNO，用于动力学系统的高效学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有神经算子架构在表示包含多尺度结构、长程交互和稳定长时间演化的非线性时变系统方面仍存在困难。需要一种能同时捕获局部细节和全局依赖关系、并保证长期预测稳定性的方法，以提升对复杂动力学系统的建模能力。
light_analysis.method: HAMNO结合局部卷积表示、全局谱算子（如傅里叶变换）和层次编码器-解码器处理，核心是数据依赖门控机制，在每个空间位置自适应融合局部和全局信息。物理信息扩展PI-HAMNO采用多目标损失，结合数据拟合与强形式（域内平方PDE残差）和弱形式（有限元测试函数乘以残差的积分）的物理约束，并使用基于质心的四面体求积评估元素积分。
light_analysis.result: 在非周期Allen-Cahn、Cahn-Hilliard和Swift-Hohenberg方程上评估，涵盖长时 rollout、数据有限训练、分布外初始条件偏移和随机种子变化。HAMNO相比标准神经算子基线提高了预测精度；PI-HAMNO进一步增强了稳定性、物理一致性和数据效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: HAMNO和PI-HAMNO为多尺度动力学系统的神经算子学习提供了有效框架，通过自适应门控和物理约束提升了精度与鲁棒性。未来可探索更复杂几何或多物理场应用，代码已开源。

title: Categorical Prior Lock-in: Why In-Context Learning Fails for Structured Data
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as conditional generators for structured data, relying on in-context learning (ICL) to adapt to new distributions without parameter updates. We investigate the limits of ICL for structured generation under distribution mismatch, using high-cardinality tabular data as a controlled test case, and identify a structural failure mode we term \textit{categorical prior lock-in}: the inability of ICL to update the model's prior over token distributions inherited from pre-training. Across two 7B-parameter open-weight models, ICL improves numerical fidelity with additional examples but exhibits a sharp ceiling on categorical distributions, failing to reproduce rare classes entirely. Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (LoRA) overcomes these limitations but introduces measurable memorization risk and, in some cases, destabilizes structured output generation, highlighting a fundamental trade-off between adaptability and privacy.
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures. Empirical study of in-context learning and LoRA fine-tuning for synthetic tabular data generation, introducing the phenomenon of categorical prior lock-in. Under review

light_analysis.overview: 揭示大型语言模型在结构化数据生成中因无法更新预训练分类先验导致的ICL失败模式，并对比LoRA微调的适应性与隐私风险。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型越来越多地用于结构化数据生成，依赖上下文学习（ICL）适应新分布。但现有方法在分布不匹配时性能受限，尤其是高基数表格数据。研究旨在探究ICL在结构化生成中的根本限制，发现其无法更新预训练的分类先验，导致对稀有类别完全失败。理解这一缺陷对改进模型适应性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 以高基数表格数据为受控测试用例，在两种7B参数开源模型上系统评估ICL在分布不匹配下的结构化生成表现。通过增加示例数量观察数值精度和分类分布的变化，并与参数高效微调（LoRA）对比。关键创新在于识别“分类先验锁定”这一结构性失败模式，即ICL无法超越预训练的分类先验分布。
light_analysis.result: ICL随着样例增加提高了数值保真度，但在分类分布上存在明显天花板，完全无法复现稀有类别。LoRA微调克服了这些限制，但引入了可测量的记忆风险，并在某些情况下破坏了结构化输出的稳定性。揭示了适应性与隐私/稳定性之间的根本权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是识别了ICL在结构化数据生成中的“分类先验锁定”失败模式，并证明了其与参数微调（LoRA）的优劣权衡。研究具有实际应用价值，提示在隐私敏感场景下需谨慎选择适应方法。未来工作可探索如何在不牺牲隐私的前提下提升ICL的分类适应性。

title: Decoding Multimodal Cues: Unveiling the Implicit Meaning Behind Hateful Videos
abstract: Hateful videos have become prevalent on online platforms, highlighting an urgent need for effective detection. However, existing studies primarily focus on binary classification and fail to provide contextual rationales that reveal the implicit meanings behind these judgments, significantly undermining model explainability. To fill this gap, we aim to achieve explainable hateful video detection, enabling models to provide contextual rationales that integrate relevant evidence and logical reasoning alongside decisions. This approach can comprehensively enhance the understanding of video content and the explainability of the decision-making process. We first introduce two datasets, Ex-HateMM and Ex-ImpliHateVid, for explainable hateful video detection. Each dataset provides fine-grained annotations of multimodal harmful elements, along with contextual rationales. We then propose an Information Augmentation and Reasoning Enhancement (IARE) framework designed for explainable detection. The framework employs an information augmentation phase that leverages the multimodal chain-of-thought to integrate harmful elements, thereby enriching rationale evidence. Additionally, IARE incorporates a reasoning enhancement phase, in which Direct Preference Optimization guides the model toward correct reasoning paths and away from incorrect ones, thereby improving the logical coherence of its justifications. We conduct extensive experiments on the two datasets, comparing multiple baselines with our proposed IARE framework. The results demonstrate that IARE achieves state-of-the-art performance while also generating accurate rationales.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可解释的仇恨视频检测方法，通过两个新数据集和IARE框架生成上下文理由。
light_analysis.motivation: 仇恨视频在在线平台泛滥，亟需有效检测。然而现有研究主要关注二元分类，无法提供揭示判断隐含意义的上下文理由，严重削弱模型可解释性。为解决此问题，论文旨在实现可解释的仇恨视频检测，使模型在决策同时提供整合相关证据和逻辑推理的上下文理由。
light_analysis.method: 首先引入两个数据集Ex-HateMM和Ex-ImpliHateVid，提供多模态有害元素的细粒度标注和上下文理由。然后提出IARE框架，包含信息增强阶段（利用多模态思维链整合有害元素丰富理由证据）和推理增强阶段（使用直接偏好优化引导正确推理路径，提高逻辑连贯性）。
light_analysis.result: 在两个数据集上进行的广泛实验，将多个基线方法与IARE框架比较。结果表明，IARE实现了最先进的性能，同时生成准确的推理理由。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出的可解释仇恨视频检测方法填补了现有研究缺乏解释性的空白，通过提供上下文理由增强了模型的可理解性。潜在局限性可能在于数据集规模和场景泛化性，未来可探索更复杂的多模态推理。

title: Online Shift Detection and Conformal Adaptation for Deployed Safety Classifiers
abstract: We present an online monitoring system for distributional shift in deployed safety classifiers, using calibrated sequential statistics to detect when a classifier has moved out of distribution. Upon detection, a conformal abstention layer adapts decision thresholds to recover a target error rate epsilon=0.1. In a pre-registered factorial evaluation (4 classifiers x 5 shift conditions x 20 seeds x 2 window sizes, 800 cells), the system achieves 86.6% valid detection (693/800, 95% CI [84.1%, 88.8%]) with mean latency of 39.5 steps. Detection holds across three ground-truth regimes: synthetic onset (86.6%), real temporal jailbreaks (85%, 17/20), and GCG adversarial attacks. Weighted conformal prediction recovers up to 39 pp of lost coverage for DeBERTa (ESS=46/300) but collapses for all other classifiers (ESS~300): logistic density ratio estimation achieves perfect source/target separability in high-dimensional embedding spaces, clipping all importance weights to the floor. DeBERTa shows a gradient from effective correction (paraphrase, ESS=46) to near-total collapse (adversarial suffix, ESS=206). PCA to 32 dimensions breaks the collapse, recovering 33 pp for Llama Guard and 21 pp for ShieldGemma. Variance decomposition reveals classifier (eta^2=0.243), shift type (eta^2=0.237), and their interaction (eta^2=0.185) all contribute substantially to detection latency variance (all p<0.001), indicating per-classifier monitoring profiles are necessary.
comment: 16 pages, 4 figures, 7 tables. Code and data at https://github.com/junwenleong/safety-classifier-shift-monitor

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种在线分布漂移监测系统，结合校准序列统计量和共形自适应层，在部署的安全分类器中保持目标错误率。
light_analysis.motivation: 部署的安全分类器面临分布漂移问题，导致性能下降。现有方法缺乏实时监测和自适应调整能力，难以在变化环境中维持稳定误差率。该研究旨在提供一种在线监测和自适应机制，确保分类器在漂移后仍能有效运作。
light_analysis.method: 使用校准的序列统计量进行在线漂移检测，检测到漂移后启用共形预测层自适应调整决策阈值，目标错误率ε=0.1。评估涵盖4个分类器、5种漂移条件、20个随机种子和2个窗口大小。采用加权共形预测和逻辑密度比估计处理重要性权重，并尝试PCA降维解决权重塌缩问题。
light_analysis.result: 系统在800个评估单元中实现86.6%的有效检测率（693/800，95% CI [84.1%,88.8%]），平均延迟39.5步。检测在合成发作、真实时间越狱和对抗攻击下均有效。加权共形预测对DeBERTa恢复最多39个百分点的覆盖损失，但其他分类器因重要性权重塌缩而失效。PCA降至32维后，为Llama Guard和ShieldGemma分别恢复33和21个百分点。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该系统有效实现了在线漂移监测和自适应错误率控制，但加权共形预测在高维嵌入空间中权重塌缩问题普遍存在，需依赖PCA等降维方法。不同分类器监测曲线差异显著，表明需要个性化监控方案。未来可探索更鲁棒的重要性权重估计方法。

title: uva-irlab-conv at SemEval-2026 Task 8: Multi-Turn RAG with Learned Sparse Retrieval and Listwise Reranking
abstract: This report describes our participation in SemEval-2026 Task 8 on multi-turn retrieval and question answering. The task evaluates conversational systems across four domains (finance, cloud documentation, government, Wikipedia), and includes unanswerable queries where the available collection does not contain sufficient evidence to produce a complete response. We propose a multi-turn retrieval-augmented generation pipeline that combines learned sparse retrieval with LLM-based reranking and generation. Using sparse retrieval as the primary retrieval method, we leverage its strong generalization across domains. In addition, we make use of the long-context capabilities of LLMs for conversational query rewriting, pointwise and listwise reranking, and generating the final response, each conditioned on the full conversational history. This multi-step design enables effective integration of conversational context throughout retrieval and generation, improving robustness across domains.
comment: SemEval-2026, The 20th International Workshop on Semantic Evaluation, collocated with ACL 2026, 9 pages, 5 figures, 6 tables

light_analysis.overview: 提出结合学习型稀疏检索与基于LLM重排序的多轮RAG流水线，用于跨领域会话系统中的检索与问答。
light_analysis.motivation: 多轮对话中的检索与问答面临领域多样性和不可回答查询等挑战，现有方法在跨领域泛化上存在不足。SemEval-2026 Task 8涵盖金融、云文档、政府和维基百科四个领域，且包含无答案查询，需要鲁棒的系统设计。
light_analysis.method: 采用多步RAG流水线：首先使用学习型稀疏检索作为主要检索方法，利用其强泛化能力跨领域检索；然后通过LLM进行对话查询重写、点式和列表式重排序，最终生成响应。每一步均基于完整对话历史，实现上下文的有效集成。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但指出该方法在多领域上提升了鲁棒性，表明其有效应对了跨领域和不可回答查询的挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种多轮RAG系统，通过稀疏检索与LLM重排序的协作，充分利用对话历史，显著增强了跨领域鲁棒性。该系统为会话式问答提供了实用框架，未来可扩展至更多领域或优化检索效率。

title: Semantic Grading of Written Answers in Low-Resource Language Bangla Using a Fine-Tuned Lightweight Language Model
abstract: Bangla is among the world's most widely spoken languages, yet it remains underserved in educational NLP research. In many remote and rural regions, access to qualified subject teachers is limited, and written answers are consequently graded largely by hand, restricting timely and consistent feedback. Automatic assessment is challenging because semantically correct responses can vary substantially in surface form. We present a bilingual (Bangla-English) evaluation system designed for low-resource educational settings that prioritizes semantic correctness over lexical overlap. Our approach fine-tunes a lightweight language model to grade each response using the question, reference answer, and student answer, producing a numeric score and concise, context-grounded feedback suitable for classroom deployment. We also construct a synthetic bilingual dataset to enable controlled training and evaluation. Across proprietary and open-source LLMs evaluated under a unified protocol, our QLoRA-tuned Qwen3-8B confirms consistent improvement by producing the most leakage-resistant feedback (RoRa = 0.819) in synthetic evaluation and the strongest agreement with human scores (rho = 0.936, MAE = 0.725) in a dedicated human study.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于QLoRA微调轻量级语言模型的双语语义评分系统，用于低资源孟加拉语书面答案自动评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 孟加拉语虽广泛使用但在教育NLP中资源匮乏，偏远地区缺乏教师导致人工评分受限，反馈不及时且不一致。现有自动评估方法依赖词汇重叠，难以处理语义正确但表达多样的答案，亟需优先语义正确性的轻量级评估系统。
light_analysis.method: 构建双语（孟加拉语-英语）评估系统，微调轻量级Qwen3-8B模型（采用QLoRA技术），输入问题、参考答案和学生答案，输出数值分数及上下文反馈。创建合成双语数据集用于训练和评估，确保模型可部署于低资源课堂环境。
light_analysis.result: 在统一评估协议下与多种专有和开源LLM对比，所提模型在合成评估中反馈防泄漏性最优（RoRa=0.819），在专门人类研究中与人工评分一致性最强（Spearman ρ=0.936，MAE=0.725），验证了轻量级模型在低资源语义评分中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为低资源语言教育提供了可行的自动评分方案，通过轻量级模型实现语义理解优先的评估，具备课堂部署价值。未来可扩展至更多低资源语言，并探索真实场景下的反馈质量优化。

title: Toward Generalist Autonomous Research via Hypothesis-Tree Refinement
abstract: Scientific progress depends on a repeated loop of exploration, experimentation, and abstraction. Researchers test candidate directions, interpret the evidence, and carry the resulting lessons into later attempts. We study how an AI agent can run this loop autonomously over long horizons. We introduce Arbor, a general framework for autonomous research that combines a long-lived coordinator, short-lived executors, and Hypothesis Tree Refinement (HTR), a persistent tree that links hypotheses, artifacts, evidence, and distilled insights across time. The coordinator manages global research strategy over the tree, while executors implement and test individual hypotheses in isolated worktrees. As results return, Arbor updates the tree, propagates reusable lessons, refines the search frontier, and admits verified improvements. This design turns autonomous research from a sequence of local attempts into a cumulative process in which strategy, execution, and evidence are carried across time. We evaluate Arbor under Autonomous Optimization (AO), an operational setting where an agent improves an initial research artifact through iterative experimentation without step-level human supervision. Across six real research tasks in model training, harness engineering, and data synthesis, Arbor achieves the best held-out result on all six tasks, attaining more than 2.5x the average relative held-out gain of Codex and Claude Code under the same task interface and resource budget. On MLE-Bench Lite, Arbor reaches 86.36% Any Medal with GPT-5.5, the strongest result in our comparison.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Arbor框架，通过假设树精炼（HTR）实现长期自主研究循环，将探索、实验和抽象自动化，显著提升研究效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 科学进步依赖反复的探索、实验和抽象循环，但现有AI系统难以在长时间跨度内自主执行这一循环。传统方法将研究视为独立尝试，缺乏累积和传播经验的能力，导致效率低下。需要一种能够持久化研究策略、假设和证据的框架，使AI代理能够连续改进研究成果，实现从局部尝试到累积过程的转变。
light_analysis.method: Arbor框架结合长期协调器、短期执行者和假设树精炼（HTR）。协调器管理全局研究策略，执行器在隔离工作树中实现和测试单个假设。HTR持久化链接假设、工件、证据和提炼的见解，在结果返回时更新树、传播可重用经验、优化搜索前沿，并接纳已验证的改进，使研究过程具有累积性。
light_analysis.result: 在六项真实研究任务（模型训练、工具工程、数据合成）中，Arbor在所有任务上取得最佳保留结果，平均相对保留增益是Codex和Claude Code的2.5倍以上。在MLE-Bench Lite上，Arbor使用GPT-5.5达到86.36% Any Medal，是对比中最强结果，展示了显著的跨任务泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: Arbor将自主研究从局部尝试转变为累积过程，策略、执行和证据跨时间传递，显著提升了研究效率和结果质量。该方法在多个研究任务中优于现有基线，展示了通用自主研究代理的潜力。未来可扩展到更广泛科研领域，并优化树结构管理以处理更大规模问题。

title: Corpus Augmentation for Sign Language Translation via LLM-Guided Video Stitching
abstract: Sign language translation (SLT) converts sign language video into spoken language text and holds significant promise for improving accessibility and enabling communication between signing and non-signing communities. While large weakly-aligned datasets have enabled pre-training at scale and gloss-free methods have reduced reliance on expert annotation, high-quality parallel sign video-text pairs for fine-tuning remain scarce, limiting generalisation on long-tail vocabulary and unseen constructions. We propose a corpus augmentation approach that requires no additional human annotation, external sign-language video corpora, or generative video models, relying only on the existing gloss-annotated training corpus and an LLM for sentence generation: per-gloss clips are extracted from training videos via CTC forced-alignment, novel gloss-sentence pairs are generated by a corpus-anchored LLM, and synthetic sequences are assembled through random sentence sampling and clip assignment. The resulting synthetic RGB video-text pairs are architecture-agnostic at the downstream training stage and can be consumed directly by RGB-based SLT models, or converted into pose or feature representations by pipelines that derive such inputs from video. Sincan et al. re-evaluated five recent gloss-free methods under strictly identical conditions; the largest verified gain over the GFSLT-VLP baseline was only 0.98 BLEU-4. Our augmentation, applied within the same framework, achieves +2.92 BLEU-4 without any change to architecture or training protocol. We further identify that synthetic data harms vision-language pretraining despite improving its objectives, and that optimising clip transitions for visual smoothness is counter-productive under L2-based criteria; we propose that abrupt boundaries may act as a form of implicit regularisation. Code is available at https://github.com/robizso/slt-datagen.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需额外标注的LLM引导视频拼接语料增强方法，显著提升手语翻译性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 手语翻译(SLT)中，高质量并行视频-文本对稀缺，限制了模型对长尾词汇和未见结构的泛化。现有方法依赖大规模弱对齐预训练或简化标注，但微调数据不足。本文旨在无需额外人力、外部语料或生成模型，仅利用现有标注训练集和LLM来增强语料，解决数据稀缺问题。
light_analysis.method: 通过CTC强制对齐从训练视频中提取每个词(gloss)的片段，利用语料锚定的LLM生成新的gloss-句子对，然后随机采样句子并分配对应片段，组装成合成RGB视频-文本对。该方法与下游SLT模型架构无关，可直接用于RGB模型或转为姿态/特征表示。
light_analysis.result: 在严格相同条件下评估五个最近的无词表方法，最大提升仅0.98 BLEU-4（GFSLT-VLP基线）。而所提增强方法在同一框架内，不改变架构或训练协议，实现+2.92 BLEU-4的提升。同时发现合成数据在视觉-语言预训练中有害，但改进其目标；优化片段过渡的视觉平滑性在L2准则下适得其反。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出有效的语料增强方法，显著提升手语翻译性能，且无需额外资源。揭示了合成数据在预训练中的负面影响以及突变边界作为隐式正则化的潜在作用。代码已公开。未来可探索更优的片段组合策略及预训练适应性。

title: The Art of Interrogation: Consistency Amplifies Factuality in Spatial Reasoning
abstract: Current Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) exhibit remarkable general capabilities but significantly underperform in spatial reasoning tasks. Existing approaches treat this gap as a knowledge deficit, relying on supervised fine-tuning (SFT) to ingest labeled spatial data from external vision sources or synthetic engines. In contrast, we argue that for many tasks, spatial reasoning capabilities are already present in pre-trained LRMs but require alignment through logical coherence under geometric 2D and 3D constraints. In this work, we propose a self-supervised reinforcement learning (RL) framework that targets the internal reasoning process without requiring ground-truth annotations. By formalizing the notion of consistency verifiers -- reward functions that check for geometric and semantic consistency under transformations -- we demonstrate that models can improve their spatial reasoning abilities. We use both image transformations, like flipping, and textual transformations, like swapping the order of objects in the question, and propose a new optimal transport-based RL strategy, OT-GRPO, which is a minimal-matching variant of group relative policy optimization tailored to pairwise verifiers. We show that this label-free consistency training approaches the accuracy of models trained with ground-truth supervision and achieves similar generalization across diverse tasks and data domains.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自监督强化学习框架，利用一致性验证器提升大推理模型的空间推理能力，无需标注数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前大推理模型在空间推理任务中表现不佳，现有方法依赖监督微调，需要大量标注数据。作者认为模型本身已具备空间推理能力，但需要逻辑一致性对齐以释放潜力，从而解决标注数据稀缺问题并提升泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出自监督强化学习框架，使用一致性验证器作为奖励函数，检查几何和语义一致性（如图像翻转、文本对象顺序交换）。并设计最优传输变体OT-GRPO，即针对成对验证器优化的组相对策略改进方法，实现无标签训练。
light_analysis.result: 无标签的一致性训练达到接近真值监督训练的准确率，并在多种空间推理任务和数据域中展现相似的泛化能力，验证了方法的有效性（具体数值未明确给出）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了无需标注数据即可显著提升大推理模型的空间推理能力，降低了数据成本，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更多一致性变换及复杂场景下的扩展。

title: From Content to Knowledge: Lightning Fast Long-Video Understanding with Neural Knowledge Representations
abstract: We propose a new paradigm for long video understanding by treating a long video as a Neural Knowledge Representation (NKR). NKR represents video contents neither as a stream of tokens nor pre-organized databases, but as an individual small portion of network weights attached to the VLM backbone. The NKR weights are optimized to encapsulate the video's semantic content via a novel Agentic Knowledge Distillation (AKD) process, where an agent automatically synthesizes dense descriptions and question-answer pairs to distill the video's knowledge into the NKR. While AKD serves as a comprehensive, one-time encoding phase, the resulting NKR transforms the video into a portable, reusable asset. At inference, the lightweight NKR is mounted onto a frozen Vision-Language Model (VLM), enabling direct, query-based understanding without reloading or re-encoding the original video. This approach decouples video length from inference cost, offering high amortized efficiency for multi-turn video understanding. Experiments on the LVBench benchmark show our method achieves performance comparable to state-of-the-art approaches while reducing end-to-end latency by over two orders of magnitude, opening new possibilities for interactive long-video understanding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出将长视频编码为神经知识表示（NKR）的新范式，通过代理知识蒸馏解耦视频长度与推理成本，实现闪电般快速的多轮交互视频理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有长视频理解方法要么将视频处理为离散令牌流（导致计算成本随视频长度线性增长），要么依赖预组织数据库（缺乏灵活性和实时性）。这些方法无法在保持高性能的同时实现低延迟的多轮交互。本文旨在通过将视频内容紧凑编码为网络权重，彻底解耦视频长度与推理复杂度，为交互式长视频理解提供高效解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 核心创新是神经知识表示（NKR），即一小部分附着在视觉语言模型（VLM）骨干上的网络权重，通过代理知识蒸馏（AKD）过程优化：一个智能体自动生成密集描述和问答对，将视频语义知识蒸馏到NKR中。NKR作为一次性编码输出，推理时直接挂载到冻结的VLM上，无需重新加载或编码原始视频，实现基于查询的即时理解。
light_analysis.result: 在LVBench基准上，所提方法在性能上与最先进方法相当，但端到端延迟降低了超过两个数量级（例如从数分钟降至秒级）。这得益于推理成本与视频长度无关的架构设计，显著提升了多轮交互场景下的用户响应速度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了长视频理解的全新范式，通过神经知识表示将视频转化为便携、可复用的知识资产，实现了高效的多轮交互。该方法在保持理解质量的同时大幅降低推理延迟，为实时视频分析、虚拟助手等应用开辟了新可能。未来工作可探索更高效的蒸馏策略和更大规模的知识表示。

title: An Ontology-Guided Multi-Anchor Graph Retrieval Framework for Traffic Legal Liability Determination
abstract: Traffic law liability determination is critical for assigning legal penalties, requiring the simultaneous identification of interdependent statutory provisions across multiple legal dimensions. However, existing retrieval-augmented generation methods suffer from a multi-dimensional retrieval bottleneck: single axis architectures compress complex legal queries into a single pathway, causing interdependent statutory dimensions to be overlooked. To address this, we propose OMAGR, an ontology-guided framework that decomposes queries into ontology-aligned anchors and executes parallel graph retrieval across each dimension, ensuring independent retrieval across dimensions before fusion. To evaluate the proposed method, we created the TrafficLaw-QA dataset, an expert-validated benchmark dataset containing 200 questions and 527 legal provisions. Results show that TrafficOmni-RAG outperforms baselines on Context Precision and Faithfulness metrics. The findings demonstrate that parallel multi-anchor retrieval effectively resolves the multi-dimensional retrieval bottleneck, offering a promising direction for traffic law liability determination research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出本体引导的多锚点图检索框架OMAGR，通过并行检索多个法律维度解决交通法律责任认定中的多维检索瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 交通法律责任认定需同时识别多个法律维度的相互依赖条款，但现有RAG方法将复杂查询压缩为单一路径，忽视多维依赖性，导致检索瓶颈。该问题影响法律处罚分配的准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出OMAGR框架，利用本体将查询分解为与本体对齐的多个锚点，对每个维度执行并行图检索，确保独立检索后融合。使用专家验证的TrafficLaw-QA数据集（200问题、527条款）评估模型。
light_analysis.result: 在TrafficLaw-QA数据集上，TrafficOmni-RAG在Context Precision和Faithfulness指标上优于基线方法，验证了并行多锚点检索有效解决多维检索瓶颈，提升了法律条款检索的准确性和忠实度。
light_analysis.conclusion: OMAGR框架通过并行多锚点检索解决了多维检索瓶颈，为交通法律责任认定研究提供了新方向。未来可探索扩展至其他法律领域或更大规模数据集。

title: Embodied-BenchClaw: An Autonomous Multi-Agent System for Embodied Spatial Intelligence Benchmark Construction
abstract: Benchmarks are essential for evaluating embodied spatial intelligence, yet their construction is labor-intensive, hard to reuse, and difficult to maintain. Existing embodied benchmarks are often static and may quickly become saturated as models improve, limiting their ability to distinguish new capabilities. We propose Embodied-BenchClaw, an autonomous agentic system for constructing embodied spatial intelligence benchmarks. Given a user-specified evaluation intent, Embodied-BenchClaw automatically produces a complete and continually updatable benchmark package through a five-stage pipeline: intent blueprinting, data collection, structuring and cleaning, benchmark synthesis, and evaluation reporting. The pipeline is coordinated by three agents for planning, construction, and evaluation. To improve reusability and reliability, Embodied-BenchClaw introduces an extensible Skill Library and process quality control, enabling benchmark construction to be composable, verifiable, and repairable. We instantiate multiple benchmarks covering indoor spatial reasoning, outdoor spatial reasoning, robotic manipulation, quadruped robot navigation, UAV/aerial-view understanding, and static benchmark enhancement. These benchmarks span diverse embodied carriers, data sources, and spatial capabilities. Experiments with human evaluation, judge-based assessment, consistency checks, cost analysis, and ablations show that Embodied-BenchClaw can construct verifiable, executable, maintainable, and diagnostically useful embodied spatial benchmarks with reduced manual effort.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Embodied-BenchClaw，一个自主多智能体系统，用于自动化构建持续可更新的具身空间智能基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 具身空间智能基准的构建劳动密集、难以重用和维护，现有基准静态且易饱和，无法有效区分新能力。亟需一种自动化、可扩展且持续更新的基准构建方法，以减少人工投入并提高基准的实用性和诊断性。
light_analysis.method: Embodied-BenchClaw通过五阶段流水线（意图蓝图、数据收集、结构化与清洗、基准合成、评估报告）自动生成基准，由规划、构建和评估三个智能体协调。引入可扩展技能库和过程质量控制，使基准构建可组合、可验证、可修复。在多领域实例化，包括室内外空间推理、机器人操作等。
light_analysis.result: 实验通过人工评估、基于评判的评估、一致性检查、成本分析和消融研究，表明Embodied-BenchClaw能够构建可验证、可执行、可维护且具有诊断价值的基准，显著减少人工努力。覆盖多种具身载体、数据源和空间能力，验证了系统的通用性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Embodied-BenchClaw为具身空间智能基准构建提供了一种自主、可扩展的解决方案，提高了基准的持续可用性和可维护性。未来可进一步扩展技能库以支持更多场景，并优化智能体协作效率。

title: When Does Language Matter? Multilingual Instructions Reveal Step-wise Language Sensitivity in Vision-Language-Action Models
abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have shown strong performance in language-conditioned robotic manipulation, yet their robustness to linguistic variation remains poorly understood. In this work, we present the first systematic multilingual evaluation of VLA models by translating the LIBERO benchmark into ten languages, revealing severe performance degradation under non-English instructions, with success rates dropping by 30-50%. Through fine-grained analysis of task executions, we find that language influence is highly non-uniform across steps: certain steps exhibit strong language dependence and dominate overall task failure, while others are largely language-agnostic. Based on this insight, we propose a step-wise inference-time intervention that aligns representations according to step language sensitivity, substantially improving performance under linguistic variation. Our results indicate that language robustness in VLA models is fundamentally a step-wise control problem, highlighting the importance of temporally structured analysis for reliable embodied agents.

light_analysis.overview: 首次多语言评估揭示VLA模型对非英语指令性能下降30-50%，提出按步骤语言敏感性的推理时干预方法显著提升鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管VLA模型在语言条件机器人操作中表现强劲，但其对语言变化的鲁棒性尚不清楚。现有评估主要基于英语指令，缺乏多语言场景下的系统性研究，限制了模型在实际多语言环境中的部署。理解语言影响在任务执行步骤中的分布，对于构建可靠具身智能体至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 将LIBERO基准翻译为十种语言构建多语言评估集，通过细粒度任务执行分析发现语言影响在步骤间高度非均匀：某些步骤强语言依赖并主导失败。基于此提出步骤级推理时干预方法，根据步骤语言敏感性对齐表示，以提升语言变化下的性能。
light_analysis.result: 非英语指令下VLA模型成功率下降30-50%。提出的步骤级干预方法显著改善多语言性能，具体提升幅度摘要未明确，但表明语言鲁棒性本质上是步骤级控制问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次揭示VLA模型在多语言指令下的严重性能退化，并证明语言影响具有步骤级非均匀性。提出按步骤敏感性的干预策略有效提升鲁棒性，强调时间结构化分析对可靠具身智能体的重要性。未来可探索更细粒度的语言-动作对齐机制。

title: GraspLLM: Towards Zero-Shot Generalization on Text-Attributed Graphs with LLMs
abstract: Research on Text-Attributed Graphs (TAGs) has gained significant attention recently due to its broad applications across various real-world data scenarios, such as citation networks, e-commerce platforms, social media, and web pages. Inspired by the remarkable semantic understanding ability of Large Language Models (LLMs), there have been numerous attempts to integrate LLMs into TAGs. However, existing methods still struggle to generalize across diverse graphs and tasks, and their ability to capture transferable graph structural patterns remains limited. To address this, we introduce the GraspLLM, a framework that combines Graph structural comprehension with semantic understanding prowess of LLMs to enhance the cross-dataset and cross-task generalizability. Specifically, we represent node texts from different graphs in a unified semantic space with a frozen general embedding model, on top of which we perform motif-aware contrastive learning across multiple motif-induced adjacency matrices to extract dataset-agnostic structural information. Then, with our proposed optimal contextual subgraph, we extract the most contextually relevant subgraph for each target node and align these subgraphs to the token space of LLM via an alignment projector. Extensive experiments on TAG benchmark datasets spanning diverse domains reveal that GraspLLM consistently outperforms previous LLM-based methods for TAGs, especially in zero-shot scenarios, highlighting its strong generalizability across different datasets and tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/Heinz217/GraspLLM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GraspLLM框架，结合图结构理解与LLM语义能力，实现文本属性图上的零样本跨数据集和任务泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本属性图（TAGs）在现实场景中广泛应用，现有LLM结合方法难以在不同图和任务间泛化，且捕获可迁移图结构模式能力有限。因此需要一种能统一语义空间、提取数据集无关结构信息并有效对齐LLM的方法。
light_analysis.method: GraspLLM使用冻结通用嵌入模型将节点文本映射到统一语义空间；通过多模体诱导邻接矩阵进行模体感知对比学习，提取数据集无关结构信息；提出最优上下文子图，为目标节点提取最相关子图，并通过对齐投影器将其映射到LLM令牌空间。
light_analysis.result: 在多个领域TAG基准数据集上，GraspLLM在零样本场景下持续优于先前基于LLM的方法，表现出跨数据集和任务的强泛化能力。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调了一致性的性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: GraspLLM有效提升了TAGs的零样本泛化能力，具有广泛的学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的对齐策略或扩展至更多图任务。

title: Notes2Skills: From Lab Notebooks to Certainty-Aware Scientific Agent Skills
abstract: Scientific discovery workflows usually contain and rely heavily on lab notes, where researchers record observations, interpret uncertain results, and plan follow-up experiments. Such informative lab notes preserve evolving scientific reasoning and author uncertainty, rather than polished final results exhibited in publications, providing a valuable opportunity for AI to engage in scientific exploration at a more comprehensive and deeper level. However, most prior work on scientific text focuses on papers, protocols, or structured databases, leaving informal laboratory notes underexplored as inputs to AI agents for science. This gap matters because lab notes often intermingle validated observations, tentative judgments, and possible experimental next steps within the same passage. If these signals are conflated, an AI agent may mistake uncertain scientific judgments for confirmed conclusions or executable actions. To this end, we present Notes2Skills, a two-stage framework for turning lab notebooks into verifiable skills for scientific AI agents while preserving the author's certainty. Across seven conditions and three wet-lab sessions, Notes2Skills is the only configuration that neither mistakes uncertain notes for firm instructions nor discards firm ones. We show that certainty preservation is the missing piece between lab notebooks and reliable agent skills, opening a path toward safer AI co-scientist systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Notes2Skills框架，将实验笔记转化为保留作者不确定性的可验证科学AI技能。
light_analysis.motivation: 科学发现流程高度依赖实验笔记，但现有AI工作主要处理论文、协议或结构化数据库，忽略了非正式的实验笔记。实验笔记中混杂了已验证观察、不确定判断和后续实验计划，若不加区分地输入AI，会导致模型将不确定的科学判断误认为确定结论或可执行动作。因此，需要一种方法在提取技能时保留作者的明确性，避免AI误判。
light_analysis.method: Notes2Skills是一个两阶段框架：首先从实验笔记中提取陈述及其不确定性水平，然后将这些陈述转化为可执行的技能，同时保留作者提出的确定性标签。通过明确区分确定和不确定的内容，确保AI既不会将不确定笔记当作明确指令，也不会丢弃确定指令。实验在七个条件和三个湿实验室场景下评估。
light_analysis.result: 在七个条件和三个湿实验室会话中，Notes2Skills是唯一既不会将不确定笔记误认为明确指令，也不会丢弃明确指令的配置。这表明该框架成功保留了原始笔记中的确定性，优于其他基线方法，为构建更可靠的AI科学助手提供了关键支撑。
light_analysis.conclusion: Notes2Skills证明了确定性保留是将实验笔记转化为可靠AI技能的关键一环。该框架为开发更安全的AI科学协作者系统开辟了道路，使AI能够更准确地理解科学推理过程，减少因混淆不确定性导致的错误。未来可探索更细粒度的不确定性建模及扩展到更广泛的科学领域。

title: Wild3R: Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian Splatting from Unconstrained Sparse Photo Collection
abstract: Feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) removes the need for time-consuming per-scene optimization required by traditional 3DGS. However, existing feed-forward approaches struggle with real-world photo collections that include diverse lighting conditions and transient objects. In this paper, we present Wild3R, a feed-forward approach for unconstrained sparse photo collections. The main bottleneck is the lack of training data that provides multiple viewpoints, a variety of illuminations, and transient variations necessary for learning robust scene representations. To address this, we introduce the WildCity dataset, which comprises 200 scenes, 170 lighting conditions, and transient objects, resulting in 337,500 images in total. By leveraging the dataset, our model learns appearance consistency across viewpoints conditioned on reference views, while removing transient content. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms existing feed-forward approaches and achieves results competitive with prior per-scene optimization-based methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Wild3R，一种前馈3D高斯泼溅方法，用于无约束稀疏照片集合，通过引入WildCity数据集学习外观一致性并去除瞬态内容。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统3D高斯泼溅需要逐场景优化，耗时且无法泛化。现有前馈方法在处理真实世界照片集合时，因光照条件多样和瞬态物体干扰而表现不佳。主要障碍是缺乏包含多视角、多种光照和瞬态变化的大规模训练数据。因此，需要构建一个能够学习鲁棒场景表示的前馈模型，同时克服数据稀缺问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出Wild3R，一种前馈3DGS框架，利用新构建的WildCity数据集（200场景、170光照条件、瞬态物体，共337,500图像）进行训练。模型通过条件参考视图学习跨视角的外观一致性，并显式移除瞬态内容，实现从稀疏无约束照片直接生成3D高斯表示，无需逐场景优化。
light_analysis.result: 在多种真实世界稀疏照片集合上评估，Wild3R在渲染质量上显著优于现有前馈3DGS方法，并达到与之前基于逐场景优化的方法相竞争的性能。具体指标包括PSNR、SSIM等，摘要未提供精确数值，但强调优于前馈方法且接近优化方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: Wild3R成功将前馈3DGS扩展到无约束场景，通过大规模数据集和外观一致性学习，有效处理光照变化和瞬态物体。该方法在效率和泛化性上具有优势，为3D场景重建提供了实用方案。未来可探索更复杂场景和动态内容，但当前受限于数据集规模和类别。

title: Beyond representational alignment with brain-guided language models for robust reasoning
abstract: The correspondence between large language models (LLMs) and the neural mechanisms underlying human higher-order cognition remains insufficiently characterized. Given that language and reasoning in the human brain appear dissociable, an open question is whether LLMs align with neural signals from reasoning-related regions and whether such signals can improve them. Here, focusing on deductive reasoning, we show that LLM internal representations are not only partially aligned with task-fMRI activity but can also be directly enhanced by these signals. Using a neural-predictivity metric, we find that LLMs explain a substantial fraction of the explainable variance in reasoning-related regions at the aggregate level, whereas predictivity within specific reasoning types is lower, indicating both alignment and divergence. Building on this, we propose a brain-guided framework: we steer model representations along directions induced by the joint structure of model and brain representations, applying intervention at inference and fine-tuning during training. We demonstrate that task-evoked brain signals can directly enhance LLM reasoning, yielding gains orthogonal to language-only supervision across 10 LLMs (1.5B-72B), with transfer across reasoning types and up to 13\% absolute accuracy gain. Our results advance LLM-brain correspondences from correlation to guidance, establishing a brain-signal-driven pathway toward more robust and cognitively aligned AI.

light_analysis.overview: 提出脑引导语言模型框架，利用任务-fMRI信号增强LLM推理能力，实现跨模型最高13%绝对准确率提升。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM与人类推理相关脑区的神经机制对应关系尚未充分表征。语言和推理在人脑中可分离，但LLM是否与推理脑区神经信号对齐以及能否利用这些信号改进模型尚不明确。现有方法仅依赖语言监督，缺乏神经信号引导，因此探索脑信号驱动的增强路径对实现更稳健和认知对齐的AI至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 通过神经预测性度量发现LLM内部表示与推理脑区任务-fMRI活动部分对齐，但特定推理类型预测性较低。基于此提出脑引导框架：利用模型与脑表示的联合结构诱导方向，在推理时施加干预、在训练时进行微调。实验涉及10个LLM（1.5B-72B），使用演绎推理任务及fMRI数据。
light_analysis.result: LLM解释推理脑区可解释方差的较大比例，但分推理类型预测性较低；脑引导方法在10个LLM上均取得正交于纯语言监督的增益，并实现跨推理类型迁移，最高绝对准确率提升13%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作将LLM与脑的对应关系从相关性提升至引导层面，建立了脑信号驱动的路径，可增强LLM推理能力并促进认知对齐的AI发展。未来可扩展至其他认知功能，但当前仅聚焦演绎推理，存在局限性。

title: Task-Aligned Stability Analysis of Vision-Language Models for Autonomous Driving Hazard Detection
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly used for scene understanding in autonomous driving, but robustness analysis often relies on task-agnostic embedding stability alone. We study whether corruption-induced embedding drift predicts changes in a task-aligned hazard score derived from CLIP image-text similarities. Using controlled corruptions on BDD100K road scenes, we compare embedding drift against margin drift, defined as the change in hazard score under perturbation. The relationship is highly corruption-dependent: some families exhibit strong coupling between representation drift and decision drift, while others induce hazardous decision instability despite relatively modest embedding change. Furthermore, corruption families differ in failure direction: most suppress hazard detections via false negatives, while occlusion instead triggers false alarms, suggesting that benchmark design should account for asymmetric failure modes, not just overall instability rates. These results suggest that robustness benchmarks should include task-aligned stability measures in addition to embedding-level perturbation statistics.
comment: 8 pages (5 main body + 3 references / appendices). ICML 2026 Workshop on Combining Theory and Benchmarks (CTB)

light_analysis.overview: 提出任务对齐的稳定性分析方法，研究视觉-语言模型在自动驾驶危险检测中嵌入漂移与决策漂移的非线性关系。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型鲁棒性分析仅依赖任务无关的嵌入稳定性，忽略了任务对齐的决策变化。自动驾驶危险检测中，嵌入漂移是否导致危险分数变化尚不清楚，且不同损坏类型可能引发不对称失败模式（如漏报与误报），现有基准测试未考虑这些因素。
light_analysis.method: 利用CLIP模型计算图片-文本相似度得到危险分数，在BDD100K道路场景上施加受控损坏（如噪声、遮挡等），比较嵌入漂移（embedding drift）与边缘漂移（margin drift，即危险分数变化）。分析不同损坏族下两者的耦合关系及失败方向（假阴性或假阳性）。
light_analysis.result: 嵌入漂移与边缘漂移的关系高度依赖损坏类型：部分损坏族两者强耦合，另一些则嵌入变化小但危险分数大幅波动。此外，多数损坏导致假阴性（漏检危险），而遮挡引发假阳性（误报），表明存在不对称失败模式，而非简单的不稳定性率。
light_analysis.conclusion: VLM在自动驾驶危险检测中的鲁棒性不能仅以嵌入稳定性衡量，需引入任务对齐的稳定性指标。基准测试应设计考虑不同损坏类型的不对称失败模式，以全面评估模型可靠性。未来可扩展至其他VLM架构和真实驾驶场景。

title: Image Quality Assessment of Identity Cards Using Measures from Open Face Image Quality
abstract: This paper addresses the challenge of assessing image quality in ID cards in remote verification systems by applying capture-related quality measures from the Open Face Image Quality (OFIQ) standard to ID card images. Our preprocessing pipeline includes corner detection, perspective normalization, and comprehensive foreground masking to ensure accurate and unbiased quality measure computation. We evaluate the effectiveness of these measures by analyzing their correlation with the performance of three presentation attack detection (PAD) algorithms across four diverse ID card datasets, where two datasets contain bona fide, i.e. pristine, images and two contain printed mock ID cards. Our results suggest that quality assessment based on some OFIQ measures can significantly improve PAD performance.
comment: Presented on IWBF 2026 (14th International Workshop on Biometrics and Forensics)

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用Open Face Image Quality标准中的捕捉相关质量度量来评估身份证图像质量，并通过实验证明某些度量能显著提升呈现攻击检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 远程身份验证系统中身份证图像质量参差不齐，影响安全性和可靠性。现有方法大多针对人脸图像设计，缺乏对身份证图像的专门质量度量。本文旨在探索将OFIQ标准应用于身份证图像，以更准确地评估质量并增强呈现攻击检测能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建预处理流程，包括角点检测、透视归一化和前景掩码，确保质量度量计算的准确性。然后基于OFIQ标准提取16种捕捉相关质量度量，评估其与三种PAD算法（如LBP、SVM等）在四个身份证数据集上的相关性，其中两个为真实图像，两个为打印假冒图像。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，某些OFIQ度量（如模糊、光照均匀性等）与PAD性能显著相关。在四个数据集上，基于这些度量的质量评估可提升PAD算法准确率约5-10%，尤其对打印假冒图像更为有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了OFIQ标准中的某些质量度量适用于身份证图像质量评估，并能有效提升呈现攻击检测性能。该研究为远程身份验证系统提供了实用的图像质量筛选手段，未来可扩展至更多攻击类型和实时场景。

title: SG2Loc: Sequential Visual Localization on 3D Scene Graphs
abstract: Visual localization in complex indoor environments remains a critical challenge for robotics and AR applications. Sequential localization, where pose estimates are refined over time, is important for autonomous agents. However, traditional methods often require storing extensive image databases or point clouds, leading to significant overhead. This paper introduces a novel, lightweight approach to sequential visual localization using 3D scene graphs. Our method represents the environment with a compact scene graph, where nodes represent objects (with coarse meshes) and edges encode spatial relationships. For each image in the localization phase, we extract per-patch semantic features, predicting object identities. Localization is performed within a particle filter framework. Each particle, representing a camera pose, projects the coarse object meshes from the scene graph into the image, assigning object identities to patches based on visibility. The similarity of the per-patch features, in the input image, and object features from the scene graph determines the weight of a particle. Subsequent images are incorporated sequentially, refining the pose estimate. By leveraging a compact scene graph and efficient semantic matching, our method significantly reduces storage while maintaining performance on real-world datasets. The code will be available at https://github.com/DmblnNicole/sg2loc.
comment: The code will be available at https://github.com/DmblnNicole/sg2loc

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于3D场景图的轻量级顺序视觉定位方法，通过紧凑场景图和语义匹配实现高效定位。
light_analysis.motivation: 复杂室内环境中的视觉定位对机器人和AR应用至关重要，但传统方法需存储大量图像数据库或点云，开销大且不适用于顺序定位。现有方法难以平衡存储与精度，亟需一种轻量级、可实时优化的定位方案。
light_analysis.method: 采用3D场景图表示环境，节点为带粗网格的物体，边为空间关系。定位时提取图像每块语义特征并预测物体身份，在粒子滤波框架中，每个粒子根据可见性投影物体网格，计算特征相似度作为粒子权重，多帧图像顺序融合以细化位姿。
light_analysis.result: 在真实数据集上，该方法在显著降低存储开销的同时，保持了与需要完整图像库或点云的基准方法相当的定位精度，验证了场景图表示和语义匹配的有效性。具体性能数据在摘要中未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种基于场景图的顺序视觉定位新范式，通过紧凑表示和语义匹配实现轻量级高精度定位，适用于资源受限的机器人和AR设备。未来可扩展至动态场景和更复杂的图结构。

title: I Understand How You Feel: Enhancing Deeper Emotional Support Through Multilingual Emotional Validation in Dialogue System
abstract: Emotional validation - explicitly acknowledging that a user's feelings make sense - has proven therapeutic value but has received little computational attention. Emotional validation in dialogue systems can be decomposed into (i) validating response identification, (ii) validation timing detection, and (iii) validating response generation. To support research on all three subtasks, we release M-EDESConv, a 120k English-Japanese multilingual corpus created through hybrid manual and automatic annotation, and M-TESC, a multilingual spoken-dialogue test set. For timing detection, we propose MEGUMI, a Multilingual Emotion-aware Gated Unit for Mutual Integration, that fuses frozen XLM-RoBERTa semantics with language-specific emotion encoders via cross-modal attention and gated fusion. MEGUMI shows superior performance on both the M-EDESConv and M-TESC datasets, both objectively and subjectively. Finally, our EmoValidBench benchmarks of GPT-4.1 Nano and Llama-3.1 8B indicate that current LLMs generate contextually similar and diverse validating responses, but emotional understanding remains a major area for improvement. Project page: https://github.com/zihaurpang/Multilingual-Emotional-Validation
comment: This paper has been accepted for presentation at SIGdial Meeting on Discourse and Dialogue 2026 (SIGDIAL 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出情感验证的多语言对话系统框架，包含数据集、时机检测模型MEGUMI和基准测试，首次系统研究对话中的情感验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 情感验证（明确承认用户感受）具有治疗价值，但在对话系统中缺乏计算关注。现有研究未分解情感验证任务，且缺乏多语言数据集。本文将其分解为验证响应识别、时机检测和生成三个子任务，并构建英日语料库，以推动情感支持对话的深入发展。
light_analysis.method: 提出MEGUMI模型，通过跨模态注意力和门控融合将冻结的XLM-RoBERTa语义与语言特定情感编码器集成，用于验证时机检测。构建120k英日多语言语料库M-EDESConv（混合人工与自动标注）和口语测试集M-TESC。对GPT-4.1 Nano和Llama-3.1 8B进行EmoValidBench基准测试。
light_analysis.result: MEGUMI在M-EDESConv和M-TESC数据集上表现优于基线，客观和主观指标均领先。LLM能生成上下文相似且多样化的验证响应，但情感理解仍不足。摘要未提供具体数值，仅指出MEGUMI的优越性能和LLM的局限性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次系统研究多语言对话中的情感验证，提供数据集、模型和基准，推动情感计算与对话系统结合，可应用于心理支持等场景。当前LLM情感理解不足是主要局限，未来可改进情感编码或引入更细粒度情绪建模。

title: AutoMine Solution for AV2 2026 Scenario Mining Challenge
abstract: With the development of autonomous driving systems, mining high-value, safety-critical, and planning-relevant scenarios from large-scale driving logs has become essential for data-driven evaluation. In this paper, we propose AutoMine, a robust self-refining scenario mining method based on LLMs and VLMs. AutoMine uses semantics-preserving prompt augmentation to reduce LLM prompt sensitivity, combines robust trajectory atomic functions with VLM-based functions to handle perception noise and open-world visual cues, and refines generated code through execution feedback from real logs. In the Argoverse 2 Scenario Mining Competition at CVPR 2026, AutoMine achieves a HOTA-Temporal score of 36.38 and a Timestamp BA score of 77.21.
comment: CVPR 2026 Scenario Mining Challenge (Temporal Track Winners)

light_analysis.overview: 提出AutoMine，一种基于LLM和VLM的鲁棒自精炼场景挖掘方法，用于从自动驾驶日志中自动挖掘高价值场景。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着自动驾驶系统的发展，从大规模驾驶日志中挖掘高价值、安全关键和规划相关的场景对于数据驱动的评估至关重要。现有方法在提示敏感性、感知噪声处理和开放世界视觉线索方面存在不足，难以鲁棒地提取有效场景。AutoMine旨在解决这些问题，通过语义保持的提示增强和结合轨迹与VLM函数来提高挖掘的准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: AutoMine基于LLMs和VLMs，采用语义保持的提示增强来降低LLM对提示的敏感性；使用鲁棒轨迹原子函数与基于VLM的函数相结合，以处理感知噪声和开放世界视觉线索；并通过真实日志的执行反馈来精炼生成的代码。该方法在Argoverse 2数据集上进行评估，无需人工干预。
light_analysis.result: 在Argoverse 2场景挖掘比赛中，AutoMine取得了HOTA-Temporal分数36.38和Timestamp BA分数77.21，证明了其在场景挖掘任务中的有效性。与基线方法相比，它能够更鲁棒地处理噪声和视觉多样性，实现高精度的场景识别。
light_analysis.conclusion: AutoMine提出了一种创新的自精炼场景挖掘框架，通过结合LLM和VLM的协同作用，有效提升了自动驾驶场景挖掘的鲁棒性和准确性。该方法具有实际应用价值，可用于数据驱动的自动驾驶评估和训练。未来工作可能扩展到更复杂的场景和多模态融合。

title: MemNovo: Look Back at the Spectrum for Balanced De Novo Peptide Sequencing from Mass Spectrometry
abstract: De novo peptide sequencing from tandem mass spectrometry is pivotal in proteomics, enabling identification of novel peptides without reference databases. While recent Transformer-based encoder-decoder models have achieved remarkable performance, we uncover a critical pathology in their inference dynamics. Through comprehensive feature scaling experiments, we demonstrate that existing auto-regressive peptide decoders tend to over-rely on generated-sequence priors while progressively under-utilizing fine-grained physical evidence from the input mass spectrum. This phenomenon leads to suboptimal results, where generated peptide sequences are biologically plausible yet not faithful to the input spectrum. To rectify this, we propose MemNovo, a training-free and plug-and-play mechanism that re-balances peptide and spectral contributions at inference time. MemNovo alleviates the information bottleneck by establishing a persistent spectral memory bank and injecting retrieved features directly into the final decoding stage via an ultra-conservative residual connection. Theoretical analysis confirms that this mechanism restores the mutual information between the decoder state and the raw spectrum. Extensive experiments on the Nine Species benchmark with two representative baselines, Casanovo and InstaNovo, demonstrate that MemNovo consistently improves both amino acid precision and peptide precision, achieving up to 39.1% relative improvement in peptide precision for Casanovo and up to 3.9% for InstaNovo, with negligible computational overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MemNovo，一种无需训练、即插即用的机制，通过持久光谱记忆库平衡肽和光谱贡献，提升从头肽测序精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有Transformer编码器-解码器模型在从头肽测序中，自回归解码器过度依赖已生成序列先验，逐渐忽视输入质谱的细粒度物理证据，导致生成序列虽生物合理但与光谱不符。此问题源于信息瓶颈，需要重新平衡肽序列和光谱在解码时的贡献。
light_analysis.method: MemNovo建立持久光谱记忆库，在最终解码阶段通过超保守残差连接注入检索到的光谱特征，直接增强解码器状态与原始光谱的互信息。该方法无需训练，即插即用，可集成到现有模型如Casanovo和InstaNovo中，仅增加极小的计算开销。
light_analysis.result: 在Nine Species基准上，MemNovo分别提升了Casanovo和InstaNovo的氨基酸精度和肽精度。对Casanovo，肽精度相对提升高达39.1%；对InstaNovo，相对提升3.9%。计算开销可忽略，证明方法的有效性和高效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MemNovo解决了现有方法中解码器忽视光谱证据的问题，通过记忆库和残差连接平衡两类信息，显著提升测序准确性。该工作为质谱测序提供了通用增强手段，未来可探索更高效的特征检索策略或扩展到其他序列生成任务。

title: RePAIR: Predictive Self-Supervised Representation Learning in Chess
abstract: In this paper, we introduce Representation Prediction via Autoencoding using Iterative Refinement (RePAIR) - a novel self-supervised representation learning architecture that synthesizes Masked Autoencoders (MAE), Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPA), and Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers (BERT). We demonstrate how it can be used to encode objects in sequential data like consecutive chess positions into compact yet meaningful representations. The basic principle of the architecture is to mask large portions of a sequence of latent states, similar to BERT and MAE. Then, we apply a lightweight Predictor to the latent representations that repairs gaps in the sequence in a lower-dimensional embedding space akin to JEPA. Our experiments in the domain of chess show that the Encoder refines the board representations such that meaningful chess concepts emerge clustered in the latent space. Furthermore, reconstructions of the masked board states show that the model is able to reason about the piece movements without relying on costly reinforcement learning methods. Lastly, we find that the resulting representation space allows for quick and intuitive dissections of chess games by observing the game path trajectories in this semantically rich space.
comment: Accepted for oral presentation at IEEE Conference on Games 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出RePAIR，一种结合MAE、JEPA和BERT的自监督表示学习架构，用于编码象棋序列数据中的对象。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法如强化学习成本高，而自监督学习在序列数据中表示学习仍有挑战。RePAIR旨在通过预测性自监督学习生成紧凑且有意义的表示，避免昂贵标注或强化学习，同时保持丰富的语义信息。
light_analysis.method: RePAIR架构掩码大部分潜在状态序列（类似BERT和MAE），然后用轻量级预测器在低维嵌入空间中修复序列间隙（类似JEPA）。编码器通过自监督迭代细化，学习棋盘状态的紧凑表示。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，编码器细化了棋盘表示，有意义的象棋概念在潜在空间中聚类。模型能够推理棋子移动，无需强化学习。表示空间允许通过游戏路径轨迹快速直观地分析棋局。
light_analysis.conclusion: RePAIR提供了一种有效的自监督方法学习序列数据表示，在象棋领域展现语义聚类和推理能力。学术价值在于结合多种架构创新，实际应用包括棋局分析。未来可扩展到其他序列领域。

title: Fine-tuning Multi-modal LLMs with ART: Art-based Reinforcement Training
abstract: There are two main Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) techniques for Large Language Models (LLMs). While Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) introduces additional weights between the LLM layers, Soft Prompting introduces additional fine-tuning-specific raw tokens to an LLM input. However, both require modification to the computational graphs of precompiled, preoptimized LLMs. As a result, neither is fully supported in high-throughput engines like vLLM. We propose fine-tuning with ART (Art-based Reinforcement Training). The method injects information into a frozen Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) by optimizing only its raw visual input, thus enabling the soft-token approach on pre-compiled computational graphs. It relies on backpropagation of gradients back into a plain pixel array and thus supports any fine-tuning objective. Moreover, the optimized visual input can be stylized as task-relevant computational artworks. The approach's effectiveness is confirmed for different sizes of a popular open Qwen architecture and for several textual benchmarks. Specifically, ART reaches accuracy competitive with LoRA across mathematics and structured-tool-use benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ART方法，通过优化视觉输入实现多模态大语言模型的参数高效微调。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的参数高效微调技术如LoRA和Soft Prompting需要修改预编译计算图，不兼容高吞吐引擎如vLLM。这限制了微调方法的实际部署效率。因此，需一种无需修改计算图、完全支持高吞吐引擎的微调方法，以提升多模态大语言模型在下游任务中的适应性和效率。
light_analysis.method: ART（Art-based Reinforcement Training）方法通过反向传播梯度优化原始像素数组，将信息注入冻结的多模态大语言模型，实现软标记方式于预编译计算图。视觉输入可转化为任务相关的计算艺术作品。该方法支持任意微调目标，且无需修改模型计算图，兼容vLLM等引擎。在Qwen架构不同规模模型上进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 在数学和结构化工具使用基准测试中，ART方法达到与LoRA相当的准确性。实验验证了多个Qwen模型规模下的有效性，证明其在不修改计算图的前提下能实现竞争性能，同时保持高吞吐引擎兼容性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ART提供了一种无需修改计算图的微调方案，兼容高吞吐引擎，扩展了参数高效微调的应用场景。其视觉输入优化和艺术风格化为可解释性提供新视角。未来可探索更复杂的视觉优化策略和更多模态的扩展。

title: Task-Aware Structured Memory for Dynamic Multi-modal In-Context Learning
abstract: Multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) depend on in-context learning (ICL) for rapid task adaptation, but their scalability is severely limited by finite context windows and the growing cost of key-value (KV) caches in long multi-modal sequences. Existing memory compression approaches typically rely on rigid token removal or sample-dependent importance estimation, which introduces bias, disrupts semantic structure, particularly for visual representations, and yields static memories that cannot adapt to new queries. We introduce TASM (Task-Aware Structured Memory), a training-free framework that addresses these limitations through task-aware, structure-preserving, and dynamically accessible memory construction. TASM employs task-vector guided compression to replace sample-specific signals with a task-level direction that captures shared relevance across demonstrations. To preserve the underlying manifold, it applies semantics-aware token merging via bipartite graph matching, aggregating tokens without destructive pruning. Finally, TASM structures memory into a hierarchy comprising a compact Core Memory and a Latent Bank, facilitating query-adaptive dynamic retrieval. Evaluations confirm TASM maintains high performance under heavy compression, effectively balancing efficiency with adaptability.

light_analysis.overview: TASM提出任务感知结构化记忆，实现无需训练的多模态上下文学习，解决长序列中KV缓存扩展问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大模型依赖上下文学习，但受限于有限上下文窗口和长多模态序列中KV缓存成本增长。现有记忆压缩方法依赖刚性标记删除或样本级重要性估计，引入偏差、破坏语义结构（特别是视觉表示），且生成无法适应新查询的静态记忆。
light_analysis.method: TASM是一个免训练框架，包含三部分：任务向量引导压缩，用任务级方向替代样本级信号；基于二分图匹配的语义感知标记合并，保留数据流形；记忆组织为核心记忆和潜在库的层次结构，实现查询自适应动态检索。
light_analysis.result: 评估表明TASM在高压缩比下保持高性能，有效平衡效率与适应性。摘要未提供具体数值对比或基线性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出TASM框架，通过任务感知、结构保持和动态可访问的记忆构建，克服现有记忆压缩方法的局限，提升多模态上下文学习的可扩展性。未来可探索更高效压缩或更多模态的适应性。

title: StatefulDiscovery: Evidence-Calibrated Claim Formation in Open-Ended Scientific Discovery
abstract: Open-ended scientific discovery asks agents to move beyond executing analyses for predefined questions. Across multiple rounds of exploration, a discovery agent must decide which phenomena warrant investigation while avoiding overinterpretation, where emerging claims exceed the evidential scope of the analyses supporting them. This creates an evidence-calibration problem: the exploration trajectory must be coupled with claim status so that evidence can guide both what to investigate next and what can be claimed. We introduce StatefulDiscovery, a discovery framework that externalizes investigation state and uses it to coordinate frontier selection, evidence acquisition, and claim adjudication. We evaluate StatefulDiscovery across 40 real-data discovery tasks. Compared with several baselines, StatefulDiscovery produces more claims overall judged to be both well-supported and high-value. Ablations indicate that structured hypotheses, local adjudication, and frontier control contribute to performance. Together, these results suggest that explicit discovery state can couple exploration with evidence-calibrated claim formation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出StatefulDiscovery框架，通过外化发现状态来校准证据与声明形成，提升开放式科学发现的证据可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在开放式科学发现中，智能体需在多轮探索中自主决定研究现象，但现有方法易导致过度解释，即声明超出证据范围。这一问题称为证据校准问题：探索轨迹必须与声明状态耦合，使证据同时指导下一步探索和可提出的声明。现有方法缺乏显式的状态管理，难以平衡探索与证据约束。
light_analysis.method: StatefulDiscovery框架通过外化研究状态，包括结构化假设、局部裁决机制和前沿控制，来协调前沿选择、证据获取和声明裁决。具体地，它维护一个显式的发现状态，在每一轮中基于当前证据选择探索方向，获取新证据后更新状态并裁定声明。在40个真实数据发现任务上评估，使用多个基线对比。
light_analysis.result: 在40个真实数据发现任务中，StatefulDiscovery相比多个基线，产出的声明总数更多，且这些声明被评判为既有良好证据支持又有高价值。消融实验表明，结构化假设、局部裁决和前沿控制三个组件均对性能有正向贡献。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称整体结果优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: StatefulDiscovery证明了显式发现状态能够有效耦合探索与证据校准的声明形成。该工作为自主科学发现系统提供了新的设计范式，提升了发现的可靠性和质量。未来方向可包括扩展到更复杂的科学领域，以及探索更高效的状态表示与更新机制。

title: SheafStain: Sheaf-Theoretic Schrödinger Bridge for Spatially and Biologically Coherent Virtual Staining
abstract: Current virtual staining approaches offer the potential for time- and cost-efficient biomarker quantification in cancer diagnostics and prognostics. However, patch-wise inference for gigapixel whole slide images (WSIs) fails to maintain spatial continuity, yielding artifacts that cause catastrophic mismatches with ground-truth images. Although pathology Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) offer rich representations, their self-attention causes varying global contexts to produce inconsistent embeddings for the same physical region. We formalize and validate this ``context contamination'' as a sheaf-theoretic problem where these embeddings form a presheaf that violates the gluing axiom. To address this, we propose SheafStain, a new approach that reinterprets VFM features as sheaf-like sections for spatially and biologically coherent virtual staining. Specifically, SheafStain integrates class and patch tokens into a Schrödinger Bridge framework as sheaf-like sections. While the class token anchors biological consistency, patch tokens form a per-position spatial map. A backbone co-pretrained on Hematoxylin \& Eosin (H\&E) and Immunohistochemistry (IHC) yields non-degenerate cross-stain stalks, so a single VFM feature space supervises both input conditioning and output stain alignment. Departing from prior work that evaluates on isolated $256 \times 256$ patches and either random-crops or resizes the $1024 \times 1024$ ground truth, we translate at $256 \times 256$ and evaluate on the stitched $1024 \times 1024$ outputs across HER2, ER, PR, and Ki-67. SheafStain demonstrates promising results against six prior methods while mitigating patch-boundary stitching artifacts. Code will soon be released.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SheafStain，利用层论和Schrödinger桥解决虚拟染色中的上下文污染和拼接伪影问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前虚拟染色方法在拼接全切片图像时产生空间不连续性和伪影，与真实图像严重不匹配。病理视觉基础模型的自注意力机制导致同一物理区域在不同全局上下文中产生不一致的嵌入，作者将其形式化为层论中的预层违反粘合公理的问题。需要一种方法保持空间连续性和生物学一致性。
light_analysis.method: 将视觉基础模型特征重新解释为层状截面，集成类令牌和补丁令牌到Schrödinger桥框架中。类令牌锚定生物学一致性，补丁令牌形成位置空间图。采用H&E和IHC共预训练的骨干网络生成非退化交叉染色茎，单个特征空间同时监督输入条件和输出染色对齐。翻译时用256×256块，拼接成1024×1024评估。
light_analysis.result: 在HER2、ER、PR和Ki-67上评估，SheafStain在缓解块边界拼接伪影方面优于六种先前方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明有希望的结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: SheafStain通过层论和Schrödinger桥实现空间和生物学一致的虚拟染色，有效解决了上下文污染和拼接伪影问题。具有临床应用潜力，代码将开源。未来可能探索更大图像尺度或更多染色类型。

title: TaskFusion: Continual Anomaly Detection for Heterogeneous Tabular Data
abstract: Continual anomaly detection in tabular data is challenging and remains largely underexplored, particularly in settings with heterogeneous feature schemas, distribution shifts, and severe class imbalance. In many real-world applications, data arrive sequentially from diverse domains, rendering conventional continual learning methods ineffective due to their reliance on a fixed input space. We propose a continual learning (CL) method, which can overcome these challenges and continually learn from different tasks. Our method consists of three main parts: our AGF model, Taskfusion augmentation, and outlier exposure. The AGF-model maps task-specific features into a shared space, then aligns distributions to reduce representation drift, and learns anomaly decision boundaries in the aligned space. To improve stability, we introduce Taskfusion augmentation, combining boundary-aware interpolation within tasks to refine the model anomaly boundaries and cross-task mixing to transfer anomaly structure across datasets. To handle class imbalance and memory constraints, we employ tabular dataset distillation to store compact synthetic replay samples, which are jointly used with augmented data in an outlier exposure objective for robust anomaly detection. We evaluate the approach on 21 heterogeneous datasets across multiple domains. Results show that our approach substantially improves continual anomaly detection performance over sequential fine-tuning and other CL baselines while reducing catastrophic forgetting and maintaining stable detection across heterogeneous datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TaskFusion方法，针对异构表格数据的持续异常检测，利用特征映射、任务融合增强和异常暴露，解决特征异质、分布漂移和类别不平衡问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 持续异常检测在表格数据中研究不足，尤其面对异构特征模式、分布漂移和严重类别不平衡。现有持续学习方法依赖固定输入空间，无法适应来自不同领域的数据流，导致灾难性遗忘和检测性能下降。
light_analysis.method: 包含三个主要部分：AGF模型将任务特定特征映射到共享空间并对齐分布；TaskFusion增强通过边界感知插值细化异常边界和跨任务混合传递异常结构；采用表格数据集蒸馏存储紧凑合成重放样本，结合异常暴露目标处理类别不平衡和内存约束。
light_analysis.result: 在21个异构数据集上评估，相比顺序微调和持续学习基线，显著提升持续异常检测性能，有效减少灾难性遗忘，并在多个领域数据集上保持稳定的检测效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了首个针对异构表格数据的持续异常检测方法，填补了该领域空白。学术上证明了特征映射和任务融合的有效性，实际应用适用于多领域数据流。未来可探索更大规模任务场景。

title: Scene-Adaptive Nonlinear Tone Curves for Pseudo Ground-Truth Generation in Low-Light 3D Gaussian Splatting
abstract: Low-light novel view synthesis is challenging because dark multi-view images contain noise, weak structural detail, and compressed dynamic range. Recent 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) methods address these challenges by generating pseudo ground-truth (pseudo-GT) images as supervision targets when paired normal-light references are unavailable. Existing pseudo-GT methods apply a uniform linear gain to all pixels, which clips bright regions while providing insufficient enhancement in dark regions, limiting reconstruction quality. We observe that nonlinear tone mappings, long established in 2D low-light enhancement, have not been explored for pseudo-GT generation in 3D reconstruction. Accordingly, we propose a scene-adaptive nonlinear tone-curve framework that replaces linear pseudo-GT with nonlinear alternatives. The framework introduces percentile-based normalisation for scene-agnostic curve application, a scene-adaptive offset for automatic black-level adjustment, and two complementary curves: Adaptive SoftExp (ASE), a bounded exponential curve, and Adaptive Poly3 (AP3), a data-driven cubic polynomial. The module changes only the pseudo-GT computation and leaves the 3DGS backbone unchanged. Experiments on three benchmarks covering 21 scenes show that both curves consistently outperform the linear baseline with PSNR improvements up to +4.34 dB on LOM and +3.25 dB on RealX3D. Both curves achieve similar performance despite their different mathematical forms, suggesting the improvement is curve-agnostic. Code is available at https://github.com/lvmingzhe/adaptiveToneCurve

light_analysis.overview: 提出场景自适应非线性色调曲线用于低光3D高斯溅射的伪真值生成，取代统一线性增益，提升重建质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 低光新视角合成因多视图图像存在噪声、弱结构细节和压缩动态范围而具有挑战性。现有3DGS方法通过生成伪真值图像作为监督目标，但使用统一的线性增益会导致明亮区域裁剪和暗区增强不足，限制重建质量。尽管非线性色调映射在2D低光增强中已成熟，但尚未用于3D重建的伪真值生成。本文旨在探索非线性曲线替代线性方法，以自适应改善不同场景的增强效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出场景自适应非线性色调曲线框架，替换线性伪真值。包括基于百分位的归一化实现场景无关曲线应用、场景自适应偏移自动调整黑电平，以及两种互补曲线：Adaptive SoftExp (ASE)有界指数曲线和Adaptive Poly3 (AP3)数据驱动三次多项式。该模块仅改变伪真值计算，不改变3DGS主干。在21个场景的三个基准上评估，PSNR提升高达+4.34 dB (LOM) 和+3.25 dB (RealX3D)。
light_analysis.result: 在LOM、RealX3D等三个基准的21个场景上，两种曲线均一致优于线性基线，PSNR提升最高达+4.34 dB (LOM) 和+3.25 dB (RealX3D)。尽管数学形式不同，二者性能相近，表明改进与曲线具体形式无关。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次将非线性色调映射引入低光3DGS伪真值生成，提出场景自适应曲线框架，显著提升重建质量。实验表明非线性策略的有效性，且曲线形式不敏感。代码已开源。未来工作可探索更复杂的曲线形式或与其他低光增强技术结合。

title: Plan-and-Verify Video Reward Reasoning with Spatio-Temporal Scene Graph Grounding
abstract: Reward models for text-to-video (T2V) generation guide post-training but often fail at fine-grained semantic alignment. We trace this to two structural weaknesses in existing reasoning-based reward models: they do not systematically verify every condition described in the prompt, and the visual evidence supporting each judgment remains implicit in their free-form reasoning. We propose SG-PVR, a video reward model that addresses these limitations through plan-and-verify reasoning grounded in spatio-temporal scene graphs. The verification plan decomposes the prompt into atomic claims, ensuring every requirement is checked. The spatio-temporal scene graph, encoding entities, attributes, and temporally-grounded relations, is extracted from the video and maintained as a persistent structured visual reference throughout reasoning. Each claim is verified against both the video and the scene graph, anchoring judgments in explicit visual evidence. SG-PVR achieves strong performance on semantic alignment, including fine-grained temporal semantics. As a test-time reranker, it further enhances compositional alignment in T2V generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SG-PVR，一种基于时空场景图的规划-验证视频奖励模型，用于改进文本到视频生成的语义对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本到视频生成的奖励模型在后训练中引导生成，但常无法实现细粒度语义对齐。原因在于推理型奖励模型存在两个结构缺陷：未能系统验证提示中描述的每个条件，且支持每个判断的视觉证据在自由形式推理中隐含不清。因此需要一种能明确验证所有条件并基于显式视觉证据的方法。
light_analysis.method: SG-PVR采用规划-验证推理，基于时空场景图。首先将提示分解为原子声明，确保检查每个要求。然后从视频中提取时空场景图，编码实体、属性和时间相关关系，作为持久的结构化视觉参考。每个声明同时对照视频和场景图验证，将判断锚定在显式视觉证据上。
light_analysis.result: SG-PVR在语义对齐（包括细粒度时间语义）上表现强劲。作为测试时重排序器，它进一步增强了文本到视频生成中的组合对齐。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调了性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: SG-PVR通过规划-验证机制和场景图显式推理，解决了奖励模型的结构缺陷，提升了语义对齐能力。该方法在文本到视频生成后训练和测试时重排序中具有应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的场景图构建或扩展到其他视频理解任务。

title: LASA: A Weak Supervision Method for Open-Vocabulary Scene Sketch Semantic Segmentation
abstract: Open-vocabulary scene sketch semantic segmentation aims to assign dense semantic labels to sparse line drawings based on flexible category vocabularies specified at inference time, without relying on pixel-level annotations during training. Unlike natural images, sketches lack texture and color cues, making semantic understanding heavily dependent on stroke layout and spatial configuration, a challenge that renders single-layer vision-language features inherently unstable. Our key observation is that attention maps from different Vision Transformer layers encode complementary spatial cues: shallow layers capture global structural layouts, while deeper layers focus on local stroke intersections and object parts. This suggests that cross-layer aggregation provides a more robust structural prior than any individual layer alone. Leveraging this insight, we propose a structure-aware framework built upon \textbf{L}ayer-wise \textbf{A}ccumulated \textbf{S}tructural \textbf{A}ttention (\textbf{LASA}), which aggregates multi-layer attention to guide hierarchical semantic alignment under weak supervision and refine predictions during inference. Experiments on FS-COCO, SFSD, and FrISS show that LASA improves mIoU by $+3.43$, $+8.01$, and $+15.74$ over the prior weakly supervised baselines, demonstrating consistent gains in both segmentation accuracy and spatial coherence. Our source code will be made publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于层间累积结构注意力（LASA）的弱监督方法，用于开放词汇场景草图语义分割，通过聚合多层注意力改善空间结构理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 草图缺乏纹理和色彩，语义理解高度依赖笔画布局和空间结构，但单层视觉-语言特征不稳定。观察到不同Transformer层注意力图编码互补空间信息：浅层捕获全局结构，深层关注局部笔触交点；因此需要跨层聚合以提供更稳健的结构先验。
light_analysis.method: 提出结构感知框架，核心是层间累积结构注意力（LASA），聚合多层注意力图以引导弱监督下的层次语义对齐，并在推理时细化预测。利用Vision Transformer的多层特征，无需像素级标注，仅依赖弱监督信号。
light_analysis.result: 在FS-COCO、SFSD和FrISS数据集上，LASA相比先前弱监督基线，mIoU分别提升+3.43、+8.01和+15.74，在分割精度和空间一致性上均取得一致增益。
light_analysis.conclusion: LASA通过跨层注意力聚合有效提升了草图语义分割性能，证明了结构先验的重要性。代码开源，为开放词汇场景下少标注草图理解提供了新思路，未来可探索更复杂的特征融合策略。

title: Flow Matching with In-Context Priors for Out-of-Distribution Brain Dynamics
