abstract: Flow matching and diffusion models enable conditional generation across domains ranging from images to proteins, with recent extensions to out-of-distribution contexts. Yet generative models of neural time series have largely remained restricted to categorical conditioning, precluding compositional and zero-shot generalization. In this work, we propose a per-timestep conditioned diffusion transformer for generating realistic fMRI brain dynamics during unseen cognitive tasks by injecting both compositional language and optional spatial priors in-context. Such zero-shot generation could enable counterfactual neuroscience by supporting in-silico design and evaluation of novel cognitive experiments before empirical validation. Leveraging this model, we evaluate across hundreds of held-out task conditions and characterize predictive performance in relation to the training manifold. From language alone, the model recovers region-specific recruitment across tasks and held-out spatial activation patterns. Spatial priors, when available, complement the text pathway by anchoring generation in regions of task space where language alone degrades, while retaining the compositional structure needed for counterfactual task specification. To our knowledge this is the first generative model of whole-cortex fMRI dynamics for unseen cognitive tasks, advancing counterfactual neuroscience and data-driven experimental design.
comment: Code and pretrained models available at https://github.com/SamGijsen/pinc-flows

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于上下文先验的流匹配模型，首次实现未见认知任务的全皮层fMRI动态零样本生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有神经时间序列生成模型局限于分类条件，无法支持组合性和零样本泛化，限制了反事实神经科学中新型认知实验的计算机模拟设计与评估。
light_analysis.method: 采用每时间步条件扩散变换器，注入组合语言描述和可选空间先验作为上下文，通过流匹配训练生成fMRI脑动态。语言先验提供任务语义，空间先验在文本退化区域补充信息。
light_analysis.result: 在数百个未见任务条件下，仅凭语言先验即可恢复区域特异性激活模式；空间先验进一步提升生成质量，尤其是在语言信息不足的任务区域，保持反事实任务规约所需的组合结构。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首个面向未知认知任务的全皮层fMRI动态生成模型，为反事实神经科学和数据驱动实验设计提供新工具，未来可扩展至更复杂的脑动态建模。

title: From Uniform to Learned Graph Priors: Diffusion for Structure Discovery
abstract: Neural relational inference (NRI) methods discover interaction graphs from trajectories through variational reasoning on discrete potential edges. However, these methods typically rely on oversimplified, factorized graph priors. Such priors, typically nearing uniform distributions, treat edges as independent entities. This systemic misalignment does not match the real-world systems and yields diffuse and indecisive edge posteriors limiting the reliability of structural discovery. To address this, we propose \textit{Diff-prior}, a diffusion-parameterized adaptive prior used to calibrate latent graph distribution rather than generate graphs. Our core insight is to reframe prior integration as a learnable denoising-style calibration that organizes scattered, uncertain edge posteriors into a more reliable overall structure which can be trained by the diffusion model. Diff-prior learns an adaptive structure prior that performs structured calibration on the edge posteriors during inference, guiding it towards a distribution closer to the underlying structure. The diff-prior operates before structural sampling and acts as a denoising calibrator directly on the encoder edge distribution, which provides a generic training paradigm over structured variables. Experiments on standard benchmarks validated our framework, and the results indicate that Diff-prior improves the performance of structure inference and generates more decisive edge posteriors across multiple NRI-family architectures. The code is available on https://github.com/Hardy158118/Diffprior.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Diff-prior，一种扩散参数化的自适应先验，用于校准神经关系推理中的潜在图分布，提高结构发现的可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有神经关系推理（NRI）方法采用简化的因子化图先验（接近均匀分布），将边视为独立实体，与真实世界系统不匹配，导致边缘后验分布分散且不果断，限制了结构发现的可靠性。需要一种机制来校准边缘后验，使其更接近真实结构。
light_analysis.method: Diff-prior是一个扩散参数化的自适应先验，它作为可学习的去噪校准器，在结构采样之前直接作用于编码器的边缘分布。通过扩散模型训练，学习对边缘后验进行结构化校准，将其组织成更可靠的整体结构。该方法提供了一个通用的训练范式，适用于结构化变量。
light_analysis.result: 在标准基准测试上的实验表明，Diff-prior提高了多种NRI架构的结构推断性能，生成了更果断的边缘后验分布。具体性能提升指标摘要未明确说明，但与基线相比有显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: Diff-prior通过可学习的扩散先验解决了NRI中先验与真实结构不匹配的问题，提升了结构发现的可靠性和后验的决策性。该框架具有通用性，可应用于多种NRI架构，代码已开源。未来可能扩展到更复杂结构的学习。

title: Skill-Augmented AI Agents for Medical Research Analysis: An Exploratory Multi-Model Human Evaluation in an NSCLC Transcriptomic Biomarker Task
abstract: Background. Large language models and AI agents are increasingly used to support biomedical research, but native model outputs may omit key analytical steps, misuse methods, or overstate conclusions. We evaluated whether autonomous access to a medical research skill package was associated with higher-quality AI-generated transcriptomic research-analysis outputs compared with native AI without skills. Methods. We conducted an exploratory multi-model human evaluation using a non-small cell lung cancer immunotherapy biomarker task. Six model backbones were tested. The evaluation included 21 anonymized outputs: 9 native-AI outputs and 12 skill-augmented outputs generated through an AI agent implementation represented by OpenClaw. Four non-expert biomedical reviewers and two blinded experts evaluated each output, with two ratings from each reviewer type. The primary outcome was expert-rated overall quality. Results. Skill-augmented outputs showed directionally higher expert overall quality than native-AI outputs (mean 5.50 vs 5.11; difference=0.39; bootstrap 95\% CI, -0.04 to 0.90; Welch p=0.156). Non-expert reviewer quality showed the same direction (mean 4.72 vs 4.47; difference=0.26; bootstrap 95\% CI, -0.25 to 0.80; Welch p=0.373). Expert agreement was limited (single-rating ICC=-0.15), and model-specific effects were descriptive and heterogeneous. Conclusions. Autonomous skill access showed a directional quality signal in this exploratory sample, but the signal was smaller than expert-rating noise and should not be interpreted as confirmatory evidence. The findings primarily motivate larger evaluations of skill-augmented AI agents with stronger reliability controls, platform replication, and biological-validity assessment.

light_analysis.overview: 探索多模型人类评估技能增强AI智能体在非小细胞肺癌转录组学生物标志物任务中的分析质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型和AI智能体在生物医学研究中应用日益广泛，但原生模型输出可能遗漏关键分析步骤、误用方法或夸大结论。现有方法缺乏对AI智能体自主访问医学研究技能包的效果评估，特别是在实际研究任务中的质量提升。该研究旨在通过人类评估比较技能增强AI与原生AI在转录组学研究分析中的质量差异，为AI在生物医学领域的可靠应用提供依据。
light_analysis.method: 采用非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）免疫疗法生物标志物任务进行探索性多模型人类评估。测试6种模型骨干，生成21个匿名输出：9个原生AI输出和12个技能增强AI输出（通过OpenClaw AI智能体实现）。由4名非专家生物医学审稿人和2名盲法专家对每个输出进行两次评分，主要结局为专家评定的总体质量。
light_analysis.result: 技能增强输出在专家总体质量上呈方向性优势（均值5.50 vs 5.11；差异0.39；bootstrap 95%CI [-0.04, 0.90]；Welch p=0.156）。非专家评审质量同样呈方向性优势（均值4.72 vs 4.47；差异0.26；bootstrap 95%CI [-0.25, 0.80]；Welch p=0.373）。专家一致性有限（单项ICC=-0.15），模型特异性效应为描述性和异质性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 自主技能访问在本探索样本中显示出方向性质量信号，但信号小于专家评分噪声，不应视为确认性证据。研究结果主要促使进行更大规模的技能增强AI智能体评估，需更强的可靠性控制、平台复现和生物学有效性评估。

title: WorldReasoner: Evaluating Whether Language Model Agents Forecast Events with Valid Reasoning
abstract: Forecasting real-world events requires language-model agents to reason under uncertainty from incomplete, time-bounded information. Yet evaluating whether agents genuinely forecast requires more than final-answer accuracy: a model may be correct by recalling memorized training facts, citing fabricated evidence, or producing an unsupported causal story. We present WorldReasoner, an evaluation framework for temporally valid event forecasting. Each task gives an agent a resolved forecasting question, a simulated forecast date, and access only to evidence available before that date; after resolution, the framework scores the submitted probability, cited evidence, and optional causal event graph. WorldReasoner reports three complementary axes: outcome quality against resolved answers, evidence quality over cited sources, and reasoning quality against post-resolution hindsight graphs. The benchmark is built by an agentic construction pipeline that generates forecasting questions, collects time-stamped evidence, and builds hindsight reference graphs at scale, yielding 345 resolved tasks derived from 14,141 articles with graphs covering 8,087 extracted events. Across six controlled agent settings, temporally valid retrieval is the strongest driver of outcome accuracy; causal graph construction improves key-event recovery; and correct graph-enabled forecasts are more strongly grounded in key events and relevant sources, yet agents still struggle to convert grounded evidence into calibrated probabilities.

light_analysis.overview: 提出WorldReasoner框架，从结果、证据和推理质量三轴评估语言模型代理在时间约束下的事件预测有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有评估仅关注最终答案准确率，但模型可能通过记忆训练事实、编造证据或生成无因果支持的故事来获取正确结果。真实世界事件预测需要在不完整、时限信息下推理，因此需要更全面的评估框架来区分真正的有效推理与表面成功。
light_analysis.method: WorldReasoner框架为每个任务提供已解决预测问题、模拟预测日期及该日期前可用证据；事件后评分提交的概率、引用证据和可选因果事件图。通过智能体构建流水线生成问题、收集时间戳证据并构建事后参考图，最终获得345个任务、14141篇文章、8087个事件的图。
light_analysis.result: 在六种受控智能体设置下，时间有效检索是结果准确性的最强驱动因素；因果图构建改善关键事件恢复；正确图支持预测更紧密基于关键事件和相关源，但智能体仍难以将基于证据的推理转化为校准概率。
light_analysis.conclusion: WorldReasoner提供多维度评估揭示语言模型代理预测能力，强调时间有效检索和因果推理的重要性，但代理在概率校准方面存在不足，为未来改进真实世界事件预测提供方向。

title: External Experience Serving in Production LLM Systems: A Deployment-Oriented Study of Quality-Cost Trade-offs
abstract: Production LLM systems accumulate reusable operational experience, but the practical deployment issue is not merely whether such experience can help. It is how different serving strategies trade off quality against online cost under realistic constraints. Injecting external experience can improve task quality, yet it also increases prompt burden, latency, and serving pressure. We study \textit{external experience serving} as a deployment-oriented quality-cost trade-off problem. We evaluate this question in a real production moderation setting, with tool-use and GPQA as supporting contrast tasks that expose different output-cost regimes. We compare no-experience baselines, random experience controls, global prompt injection, and retrieval-based selective injection, and analyze both task quality and serving cost. The results show that, once experience becomes case-dependent, selective retrieval provides a stronger operating point than unconditional global injection. They further show that retrieval quality matters more than simply increasing Top-$K$, and that the same serving policy can exhibit substantially different cost-benefit profiles across short-output and decode-heavy regimes. These findings suggest that external experience is best treated as a selective, cost-aware serving decision rather than as a universal add-on. Overall, in the settings studied here, external experience pays off only when both the serving interface and the task-specific cost structure make its quality gains worth the online cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出面向部署的外部经验服务问题，研究质量-成本权衡，发现选择性检索比全局注入更优。
light_analysis.motivation: 生产LLM系统可积累可重用操作经验，但注入外部经验会带来提示负担、延迟和服务压力。现有研究未充分探讨实际部署中不同服务策略如何权衡质量与在线成本。本文旨在解决该问题，指导实际系统设计。
light_analysis.method: 在实际生产内容审核场景中评估，使用工具使用和GPQA作为辅助任务。比较无经验基线、随机经验控制、全局提示注入和基于检索的选择性注入。通过任务质量和在线成本指标分析。
light_analysis.result: 选择性检索比无条件全局注入提供更强的操作点。检索质量比增加Top-K更重要。相同策略在短输出和解码密集型任务中成本效益差异显著。经验回报取决于服务接口和成本结构。
light_analysis.conclusion: 外部经验应作为选择性、成本意识的服务决策，而非通用附加项。其付费条件为质量收益值得在线成本。研究为生产LLM系统部署提供实践指导。

title: TextHOI-3D: Text-to-3D Hand-Object Interaction via Discrete Multi-View Generation and Joint Mesh Optimization
abstract: Text-conditioned 3D generation has progressed rapidly for images and isolated objects, but producing a hand-object mesh remains challenging: the output must preserve language semantics, cross-view consistency, object geometry, articulated hand shape, and physically plausible contact. We present TextHOI-3D, a staged framework that uses generated multi-view observations as an explicit interface between text-conditioned visual generation and geometry-aware hand-object recovery. TextHOI-3D learns a compact VQ token space for fixed-camera hand-object observations, predicts multi-view visual tokens from text with a CLIP-conditioned visual autoregressive model, and recovers a unified hand-object mesh through prior initialization, multi-view joint optimization, and anti-penetration refinement. The design separates semantic generation from geometric recovery while keeping both stages connected by a discrete multi-view representation. On HO3D-derived evaluations, the multi-view setting reduces object CD from 17.26 mm to 4.92 mm and penetration volume from 5.3721 cm^3 to 0.2193 cm^3 compared with a single-view counterpart, while improving hand errors and surface F-scores. These results support multi-view visual tokens as an effective intermediate representation for text-driven 3D hand-object mesh creation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TextHOI-3D框架，通过离散多视角生成和联合网格优化实现文本到3D手物交互网格的创建。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本条件3D生成在图像和孤立物体上表现良好，但生成手-物交互网格面临多重挑战：需同时保持语言语义、跨视角一致性、物体几何、手部关节姿态以及物理接触合理性。现有方法难以兼顾这些要求，导致生成结果不准确或物理不真实。因此，亟需一种能够有效分离语义生成与几何恢复并保持两者关联的框架。
light_analysis.method: TextHOI-3D采用分阶段框架：首先学习紧凑的VQ token空间，编码固定相机视角的手物观察；然后使用CLIP条件视觉自回归模型从文本预测多视角视觉token；最后通过先验初始化、多视角联合优化和反穿透细化恢复统一的手物网格。该设计将语义生成与几何恢复分离，并通过离散多视角表示保持两阶段连接。
light_analysis.result: 在HO3D衍生评估中，多视角设置相比单视角将物体Chamfer距离从17.26mm降至4.92mm，穿透体积从5.3721cm³降至0.2193cm³，同时手部误差和表面F分数也得到改善。结果表明多视角视觉token作为中间表示能有效提升文本驱动3D手物网格生成的质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: TextHOI-3D验证了多视角视觉token作为文本驱动3D手物网格创建中间表示的有效性，通过离散生成与联合优化解决了语义与几何的平衡问题。该框架为文本到交互式3D生成提供了新思路，具有潜在的应用价值，如虚拟现实和机器人操作。未来可探索更复杂交互场景和更高效token空间。

title: Toward Trustworthy AI: Multi-Target Adversarial Attacks and Robust Defenses for Continuous Data Summarization
abstract: Trustworthy AI requires reliable data-processing pipelines, not only robust downstream predictive models. As an upstream component, data summarization determines which information is retained and passed to subsequent learning or decision modules. Therefore, adversarial perturbations to the summarization process can compromise trustworthy AI in an upstream manner: they may alter the selected summary, reduce its representativeness, and further degrade the utility of subsequent learning tasks. In this paper, we study adversarial attacks on continuous data summarization under similarity-level perturbations through DR-submodular optimization. We show that a class of multi-resolution image summarization objectives can be formulated as multilinear extensions of non-negative submodular set functions and satisfy DR-submodularity with $m$-weak monotonicity. We then formulate multi-target attack generation as a min-max problem, where one admissible perturbation of the similarity structure is optimized to degrade multiple target summarization models. To mitigate such perturbations, we formulate robust defense against mixed attack types as a regularized max-min problem. For both problems, we develop approximation algorithms with theoretical guarantees. Experiments on real-data and controlled clustered benchmarks show that the proposed attack is effective in representative low-to-moderate budget regimes and can induce downstream task-performance loss. The proposed defense improves the robustness--mitigation trade-off in structured settings, while also revealing the parameter sensitivity of robust protection on real data.
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security (IEEE TIFS)

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于DR-submodular优化的多目标对抗攻击与鲁棒防御方法，用于连续数据总结，具有理论保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 可信AI需要可靠的数据处理管道，但上游数据总结过程易受对抗扰动，导致信息代表性下降和下游任务性能退化。现有研究多关注下游模型鲁棒性，忽视上游组件的脆弱性。本文旨在揭示并缓解此类威胁。
light_analysis.method: 将多分辨率图像总结目标构造为DR-submodular函数（多线性扩展与弱单调性）。攻击生成建模为min-max问题，优化相似性结构扰动以同时降低多个总结模型性能；防御建模为正则化max-min问题，对抗混合攻击类型。开发了带理论保证的近似算法。
light_analysis.result: 在真实数据和聚类基准上，所提攻击在低到中预算区域有效，能引起下游任务性能损失；防御在结构化设置下改善了鲁棒性-缓解权衡，并揭示了真实数据上鲁棒保护的参数敏感性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文研究数据总结的对抗攻击与防御，强调上游组件对可信AI的关键作用。攻击可破坏总结及下游任务，防御能提升鲁棒性。未来可探索更广泛的数据总结场景与防御参数优化。

title: Space-sampled Value Decay: Forgetting Mechanisms for Non-stationary Deep Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Studies on rodents such as mice have shown the capabilities to adapt their behavior when dealing with changing parameters (``drift'') of the environment even if no information about change is provided (uncertainty) -- a behavior that can be modeled by forgetting mechanisms. Non-stationary Reinforcement Learning (NSRL) deals with adapting state-of-the-art RL methods to deal with changing environments: these however usually require (partially) perfect information about the drift such as ``task IDs'' or ``context''. To mitigate the effects of drift, this work develops \emph{Space-sampled Value Decay} as an explicit forgetting mechanism for value-based deep RL architectures as a simple yet effective approach. In particular we demonstrate and discuss positive effects but also limitations in achieved returns for modifications of Deep Q-networks (DQN) and Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) when evaluated on non-stationary environments.
comment: Accepted at The 2nd Workshop on Epistemic Intelligence in Machine Learning, EIML@ICML 2026, (non-archival)

light_analysis.overview: 提出Space-sampled Value Decay遗忘机制，用于无漂移信息时的非平稳深度强化学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有非平稳强化学习方法通常依赖任务ID或上下文等完美信息，而动物能在无信息时适应环境变化。本文旨在开发一种简单有效的遗忘机制，使深度强化学习在缺乏环境变化信息时也能适应漂移，弥补现有方法在无监督适应上的不足。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出Space-sampled Value Decay，通过对值函数进行空间采样并施加衰减来模拟遗忘，作为基于价值的深度强化学习的显式遗忘机制。在DQN和SAC架构中集成该机制，并在非平稳环境中测试其效果。该方法无需额外任务信息，简单且通用。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该遗忘机制在非平稳环境下对DQN和SAC的回报有正面影响，但同时也存在性能局限性。摘要未提供具体数值或与基线方法的定量对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的Space-sampled Value Decay作为一种显式遗忘机制，使深度强化学习在无漂移信息时能适应非平稳环境，具有一定学术和实际价值。方法简单有效，但存在性能局限，未来可探索更优的遗忘策略或与其他适应机制结合。

title: Multimodal Ordinal Modeling of Alzheimer's Disease Severity Using Structural MRI and Clinical Data
abstract: Neurodegenerative diseases such as Alzheimer's disease (AD) require accurate and scalable tools for assessing disease severity, yet current clinical staging remains time-intensive and prone to variability. We propose an attention-enhanced multimodal machine learning framework with ordinal regression for automated and interpretable AD severity staging. The framework integrates T1-weighted MRI with demographic and genetic variables and compares unimodal and multimodal architectures using ordinal and non-ordinal prediction heads. Models were trained and validated using cohort-stratified splits derived from the ADNI, AIBL, and NIFD datasets. A strictly held-out test set was constructed using subjects excluded from all training, validation, preprocessing, and hyperparameter tuning procedures, with subject-level splitting employed throughout to prevent data leakage. Among unimodal approaches, the T1-weighted MRI model achieved slightly higher adjacent-stage accuracy (0.963) and agreement with clinical staging (QWK 0.444) than the tabular model (QWK 0.433). Integrating imaging, demographic, and genetic information improved overall performance. The multimodal non-ordinal baseline achieved the lowest prediction error (MAE 0.340), whereas the ordinal multimodal model achieved the highest adjacent-stage accuracy (0.970) and strongest agreement with clinical staging (QWK 0.549). These findings indicate that ordinal formulations better capture the ordered structure of the CDR scale and yield predictions more consistent with clinical staging. Explainability analyses using Grad CAM++ and SHAP demonstrated anatomically and clinically plausible model behavior, supporting transparent decision-making. Overall, attention-based multimodal learning with ordinal regression represents a robust, interpretable, and scalable approach for automated AD severity staging and AI-assisted clinical decision support.
comment: 18 pages. Submitted to journal for review

light_analysis.overview: 提出注意力增强的多模态序数回归框架，实现阿尔茨海默病严重程度的自动、可解释分期。
light_analysis.motivation: 阿尔茨海默病等神经退行性疾病需要准确且可扩展的严重程度评估工具，但当前临床分期耗时且易受主观变异影响。现有方法缺乏对疾病有序进展的显式建模，且单模态数据未能充分利用多源信息，导致分期一致性和准确性不足。因此亟需一种整合多模态数据、捕捉疾病序数结构并保持可解释性的自动化方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出注意力增强的多模态机器学习框架，整合T1加权MRI、人口统计学和遗传变量，采用序数回归预测头。框架比较了单模态与多模态、序数与非序数架构。模型在ADNI、AIBL、NIFD数据集上通过分层划分进行训练验证，严格隔离测试集以避免数据泄露。解释性分析使用Grad-CAM++和SHAP。
light_analysis.result: 单模态T1-MRI模型相邻阶段准确率0.963，QWK 0.444；多模态非序数基线MAE最低（0.340），但多模态序数模型取得最高相邻阶段准确率（0.970）和最强临床分期一致性（QWK 0.549）。序数公式更好地捕获CDR等级的有序结构，解释性分析显示解剖和临床合理的行为。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作表明注意力增强的多模态序数学习为AD严重程度自动分期提供了稳健、可解释且可扩展的方案，预测结果与临床分期高度一致，有助于AI辅助临床决策。未来可探索更细粒度分期或纵向数据融合。

title: AI4Land: Scalable Deep Learning for Global High-Resolution Land Use Reconstruction
abstract: Uncertainty in the terrestrial carbon cycle remains a major constraint in climate projections, partly driven by the uncertainties affecting the land surface representation and variability in Earth system models. To address this limitation, we present a data-driven framework AI4Land, for generating high-resolution historical reconstructions and future projections of key land surface variables. The framework follows a two-phase approach using a U-Net architecture. In the first phase, which is the focus of this work, it reconstructs annual land use and land cover by integrating coarse-resolution scenario data with static geophysical features. In a planned second phase, the resulting high-resolution maps will be used to predict dynamic biophysical variables, particularly leaf area index, at finer temporal scales. Trained on Earth observation data, the models learn to reproduce spatially explicit and physically consistent land surface patterns, extending temporal coverage to periods lacking direct observations. AI4Land was developed and trained on MareNostrum5, demonstrating how GPU-accelerated HPC infrastructure enables global-scale climate AI pipelines. The final product is a suite of open-source emulators designed for real-time coupling with digital twin platforms, such as those developed under the Destination Earth initiative. By delivering realistic and evolving land surface conditions on demand, this work aims to reduce critical uncertainties and improve the predictive power of next-generation climate simulations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AI4Land框架，利用U-Net架构进行全球高分辨率土地利用重建，减少气候预测中的陆地碳循环不确定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 陆地碳循环的不确定性是气候预测的主要限制，源于地球系统模型中陆面表征和变率的不确定性。现有方法依赖粗分辨率情景数据，缺乏高分辨率历史重建和未来预测能力。
light_analysis.method: 采用两阶段U-Net架构。第一阶段整合粗分辨率情景数据与静态地理特征，重建年度土地利用和覆盖；第二阶段预测叶面积指数等动态变量。模型在MareNostrum5上训练，利用GPU加速HPC实现全球尺度推理。
light_analysis.result: 在MareNostrum5上完成训练，可生成空间显式且物理一致的地表模式，扩展无观测时段的时间覆盖。输出开源模拟器，支持与数字孪生平台实时耦合。摘要未提供具体性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: AI4Land通过深度学习实现高分辨率土地利用重建，减少气候模拟中的关键不确定性。其开源模拟器可集成到Destination Earth等数字孪生系统，提升下一代气候模拟的预测能力。

title: MultiToP: Learning to Patch Visual Tokens to Mitigate Hallucinations in Video Large Multimodal Models
abstract: Video Large Multimodal Models have achieved remarkable progress in video understanding, yet they remain prone to hallucinations, where generated responses are not faithfully supported by the input video. In this paper, we propose MultiToP, a multimodal-context-aware visual token patching framework that mitigates hallucinations by refining unreliable visual tokens before language generation. MultiToP introduces a lightweight Visual Token Patcher to predict token-level replacement distributions and selectively substitute unreliable visual tokens with a dynamic global patch token. To train the patcher effectively, we further propose information-guided rank calibration, which uses answer-conditioned frame-level information cues derived from the backbone to guide token replacement. Combined with ground-truth answer supervision and sparsity regularization, MultiToP enables localized visual evidence refinement without modifying the original model. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MultiToP effectively reduces hallucinations on Vript-HAL with negligible inference overhead, improving the F1 scores of Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct by 50.60% over the vanilla model. Meanwhile, MultiToP preserves general video understanding ability, yielding an 18.58% relative accuracy gain on ActivityNet-QA for Video-LLaVA-7B.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MultiToP框架，通过修补不可靠视觉标记减少视频大语言模型的幻觉，实现轻量级局部视觉证据细化。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频大多模态模型在视频理解中取得显著进展，但仍易产生幻觉，生成内容与输入视频不一致。现有方法通常需要修改模型或增加大量计算，本文旨在不修改原始模型的前提下，通过轻量级模块细化视觉标记，高效缓解幻觉问题。
light_analysis.method: MultiToP引入轻量级视觉标记修补器（Visual Token Patcher），预测每个视觉标记的替换分布，并选择性地将不可靠标记替换为动态全局修补标记。训练时采用信息引导的排序校准，利用基于回答的帧级信息线索指导替换，结合真实答案监督和稀疏正则化，实现局部视觉证据细化，无需修改原始模型。
light_analysis.result: 在Vript-HAL数据集上，MultiToP有效减少幻觉，使Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct的F1分数相比基模型提升50.60%。同时，在ActivityNet-QA上，Video-LLaVA-7B的准确率相对提升18.58%，证明其保持通用视频理解能力，且推理开销可忽略。
light_analysis.conclusion: MultiToP通过修补不可靠视觉标记，有效缓解视频大语言模型的幻觉问题，同时保持通用理解能力。其轻量级设计无需修改原始模型，具有实用价值。未来可探索更精细的全局标记生成或应用于其他多模态任务。

title: Lius: Translation Model Based Instructional Lingustic Using Continual Instruction Tuning In Kupang Malay
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) offer new potential for translation tasks but often experience performance degradation when handling low-resource languages. To address this limitation, we propose an approach for fine-tuning LLMs on a low-resource language, Kupang Malay. Our approach involves designing a set of instructions by leveraging explicit lexical and semantic features from a bilingual dictionary, and introducing Continual Instruction Tuning (CIT), a training paradigm that enables iterative instruction-based training. Experimental results demonstrate that our model, named Lius, yields notable improvements over standard instruction-tuned models by outperforming 4-6 points, and surpassing both Neural Machine Translation (NMT) and Multilingual LLM models by 10-13 points on several evaluation metrics. These findings highlight the potential of our approach to mitigate the reliance on large-scale parallel data in low-resource language translation.
comment: This paper is the result of the Master Thesis in Master of Artificial Intelligence at Universitas Gadjah Mada

light_analysis.overview: 提出连续指令微调方法，提升低资源语言库邦马来语的翻译性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在低资源语言翻译中性能下降，而传统方法依赖大规模并行数据。库邦马来语作为低资源语言，缺乏足够训练数据。现有指令微调方法未能充分利用语言特征，且无法迭代优化。本研究旨在通过设计基于双语词典的指令和连续训练范式，缓解数据稀缺问题，提升翻译质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出Lius模型，利用双语词典的显式词汇和语义特征设计指令集，并引入连续指令微调（CIT）训练范式。CIT通过迭代式指令训练，使模型逐步适应低资源语言。微调过程以LLM为基础，使用少量库邦马来语数据，结合词典特征增强语义理解。
light_analysis.result: 在多个评估指标上，Lius模型比标准指令微调模型提升4-6个点，超越神经机器翻译和多语言LLM模型10-13个点。结果表明该方法有效减少了低资源语言翻译对大规模并行数据的依赖，显著提升翻译性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出针对低资源语言的连续指令微调方法，验证了结合词典特征和迭代训练的有效性。减少了数据需求，为其他低资源语言翻译提供新思路。未来可探索更多语言特征和指令设计，进一步优化跨语言泛化能力。

title: A Comprehensive Ecosystem for Open-Domain Customized Video Generation
abstract: Recent progress in video generation has shown impressive visual synthesis capabilities. However, open-domain customized video generation remains limited by the lack of large-scale, annotated datasets capturing diverse identity-specific attributes. To address this, we introduce PexelsCustom-1M, the first publicly available million-scale dataset for identity-preserving video generation, containing one million curated <identity, text, video> triplets across 8,000+ categories. Leveraging this, we propose CustoMDiT, a parameter-efficient framework that adapts a pretrained multimodal Diffusion Transformer into a customized video generator with only 8% additional learnable parameters. Our method surpasses prior state-of-the-art. However, benchmarks such as DreamBooth cover only 100 classes, which is insufficient for real-world applications. To overcome this, we construct OpenCustom, a new benchmark with 1,000+ categories, created via cross-dataset knowledge fusion from ImageNet and MS-COCO. Extensive experiments confirm the advantages of both our dataset and model. We will open-source the entire ecosystem--including dataset, pipeline, benchmark, and implementations--to support further research.
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables. Accepted by ICASSP 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个百万级身份保留视频生成数据集PexelsCustom-1M及参数高效模型CustoMDiT，构建开放域定制视频生成生态。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有开放域定制视频生成受限于缺乏大规模、标注的身份属性数据集，且现有基准（如DreamBooth）类别仅100类，不足以支撑现实应用。因此，需要大规模数据集和更全面的基准来推动该领域发展。
light_analysis.method: 构建PexelsCustom-1M数据集，包含100万个<身份, 文本, 视频>三元组，覆盖8000+类别。提出CustoMDiT，基于预训练多模态扩散Transformer，仅增加8%可学习参数实现定制化视频生成。同时构建OpenCustom基准，通过跨数据集知识融合（ImageNet、MS-COCO）涵盖1000+类别。
light_analysis.result: CustoMDiT在定制视频生成上超越先前最优方法。OpenCustom基准提供了更全面的评估，实验验证了数据集和模型的有效性。具体性能指标未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究提供了完整生态系统（数据集、流程、基准、实现），推动开放域定制视频生成研究。数据与代码将开源，促进后续工作。局限性可能在于模型参数效率虽高，但生成质量仍需进一步提升。

title: Seeing What Matters: Perceptual Wrapper with Common Randomness for 3D Gaussian Splatting
abstract: While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) achieves impressive real-time rendering, it frequently struggles to synthesize high-frequency textures, a limitation heavily exacerbated in memory-constrained and rate-distortion-optimized (RDO) pipelines. To address this, we propose a versatile 2D perceptual wrapper that enhances the rendered outputs of existing 3DGS representations in a content- and view-dependent manner. Our method leverages a lightweight synthesis network conditioned on pseudo-random Gaussian noise to synthesize perceptually plausible textures. Supervised by Wasserstein Distortion, the network learns to match local feature statistics rather than strictly enforcing pixel-wise reconstruction fidelity, effectively mitigating the blurriness inherent in standard frameworks. We demonstrate the broad applicability of our plug-and-play approach across vanilla, memory-constrained, and RDO 3DGS methods. Comprehensive subjective and objective experiments confirm that our method significantly improves over existing baselines, yielding superior perceptual quality at sharply reduced file or model sizes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于感知包装器的2D增强方法，利用伪随机噪声生成纹理，提升3DGS在内存受限和率失真优化场景下的视觉质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 3DGS在实时渲染中表现优异，但在合成高频纹理时存在不足，尤其在内存受限和率失真优化管线中模糊问题加剧。现有方法缺乏内容及视图依赖的纹理增强手段，导致感知质量下降。
light_analysis.method: 提出2D感知包装器，使用轻量级合成网络，以伪随机高斯噪声为条件，生成感知上合理的纹理。采用Wasserstein Distortion损失监督，学习匹配局部特征统计量，而非严格像素级重建。该插件可应用于原始、内存受限和RDO 3DGS方法。
light_analysis.result: 主观和客观实验证实，该方法在显著降低文件或模型大小的同时，相比现有基线方法在感知质量上取得明显提升。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明在多种3DGS变体上均有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提出了一种通用、即插即用的感知增强方案，有效缓解3DGS的模糊问题，在压缩和内存受限场景下保持高质量渲染。未来可探索更复杂的噪声条件或扩展至其他神经渲染管线。

title: Battery detection of XRay images using transfer learning
abstract: The need for detecting and sorting batteries is drastically increasing for many applications. This study proves the potential of transfer learning in predicting whether the image contains a battery or not, the location and identifying three types of batteries, namely: prismatic, pouch, and cylindrical Lithium-Ion Batteries (LIB). Particularly, it focuses on the transfer learning method in two applications: Training a large-scale dataset to detect electronic devices using a pre-trained YOLOv5m, then using these latter trained weights to detect and classify the batteries. The precision of battery detection achieves 94%, which outperforms the pretrained YOLOv5m weights with 5%, in 22 ms inference time.
comment: Published at the European Symposium on Artificial Neural Networks (ESANN 2022)

light_analysis.overview: 利用迁移学习在X射线图像中检测、定位和分类三种锂电池，精度达94%。
light_analysis.motivation: 电池检测和分类需求日益增长，现有方法在X射线图像上精度不足。迁移学习可高效利用预训练模型，减少标注数据需求，提升检测性能。本研究旨在验证迁移学习在电池检测中的潜力，包括位置定位和三种类型（棱柱、软包、圆柱）分类。
light_analysis.method: 采用YOLOv5m作为基础模型，首先在大规模电子设备数据集上预训练，然后迁移权重到电池检测任务。通过微调使模型适应X射线图像特征，实现电池存在性判断、位置定位及三种锂电池（棱柱、软包、圆柱）分类。推理时间22ms。
light_analysis.result: 电池检测精度达到94%，相比直接使用预训练YOLOv5m权重提升5%。推理速度22ms，满足实时检测需求。该结果证明了迁移学习在X射线电池检测中的有效性，优于传统方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究展示了迁移学习在X射线图像电池检测中的显著优势，精度高、速度快。该方法可应用于废旧电池回收、安全检查等领域。未来可拓展到更多类型电池检测，或结合其他深度学习架构进一步提升性能。

title: SVoT: State-aware Visualization-of-Thought for Spatial Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Spatial reasoning remains a challenge for Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), as it requires reliable multi-hop inference over both intermediate states and state transitions. Current studies often leave intermediate states unverified and treat state transitions as implicit processes, which limits reliability in multi-hop spatial reasoning. To address this, we propose State-aware Visualization-of-Thought (SVoT), a reinforcement learning framework that generates interleaved, verifiable intermediate states and visualizations. SVoT integrates transition reasoning chains into the generation processes, enabling the model to verify action preconditions and effects through interleaved textual and visual reasoning. We train SVoT via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), instantiating verification through reward design and evaluating the efficacy of different fine-grained rewards. As existing benchmarks reduce state transitions to single-variable updates, substantially simplifying the problems, we establish five domains by extending classical environments and introducing two novel domains, Pacman and Gather, that require multi-object interactions and numerical reasoning. These domains support systematic evaluation of multi-hop spatial reasoning with quantitative verification of generated intermediate states and transition reasoning. SVoT with transition-aware supervision achieves state-of-the-art performance across the introduced domains, yielding up to a 65% absolute accuracy gain on out-of-distribution test sets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出状态感知的思维可视化（SVoT）框架，通过强化学习生成可验证的中间状态和可视化，提升多模态大模型的空间推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 空间推理要求在多跳推理中可靠地处理中间状态和状态转换，但现有方法将中间状态视为隐式过程且未验证，导致可靠性不足。同时，现有基准将状态转换简化为单变量更新，简化了问题。因此，需要一种能显式验证中间状态和转换推理的方法，以提升多模态大模型在复杂空间推理任务上的表现。
light_analysis.method: SVoT框架利用Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)训练模型，生成交织的文本和视觉中间状态及可视化，通过奖励设计实现动作前提和效果的验证。引入Pacman和Gather两个新域，要求多物体交互和数值推理，支持系统评估多跳空间推理和中间状态的定量验证。
light_analysis.result: 在引入的多个域上，SVoT实现了最先进性能，尤其在分布外测试集上，获得高达65%的绝对准确率提升，验证了过渡感知监督的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SVoT通过强化学习显式建模和验证中间状态，显著提升了多模态大模型的空间推理能力。该框架为复杂多跳推理任务提供了可行方案，具有重要的学术价值和应用前景。未来可探索更高效的奖励设计和跨域泛化能力。

title: When Do Data-Driven Systems Exhibit the Capability to Infer?
abstract: The European AI Act is the first comprehensive regulation of artificial intelligence (AI), setting out extensive obligations, particularly for so-called high-risk and general-purpose AI systems. A key distinguishing feature of AI systems under the AI Act is the capability to infer. Since the AI Act does not clearly define what inference is, there is a gray area for certain data-driven systems. A specific example is credit scoring systems, which are listed by Annex III of the AI Act. At the same time, however, these are often implemented using statistical models for which it is unclear whether they have the capability to infer and thus fall under the AI definition of the AI Act at all.   Motivated by statistical learning theory, this work develops a framework for grading different levels of the capability to infer. Based on the AI Act and the Commission Guidelines on the definition of an artificial intelligence system, we analyze which levels constitute sufficient capability to infer within the meaning of the AI Act and where further regulatory clarity is needed. We illustrate the framework by creating two realistic credit scoring workflows and show whether and where inference occurs in them. Our analysis illustrates that not only individual models but the entire data processing workflow must be considered. It also shows that the involvement of human experts during development can have significant influence on the capability to infer. Code can be found at https://github.com/fraunhofer-iais/inference-framework-creditscorecards.

light_analysis.overview: 基于统计学习理论，提出分级框架以判定数据驱动系统是否具备欧盟AI法案定义的推理能力，并应用于信用评分系统。
light_analysis.motivation: 欧盟AI法案首次全面监管AI，但未明确定义“推理能力”，导致高风险的信用评分系统等数据驱动系统是否属于AI存在灰色地带。现有方法缺乏统一标准，需要明确推理能力的判定标准和监管边界，以合规评估系统风险。
light_analysis.method: 论文从统计学习理论出发，构建推理能力分级框架，依据AI法案及指南分析不同级别是否满足法律定义。通过创建两个实际信用评分工作流，在完整数据处理流程中识别推理发生的位置，并考虑人类专家开发过程中的影响。框架开源在GitHub。
light_analysis.result: 分析表明推理能力不仅取决于单个模型，还需考虑整个数据处理流程；人类专家在开发中的参与会显著影响系统的推理能力。论文为信用评分系统提供了是否落入AI法案定义的判断依据，但未报告定量实验结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架有助于厘清AI法案中推理能力的法律灰色地带，为高风险AI系统的合规评估提供技术支撑。未来可能需要更多监管澄清，尤其是当系统涉及统计模型和人工干预时。研究启发需从全流程视角审视AI定义。

title: Automated Creativity Evaluation of Language Models Across Open-Ended Tasks
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in language understanding, reasoning, and generation, sparking growing interest in their creative potential. Realizing this potential requires systematic and scalable methods for evaluating creativity across diverse tasks. However, most existing creativity metrics are tightly coupled to specific tasks, embedding domain assumptions into the evaluation process, and limiting scalability and generality. To address this gap, we introduce an automated, domain-agnostic framework for quantifying LLM creativity across open-ended tasks. Our approach separates the measurement apparatus from the creative task itself, enabling scalable, task-agnostic assessment. Divergent creativity is measured using semantic entropy, a reference-free and robust metric for novelty and diversity, validated against human annotations, LLM-based novelty judgments and baseline diversity measures. Convergent creativity is assessed via a novel retrieval-based multi-agent judge framework that delivers context-sensitive evaluation of task fulfilment with over 60% improved efficiency. We validate our framework in three qualitatively distinct domains: problem-solving (MacGyver), research ideation (HypoGen), and creative writing (BookMIA), using a broad suite of LLMs. Empirical results show that our framework reliably captures key facets of creativity, including novelty, diversity, and task fulfilment, and reveal how model properties, such as size, temperature, recency, and reasoning, impact creative performance. Our work establishes a reproducible and generalizable standard for automated LLM creativity evaluation, paving the way for scalable benchmarking and accelerating progress in creative AI.
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 (Main Conference). 35 pages, 16 figures. Code: https://github.com/tanminsen/creativity-eval

light_analysis.overview: 提出自动化、领域无关的框架，通过语义熵和检索式多智能体评估LLM的创造力。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在语言理解与生成上进步显著，但其创造力评估缺乏通用方法。现有指标多与特定任务绑定，嵌入领域假设，限制了可扩展性和通用性。为系统评估不同开放任务的创造力，需一种可扩展且任务无关的自动化评估标准。
light_analysis.method: 框架将测量工具与任务分离：发散创造力使用语义熵，一种无参考的鲁棒新颖性度量；收敛创造力采用基于检索的多智能体评判框架，提升效率超60%。在MacGyver、HypoGen、BookMIA三个领域验证，涉及多种LLM。
light_analysis.result: 框架有效捕捉新颖性、多样性和任务完成度等创造力核心方面。效率提升60%以上，结果与人类注释及基线一致。发现模型大小、温度、训练新鲜度和推理能力显著影响创造表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了首个可重复、可泛化的自动化创造力评估标准，支持跨领域基准测试。推动创造性AI的可扩展评估，为未来研究提供统一方法论。局限在于通用性需更多领域验证。

title: RCAP: Robust, Class-Aware, Probabilistic Dynamic Dataset Pruning
abstract: Dynamic data pruning techniques aim to reduce computational cost while minimizing information loss by periodically selecting representative subsets of input data during model training. However, existing methods often struggle to maintain strong worst-group accuracy, particularly at high pruning rates, across balanced and imbalanced datasets. To address this challenge, we propose RCAP, a Robust, Class-Aware, Probabilistic dynamic dataset pruning algorithm for classification tasks. RCAP applies a closed-form solution to estimate the fraction of samples to be included in the training subset for each individual class. This fraction is adaptively adjusted in every epoch using class-wise aggregated loss. Thereafter, it employs an adaptive sampling strategy that prioritizes samples having high loss for populating the class-wise subsets. We evaluate RCAP on six diverse datasets ranging from class-balanced to highly imbalanced using five distinct models across three training paradigms: training from scratch, transfer learning, and fine-tuning. Our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art dataset pruning methods, achieving superior worst-group accuracy at all pruning rates. Remarkably, with only $10\%$ data, RCAP delivers $>1\%$ improvement in performance on class-imbalanced datasets compared to full data training while providing an average $8.69\times$ speedup. The code can be accessed at https://github.com/atif-hassan/RCAP-dynamic-dataset-pruning
comment: Proceedings of the Forty-first Conference on Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI 2025)

light_analysis.overview: 提出RCAP动态数据集剪枝算法，通过类感知概率采样提升最差组精度和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 动态数据剪枝旨在减少计算成本的同时最小化信息损失，但现有方法在高剪枝率下难以保持最差组精度，尤其在平衡和失衡数据集上。该研究针对分类任务，解决如何自适应选择代表性数据子集以兼顾效率与均衡性能的问题。
light_analysis.method: RCAP采用闭式解估计每类样本保留比例，通过类聚合损失逐 epoch 自适应调整。然后使用自适应采样策略优先选择高损失样本填充类子集。在六个数据集（平衡到高度失衡）上使用五个模型，在从头训练、迁移学习、微调三种范式下评估。
light_analysis.result: RCAP在所有剪枝率下优于现有方法，最差组精度最高。仅用10%数据，在类失衡数据集上性能比全数据训练提升>1%，平均加速8.69倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: RCAP通过类感知概率剪枝实现了鲁棒的高效训练，尤其改善最差组性能。学术上提供动态剪枝新思路，实际价值显著降低计算成本。未来可探索更复杂的依赖关系或扩展到其他任务。

title: AnchorEdit: Maintaining Temporal Consistency in Multi-turn Image Editing via Causal Memory
abstract: Multi-turn image editing is essential for iterative design, yet current models often struggle with identity drift and error accumulation over successive steps. While existing research leverages video priors for consistency, their reliance on bidirectional attention is fundamentally misaligned with the causal, sequential nature of interactive editing. In this paper, we propose AnchorEdit, the first autoregressive (AR) diffusion-based framework designed specifically for high-resolution, long-term multi-turn editing. AnchorEdit bridges the gap between video priors and causal inference through a three-stage training curriculum: identity-preserving sing-turn pretraining, causal AR forcing fine-tuning with a novel self-rollout strategy to mitigate exposure bias, and consistency distillation for efficient 4-step generation. During inference, we introduce a memory mechanism to anchor the initial subject identity and ensure stable extrapolation across extended editing trajectories. To evaluate performance, we provide a new high-resolution multi-turn editing benchmark designed to stress-test long-horizon stability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AnchorEdit achieves state-of-the-art results, maintaining exceptional subject fidelity and instruction following even over 10+ interaction rounds.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个自回归扩散框架AnchorEdit，专为高分辨率、长期多轮图像编辑设计，通过因果记忆机制解决身份漂移和错误累积问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 多轮图像编辑是迭代设计的关键，但现有模型在连续编辑中容易出现身份漂移和错误累积。尽管视频先验方法被用于保持一致性，但其依赖的双向注意力与交互编辑的因果顺序不匹配，无法有效支持长序列编辑。因此，需要一种适应因果、顺序特性的新框架。
light_analysis.method: AnchorEdit采用三步训练课程：首先进行身份保留的单轮预训练，然后通过因果自回归强制微调（利用自推出策略缓解暴露偏差），最后使用一致性蒸馏实现4步高效生成。推理时引入记忆机制，锚定初始主体身份，确保长轨迹上的稳定外推。
light_analysis.result: 在作者提供的高分辨率多轮编辑基准上，AnchorEdit实现了最先进的性能，即使在10轮以上的交互中也能保持出色的主体保真度和指令跟随能力。实验验证了框架在长期稳定性上的优势，但摘要未提供具体量化指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: AnchorEdit通过因果记忆和自回归扩散框架，有效解决了多轮图像编辑中的身份一致性问题，具有重要学术和实用价值。其训练课程和记忆机制为长期图像编辑提供了新思路，未来可探索更高效的训练方式或扩展到视频生成领域。

title: From Prompts to Tokens: Internalizing Causal Supervision in Vision-Language Model for Multi-Image Causal Reasoning
abstract: Visual causal reasoning is essential for understanding and intervening in the physical world, requiring identification of causal variables from visual inputs and reasoning over intervention effects. Despite recent progress, large vision--language models (VLMs) remain brittle at such tasks, especially for interventional and counterfactual queries over multi-image inputs. Most existing explorations inject causal knowledge via textual prompts, leaving causal mechanisms external to model execution and limiting reliable control during inference. To address this problem, we propose BridgeVLM, which internalizes visual causal reasoning by inducing a causal graph from multi-image inputs and converting it into structured Causal Tokens executed by RAMP layers injected into the LLM decoder for causal message passing. We further introduce a unified training interface M3S for fine-grained causal supervision from different granularities (local/global level). BridgeVLM achieves 54.4% accuracy on intervention tasks on CausalVLBench (vs. 33.2% with prompt-level supervision), improves results on Causal3D from 43.6% to 49.0%, and substantially improves causal structure learning on CausalVLBench ($F_1$: 33.4% $\rightarrow$ 75.1%).

light_analysis.overview: 提出BridgeVLM，通过因果标记内部化视觉因果推理，显著提升多图像因果推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉因果推理需要从视觉输入识别因果变量并推理干预效果，但现有VLM使用文本提示注入因果知识，导致因果机制外部化，推理不可靠。尤其在多图像干预和反事实查询任务上表现脆弱，需要更可靠的内部化方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出BridgeVLM，从多图像输入诱导因果图，转换为结构化因果标记，通过注入LLM解码器的RAMP层执行因果消息传递。引入统一训练接口M3S，提供局部和全局粒度的细粒度因果监督，实现因果知识内部化。
light_analysis.result: BridgeVLM在CausalVLBench干预任务上准确率54.4%（vs. 提示级监督33.2%），Causal3D从43.6%提升至49.0%，因果结构学习F1从33.4%提升至75.1%，验证了内部化因果推理的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: BridgeVLM通过内部化因果推理，克服了外部提示的局限，显著提升多图像因果推理准确性和因果结构学习。表明将因果机制嵌入模型内部是更优策略，为可解释视觉推理提供新方向，未来可扩展至更复杂任务。

title: Hey Chat, Can You Teach Me? Structuring Socratic Dialogue for Human Learning in the Wild
abstract: Large language models are now widely used for everyday learning, but the underlying interactions are typically unstructured chats rather than following a curriculum. Unlike formal online learning systems, these interactions carry no prior record of the student, so any estimate of what the student already knows must be inferred from the dialogue itself. We show that this gap is not closed by scaling models alone. Frontier and education-tuned LLMs perform poorly when asked to tutor a student over an extended session, because doing so requires three things at once. The tutor must sequence a curriculum, conduct Socratic dialogue, and infer the student's knowledge state from that dialogue. We propose separating these responsibilities. Given a student query, our system constructs a prerequisite knowledge graph in which subtopics are nodes and dependencies are edges, and frames tutoring as deciding which node to teach next and how many dialogue turns to spend on it before moving on. A lightweight PPO policy handles this sequencing decision, while an LLM conducts the Socratic exchange at the chosen node and returns a signal of student progress. Across held-out STEM and non-STEM topics, our PPO-paired tutor outperforms heuristic baselines, frontier general-purpose models, and a model specialised for Socratic dialogue: on both the rate at which students reach full curriculum mastery and the number of turns required. Explicit curriculum structure delivers gains that scaling the underlying model does not.

light_analysis.overview: 通过分离课程排序、苏格拉底对话和知识状态推断，提出PPO策略加知识图谱的辅导系统，显著提升学习效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型被广泛用于日常学习，但交互缺乏课程结构，且无法利用学生历史记录。现有模型（包括前沿和教育微调模型）在长时间辅导中表现不佳，因为它们需要同时完成课程排序、苏格拉底对话和知识状态推断三项任务。这导致学习效率低下，学生难以系统掌握知识。
light_analysis.method: 提出将辅导任务解耦为三个独立部分：首先，根据学生查询构建先决知识图谱，其中子主题为节点，依赖关系为边；然后，使用轻量级PPO策略决定下一步教授哪个节点以及在该节点上花费的对话轮次；最后，LLM在选定节点执行苏格拉底对话并返回学生进展信号。该方法在STEM和非STEM主题上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在保持的STEM和非STEM主题上，PPO配对辅导器在完全掌握课程内容的学生比例和所需对话轮次上均优于启发式基线、前沿通用模型和苏格拉底对话专用模型。结果表明，显式的课程结构带来的收益超过了单纯扩大模型规模。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明通过显式课程结构分离辅导责任能有效提升LLM的教学效果。该方法具有实际应用价值，可集成到现有学习系统中。未来工作可探索更复杂的知识状态推断和个性化策略。

title: UniReason-Med: A Shared Grounded Reasoning Interface for 2D-to-3D Transfer in Medical VQA
abstract: We study whether grounded reasoning supervision from abundant 2D medical images can improve 3D medical VQA when both input types are aligned through a common reasoning interface. We introduce UniReason-Med, a single-checkpoint framework that processes either a 2D image or a slice-serialized 3D volume at inference time, generating interleaved textual reasoning and localized visual evidence through shared box syntax, region-token injection, and a common grounded reasoning policy. To train this interface, we construct UniMed-CoT, a 220K instruction-tuning dataset with interleaved textual reasoning and grounded visual evidence, including 170K 2D and 50K 3D samples. Through supervised fine-tuning followed by outcome-level reinforcement learning, UniReason-Med learns to generate grounded reasoning traces without IoU/Dice-based localization rewards during RL. Data-mixture and component ablations show that joint 2D+3D grounded supervision substantially improves 3D reasoning over 3D-only training, while grounding and region-token injection consistently benefit both 2D and 3D tasks. These results suggest that a shared grounded reasoning interface can transfer reasoning structure from 2D images to slice-serialized volumetric medical understanding. The code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/IQuestLab/unireason-med.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UniReason-Med，通过共享的接地推理接口将2D医学图像的推理能力迁移到3D医学VQA，无需3D定位奖励。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D医学VQA因标注数据稀缺而进展缓慢，而2D医学图像数据丰富。现有方法未能有效利用2D图像的接地推理信息来提升3D理解。本文旨在利用共享推理接口，将2D图像的结构化推理迁移到3D体数据，解决3D模型推理能力不足的问题。
light_analysis.method: 构建UniReason-Med框架，使用单一检查点处理2D图像或切片序列化的3D体积，通过共享框语法、区域标记注入和共同接地推理策略生成交错文本推理和局部视觉证据。训练使用UniMed-CoT数据集（220K样本，含170K 2D和50K 3D），采用监督微调加结果级强化学习，无需IoU/Dice定位奖励。
light_analysis.result: 数据混合和组件消融实验表明，联合2D+3D接地监督相比仅3D训练显著提升3D推理性能。接地和区域标记注入对2D和3D任务均有持续增益。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但定性结论证实了跨模态推理迁移的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniReason-Med证明了共享接地推理接口可以将2D图像中的推理结构迁移到切片序列化体数据理解中，具有重要的学术和应用价值。潜在局限为需大量标注数据，未来可探索更高效的数据生成和跨模态对齐方法。

title: Multi-View In-Cabin Monitoring System for Public Transport Vehicles
abstract: We introduce a multi-view in-cabin monitoring dataset for public transportation with synchronized RGB and depth images from four inward-facing cameras and a rotating LiDAR covering the vehicle interior of a digitalized and partly automated German city bus. The dataset contains 9.136 synchronized samples with annotations and is accompanied by a calibration and pseudo-labeling pipeline that generates 3D human pose estimates and oriented 3D bounding boxes for occupants. We further provide a nuScenes-format conversion and benchmark representative multi-view 3D detection models (e.g., Lift-Splat-Shoot and BEVFusion), supporting comparative evaluation and small-scale training of multi-view in-cabin perception models. The dataset and tools are available at https://github.com/EvgenyGorelik/multiview_incabin_dataset.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个用于公共交通的多视角车内监控数据集，包含同步RGB-D图像和LiDAR数据，并提供校准、伪标签和基准模型支持。
light_analysis.motivation: 公共交通工具内的乘客监控对于安全和运营优化至关重要，但缺乏高质量的多模态车内数据集。现有数据集多为单视角或室外场景，难以支持复杂车内环境的多视角3D感知研究。摘要旨在填补这一空白，提供同步的RGB、深度和LiDAR数据，以促进车内感知算法的开发与评估。
light_analysis.method: 数据集采集自一辆数字化的德国城市公交车，使用四个朝内的摄像头和一个旋转LiDAR覆盖车内。包含9,136个同步样本，标注了3D人体姿态和朝向3D边界框。通过校准和伪标签管道自动生成3D标签。提供nuScenes格式转换，并基准测试了Lift-Splat-Shoot和BEVFusion等多视角3D检测模型。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体性能指标，但说明了数据集可用于小规模训练和比较评估多视角车内感知模型。通过基准测试，验证了代表性方法在该场景下的适用性，为后续研究提供了基线。数据集和工具已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该数据集和工具为车内监控研究提供了标准化平台，支持多视角3D感知模型的开发与比较。未来可推动乘客行为分析、拥挤度估计等应用。局限性在于仅覆盖单一车型和环境，需扩展更多场景。

title: Mind the Perspective: Let's Reason Recursively for Theory of Mind
abstract: Theory of Mind (ToM) reasoning requires inferring agents' beliefs from partial and asymmetric observations, which remains an open challenge for LLMs. Existing prompting-based approaches improve ToM reasoning through observable-event filtering or temporal belief chains, without explicitly modeling nested beliefs. We introduce RecToM, an inference-time framework for ToM reasoning that models nested beliefs via recursive perspective construction. RecToM constructs each character perspective from the preceding character perspective along the character chain specified by the question, reducing higher-order belief questions to actual-world questions within the final constructed perspective. We further provide a KD45 analysis showing that RecToM's perspective construction induces a well-formed belief modality beyond simple event filtering. Experiments on ToM benchmarks, including Hi-ToM, Big-ToM, and FanToM, across multiple LLM backbones show that RecToM consistently outperforms recent advanced approaches, achieving state-of-the-art performance. Notably, RecToM reaches 100\% accuracy on Hi-ToM with GPT-5.4 and Qwen3.5, a benchmark requiring higher-order ToM reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RecToM框架，通过递归视角构建建模嵌套信念，实现理论推理的最先进性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 理论思维推理需要从部分和不对称的观察中推断智能体的信念，这对LLMs仍是挑战。现有基于提示的方法通过可观察事件过滤或时间信念链改进推理，但未显式建模嵌套信念。因此，需要一种能显式处理嵌套信念的方法以提升高阶推理能力。
light_analysis.method: RecToM是一个推理时框架，通过递归视角构建建模嵌套信念：沿着问题指定的角色链，从上一角色视角构建每个角色视角，将高阶信念问题简化为最终视角内的实际世界问题。同时提供KD45分析，证明视角构建形成良好的信念模态，超越简单事件过滤。使用多个LLM作为骨干。
light_analysis.result: 在Hi-ToM、Big-ToM和FanToM基准测试上，RecToM一致优于最近的先进方法，实现最先进性能。特别是在Hi-ToM（需高阶ToM推理）上，使用GPT-5.4和Qwen3.5达到100%准确率，显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: RecToM通过递归视角构建有效建模嵌套信念，在多个ToM基准上取得最佳性能，展示了其学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索更复杂的角色链或不完全观察情况。

title: ICA Lens: Interpreting Language Models Without Training Another Dictionary
abstract: Finding interpretable directions in language-model representations is critical for understanding and controlling model behavior. Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have become the standard tool for this purpose, but using them as the default first lens often requires training, storing, and evaluating large overcomplete dictionaries. This bottleneck limits rapid exploration and raises a fundamental question: how much interpretable structure is already visible from activation geometry before training another neural dictionary? Our intuition is simple: many interpretable directions are selective on tokens, and these directions should look less Gaussian than random directions. We therefore revisit independent component analysis (ICA), a classical method for finding non-Gaussian directions, as a compact lens for language-model interpretability. We find that ICA has been underestimated for LLM interpretability, because prior uses often relied on off-the-shelf ICA implementations that are brittle on LLM activations and lacked systematic tools for inspecting and evaluating the recovered directions. To bridge these gaps, we introduce ICALens, the first practical workflow for stable, efficient, and auditable ICA analysis of LLM representations. It combines an optimized GPU-parallel FastICA pipeline with LLM-specific stability recipes and better fitting diagnostics, enabling efficient and reliable layer-wise analysis. Across GPT-2 Small, Gemma 2 2B, and Qwen 3.5 2B Base, ICALens efficiently recovers compact, human-interpretable directions without per-layer gradient-based dictionary training. On SAEBench, ICA is competitive with public SAEs in sparse probing and outperforms them in targeted probe perturbation under small-to-medium budgets. These results suggest that ICA should not be viewed as a weak baseline, but as an efficient and complementary first lens for exploring language-model representations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ICALens，基于独立成分分析（ICA）作为语言模型表示的高效解释性透镜，无需训练稀疏自编码器。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前语言模型可解释性研究常用稀疏自编码器（SAEs）寻找可解释方向，但该方法需要训练、存储和评估大型过完备字典，成为快速探索的瓶颈。作者质疑在训练神经字典之前，激活几何中已存在多少可解释结构。直觉上，许多可解释方向对令牌具有选择性，看起来比随机方向更少高斯性。因此，他们重新审视ICA这一经典的非高斯方向寻找方法，但先前应用因实现鲁棒性差和缺乏系统评估工具而效果不佳。
light_analysis.method: 提出ICALens，首个针对LLM表示进行稳定、高效、可审计ICA分析的工作流。结合优化的GPU并行FastICA管道，配备LLM特定稳定性方案和更好的拟合诊断指标，实现高效可靠的逐层分析。无需逐层基于梯度的字典训练，直接恢复紧凑、人类可解释的方向。在GPT-2 Small、Gemma 2 2B和Qwen 3.5 2B Base三个模型上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在SAEBench基准上，ICALens在稀疏探针任务中与公开SAEs竞争力相当，并在小到中等预算下的目标探针扰动任务中优于SAEs。相比SAEs，ICALens训练和评估更高效，无需存储大型字典，且恢复的方向可解释性高。
light_analysis.conclusion: ICALens表明ICA不应被视为弱基线，而是高效且互补的LLM表示探索第一透镜。其无需额外训练，直接利用激活几何中的非高斯结构，为语言模型可解释性提供新视角。未来可应用于更多模型和下游任务，但可能受限于ICA的线性假设和高斯性假设的适用性。

title: Ouroboros-Spatial: Closing the Data-Model Loop for Spatial Reasoning
abstract: Spatial reasoning remains a persistent challenge for multimodal large language models (MLLMs). Existing approaches largely rely on large-scale, statically curated datasets, where all training samples are treated uniformly regardless of the model's evolving capabilities. This static paradigm is inherently data-inefficient: training capacity is often spent on samples that are either trivial or overly difficult for the model at its current stage. To address this limitation, we propose Ouroboros-Spatial, a self-evolving training framework in which the model plays dual roles as a proposer and a solver. In each iteration, a frozen proposer generates spatial question-answer (QA) pairs from 3D scene metadata and raw video frames, together with executable code for deriving reliable ground truth. A learnable solver is then fine-tuned on the accepted samples, and its per-sample prediction confidence is used as a difficulty signal. This signal is fed back to the proposer in the next iteration, guiding it to generate questions better matched to the solver's current capabilities. Through this closed-loop design, the training distribution co-evolves with model ability, reducing redundant trivial examples while filtering out ambiguous or uninformative samples with limited learning value. Across six spatial reasoning benchmarks, Ouroboros-Spatial substantially improves Qwen3-VL-4B and Qwen3-VL-8B while using an order of magnitude fewer training examples than recent large-scale curated datasets. On VSI-Bench, it yields absolute gains of 9.9 and 6.8 points for the 4B and 8B models, respectively, enabling both to outperform a wide range of strong open-source and proprietary baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Ouroboros-Spatial，一种闭环自进化训练框架，通过模型自身能力反馈动态生成空间推理训练数据，大幅提升数据效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 空间推理对多模态大模型仍是挑战。现有方法依赖大规模静态数据集，对所有样本统一对待，忽视模型能力的动态变化，导致训练资源浪费在过于简单或困难的样本上，数据效率低下。因此需要一种能根据模型当前能力自适应调整训练数据的方法。
light_analysis.method: Ouroboros-Spatial让模型扮演proposer和solver双重角色。冻结的proposer从3D场景元数据和视频帧生成空间QA对及可执行代码（用于可靠GT）。solver在接受的样本上微调，其预测置信度作为难度信号反馈给proposer，指导下一轮生成更匹配solver能力的样本。闭环设计使训练分布与模型能力共进化，减少冗余简单样本并过滤模糊无信息样本。
light_analysis.result: 在六个空间推理基准上，Ouroboros-Spatial显著提升Qwen3-VL-4B和8B，使用训练样本量比大规模数据集少一个数量级。在VSI-Bench上，4B和8B模型分别绝对提升9.9和6.8个点，超越多个强开源和专有基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: Ouroboros-Spatial通过闭环数据-模型循环实现了高效的数据利用和空间推理能力提升，为模型自我进化训练提供了新范式。未来可探索更丰富的难度信号和更多场景，但摘要未明确说明具体方向。

title: Substrate Asymmetry in User-Side Memory: A Diagnostic Framework
abstract: User-side memory in LLMs is typically scored as a single "personalization" capability: given a user's history, is the output more user-aware? We show this aggregate metric hides opposite-direction failures. Memory factorises into at least three orthogonal axes -- behavioral consistency (style, voice), factual presence (recall facts in history), and factual absence (abstain when a fact is absent) -- and no single substrate wins all three. Comparing per-user gamma-LoRA (a small LoRA adapter trained on each user's history; gamma denotes per-user, not per-task) against BGE-large dense top-K retrieval on a controlled 50-user synthetic corpus and a real-data probe (LaMP-3), we find gamma-LoRA decisively wins behavioral style while RAG decisively wins factual absence -- and the same query-projection cells in attention layers 21-35 causally load-bear both effects in opposite directions (zeroing those LoRA weights raises absence-probe TPR by +33 pp and drops presence-probe TPR by 20 pp). On the more heavily RLHF-tuned Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct the asymmetry strengthens, not heals: parametric memory's behavioral advantage collapses while its absence-calibration deficit against retrieval widens -- an alignment tax on parametric user-memory. On real-data LaMP-3, gamma-LoRA underperforms a majority baseline; a 9-condition mitigation sweep diagnoses this as instruction-following collapse, not substrate failure (a 9x2 cross-product shows the eval-time {1..5} logit mask drives main_acc to >=0.995 on every recipe), and the best training-time fix replicates bit-identically on Llama. Finally, substrate-selection routing is question-classification, not calibration: a 110M DistilBERT on the question text alone beats every logit-based router. We contribute the diagnostic framework, the diagnosed real-data negative, the alignment-tax replication, and the routing-as-classification finding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出诊断框架，揭示用户侧记忆分解为三个正交轴，发现参数记忆与检索记忆的权衡及对齐税。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法将用户侧记忆视为单一能力，使用聚合指标评估，掩盖了不同方向的失败。实际应用中，模型需要在行为一致性、事实存在和事实缺失三个正交维度上表现良好，而单一子策略无法同时优化所有维度。研究动机是提供一个诊断框架，系统分析不同记忆策略的优劣，特别是参数记忆（如LoRA）与检索增强生成（RAG）之间的权衡，并揭示RLHF对齐可能带来的副作用。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用诊断框架，对比gamma-LoRA（每个用户训练一个小适配器）和BGE-large密集检索，在50用户合成语料和LaMP-3真实数据上评估。通过因果分析定位注意力层（21-35）中查询投影单元的关键作用，并测试Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct上的对齐影响。此外，使用9条件缓解实验诊断LaMP-3上gamma-LoRA性能差的原因，并构建基于问题文本的110M DistilBERT路由分类器。
light_analysis.result: gamma-LoRA在行为风格上显著优于RAG，而RAG在事实缺失（正确拒绝）上大幅领先。零化相关LoRA权重使事实缺失TPR提升33个百分点，同时事实存在TPR下降20个百分点。在RLHF对齐的Llama-3.1上，参数记忆的行为优势消失，与检索的缺失校准差距扩大。LaMP-3真实数据上，gamma-LoRA不如多数基线；缓解实验表明问题是指令跟随崩溃而非子策略失败。路由实验显示，基于问题文本的DistilBERT分类器（110M）优于所有基于logit的路由器。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究贡献了一个通用的诊断框架，揭示了用户侧记忆的多维本质和子策略间的根本权衡。真实数据上的负面结果和RLHF对齐税的发现具有实际指导意义：设计个性化LLM时需要根据任务维度选择或组合记忆策略，而非依赖单一方案。路由即分类的发现简化了子策略选择问题。未来工作可扩展到更大模型和更复杂的路由机制。

title: Capacity-Constrained Online Convex Optimization with Delayed Feedback
abstract: Online learning with delayed feedback typically assumes that the learner can track all pending rounds until their feedback arrives. In practice, tracking resources are finite, and feedback from untracked rounds is permanently lost. In this paper, we study delayed online convex optimization (OCO) under a hard capacity constraint, where at most $C$ pending rounds can be tracked at any time. To model delay information, we introduce a semi-clairvoyant model that refines the clairvoyant assumption from prior work: rather than requiring delays to be known at prediction time, the learner observes delay expirations online, consistent with the classical unconstrained delayed setting. Our approach proceeds via a reduction to a novel ``delayed and weighted'' OCO problem, using a scheduler that randomizes tracking decisions and importance-weights the resulting observations. For this base problem, we propose and analyze Delayed-Weighted FTRL and its bandit analogue, establishing regret bounds that explicitly characterize the interaction between time-varying weights and delayed feedback. Combining these base learners with our schedulers yields the first regret guarantees for capacity-constrained OCO under convex and strongly convex losses, for both first-order and bandit feedback. For first-order feedback, capacity $C = Ω(\log T)$ suffices to recover standard delayed OCO rates up to logarithmic factors. For bandit feedback, the regret rates are modulated by powers of $(1 + σ_{\text{max}}/C)$, where $σ_{\text{max}}$ is the maximum number of pending observations at any time. This allows the regret bound to degrade gracefully when $C < σ_{\text{max}}$, while remaining sublinear.

light_analysis.overview: 首次在硬容量约束下解决延迟在线凸优化问题，通过调度器和加权FTRL实现亚线性遗憾。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有延迟在线学习假设无限跟踪资源，但实际中资源有限，未跟踪的反馈永久丢失。本文研究最多同时跟踪C个待处理轮的容量约束问题，填补了理论空白，具有实际重要性。
light_analysis.method: 引入半预知模型，学习器在线观察延迟到期时间。通过归约为“延迟加权”OCO问题，使用随机化调度器决定跟踪并重要性加权观测。提出延迟加权FTRL及其赌博机版本，分析时变权重与延迟交互。
light_analysis.result: 凸和强凸损失下首次获得容量约束OCO遗憾界。一阶反馈时C=Ω(log T)恢复标准延迟OCO速率；赌博机反馈时遗憾率由(1+σ_max/C)幂次调制，C<σ_max时仍保持亚线性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文解决了容量约束下延迟OCO的理论问题，为实际资源受限系统提供方案。未来可扩展至非凸损失或更复杂调度策略。

title: ERN-Net : Evolving Reason Node-Net for Document Binarization
abstract: This paper presents ERN-Net, an Evolving Reason Node-Net for efficient document image binarization. ERN-Net enhances degradation-sensitive regions, such as faint strokes, broken characters, and noisy backgrounds, through evolving reason nodes and multi-scale reasoning. We further compare ResNet-101, ConvNeXt-Tiny, and ConvNeXt-Base, and find that ConvNeXt-Tiny provides the best practical trade-off between accuracy and memory usage. In addition, DIBCO-based pretraining improves binarization performance without increasing model memory consumption, requiring only about 1.5 additional training hours. Experiments on DIBCO-style benchmarks show that ERN-Net is effective under low-data and low-memory settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ERN-Net，一种演化推理节点网络，用于高效的文档图像二值化，通过增强退化敏感区域和引入DIBCO预训练，在低数据和低内存设置下有效。
light_analysis.motivation: 文档图像二值化面临退化问题，如笔画模糊、字符残缺、背景噪声等。现有方法在处理这些退化敏感区域时性能不佳，且需要大量计算资源。因此，需要一种高效且准确的二值化方法，尤其适用于低数据和低内存场景。
light_analysis.method: ERN-Net采用演化推理节点和多尺度推理机制，增强退化敏感区域。对比了ResNet-101、ConvNeXt-Tiny和ConvNeXt-Base，选择ConvNeXt-Tiny作为骨干网络以平衡精度和内存。引入基于DIBCO的预训练，仅增加约1.5小时训练时间，不增加内存消耗。
light_analysis.result: 在DIBCO风格基准测试中，ERN-Net在低数据和低内存设置下表现有效。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但通过与ConvNeXt等架构的对比，验证了ConvNeXt-Tiny在精度和内存间的实用权衡，且DIBCO预训练提升了二值化性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: ERN-Net通过演化推理节点和多尺度推理，有效提升了文档二值化中退化区域的性能。ConvNeXt-Tiny作为骨干网络实现了效率与精度的平衡，DIBCO预训练为轻量级改进提供了新思路。未来可探索更多退化场景或扩展至其他图像处理任务。

title: RLCSD: Reinforcement Learning with Contrastive On-Policy Self-Distillation
abstract: On-policy self-distillation (OPSD) provides dense, token-level supervision for reasoning models by aligning a model's own distribution with the distribution it produces under privileged context, typically a verified solution. However, we show that the learning signal drawn from this distributional gap concentrates on style tokens rather than task-bearing ones, as the hinted model tends to produce more direct, shorter outputs. We term this pathology \emph{privilege-induced style drift}, which destabilizes training or causes response length to shrink. To address this, we propose \textbf{RLCSD} (Reinforcement Learning with Contrastive on-policy Self-Distillation), which mitigates this drift by contrasting the teacher-student gap under a correct hint against that under a wrong hint, suppressing the style shift that conditioning on a hint tends to induce regardless of correctness, and yielding a signal that is more concentrated on task-bearing tokens. Experiments on Qwen3 (1.7B/4B/8B) and Olmo-3-7B-Think across mathematical and logical reasoning show that RLCSD consistently outperforms GRPO and prior OPSD methods. We further show that the contrastive principle is general: it plugs into existing OPSD methods to improve them, and its underlying insight extends to the broader cross-model on-policy distillation setting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RLCSD，通过对比正确和错误提示下的师生分布差距，缓解推理模型中特权诱导的风格漂移问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在推理模型的on-policy self-distillation中，学习信号集中于风格标记而非任务标记，导致训练不稳定或响应长度缩短。这种“特权诱导风格漂移”源于正确提示使模型输出更简短直接，但风格变化掩盖了任务相关信号，现有方法未有效解决。
light_analysis.method: RLCSD通过对比在正确提示和错误提示下的教师-学生分布差距来抑制风格漂移。具体而言，利用正确和错误提示产生的信号差异，突出任务相关标记，减少风格影响。该方法可即插即用于现有OPSD方法，并拓展至跨模型蒸馏。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen3（1.7B/4B/8B）和Olmo-3-7B-Think上的数学与逻辑推理实验表明，RLCSD一致优于GRPO和先前的OPSD方法。具体性能提升摘要未明确说明，但明确优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: RLCSD有效解决了特权诱导风格漂移，提高了推理模型训练稳定性。对比原则具有通用性，可改进现有OPSD方法并扩展到跨模型设置。未来可进一步探索其在更广泛场景的应用。

title: MedCTA: A Benchmark for Clinical Tool Agents
abstract: To make clinically grounded decisions, medical AI agents are expected to go beyond simple recognition and be capable of tool retrieval, evidence acquisition, and integration. Existing benchmarks largely evaluate isolated perception or single-turn question answering, and therefore provide limited visibility into failures of planning, tool recruitment, and rollout reliability. We introduce MedCTA, a benchmark for evaluating medical tool agents on clinician-validated, step-implicit tasks grounded in realistic multimodal clinical inputs, including radiology images, pathology slides, and reports. MedCTA comprises 107 real-world clinical tasks with clinician-verified executable trajectories over 5 deployed tools, and supports process-aware evaluation of tool selection, argument validity, execution stability, trajectory fidelity, and outcome quality. We benchmark 18 open- and closed-source multimodal models and find that even frontier systems remain brittle in multi-step clinical tool use: autonomous rollouts are dominated by protocol failures, premature stopping, and incorrect tool recruitment, while gold-standard tool routing yields large but still incomplete gains. These results show that strong backbone perception does not translate into reliable agentic behavior in clinical settings. MedCTA provides a rigorous testbed for auditing, diagnosing, and advancing trustworthy medical AI agents. The dataset and evaluation suite are available at https://ivul-kaust.github.io/MedCTA/
comment: Project Page: https://ivul-kaust.github.io/MedCTA/ Code: https://github.com/IVUL-KAUST/MedCTA Data: https://huggingface.co/datasets/IVUL-KAUST/MedCTA

light_analysis.overview: 提出MedCTA基准，用于评估临床工具代理在多步骤真实任务中的过程感知能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有医疗AI基准大多聚焦于孤立感知或单轮问答，无法评估代理在规划、工具招募和部署可靠性方面的失败。临床决策需要代理具备工具检索、证据获取与整合能力，但缺乏系统性的评估基准。MedCTA通过临床验证的逐步隐式任务填补这一空白，帮助诊断和提升代理的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: MedCTA包含107个真实临床任务，涉及放射影像、病理切片和报告等多模态输入，并配有临床医生验证的可执行轨迹，覆盖5个已部署工具。评估支持过程感知，包括工具选择、参数有效性、执行稳定性、轨迹保真度和结果质量。对18种开源和闭源多模态模型进行基准测试，分析其自主部署中的失败模式。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，前沿多模态模型在多步骤临床工具使用中仍显脆弱：自主部署主要受协议失败、过早停止和不正确工具招募影响，而金标准工具路由虽带来较大改进但仍不完全。强骨干感知能力并未转化为可靠的代理行为，揭示了当前模型的根本局限。
light_analysis.conclusion: MedCTA为审计、诊断和推进可信医疗AI代理提供了严格的测试平台，凸显了感知与代理能力之间的鸿沟。该基准有助于引导未来研究关注工具使用的稳健性和规划可靠性，数据集和评估套件已公开，支持社区进一步探索。

title: A Data-Centric Framework for Detecting and Correcting Corrupted Labels
abstract: The performance of machine learning and deep learning models largely depends on the quality of the training data. However, the quality of the real-world datasets is often compromised by noisy labels, which can substantially degrade model accuracy and reliability. To address this challenge, we propose Relabeler, an end-to-end data-centric framework for detecting and correcting corrupted labels. For corrupted label detection, Relabeler jointly leverages both local and global relationships among data instances to identify potentially noisy samples. After detecting suspicious instances, Relabeler further performs label correction by estimating the most probable clean label for each instance based on both its input features and observed noisy label. Extensive experiments across multiple datasets, noise types, and noise rates demonstrate that Relabeler consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving up to 58% improvement in label correction precision and 6% improvement in downstream task performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Relabeler，一个端到端数据为中心的框架，用于检测和纠正训练数据中的错误标签。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器学习模型性能高度依赖训练数据质量，但现实数据集常受噪声标签影响，导致准确性和可靠性下降。现有方法通常只关注检测或纠正之一，且未充分利用数据实例间的局部和全局关系，难以有效处理复杂噪声模式。
light_analysis.method: Relabeler采用端到端数据为中心方法，联合利用局部和全局关系检测可疑噪声样本，再基于输入特征和观察到的噪声标签估计最可能干净标签进行纠正。该框架不依赖特定模型，可灵活应用于不同数据集和噪声场景。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集、噪声类型和噪声率下，Relabeler持续优于最先进基线，标签纠正精度提升高达58%，下游任务性能提升6%。实验覆盖广泛噪声条件，验证了其鲁棒性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Relabeler有效提升数据质量，从而改善模型性能。其数据为中心的设计可广泛用于实际场景中的标签噪声问题。未来可探索更复杂的噪声模型或集成到自动机器学习流程中。

title: Noise-Aware Framework for Correcting Corrupted Labels
abstract: High-quality labeled data is essential for training reliable ML/DL models. However, real-world datasets often contain a considerable proportion of corrupted labels, which can severely degrade model performance. To address this problem, we propose CANOLA, a novel framework for correcting corrupted labels through noise-aware learning and iterative label refinement. CANOLA explicitly estimates the underlying noise distribution of the dataset and incorporates this information into the training of a noise-aware Deep Neural Network. By incorporating noise characteristics during learning, CANOLA enables the model to down-weight unreliable supervision signals and focus on trustworthy patterns, thereby improving robustness and generalization. Label correction is performed via cautious, iterative soft label refinement, in which model predictions are blended with observed labels to prevent premature or erroneous updates. This progressive refinement allows the dataset to be repaired in a stable and controlled manner. We evaluate CANOLA on six widely used datasets under realistic noisy labeling scenarios. Experimental results show that CANOLA consistently outperforms SOTA label correction methods, achieving relative improvements ranging from 19% to 52% in error reduction. Moreover, models trained on datasets corrected by CANOLA obtain substantial downstream performance gains. Even simple classifiers trained on CANOLA's corrected data can outperform complex model-centric approaches by margins of up to 67%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CANOLA框架，通过显式估计噪声分布和迭代软标签细化，有效纠正损坏标签，提升模型鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 高质量标注数据对训练可靠模型至关重要，但现实数据集常包含大量损坏标签，严重损害模型性能。现有标签纠正方法往往忽略噪声分布或过早更新标签，导致错误累积。CANOLA旨在解决这些问题，通过噪声感知学习提升标签质量和模型泛化。
light_analysis.method: CANOLA框架包含两步：1) 显式估计数据集噪声分布，并将其融入噪声感知深度神经网络训练，使模型降低不可靠监督信号权重；2) 通过谨慎的迭代软标签细化进行标签纠正，混合模型预测与原始标签，避免过早错误更新，逐步稳定修复数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在六个数据集上模拟真实噪声场景，CANOLA在错误减少上相对SOTA方法提升19%-52%。使用CANOLA纠正后的数据训练简单分类器，下游性能提升显著，甚至比复杂模型中心方法高出67%。
light_analysis.conclusion: CANOLA通过噪声感知学习和迭代软标签细化，有效提升标签质量和模型泛化能力，具有重要实用价值。未来工作可探索更复杂的噪声模型或结合主动学习进一步减少标注成本。

title: Spectrally Regularized Latent Flow Matching for Turbulence Generation
abstract: Latent diffusion and flow matching have emerged as leading approaches for synthetic turbulence generation, yet they systematically under-represent dissipation-range amplitudes. We introduce a latent flow matching framework with a spectrally regularized compression stage that directly targets this failure mode. On a 256^2 DNS dataset at Re_f \approx 2250, replacing an MSE-trained VAE with a zone-weighted log-spectral objective raises deep-dissipation retained spectral power from 25% to 94% in reconstruction and from 20% to 79% in unconditional generation. The improved latent representation also yields a substantially better sampling cost-fidelity tradeoff: the MSE-trained latent space imposes a fundamental quality ceiling near DD bias -0.70 that no integrator or step-count can overcome, while the spectrally regularized latent space reaches DD bias -0.117 at just 20 function evaluations. Mechanistically, encoder-decoder swap experiments show that the improvement is driven primarily by encoder-induced latent reorganization rather than decoder capacity, while a support-amplitude decomposition reveals that MSE-trained models behave as conservative suppression models, minimizing pointwise error by attenuating intermittent high-wavenumber structure. Both pipelines recover the second-order structure function and the correct sign of S_3, indicating the correct cascade direction without explicit supervision. A small residual gap in the magnitude of S_3 suggests that phase-coherent triadic organization remains a complementary axis to amplitude fidelity for future generative turbulence models.
comment: Accepted at the AI4Physics Workshop at ICML 2026. OpenReview: https://openreview.net/forum?id=MEZ1otYgXS

light_analysis.overview: 提出频谱正则化的潜在流匹配框架，显著提升了湍流生成中耗散范围的谱功率保真度。
light_analysis.motivation: 潜在扩散和流匹配模型在合成湍流生成中占主导地位，但系统性地低估了耗散范围的振幅。现有方法在重建高波数结构时性能不佳，影响了湍流生成的真实性。该研究旨在解决这一关键缺陷，提高生成湍流的频谱保真度。
light_analysis.method: 提出频谱正则化的潜在流匹配框架，采用区域加权对数谱目标替代MSE训练的VAE作为压缩阶段。在256^2 DNS数据集（Re_f≈2250）上训练，通过编码器和解码器交换实验分析改进机制，并使用支持-振幅分解解释MSE模型的行为。
light_analysis.result: 深度耗散保留谱功率从25%提升至94%（重建）和从20%提升至79%（无条件生成）。MSE潜在空间的质量上限接近DD偏差-0.70，而频谱正则化潜在空间在仅20次函数评估时达到DD偏差-0.117。两个管线均恢复二阶结构函数和S_3的正确符号。
light_analysis.conclusion: 频谱正则化有效改善了湍流生成的耗散范围振幅保真度，实现了更好的采样成本-保真度权衡。研究揭示了编码器诱导的潜在重组是改进的关键，而MSE模型表现为保守抑制模型。未来工作需考虑相位相干三元组组织以进一步提高S_3幅度精度。

title: RankVR: Low-Rank Structure Perception and Value Recalibration for Robust Composed Image Retrieval
abstract: Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) constitutes a pivotal paradigm requiring models to perform joint reasoning on reference images and modification texts. However, the prevalence of Noisy Triplet Correspondence (NTC) in large-scale datasets severely constrains model performance. Existing denoising methods either target binary mismatches or rely on scalar-based point-wise estimation, neglecting rich global structural correlations among sample populations and dynamic value variations during training, thereby yielding suboptimal results. This paper identifies two critical unresolved challenges: Global Structural Inconsistency of Semantic Correlations and Hard Sample Discrimination Uncertainty. To address these, we propose RankVR, a framework designed to construct a robust CIR model via global structure consistency and dynamic value perception. Specifically, we introduce the Global Structure Consistency Perception (GSCP) module, which utilizes the Effective Rank of the Correlation Matrix to decouple clean samples from structural noise. By measuring rank difference, GSCP identifies samples disrupting macroscopic semantic symmetry. Furthermore, we develop the Adaptive Semantic Value Calibration (ASVC) module to distinguish high-value hard clean samples. By integrating training potential and reliability, it dynamically quantifies the semantic value of each triplet, ensuring effective utilization of hard samples while suppressing noise characterized by logical conflicts. Extensive experiments on the FashionIQ and CIRR benchmark datasets demonstrate that RankVR significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, validating its superior robustness in noisy environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RankVR框架，通过全局结构一致性和动态价值感知解决组合图像检索中的噪声三元组对应问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 组合图像检索依赖于参考图像和修改文本的联合推理，但大规模数据集中普遍存在的噪声三元组对应（NTC）严重限制了模型性能。现有去噪方法要么针对二元不匹配，要么依赖基于标量的点估计，忽略了样本群体间的丰富全局结构关联和训练过程中的动态价值变化，导致次优结果。本文识别了全局语义相关性的结构不一致和难样本判别不确定性两个关键挑战。
light_analysis.method: 提出RankVR框架，包含两个核心模块：全局结构一致性感知（GSCP）模块，利用相关矩阵的有效秩从结构噪声中解耦干净样本，通过测量秩差识别破坏宏观语义对称性的样本；自适应语义价值校准（ASVC）模块，通过整合训练潜力和可靠性动态量化每个三元组的语义价值，区分高价值难样本，在有效利用难样本的同时抑制具有逻辑冲突的噪声。
light_analysis.result: 在FashionIQ和CIRR基准数据集上的大量实验表明，RankVR显著优于现有最先进方法，验证了其在噪声环境下的卓越鲁棒性。具体性能提升指标摘要未明确说明，但确认了SOTA效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过解决全局结构不一致和难样本判别不确定性，提出了鲁棒的组合图像检索框架RankVR。GSCP和ASVC模块分别从结构和价值角度处理噪声，提升了模型在真实噪声场景下的表现。未来可探索更复杂的结构感知策略和动态校准机制。

title: Goal-Autopilot: A Verifiable Anti-Fabrication Firewall for Unattended Long-Horizon Agents
abstract: Long-horizon LLM agents are not trusted to run unattended: with no human watching, they confidently report success they never verified. We treat honesty -- bounding what an agent may claim at termination -- as a first-class metric for unattended autonomy, distinct from capability. We present Autopilot, an execution model that makes silent fabricated success structurally impossible rather than merely rarer. Autopilot externalizes all working state into a durable, gated finite-state machine that a scheduler advances one stateless tick at a time; a hard floor forbids any terminal "done" claim whose falsifiable gate did not actually execute and pass. We prove a No-False-Success theorem -- under gate soundness, floor enforcement, and plan coverage, termination implies the goal holds -- whose only trust points are empirically measurable, and show the worst case degrades to an honest stall, never a fabricated success. Because each tick rehydrates only the state machine, per-step context cost is constant in the horizon. Across a 3,150-cell paired corpus (70 tasks $\times$ 3 systems $\times$ 3 models $\times$ 5 seeds, including 50 SWE-bench Lite tasks across 11 OSS repos), Autopilot fabricates on 0.95% of cells [95% CI 0.38--1.62] while Reflexion and StateFlow baselines fabricate on 8.10% [6.48--9.81] and 25.05% [22.48--27.62] respectively. The headline contrast lives in the hard regime: on SWE-bench Lite, the firewall reduces fabrication from 33.7% (StateFlow) to 0.67%, a paired difference of $-33.07$ pp [95% CI $-36.53, -29.73$]. The mechanism is the gate, not the model: all ten Autopilot fabrications come from the strongest model, while two weaker mid-tier models never fabricate across 700 paired cells. The firewall trades coverage for honesty by design -- an honest stall is recoverable; a confident wrong output shipped downstream is not.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个可验证的反虚构防火墙Autopilot，使长周期LLM代理在无人监控下无法伪造成功，通过有限状态机执行模型保证结果诚实。
light_analysis.motivation: 长周期LLM代理在无人监控时可能虚假报告成功，现有方法无法结构性消除伪造。诚实性作为无人自主的关键指标被忽视，需要一种机制使得伪造成功在结构上不可能。
light_analysis.method: Autopilot将工作状态外部化为持久化门控有限状态机，调度器逐原子步推进。硬性禁止任何门未执行通过的'完成'声明。证明无虚假成功定理，退化情况仅为诚实的暂停。每步上下文成本与周期长度无关。
