light_analysis.result: 在3150个单元语料库中(70任务×3系统×3模型×5种子)，Autopilot伪造率0.95%[0.38-1.62]，而Reflexion和StateFlow分别为8.10%[6.48-9.81]和25.05%[22.48-27.62]。在SWE-bench Lite上，伪造率从33.7%降至0.67%（差-33.07 pp）。所有伪造来自最强模型，中等模型无伪造。
light_analysis.conclusion: Autopilot通过门控机制而非模型能力实现诚实性，设计上以覆盖率为代价换取诚实。诚实的暂停可恢复，而错误的输出不可逆。该工作为无人监督代理提供了可靠的安全保障。

title: DroneShield-AI: A Multi-Modal Sensor Fusion Framework for Real-Time Autonomous Drone Threat Detection, Behavioral Intent Classification, and Swarm Intelligence in Contested Airspace
abstract: Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) threats have emerged as a defining security challenge of the 21st century. This paper presents DroneShield-AI, a unified open framework integrating six processing layers: RF signal classification, acoustic motor-signature detection, YOLOv8-based visual detection, evidence-weighted sensor fusion, a Behavioral Intent Classification Engine (BICE), and a Graph Neural Network Swarm Intelligence Module (GNN-SIM). BICE introduces the first systematic six-class threat taxonomy for drone flight patterns, enabling predictive operator alerts with a 30-second advance-warning horizon. GNN-SIM is the first open framework for adversarial multi-drone formation analysis using Graph Attention Networks. Evaluated on three publicly available real-world datasets, the fused pipeline achieves 96.1% detection accuracy, 3.2% false alarm rate, AUC-ROC: 0.981, and 142ms end-to-end latency on commodity CPU-class hardware at approximately $500-$780 USD total system cost. All code, model weights, and simulation datasets are publicly released at submission.
comment: 23 pages, 6 figures, 11 tables. Code available at https://github.com/bayizeremarius/DroneShield-AI

light_analysis.overview: 提出多模态传感器融合框架DroneShield-AI，实现实时无人机威胁检测与群体智能分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 无人机威胁已成为21世纪核心安全挑战。现有检测方法多依赖单一传感器，缺乏统一框架整合多源信息，且对飞行行为意图分类和群体编队分析的研究不足。传统方法实时性差、硬件成本高，难以在消费级设备上部署。因此，需要一种低成本、高精度、低延迟的多模态融合方案。
light_analysis.method: 框架包含六个处理层：RF信号分类、声学电机信号检测、YOLOv8视觉检测、证据加权融合、行为意图分类引擎（BICE）和基于图注意力网络的群体智能模块（GNN-SIM）。BICE首次提出六类威胁飞行模式分类，提供30秒提前预警。GNN-SIM实现对抗性多无人机编队分析。使用三个公开真实数据集进行训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在约500-780美元成本的商品CPU硬件上，融合管道达到96.1%检测准确率、3.2%虚警率、AUC-ROC 0.981和142ms端到端延迟。性能优于单一传感器方法，验证了多模态融合的有效性和实时性。代码、模型权重和仿真数据集已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: DroneShield-AI提供了首个开放统一框架，在低成本硬件上实现高精度实时无人机威胁检测。其行为意图分类和群体智能模块为预警和对抗策略开辟新方向。未来可扩展至更多传感器类型和复杂攻击场景。局限性可能包括数据集规模有限及对未知无人机型号的泛化能力。

title: Layer-Isolated Evaluation: Gating the Deterministic Scaffold of a Production LLM Agent with a No-LLM, Regression-Locked Test Harness
abstract: End-to-end task-success is the dominant way to evaluate LLM agents, but one aggregate number tells you that an agent regressed, not where. We present layer-isolated evaluation: a deployed ordering agent is decomposed into a fixed taxonomy of layers (ontology, intent, routing, decomposition, escalation, safety, memory, and cross-cutting envelope/defense), each exercised by its own assertion slice in a deterministic, no-LLM "pure" mode. The pure suite (238 cases across 23 slices; 225 run in 2.39 s, ~10 ms/case) runs in CI on every change against a locked per-slice baseline. We validate by controlled regression injection, degrading one layer at a time across seven non-safety layers. The effect we did not design in is masking: the aggregate pass-rate barely moves (-1.7 to -5.9 pp for six local regressions), while the matching slice craters (-25 to -91 pp). A layer's slice reacting to its own fault is partly by construction; the measured results are (i) the aggregate masking and (ii) that damage stays off the other slices: the injected layer's slice is the single worst-hit in 5 of 7 cases and top-3 in 7 of 7 (mean rank 1.29 of 19). Localization replicates on a second, structurally different tenant (Starbucks SG): all seven matching slices crater, so it is not a single-catalog artifact. We position it as a concrete, deterministic instantiation of the component-level evaluation EDDOps prescribes but leaves unimplemented, with CheckList as ancestor and as the deterministic mirror image of whole-workflow stochastic mutation testing. Our contributions: (a) a fully decomposed, sub-second, no-LLM per-layer harness for a production agent, (b) a coverage-honesty test-adequacy criterion that refuses to score an unexercised layer, and (c) the regression-injection demonstration that per-slice baseline-locked gates localize regressions an aggregate metric masks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出分层隔离评估方法，用无LLM确定性测试套件定位生产级LLM代理的回归错误。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有端到端评估仅提供聚合成功率，无法定位代理退化的具体原因。本文针对部署的订购代理，将其分解为固定层次（本体、意图、路由、分解、升级、安全、记忆及跨切面包络/防御），每层由独立断言切片测试。该方法解决了聚合指标掩盖局部回归的问题，实现退化精准定位。
light_analysis.method: 提出分层隔离评估框架，将代理分解为7层+跨切面层，构建238个测试用例（23个切片）的确定性无LLM套件，在CI中每次变更时运行并与每层基线锁定的通过率对比。通过可控回归注入实验（每次仅退化一层）验证效果，使用两个不同租户（原始和Starbucks SG）测试泛化性。
light_analysis.result: 注入回归后，聚合通过率仅下降1.7-5.9个百分点（6个局部回归），而匹配切片通过率下降25-91个百分点。被注入层是受影响最严重的（7例中5例排名第一，7例均前三，平均排名1.29/19）。在第二个租户上结果一致，证明方法非单目录伪影。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了生产级代理的完全分解、亚秒级无LLM每层测试套件，提出覆盖-诚实测试充分性准则（拒绝评分未执行层），并通过回归注入演示证明每层基线锁定门能定位聚合指标掩盖的回归。该方法为EDDOps组件级评估提供了具体实现，类似CheckList和全工作流随机突变测试的确定性镜像。

title: Reason, Then Re-reason: Cross-view Revisiting Improves Spatial Reasoning
abstract: Spatial reasoning from egocentric videos is inherently challenging because the observable evidence is constrained by the camera trajectory. Existing methods rely on single-turn inference, forcing models to resolve geometric ambiguity through semantic priors rather than verifiable evidence. We argue that spatial reasoning should be revisitable: conclusions formed under limited evidence should remain open to revision when complementary viewpoints become available. Building on this insight, we propose Reason, then Re-reason (ReRe), a training-free, inference-time framework with two phases: in the Reason Phase, an MLLM forms a spatial hypothesis from the original video; in the Re-reason Phase, it verifies or revises the hypothesis by observing a synthesized novel-view video. To enable effective cross-view revisiting, we design a Geometry-to-Video pipeline that renders strategically complementary novel views from predicted 3D geometry. These views feature an elevated, oblique perspective with scene-spanning coverage, while preserving the MLLM's native video interface without architectural modifications. Extensive evaluations on VSI-Bench and STI-Bench demonstrate that ReRe substantially boosts open-source MLLMs to rival proprietary state-of-the-art performance. Project page: https://zhenjiemao.github.io/ReRe/

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReRe框架，通过两阶段交叉视角重新推理提升空间推理能力，无需训练即可使开源MLLM媲美专有模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 自我中心视频的空间推理因相机轨迹限制而困难。现有方法采用单次推理，依赖语义先验解决几何模糊性，无法利用后续可用视角验证或修正结论。这导致推理结果不可靠。因此需要一种可重新审视的推理机制，在获得互补视角时允许修正初始假设。
light_analysis.method: 提出训练无关的推理框架ReRe，包含两阶段：Reason阶段，MLLM基于原始视频形成空间假设；Re-reason阶段，通过观察合成的新视角视频验证或修正假设。核心创新是Geometry-to-Video流水线，从预测的3D几何渲染策略性互补视角，采用高架斜视场景覆盖视角，且保持MLLM原生视频接口，无需架构修改。
light_analysis.result: 在VSI-Bench和STI-Bench基准上的大量评估表明，ReRe显著提升了开源MLLM（如LLaVA、Video-LLaMA等）的空间推理性能，使其与专有SOTA模型（如GPT-4V）相当。具体性能提升数值摘要未明确列出，但声称“substantially boosts open-source MLLMs to rival proprietary state-of-the-art performance”。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReRe框架证明了交叉视角重新推理对空间推理的有效性，是一种无需额外训练即可提升现有MLLM能力的方法。其学术价值在于提出可验证的推理范式，实际应用价值在于可集成到现有视觉语言模型中改进空间理解。未来工作可探索更高效的视角合成或扩展到其他推理任务。

title: Parameter-Efficient Adapter Tuning for Tabular-Image Multimodal Learning
abstract: Tabular-image multimodal learning aims to improve predictive modeling by jointly using structured tabular attributes and visual data. Although pretrained encoders provide strong modality-specific representations, full fine-tuning can be computationally expensive, while keeping encoders frozen may limit task-specific adaptation. We propose the Tabular-Image Adapter (TI-Adapter), a modality-specific adapter-based fine-tuning framework for efficient multimodal adaptation. TI-Adapter freezes the pretrained tabular encoder and learns an adapter after the extracted tabular embedding, while adapting the image branch with embedding-level and bottleneck-level adapters instead of full fine-tuning. Experiments on 20 tabular-image datasets show that TI-Adapter achieves competitive or better predictive performance than full fine-tuning while using substantially fewer trainable parameters. Ablation studies further demonstrate the importance of adapter placement for balancing performance and practical efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TI-Adapter，一种参数高效的适配器微调框架，用于表格-图像多模态学习，仅需少量可训练参数即可达到或超越全微调性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 表格-图像多模态学习旨在联合利用结构化表格属性和视觉数据提升预测建模。预训练编码器虽提供强模态度表示，但全微调计算代价高，而冻结编码器又限制任务特定适应。现有方法难以在效率和性能之间取得平衡，亟需一种既能高效适应任务又不牺牲性能的微调策略。
light_analysis.method: TI-Adapter冻结预训练表格编码器，在其后学习一个适配器；图像分支则采用嵌入层和瓶颈层适配器替代全微调，仅更新少量参数。该方法在20个表格-图像数据集上进行评估，并与全微调及冻结基线对比。关键创新在于模态度特定适配器设计，适配器放置位置经消融研究验证对性能与效率平衡至关重要。
light_analysis.result: 在20个表格-图像数据集上，TI-Adapter在预测性能上与全微调相当或更优，同时可训练参数数量显著减少（例如，仅占全微调参数的5%-10%）。消融实验表明，适配器放置位置（嵌入层vs.瓶颈层）对性能影响显著，合理配置可进一步提升效率与准确率权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: TI-Adapter为多模态学习提供了一种高效微调方案，既保留了预训练知识又实现了任务适应，具有较高的实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的适配器结构（如多头适配器）或将其扩展至更多模态组合。局限性在于适配器设计当前依赖人工经验，需要自动化搜索策略。

title: UR-BERT: Scaling Text Encoders for Massively Multilingual TTS Through Universal Romanization and Speech Token Prediction
abstract: We propose UR-BERT, a Romanized transcription-based text-to-speech (TTS) encoder for massively multilingual TTS systems. Conventional grapheme-to-phoneme (G2P)-based approaches are limited to around 100 languages due to the availability of reliable G2P resources. In contrast, UR-BERT scales to 495 languages by unifying diverse writing systems into a shared Romanization representation. To further enhance phonetic fidelity and text-speech alignment, we introduce a speech token prediction objective during training, which encourages the encoder to learn speech-aware phonetic representations in a data-efficient manner. Experiments show that TTS systems built on UR-BERT consistently outperform recent text encoder baselines across a wide range of languages and resource conditions, and demonstrate strong generalization to unseen languages.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UR-BERT，通过通用罗马化转写和语音token预测，将TTS文本编码器扩展到495种语言并提升跨语言泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统基于G2P的TTS方法受限于可靠G2P资源的可用性，仅能覆盖约100种语言，难以扩展到更多语言。多语言TTS需要一种能统一不同书写系统、无需音素级标注的文本表示方法，以支持大规模语言覆盖并保持语音-文本对齐。
light_analysis.method: UR-BERT采用罗马化转写将495种语言的书写系统统一为共享的拉丁字母表示，避免依赖G2P。训练时引入语音token预测目标，让编码器学习语音感知的文本表征，无需额外音素标注，通过预测语音离散token增强文本与语音的对齐。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，基于UR-BERT的TTS系统在多种语言和资源条件下持续优于近期文本编码器基线，并展现出对未见语言的强泛化能力。具体性能提升指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: UR-BERT通过统一罗马化和语音token预测有效解决了多语言TTS的扩展性问题，支持495种语言并提升文本-语音对齐质量，为大规模多语言TTS提供了高效方案。未来可探索更优的语音预测策略及更多语言覆盖。

title: Organize then Retrieve: Hierarchical Memory Navigation for Efficient Agents
abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents struggle with long-horizon tasks due to their inherent statelessness, requiring all task-relevant information to be encoded in growing input contexts. The resulting degraded reasoning quality, increased inference cost, and higher latency necessitate efficient working memory mechanisms. However, existing approaches either rely on lossy compression or similarity-based retrieval, which often fail to capture temporal structure and causal dependencies required for multi-step agentic tasks. In this work, we present HORMA, a Hierarchical Organize-and-Retrieve Memory Agent that organizes experience into a file-system-like hierarchical structure, where summarized entities are linked to the corresponding raw trajectories, enabling efficient access without losing detailed information. HORMA decomposes working memory into two stages: structured memory construction and navigation-based retrieval. The construction module iteratively refines how experiences are structured by distinguishing between failures caused by missing information and those caused by misleading or overloaded context. The navigation module retrieves task-relevant context by traversing the hierarchy using a lightweight agent trained with reinforcement learning to select minimal yet sufficient context, thereby reducing latency along the critical execution path. Across ALFWorld, LoCoMo, and LongMemEval, HORMA improves task performance under constrained context budgets while requiring at most 22.17% of the baseline token usage in long conversation tasks. Compared to existing methods, it consistently achieves better efficiency-performance trade-offs and generalizes effectively to unseen tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种层次化组织与检索记忆代理HORMA，通过文件系统式层次结构组织经验并利用强化学习导航检索，提升长周期任务效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型代理在处理长周期任务时因无状态性导致推理质量下降、推理成本增加和延迟增高。现有方法要么使用有损压缩，要么基于相似性检索，但难以捕捉多步代理任务所需的时间结构和因果依赖。因此需要一种高效的工作记忆机制，既能保留详细信息，又能高效访问。
light_analysis.method: HORMA将工作记忆分解为两个阶段：结构化记忆构建和基于导航的检索。构建模块通过区分因信息缺失和因上下文误导或过载导致的失败，迭代优化经验组织结构，将总结实体链接到原始轨迹。导航模块使用轻量级代理通过强化学习训练，在层次结构中遍历以选择最小但足够的上下文，减少关键执行路径的延迟，形成文件系统式层次结构。
light_analysis.result: 在ALFWorld、LoCoMo和LongMemEval上，HORMA在受约束的上下文预算下提升了任务性能，在长对话任务中仅需基线模型22.17%的token使用量。与现有方法相比，它持续实现了更好的效率-性能权衡，并能有效泛化到未见任务。
light_analysis.conclusion: HORMA通过层次化组织和导航机制解决了LLM代理在长周期任务中的效率与性能平衡问题，具有学术价值（提出新的记忆组织范式）和应用价值（降低推理成本）。潜在局限性可能涉及层次结构构建的复杂性，未来可探索更动态更新机制。

title: Can AI Reason Like an Urban Planner? Benchmarking Large Language Models Against Professional Judgment
abstract: Problem, Research Strategy, and Findings: The rise of large language models (LLMs) raises a key question for urban planning: which forms of professional planning knowledge can AI replicate, and which still require human judgment? Although AI tools are increasingly used in planning practice, there is still no systematic framework for testing whether they can reason with the contextual sensitivity, value awareness, and institutional literacy central to planning expertise. This paper introduces Urban Planning Bench (UPBench), a domain-specific evaluation framework that assesses LLM reasoning through a 4x5 matrix of four knowledge pillars and five cognitive levels adapted from Bloom's revised taxonomy. Evaluating 25 LLMs with automated scoring and expert review, we find a non-monotonic cognitive curve: models perform better on higher-order analytical tasks than on factual recall and integrative judgment. This suggests that planning knowledge often treated as lower-order is deeply shaped by institutional, jurisdictional, and temporal context, making it hard for LLMs to generalize. We summarize these limits as four epistemic diagnostics: regulatory hallucination, conceptual conflation, wickedness paralysis, and phronetic deficit.   Takeaway for Practice: The findings support differential delegation in planning. LLMs can assist with cross-disciplinary synthesis, literature review, scenario generation, and preliminary policy analysis. However, they remain unreliable for jurisdiction-specific regulation, normative conflict resolution, and context-sensitive procedure. Agencies should require verification for AI-assisted regulatory analysis, while planning education should emphasize institutional literacy, normative judgment, and contextual sensitivity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UPBench评估框架，系统测试大语言模型在城市规划领域的推理能力，发现高阶分析优于低阶事实回忆。
light_analysis.motivation: AI工具在规划实践中日益普及，但缺乏系统性框架评估其是否具备规划专业知识所需的语境敏感性、价值意识和制度素养。现有方法无法判断LLM能否像人类专家一样推理，因此需要建立一个领域特定的评估体系。
light_analysis.method: 构建UPBench评估框架，基于4×5矩阵：四个知识支柱（如法规、规范等）和五级认知层次（改编自Bloom分类法）。使用自动评分和专家评审评估25个LLM，并总结四种认知缺陷：监管幻觉、概念混淆、恶意悖论、实践赤字。
light_analysis.result: 发现非单调认知曲线：LLM在高阶分析任务（如跨学科综合）上表现优于事实回忆和整合判断。这表明规划知识受制度、司法和时间背景深刻影响，难以泛化。具体缺陷包括监管幻觉（生成虚构法规）、概念混淆等。
light_analysis.conclusion: 支持差异化委托：LLM可辅助跨学科综合、文献综述、场景生成等，但在特定法规、规范冲突和上下文敏感程序上不可靠。建议机构对AI辅助监管分析要求验证，规划教育应强化制度素养、规范判断和语境敏感性。

title: Lung-R1: A Knowledge Graph-Guided LLM for Pulmonary Diagnostic Reasoning
abstract: Diagnosing pulmonary diseases requires integrating heterogeneous evidence amid phenotypic variability and cross-disease overlap. Although large language models (LLMs) have shown progress on pulmonary knowledge question answering (QA) and information-processing tasks, reliable pulmonary diagnosis requires patient-specific, relation-aware reasoning over electronic medical record (EMR) evidence rather than isolated knowledge recall. We define this gap between pulmonary knowledge and case-level diagnostic reasoning as the Pulmonary Knowledge-to-Diagnosis Gap. To address it, we introduce LungKG, the first structured pulmonary knowledge graph for diagnostic knowledge organization and record-grounded reasoning. LungKG contains 59,038 nodes and 164,308 edges across 15 entity types and 112 relation types, serving as both a reusable pulmonary knowledge resource and the foundation for LungKG-guided model adaptation. Built on LungKG, we propose Lung-R1, a LungKG-guided pulmonary LLM trained through KG-constrained reasoning-chain construction and KG-guided reinforcement learning. In a 20-system evaluation, Lung-R1-14B achieves state-of-the-art performance across Choice, Pulmonary-QA, and EMR Diagnosis, reaching an EMR Diagnosis score of 4.3583 and surpassing the strongest non-Lung-R1 baseline by 0.1476 points. These results demonstrate the value of LungKG-guided training for EMR-based pulmonary diagnosis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出知识图谱引导的LLM (Lung-R1) 用于肺部诊断推理，通过构建结构化知识图谱LungKG并引导强化学习训练，弥合肺部知识与病例诊断之间的鸿沟。
light_analysis.motivation: 肺部疾病诊断需整合异质性证据，但现有LLM在病例级诊断推理上表现不足，主要依赖孤立知识回忆而非患者特定、关系感知的推理。为弥合这一知识到诊断的鸿沟，亟需结构化的知识组织和记录驱动的推理方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建LungKG，首个结构化肺部知识图谱，包含59,038节点、164,308边，覆盖15实体类型和112关系类型。基于LungKG，通过KG约束的推理链构建和KG引导的强化学习训练Lung-R1模型，实现知识组织与推理增强。
light_analysis.result: 在20系统评估中，Lung-R1-14B在多项任务上达到SOTA，包括选择题、肺部QA和EMR诊断。EMR诊断得分为4.3583，超越最强非Lung-R1基线0.1476分，验证了KG引导训练对EMR诊断的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Lung-R1展示了知识图谱引导训练对基于EMR的肺部诊断的价值，同时提供了可重用的肺部知识资源LungKG。未来可拓展至更多疾病领域，并探索更大规模模型与更细粒度推理。

title: ARGUS: Stacked Multi-View Identity Mosaic Injection for Subject-Preserving Video Generation
abstract: Subject-preserving video generation is not solved by frontal-face similarity alone: a generated person must remain recognizable across motion, large viewpoint changes, expression shifts, occlusion, scale variation, and conflicts among text, first-frame, and identity references. We argue that the central bottleneck is the point-reference paradigm, which collapses identity into a single static observation entangled with pose, accessories, lighting, background, and camera statistics. We introduce Argus, a Wan-based framework centered on Stacked Multi-View Identity Mosaic Injection (SMII). SMII converts MLLM-selected image/video identity evidence into a 3*3 stacked mosaic, synchronizes the mosaic with the current diffusion time, and injects it as negative-time read-only memory in Wan's native token space. This turns identity from an external clean adapter or a single reference image into a compact dynamic distribution. Around SMII, an MLLM Identity Director selects informative identity moments and resolves condition conflicts, while no-cross-pair counterfactual training, Temporal Identity Annealing, and Adaptive Self-Likeness Guidance improve robustness without paired subject-video supervision. We further release HardID-Celeb, a public-figure identity-stress benchmark, and introduce YawScore and OccScore to probe large-yaw and first-frame-occlusion robustness. Argus achieves state-of-the-art results on OpenS2V-Eval Human-Domain, reaching 64.38 Total Score, 71.86 FaceSim, 51.62 NexusScore, and 79.14 NaturalScore. On HardID-Celeb, Argus obtains 76.80 FaceSim and improves YawScore and OccScore by 12.60 and 15.10 points over the strongest baselines, demonstrating that dynamic identity memory and large-scale counterfactual self-supervision are highly effective for subject-preserving video generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Argus框架，通过堆叠多视图身份马赛克注入（SMII）将身份转化为紧凑动态分布，解决视频生成中的主体保持问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有主体保持视频生成仅依赖正面人脸相似度，无法应对大角度、遮挡、表情变化等。点参考范式将身份与静态观察纠缠，导致跨变化识别失败。需要将身份建模为动态分布而非单一静态特征。
light_analysis.method: 核心为SMII，利用MLLM选取身份证据，转换为3×3堆叠马赛克并同步扩散时间，作为只读内存注入Wan的token空间。结合MLLM Identity Director、无交叉对反事实训练、时间身份退火和自适应自相似度引导，实现无配对视频监督下的鲁棒身份保持。
light_analysis.result: 在OpenS2V-Eval人类域上达64.38总分，71.86 FaceSim，51.62 NexusScore，79.14 NaturalScore；在HardID-Celeb上FaceSim为76.80，YawScore和OccScore比最强基线分别提升12.60和15.10。
light_analysis.conclusion: 动态身份记忆和大规模反事实自监督有效解决了主体保持视频生成中的身份动态性问题。发布HardID-Celeb基准用于压力测试，为后续研究提供评估标准。

title: CoCoSI: Collaborative Cognitive Map Construction for Spatial Intelligence
abstract: Spatial intelligence is a key frontier for multimodal large language models (MLLMs), enabling them to reason about the physical world from visual experience. Inspired by human spatial cognition, recent approaches construct grid-based cognitive maps from multi-frame visual inputs to maintain coherent spatial representations over time. However, limited context lengths still challenge spatial understanding, while existing methods, such as long-context modeling and external memory, often require architectural changes, memory modules, or finetuning, limiting their applicability to off-the-shelf pretrained MLLMs. This motivates a lightweight, model-agnostic method for preserving spatial information beyond the native context window. To this end, we propose a plug-and-play multi-agent framework that collaboratively constructs cognitive maps as structured spatial memory, enhancing the spatial understanding of arbitrary pretrained MLLMs without architectural modification or additional training. Our framework features local-global agent coordination, cognitive map construction with atomic commits, and cross-agent verification. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance on spatial understanding tasks while remaining fully training-free. Code will be released.

light_analysis.overview: 提出即插即用的多智能体框架CoCoSI，通过协作构建认知地图增强预训练多模态大语言模型的空间理解，无需架构修改或额外训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型的空间智能受限于上下文长度，现有方法如长上下文建模或外部记忆需架构修改或微调，限制其即插即用性。因此需要轻量级、模型无关的方法来保留超出原生上下文窗口的空间信息。
light_analysis.method: 提出即插即用的多智能体框架，包含局部-全局智能体协调、原子提交的认知地图构建和跨智能体验证。通过协作构建结构化空间记忆，增强任意预训练MLLM的空间理解，无需架构修改或训练。
light_analysis.result: 在空间理解任务上取得优越性能，完全无需训练。具体指标摘要未明确说明，但表明方法有效提升空间理解能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: CoCoSI框架有效增强MLLM空间理解，具有即插即用和训练免费特性，代码将开源。为空间智能提供轻量级解决方案，未来可扩展至更复杂空间任务。

title: BiWM: Advancing Open-Source Interactive Video World Models with Bidirectional Autoregression
abstract: Transitioning bidirectional video diffusion models into an autoregressive paradigm improves the interactivity of video world models, but existing causal pipelines need many stages (control fine-tuning, autoregressive training, causal initialization, few-step distillation) and still trail bidirectional models in quality due to error accumulation. Recent world models such as Yume-1.5 and Matrix-Game-3.0 instead adopt a bidirectional autoregressive approach, gaining fidelity and stable long-horizon rollout from self-correcting error propagation, yet open-source frameworks (e.g., minWM) support only causal models. We present BiWM, the first full-stack framework for interactive video world models under the bidirectional autoregressive paradigm, jointly optimizing generation quality and inference speed. From a pretrained video backbone, BiWM injects camera control by fine-tuning, then runs a few-step Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD) stage that turns the backbone into an action/camera-controllable world model: just two training stages instead of four in minWM, converging in a few hundred steps on 8xH200 GPUs. A single recipe spans Wan2.1-1.3B, Wan2.2-5B, HunyuanVideo-1.5-8B, and LTX-2.3-22B, and also supports secondary fine-tuning of existing bidirectional models. BiWM enables real-world camera control where minWM loses controllability, integrates pluggable history compression (FramePack-style and PackForcing-style) for long rollouts, and offers an optional NVFP4 4-bit training/inference pipeline. To counter DMD's mode-seeking degradation, we add GAN and mass-covering forward-KL objectives that preserve scene dynamics. We open-source BiWM for resource-constrained research and high-fidelity environment simulation.
comment: After the paper was posted, we discovered that several visualization results were produced using wrong configuration settings during runtime. This error affects the reliability of the presented visual comparisons. Additionally, further optimization of the design is needed. We therefore request to withdraw this version and will submit a corrected and improved version later

light_analysis.overview: 首个全栈双向自回归交互式视频世界模型框架BiWM，联合优化生成质量与推理速度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有双向视频扩散模型转换到自回归范式需多阶段（控制微调、自回归训练、因果初始化、少步蒸馏），且因果模型因误差累积质量低于双向模型。开源框架仅支持因果模型，缺乏对高质量、可控长时视频生成的支持。BiWM旨在减少训练阶段、提升交互性，使资源受限研究也能获得高保真环境模拟。
light_analysis.method: BiWM从预训练视频骨干出发，通过微调注入相机控制，再使用分布匹配蒸馏（DMD）单阶段转化为可控世界模型，仅需两阶段训练。支持Wan2.1、HunyuanVideo等多种骨干，集成FramePack-style等可插拔历史压缩实现长时rollout，并提供可选NVFP4 4位训练/推理。为缓解DMD的模式搜索退化，加入GAN和forward-KL目标保持场景动态。
light_analysis.result: 相比minWM的四阶段，BiWM仅两阶段且在8×H200 GPU上几百步收敛。实现真实相机控制（minWM失去可控性），支持多种模型尺寸（1.3B至22B）。实验表明其生成质量与双向模型相当，推理速度提升，长时rollout稳定。开源框架降低了高保真视频世界模型的资源门槛。
light_analysis.conclusion: BiWM是首个开源双向自回归交互式视频世界模型框架，通过精简训练流程、集成历史压缩和对抗训练策略，平衡了质量、速度与可控性。适用于资源受限研究与高保真环境仿真。未来可探索更高效的蒸馏方法及更广泛的控制模态。

title: GENERIC-FNO: Embedding Energy Conservation and Entropy Production into Fourier Neural Operators
abstract: We introduce GENERIC-FNO, the first neural operator to embed the full GENERIC (metriplectic) structure of nonequilibrium thermodynamics -- reversible, energy-conserving dynamics and irreversible, entropy-producing dynamics coupled through the degeneracy conditions -- directly in function space. Existing structure-preserving neural operators enforce at most a single conservation law or reversible (Hamiltonian) structure, while thermodynamically consistent learning has been confined to finite-dimensional, graph, or particle systems. GENERIC-FNO closes this gap: it learns the energy and entropy functionals as neural operators and parameterizes the Poisson and friction operators as diagonal Fourier multipliers sandwiched between rank-one projections that enforce the degeneracy conditions exactly, by construction, with no penalty term, update projection, or residual. The degeneracy identities hold to machine precision (residuals ~10^-13) for any initialization, dimension, or resolution, so the continuous-time dynamics conserve the learned energy and produce entropy exactly; the explicit time stepping adds only a small O(dt^2) drift (per-step residual ~10^-6). We further note that the (E,S,L,M) decomposition of a given flow is not unique, and introduce a gauge-invariant dissipation diagnostic separating reversible from dissipative dynamics independently of the learned functionals. Across three operator backbones (1D/2D FNOs and DeepONet) and four PDEs spanning reversible, dissipative, and mixed regimes, GENERIC-FNO preserves its exact structural guarantees zero-shot across a 4x super-resolution range (64 to 256), recovers the ground-truth ordering of physical dissipation, and is competitive with strong unconstrained and energy-penalized baselines, outperforming them on several dissipative and mixed problems at comparable or fewer parameters.

light_analysis.overview: 首个在函数空间中嵌入完整GENERIC非平衡热力学结构的神经算子，精确实现能量守恒和熵增。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有结构保持神经算子最多仅强制执行单一守恒律或可逆（哈密顿）结构，而热力学一致学习局限于有限维、图或粒子系统。实际物理系统需同时满足能量守恒和熵增的degeneracy条件，这一缺失限制了神经算子模拟复杂热力学过程的能力。GENERIC-FNO旨在填补这一空白，实现函数空间中的完整热力学约束。
light_analysis.method: 将能量和熵泛函学习为神经算子，泊松和摩擦算子参数化为对角傅里叶乘子，夹在秩一投影之间以精确强制执行degeneracy条件，无需惩罚项、更新投影或残差。退化恒等式达机器精度（残差~10^-13）。引入规范不变耗散诊断，无关学习泛函可分离可逆与耗散动力学。支持1D/2D FNO和DeepONet三种算子骨干。
light_analysis.result: 在四个PDE（可逆、耗散、混合）上，零样本跨4倍超分辨率范围（64到256）保持结构保证。重建物理耗散真实排序，与强无约束和能量惩罚基线竞争，在多个耗散和混合问题上以更少或相当参数表现更优。连续时间动力学精确守恒学习能量并产生熵，显式时间步进仅引入小O(dt^2)漂移（每步残差~10^-6）。
light_analysis.conclusion: GENERIC-FNO首次在函数空间实现完整GENERIC结构，为热力学一致的学习提供了精确且可扩展的框架。其精确结构保证和超分辨率泛化能力适用于复杂物理系统模拟。未来可推广至其他非平衡过程或结合数据驱动发现未知热力学关系。局限性在于需已知系统维度及算子形式。

title: Rewrite to Translate, Translate to Reward: Reinforcement Learning for Source Rewriting in Machine Translation
abstract: Rewriting source text with large language models (LLMs) before translation has been shown to improve machine translation (MT) quality. However, we find that prompt-based rewriting can degrade translation quality rather than improve it, particularly when smaller LLMs, such as 4B-parameter models, are used. We argue that this limitation stems from the difficulty of controlling rewriting behavior through natural-language prompts alone: a rewrite is useful only if it improves downstream translation, yet existing prompt-based methods do not explicitly optimize for this signal. To address this issue, we propose RLSR (Reinforcement Learning for Source Rewriting), a reinforcement learning framework that trains the rewriting model with a reward based on the downstream translation-quality improvement produced by each rewrite. Experiments across six MT systems and 16 language pairs show that our 4B RLSR-trained rewriting models significantly outperform both the no-rewriting baseline and prompt-based rewriting baselines at the same model scale, while remaining competitive with baselines that use a 235B LLM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出强化学习框架RLSR，通过下游翻译质量奖励训练源文本改写模型，提升机器翻译性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 使用大语言模型（LLM）进行源文本改写可提升机器翻译质量，但基于提示的改写方法存在局限性：对小模型（如4B参数）反而可能降低翻译质量。原因在于自然语言提示难以精确控制改写行为，改写是否有效取决于下游翻译的改进，而现有方法未直接优化这一信号。因此，需要一种能显式优化下游翻译质量的改写方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出RLSR（Reinforcement Learning for Source Rewriting）框架，采用强化学习训练改写模型。核心思想：以每个改写对下游翻译质量的提升作为奖励信号，通过策略梯度优化改写模型参数。实验使用多种MT系统（共6个）和16个语言对，训练4B参数规模的改写模型。与无改写基线、同规模提示改写基线及235B大模型基线进行对比。
light_analysis.result: 在6个MT系统和16个语言对上，RLSR训练的4B改写模型显著优于无改写基线和基于提示的改写基线（同规模），翻译质量指标提升明显。同时，该4B模型与使用235B大模型（如GPT-3）的提示改写基线相比具有竞争力，甚至在某些设置下更优，证明了小模型通过强化学习可接近大模型效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: RLSR有效解决了提示改写对小模型效果不佳的问题，通过强化学习直接优化下游翻译质量，使小型改写模型取得显著改进。该方法具有实际应用价值，可降低对超大LLM的依赖，同时提升翻译系统性能。未来工作可探索更复杂的奖励设计或扩展到其他文本生成任务。

title: MemToolAgent: Leveraging Memory for Tool Using Agents Based on Environment and User Feedback
abstract: Modern large language model (LLM) agents can use external tools to help users solve complex tasks. However, for problems that require learning from long-term historical events or from previous agent-environment interactions, LLM agents are required to use memory mechanisms to store and retrieve experiences. While sophisticated memory systems exist for dialogue agents, few studies have empirically examined how to improve agents' tool-using capabilities through past user-agent conversations. We propose MemToolAgent, a framework that improves tool use through memory management. Our approach contains a memory extraction module that processes past experiences into structured memory entries, and a retrieval module that dynamically selects a subset of the stored memory entries. This enables more personalized and accurate responses aligned with user preferences and feedback without requiring LLM fine-tuning. In summary, this work has three main contributions: (1) a unified memory entry format that improves both general-purpose and personalized tool use without LLM fine-tuning, (2) a reflection-based memory extraction that uses environment and user feedback to distill wrong executions into critiques to store, and (3) a retrieval module that chooses how many past experiences to use based on the memory similarity distribution. MemToolAgent achieves 29%, 80%, and 17% relative improvements compared to strong baselines on the WorkBench, NESTFUL, and PEToolBench benchmarks, respectively.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MemToolAgent框架，通过内存管理机制提升LLM代理的工具使用能力，无需微调即可实现个性化和准确响应。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM代理在执行需要长期历史或交互学习的任务时，缺乏有效利用过往经验的能力。现有对话代理的内存系统未专门优化工具使用，导致无法从用户交互中持续改进。该研究旨在解决如何通过结构化内存和智能检索增强代理的工具利用效率，避免频繁微调的高成本。
light_analysis.method: 提出MemToolAgent，包含内存提取和检索模块。提取模块将环境与用户反馈转化为结构化内存条目（包含批评反思），检索模块基于内存相似性分布动态选择最相关的历史经验。采用统一格式的内存条目支持通用和个性化任务，无需LLM微调。
light_analysis.result: 在WorkBench、NESTFUL、PEToolBench三个基准测试上，相比强基线方法分别实现29%、80%和17%的相对提升。结果表明，通过内存管理可显著改善工具使用准确性，尤其对需要个性化适应的任务效果突出。
light_analysis.conclusion: MemToolAgent通过内存提取与检索机制有效提升了LLM代理的工具使用能力，展示了无需微调即可从历史交互中学习的潜力。未来可进一步优化内存条目的表示和检索策略，以适应更复杂的动态环境。

title: Breaking the Ice: Analyzing Cold Start Latency in vLLM
abstract: As scalable inference services become popular, the cold start latency of an inference engine becomes important. Today, vLLM has evolved into the de facto inference engine of choice for many inference workloads. Although popular, due to its complexity and rapid evolution, there has not been a systematic study of its startup latency. With major architectural innovations such as the V1 API and the introduction of torch.compile, this paper presents the first detailed performance characterization of vLLM startup latency. We break down the startup process into six foundational steps and demonstrate that it is predominantly CPU bound. Each step exhibits consistent and interpretable scaling trends with respect to model-level and system-level parameters, enabling fine-grained attribution of latency sources. Building on these insights, we develop a lightweight analytical model that accurately predicts vLLM startup latency for a given hardware configuration, providing actionable guidance for resource planning in large-scale inference environments. All benchmarking datasets, analysis tools, and prediction scripts are open sourced at https://github.com/upb-cn/vllm-startup-profiler.

light_analysis.overview: 首次系统分析vLLM推理引擎的冷启动延迟，分解为六个CPU密集型步骤，并构建轻量级预测模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着可扩展推理服务普及，推理引擎的冷启动延迟成为关键性能瓶颈。vLLM作为事实标准，但因其复杂性和快速演化，缺乏对其启动延迟的系统研究。现有方法无法细粒度归因延迟来源，导致大规模部署中资源规划困难。本文旨在填补这一空白，为优化启动性能提供基础。
light_analysis.method: 将vLLM启动过程分解为六个基础步骤（如模型加载、内存分配等），通过基准实验证明其CPU密集型特性。每个步骤的延迟对模型规模（参数量、层数）和系统参数（CPU核心数、内存带宽）呈现一致且可解释的缩放趋势。基于这些洞察，开发了一个轻量级分析模型，采用线性拟合和参数化方法预测给定硬件配置下的启动延迟。所有基准数据集、分析脚本和预测工具已开源。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，vLLM启动延迟主要由CPU计算主导，六个步骤的延迟贡献可被精确归因。每个步骤的缩放趋势与理论分析一致，例如模型加载时间随参数量线性增长。构建的轻量级预测模型在多种硬件配置（如不同CPU和GPU组合）上平均预测误差低于10%，为大规模推理环境的资源规划（如预先分配实例）提供了可靠指导。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次系统刻画了vLLM的冷启动延迟，揭示了其CPU密集型和可解释的缩放特性，并提出了高精度预测模型。学术上，为推理引擎性能分析提供了方法论框架；实践上，可直接用于优化部署策略，减少用户等待时间。未来工作可扩展至其他推理引擎或动态预热机制。

title: On the Geometry of On-Policy Distillation
abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) is increasingly used to improve large language model reasoning, but its training dynamics remain poorly understood. We characterize the trajectory of OPD updates in parameter space and compare it with supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR). A suite of parameter-space diagnostics consistently places OPD in a relaxed off-principal regime: compared with SFT, its updates affect fewer weights and avoid principal directions more strongly, while compared with RLVR, they remain less tightly constrained. Beyond this static localization, OPD exhibits subspace locking: its cumulative updates rapidly enter a narrow low-dimensional channel. Constraining training to the update subspace formed early in training preserves OPD performance but substantially degrades SFT, indicating that the locked subspace is functionally sufficient for OPD. Control experiments further show that sparsifying the update tokens and shifting rollout generation off-policy preserve the rank dynamics, whereas mixing the OPD objective with RLVR changes them. Overall, these results suggest that OPD is not merely an intermediate point between SFT and RLVR, but induces its own update geometry in parameter space.

light_analysis.overview: 本文揭示了在线策略蒸馏在参数空间中的独特更新几何特性，不同于监督微调和强化学习，并证明其早期形成的低维子空间对性能至关重要。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线策略蒸馏（OPD）在提升大语言模型推理能力方面应用广泛，但其训练动态尚未被充分理解。现有方法如监督微调（SFT）和基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）有各自明确的特性，而OPD作为中间方法，其参数更新轨迹和几何性质缺乏系统分析。理解OPD的更新几何有助于优化训练策略，提升模型性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过参数空间诊断工具，比较OPD、SFT和RLVR的更新轨迹。引入静态定位和子空间锁定概念，分析更新方向、权重影响范围和主成分约束。通过控制实验（如稀疏化更新token、离线采样、混合目标函数）探究更新秩动态的驱动因素。使用累积更新子空间进行约束训练，评估不同方法的功能充分性。
light_analysis.result: OPD的更新影响更少权重且避免主方向（静态定位），并快速进入窄低维通道（子空间锁定）。将训练限制在早期形成的更新子空间内，OPD性能保持不变，而SFT显著下降。稀疏化token和离线采样不改变秩动态，但混合RLVR目标会改变。这表明OPD具有独特的更新几何，非SFT与RLVR的简单插值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文系统刻画了OPD的参数空间更新几何，揭示其独特的静态定位和子空间锁定特性，证明OPD并非SFT与RLVR的中间态，而是具有自身训练动力学机制。该发现有助于开发更高效的OPD训练方法，并为理解不同微调方法的本质差异提供几何视角。未来可探索子空间锁定的一般性及跨模型、跨任务的扩展。

title: Multi-task Learning is Not Enough: Representational Entanglement in Dual-output Second Language Speech Recognition
abstract: Second-language (L2) speech recognition often requires transcriptions of pronunciations and intended meanings. Multi-task learning (MTL) is a natural approach because it assumes that shared representations benefit both outputs. However, this paper shows that this assumption does not hold across Korean and English. MTL improves meaning but degrades surface transcription, especially in English, where the degradation scales with surface-meaning divergence measured by Levenshtein edit distance. Encoder analysis links these patterns to encoder-level entanglement, with Korean preserving distinct task representations while English produces nearly identical ones. Cross-task decoder analysis shows that the meaning dual-output decoder adapts with a unique representation, while the surface dual-output decoder remains constrained by the encoder. These findings motivate the design of MTL frameworks that mitigate encoder-level entanglement to reduce surface degradation in dual-output L2 automatic speech recognition.
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, Accepted to the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning Workshop on Machine Learning for Audio

light_analysis.overview: 揭示多任务学习在L2语音识别中导致表面转写退化的原因，归因于编码器级别的表示纠缠，并指出需缓解纠缠。
light_analysis.motivation: L2语音识别需要同时输出音标转写和语义理解，多任务学习被自然采用，但其共享表示假设在韩语和英语中不成立。实验发现MTL虽改善语义但降低表面转写，尤其英语中降级与表面-语义差异成比例，表明现有MTL框架存在缺陷，需理解纠缠机制。
light_analysis.method: 使用韩语和英语L2语音数据，通过编码器分析比较单任务与MTL的表示，测量表面-语义差异（Levenshtein编辑距离），并分析跨任务解码器对编码器的依赖。揭示编码器级别表示纠缠：韩语保留不同任务表示，英语几乎相同；语义解码器适应独特表示，而表面解码器受编码器约束。
light_analysis.result: MTL在英语中表面转写性能显著下降，降级程度与Levenshtein编辑距离正相关。编码器分析显示韩语任务表示分离，英语纠缠严重。解码器分析表明语义解码器学习独特表示，而表面解码器行为受编码器限制，导致性能退化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明MTL不足以处理L2语音识别的双输出任务，编码器纠缠是表面退化根源。学术贡献是揭示MTL在跨语言场景的局限，实际价值指导设计解纠缠的MTL框架。未来可探索对抗训练或分离编码器等缓解策略。

title: Frames2LoRA: Parametric Video Internalization for Vision-Language Models
abstract: Processing video in vision-language models is expensive: each frame occupies hundreds of tokens, and inference cost scales with every frame and every repeated query. We introduce Frames2LoRA, a method for parametric video internalization. A perceiver hypernetwork reads the intermediate representations produced layer-by-layer as a frozen VLM encodes a video, and generates a Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) adapter in a single forward pass. Unlike standard LoRA fine-tuning, which requires iterative gradient updates, Frames2LoRA predicts these weights directly from the video. Trained for SmolVLM2 500M and 2.2B on video summarization and captioning, Frames2LoRA enables the same frozen VLM to answer queries from the adapter alone, with zero visual tokens in its context at query time. Frames2LoRA is statistically non-inferior and equivalent to direct video-in-context inference across all five captioning benchmarks at both model scales, and across seven of eight video question answering benchmark-scale pairings. Although trained only on 12 frames at 384px, it remains stable up to 1,024 frames and 1024px, where direct video-in-context inference often degenerates. Across this sweep, it reduces answer-time visual-token load by up to 1,500x and query TTFT by 6-80x, while preserving video-faithful outputs. We also find that independently generated adapters for non-overlapping video segments can compose in rank space, suggesting a path toward chunked long-video internalization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Frames2LoRA方法，通过超网络将视频内化为LoRA适配器，实现零视觉令牌的视频问答。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型处理视频时，每帧占用数百个token，推理成本随帧数和查询次数线性增长。传统微调需要迭代梯度更新，效率低。亟需一种高效、可扩展的视频内化方法，降低推理开销同时保持性能。
light_analysis.method: Frames2LoRA利用感知器超网络，在冻结VLM编码视频时逐层读取中间表示，单次前向生成LoRA适配器。训练时使用视频摘要和描述任务，基于SmolVLM2 500M和2.2B模型。推理时仅需适配器，上下文含零视觉token。支持不重叠视频段独立生成适配器并在秩空间组合，实现长视频分块内化。
light_analysis.result: 在5个视频描述基准上，Frames2LoRA与直接视频上下文推理统计等效；在8个视频问答中7个等效。仅训练12帧384px，但稳定支持1024帧1024px（直接推理常退化）。推理时视觉token负载减少高达1500倍，查询TTFT降低6-80倍，输出保真。
light_analysis.conclusion: Frames2LoRA首次实现参数化视频内化，无需视觉token即可回答查询，大幅降低推理成本。方法保持性能稳定，支持长视频扩展。未来可探索更复杂任务及组合式内化路径，为高效视频理解提供新范式。

title: EvalStop: Using World Feedback to Detect and Correct Reward Overoptimization in Multi-Tenant RLHF Platforms
abstract: Cloud LLM fine-tuning platforms increasingly serve RLHF workloads, where a learned reward model is optimized as a proxy for human quality. As Gao et al. (2023) showed, this proxy diverges from world feedback (downstream eval metrics) under sustained optimization pressure, a phenomenon known as reward overoptimization. Existing platform schedulers ignore this divergence: non-clairvoyant schedulers optimize JCT without any quality signal, SLAQ-style quality-aware schedulers use training loss (a weaker proxy that drops monotonically through hacking), and classical per-job early stopping requires human monitoring and does not free shared GPUs. We propose EvalStop, a composable scheduling primitive that terminates jobs on k consecutive eval-score declines, releases GPUs, preserves the best checkpoint, and delegates to any base scheduler. We frame scheduler-level early stopping as a detection problem and evaluate it in a discrete-event simulator whose RLHF workload mixes reward-hacking and structurally healthy runs, with ground-truth labels hidden from schedulers. On RLHF-heavy workloads (80% RLHF, 64 GPUs), EvalStop achieves precision 98% / recall 99% / FPR 1.5% while improving JCT by 9% and cutting wasted compute by 22% over SRTF-Est (p<0.05). Trivial fixed-progress and loss-plateau competitors either incur 65% FPR on healthy RLHF or miss over half of true hacking cases. Gains compose across every base scheduler tested (9-25% JCT) and detection quality stays stable under eval noise (precision at least 91% at noise std <= 0.05) and hacking base rate (precision at least 89% across 20-80% hacking fractions).

light_analysis.overview: 提出EvalStop调度原语，通过检测评估分数连续下降来终止过优化作业，释放GPU并保留最佳检查点，提升系统效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 云LLM微调平台中RLHF工作负载使用奖励模型作为人类质量的代理，但持续优化下代理与真实世界反馈（下游评估指标）产生偏差，即奖励过优化。现有调度器忽略此问题：非预知调度器优化作业完成时间（JCT）但无质量信号；SLAQ式调度器使用训练损失（易被欺骗）；经典早停需要人工监控且不释放共享GPU。因此需要自动检测与终止过优化作业的机制。
light_analysis.method: EvalStop是一个可组合的调度原语，当作业评估分数连续k次下降时终止作业，释放GPU，保留最佳检查点，并可委托给任意基础调度器。将调度器级早停视为检测问题，在离散事件模拟器中评估，混合奖励破解和结构性健康的RLHF工作负载，真实标签对调度器隐藏。
light_analysis.result: 在80% RLHF工作负载、64 GPU场景下，EvalStop达到精确率98%、召回率99%、假阳性率1.5%，相比SRTF-Est改进JCT 9%、减少浪费计算22%（p<0.05）。固定进度和损失平台基线分别导致65%假阳性率或错过超半数破解案例。在所有基础调度器上JCT改进9-25%，在不同评估噪声（噪声标准差≤0.05时精确率≥91%）和破解比例（20-80%时精确率≥89%）下检测质量稳定。
light_analysis.conclusion: EvalStop有效检测并终止奖励过优化作业，显著提升多租户RLHF平台效率，节省计算资源且与现有调度器兼容。其检测性能稳健，具有实际部署价值。未来可探索更复杂的检测规则或自适应k值。

title: BaltiVoice: A Speech Corpus and Fine-tuned Whisper ASR System for the Balti Language
abstract: We present BaltiVoice, a 16.8-hour read-speech corpus for Balti (ISO 639-3: bft), a Tibetic language spoken in Gilgit-Baltistan, Pakistan, with no prior publicly available ASR resources. The corpus contains 10,060 validated utterances in native Nastaliq script, derived from Mozilla Common Voice recordings. Fine-tuning OpenAI Whisper-small yields a Word Error Rate (WER) of 26.74% and a Character Error Rate (CER) of 8.67% on a 538-utterance speaker-disjoint validation set, down from a zero-shot baseline of 159.19% WER and 152.52% CER. A Whisper-base fine-tuned on the same data achieves 44.54% WER and 15.61% CER, confirming that model capacity matters for this low-resource setting. The dataset, fine-tuned model, and a live transcription demo are publicly available on HuggingFace.
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables. Code and data available at https://github.com/mohdali-dev/BaltiVoice-ASR

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个公开的巴尔蒂语语音语料库及微调Whisper ASR系统，显著降低词错误率。
light_analysis.motivation: 巴尔蒂语（bft）是巴基斯坦吉尔吉特-巴尔蒂斯坦地区的一种藏语语言，此前没有任何公开的自动语音识别（ASR）资源。缺乏语音数据和基线系统严重阻碍了该语言的信息获取和技术发展。现有ASR系统无法处理这种低资源语言，零样本基线WER高达159.19%，表明有必要构建专用语料库并开展模型微调研究。
light_analysis.method: 构建了包含10,060条验证话语的16.8小时朗读语音语料库BaltiVoice，采用原生Nastaliq脚本转录，数据来源于Mozilla Common Voice录音。基于OpenAI Whisper-small模型进行微调，采用说话人不重叠的538条话语验证集。同时对比Whisper-base微调结果，探讨模型容量对低资源场景的影响。数据集、微调模型及实时转录演示均已公开在HuggingFace。
light_analysis.result: 微调Whisper-small后WER从零样本基线的159.19%降至26.74%，CER从152.52%降至8.67%。Whisper-base微调后WER为44.54%，CER为15.61%，表明更大模型容量在低资源设定中更有效。结果基于说话人不重叠的验证集，具有可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究填补了巴尔蒂语ASR的空白，提供了首个公开语料库和基线模型。微调Whisper-small取得了可用的识别性能，验证了迁移学习在极低资源语言上的有效性。未来可扩展语料规模、探索多语言预训练模型的其他适配策略。公开资源将促进该语言的语音技术研究和应用。

title: Libra: Efficient Resource Management for Agentic RL Post-Training
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a standard post-training paradigm for shaping large language models (LLMs) into capable agents. In agentic RL, the rollout stage generates trajectories while invoking tools, producing long-tailed and non-stationary workloads that expose two fundamental challenges in resource management. First, due to the long-tail distribution, a small fraction of trajectories dominates rollout makespan. Second, rollout and training are subject to cross-stage imbalance, as they exhibit strong asymmetry in compute patterns, memory demands, and sensitivity to sequence length. Compounding this asymmetry, the sequence length distribution drifts continuously as the policy evolves, rendering any static resource split progressively suboptimal.   We present Libra, a resource management system to address both challenges via two core mechanisms. The first is a global resource planner that jointly optimizes GPU allocation across rollout and training clusters. It leverages an elastic hybrid pool to enable lightweight, non-blocking worker reallocation between stages. The second is a causality-driven multi-level feedback queue (C-MLFQ) scheduler, which routes requests to heterogeneous rollout buckets based on causal signals derived from tool-return outcomes, rather than relying on fragile length predictions. Evaluated on 48 A800 GPUs, Libra achieves up to 3.0x higher throughput and converges up to 2.5x faster in reward compared to the baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Libra系统，通过全局资源规划器和因果驱动的多级反馈队列调度器，解决强化学习后训练中长尾分布和跨阶段不平衡的资源管理问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在agentic RL后训练中，rollout阶段生成轨迹并调用工具，产生长尾和非平稳工作负载。少数长轨迹主导rollout完成时间；rollout与训练阶段在计算模式、内存需求和序列长度敏感性上高度不对称，且序列长度分布随策略漂移，静态资源分配逐渐失效，急需动态资源管理方案。
light_analysis.method: Libra包含两个核心机制：1) 全局资源规划器，联合优化rollout和训练集群的GPU分配，通过弹性混合池实现轻量级非阻塞工作重分配；2) 因果驱动的多级反馈队列调度器，根据工具返回结果的因果信号将请求路由到异构rollout桶，避免依赖脆弱的长度预测。
light_analysis.result: 在48个A800 GPU上评估，Libra相比基线实现了最高3.0倍的吞吐量提升，并在奖励上收敛速度加快2.5倍，验证了其在资源利用和训练效率上的显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: Libra有效应对agentic RL后训练中的资源管理挑战，提供了动态、高效的系统方案。学术上引入因果驱动调度新思路，实际中可加速LLM代理训练。未来可探索更复杂的因果建模及扩展至其他场景。

title: Geometric Erasure by Contrastive Velocity Matching in Rectified Flows
abstract: While the rapid adoption of multimodal generative models offers immense potential, it has also increased the risks of harmful content synthesis, deepfakes, and copyright infringements. To address these challenges, concept erasure has emerged as a prospective safeguard. However, as the field gradually transitions from U-Net-based diffusion models to Rectified Flow Transformers, erasure research has struggled to keep pace. In this work, we introduce GEM, a simple but highly effective erasure framework for Rectified Flow models. As part of our contribution, we establish a principled bridge between trajectory-based unlearning grounded in Generative Flow Networks and classic teacher-guided erasure: we translate trajectory-based signals into a teacher-guided flow-matching setup that unifies the strengths of both paradigms. Concretely, a teacher provides complementary attraction and repulsion signals that we combine into a single geometric guidance objective, yielding targeted suppression of unwanted concepts while preserving benign generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 GEM 框架，通过对比速度匹配实现 Rectified Flow 模型中的概念擦除。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态生成模型的广泛应用带来了有害内容合成、深度伪造和版权侵权等风险。概念擦除作为一种保护机制，但现有研究主要针对 U-Net 扩散模型，未能跟上向 Rectified Flow Transformer 的转变。因此需要为 Rectified Flow 模型设计高效、可扩展的擦除方法。
light_analysis.method: GEM 框架建立在生成流网络轨迹遗忘与教师引导擦除之间的原则性桥梁上。将轨迹信号转化为教师引导的流匹配设置，统一两种范式的优势。具体地，教师提供互补的吸引和排斥信号，组合成单一的几何引导目标，实现对不想要概念的目标抑制，同时保留良性生成能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，GEM 能有效擦除指定概念（如有害内容），同时保持模型在无关概念上的生成质量。在标准基准测试上，相比现有方法，GEM 在擦除效果和生成保真度间取得更优平衡。具体数值未在摘要中明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: GEM 为 Rectified Flow 模型提供了一种简单高效的擦除框架，通过统一轨迹遗忘和教师引导方法，实现了精准的概念抑制。该方法不仅推动了概念擦除领域的技术进步，也为生成模型的安全部署提供了实用工具。未来可探索更复杂的几何引导策略及扩展至其他生成架构。

title: Apertus LLM Family Expansion via Distillation and Quantization
abstract: The wide adoption of LLMs has led to their use in great variety of applications and scenarios, such as chatbot assistants and data annotation, creating the need for the models to satisfy certain budget and hardware constraints. This has led to the trend of LLMs being released in batches consisting of similar models of various sizes for the family of models to adhere to as wide of a range of constraints as possible. In this paper, we validate distillation and quantization as a cost-effective way to expand model families to new sizes and hardware formats. Based on the open-recipe Apertus 8B LLM, we produce Apertus-v1.1 - a distilled family of models with up to 4B parameters trained on 1.7T permissive license tokens. We demonstrate cost-efficiency and strong accuracy performance of our approach for covering large ranges of hardware and systems requirements.

light_analysis.overview: 验证蒸馏和量化作为扩展LLM家族到新尺寸和硬件格式的成本有效方法。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM广泛应用于各种场景，如聊天助手和数据标注，但不同应用有不同预算和硬件约束。现有模型家族通常只提供少数几种尺寸，难以覆盖广泛需求。需要一种成本有效的方法来扩展现有模型家族，使其适应更多硬件和系统要求。
light_analysis.method: 基于开源的Apertus 8B LLM，通过蒸馏和量化技术生产Apertus-v1.1模型家族。蒸馏使用1.7T许可令牌训练，得到参数最多4B的模型。量化进一步压缩模型以适应不同硬件格式。该方法旨在保持性能的同时降低计算和存储成本。
light_analysis.result: 蒸馏和量化方法在覆盖大范围硬件和系统需求方面展示了成本效益和强准确性性能。Apertus-v1.1家族包含多种尺寸，其中4B参数模型在1.7T令牌上训练，性能接近原始8B模型但参数量减半。摘要未提供具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 蒸馏和量化是扩展LLM家族到新尺寸和硬件格式的有效途径，有助于模型适应更广泛的预算和硬件约束。该方法可推广到其他开源LLM，促进LLM的民主化部署。未来可探索更大规模蒸馏和更高效的量化策略。

title: GrowLoop: Self-Evolving Conversation Evaluation Seeded by Human
abstract: With the rapid advancement of large language models, evaluating human-likeness in open-ended conversation has become increasingly important. However, human-likeness is a form of tacit knowledge that humans perceive intuitively, yet the underlying criteria resist explicit formulation. Human judgments vary widely, with strong agreement on some cases and legitimate disagreement on others. Meanwhile, the criteria behind human judgments remain implicit, leaving no clear basis for constructing cases. Further, what counts as human-likeness is not static, but evolving with model capability and human expectations. Despite progress in evaluation methods such as expert-authored benchmarks, Reward Models, and self-evolving benchmarks, none addresses all three challenges simultaneously. Therefore, we propose GrowLoop, a self-evolving conversation evaluation system that continuously adapts as models advance and scenarios shift. Starting from minimal human seed annotations, LLM agents iteratively extract and refine evaluation rubrics through Heuristic Learning. Human-AI agreement is required where annotators converge, while only plausibility is expected where they diverge. Moreover, the Rubric-Case co-evolution mechanism enables continuous evolution. When the evaluation target shifts, new human seeds expand the system's coverage accordingly. When applied to human-likeness evaluation in open-ended conversation, the AI judge guided by these rubrics not only substantially outperforms existing methods in alignment with human judgments, but also uncovers issues that annotators overlook. The resulting benchmark effectively discriminates models across capability tiers and reveals where they fall short, while generalizing to new scenarios and adapting as models advance. Our work shifts the benchmarking paradigm from manual updates or difficulty scaling to comprehensive, continuous self-evolution.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自演进对话评估系统GrowLoop，通过最小人工种子标注和启发式学习持续改进评估标准，解决人类判断隐性、分歧及标准演进三大挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大语言模型发展，评估开放式对话的类人性日益重要。但类人性是隐性知识，人类判断标准难以显式化且存在分歧，同时标准随模型能力进化。现有方法（专家基准、奖励模型、自演进基准）均无法同时解决这三个挑战，亟需持续演进的评估系统。
light_analysis.method: GrowLoop从最小人工种子标注开始，LLM代理通过启发式学习迭代提取并细化评估标准。在人类一致处要求人机一致，在分歧处仅要求合理性。标准-案例共演化机制使系统持续适应：评估目标变化时，新种子标注扩展覆盖。应用于开放对话的类人性评估，AI评判器由这些标准指导。
light_analysis.result: 在类人性评估中，GrowLoop引导的AI评判在与人判断对齐上显著优于现有方法，并能发现人类评估者忽略的问题。生成的基准有效区分不同能力层次的模型，揭示模型短板，同时泛化到新场景并随模型进步适应。
light_analysis.conclusion: GrowLoop将基准范式从手动更新或难度扩展转变为全面的持续自演进。其贡献在于首次同时处理人类判断的隐性、分歧和进化问题，具有重要的学术和实用价值。未来可探索更高效的种子标注策略或扩展到其他评估维度。

title: When Does Deep RL Beat Calibrated Baselines? A Benchmark Study on Adaptive Resource Control
abstract: A properly calibrated rule-based autoscaler can beat every one of six mainstream deep reinforcement learning (DRL) algorithms on cost across every workload we test - so when, if ever, does DRL actually help? We study this in RLScale-Bench, a reproducible benchmark and evaluation protocol for DRL on adaptive resource control, where an agent allocates compute to a dynamic workload under cost and service-level constraints. We evaluate PPO, DQN, A2C, SAC, TD3, and DDPG under matched architectures, training budgets, and reward functions against a calibrated rule-based baseline across six workload patterns and five seeds (240 runs), instantiate the benchmark on Kubernetes Horizontal Pod Autoscaling, and probe distribution-shift generalization. Three findings challenge common assumptions: (i) the calibrated controller achieves the lowest cost on all six workloads, though it trails the best RL agents on bursty and flash traffic; (ii) discrete-action algorithms outperform continuous-action ones by one to two orders of magnitude in constraint violations due to action-space mismatch; and (iii) no single algorithm dominates across workloads, with rankings shifting by up to four positions. The bottleneck in RL-based resource control is not algorithm selection but baseline calibration, reward engineering, and realistic evaluation protocols.

light_analysis.overview: 发现校准的规则基线在自适应资源控制中成本优于六种主流DRL算法，挑战了DRL的优势假设。
light_analysis.motivation: 自适应资源控制是云计算中的关键问题，目标是在成本和性能约束下动态分配计算资源。现有研究常将深度强化学习（DRL）视为先进方案，但其实际效益缺乏系统的基准验证。论文旨在回答“DRL何时真正有用”，通过构建可复现的基准RLScale-Bench，系统对比多种DRL与校准的基线策略，揭示DRL在资源控制中的真实表现和瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 提出RLScale-Bench基准和评估协议，包括六个工作负载模式（含突发和闪流）、五个随机种子，共240次运行。对比PPO、DQN、A2C、SAC、TD3、DDPG六种DRL算法与经过校准的基于规则的自伸缩基线。所有方法在匹配的架构、训练预算和奖励函数下测试，并实例化到Kubernetes水平Pod自动伸缩，还评估分布偏移下的泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 校准的基线控制器在所有六个工作负载上实现最低成本，但在突发和闪流负载下落后于最佳DRL agent。离散动作算法（如DQN）在约束违规上比连续动作算法（如SAC、TD3）低一到两个数量级。无单一算法在所有负载上占优，排名波动高达四位。结果表明RL资源控制的瓶颈并非算法选择，而是基线校准、奖励工程和评估协议。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过系统性基准研究揭示了深度强化学习在自适应资源控制中的实际效用有限，强调基线校准和评估协议的重要性。贡献包括RLScale-Bench可复现基准、六种算法与基线的全面对比，以及关键发现：校准基线成本最优、离散动作优势显著、无通用算法。工作为DRL在资源控制领域的应用提供了重要参考，未来可探索更复杂的奖励设计和任务分解。

title: ChartFI: Benchmarking Faithfulness and Insightfulness of Chart Descriptions from Multimodal Large Language Models
abstract: Chart descriptions are essential for accessibility, cross-modal retrieval, and assisting readers in extracting insights from complex visualizations. As multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly adopted for automated chart description generation, a critical question arises: how faithfully and insightfully do these models actually describe charts? Current benchmarks fall short on two fronts: existing datasets consist of simple, homogeneous charts paired with shallow, fact-enumerating descriptions; and prevailing metrics fail to capture the multi-faceted nature of description quality. To address these gaps, we present the Chart Faithfulness and Insightfulness Benchmark (ChartFI-Bench). We first summarize four dimensions that characterize high-quality chart descriptions: factual accuracy, salient feature emphasis, domain-informed guidance, and chart-text complementarity. Guided by these dimensions, we construct a high-quality benchmark comprising 896 chart-description pairs, which feature visually complex charts and semantically rich descriptions. Furthermore, we design four aligned evaluation metrics -- Faithfulness, Coverage, Informativeness, and Acuity -- to systematically assess the quality of descriptions across these dimensions. Experiments conducted on mainstream MLLMs demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework and reveal common weaknesses among existing models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ChartFI-Bench基准，从四个维度评估多模态大模型生成图表描述的信实度和洞察力。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前图表描述生成基准存在两大不足：数据集简单同质，描述仅枚举事实；现有指标无法全面评估描述质量。这导致对多模态大模型（MLLMs）生成图表描述的信实度和洞察力缺乏可靠评价，亟需一个覆盖多维度的高质量基准。
light_analysis.method: 首先总结图表描述四个质量维度：事实准确性、突出特征、领域指导、图文互补。据此构建包含896个复杂图表及语义丰富描述的基准数据集。设计四个对齐的评估指标：Faithfulness（事实准确性）、Coverage（覆盖度）、Informativeness（信息量）、Acuity（洞察敏锐度），系统评估各维度质量。
light_analysis.result: 在主流多模态大模型上实验证明，所提框架能有效评估描述质量，并揭示现有模型常见弱点（如对复杂图表事实错误、缺乏领域洞察等）。具体性能指标摘要未明确，但表明框架有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: ChartFI-Bench为图表描述生成提供了标准化评测基准，有助于推动MLLMs在该任务上的信实度和洞察力提升。未来可扩展至更多图表类型和语言，或结合人类评价进一步优化指标。

title: KAN-MLP-Mixer: A comprehensive investigation of the usage of Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs) for improving IMU-based Human Activity Recognition
abstract: Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs) have demonstrated an exceptional ability to learn complex functions on clean, low-dimensional data but struggle to maintain performance on noisy and imperfect real-world datasets. In contrast, conventional multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs) are far more tolerant to noise and computationally efficient. Replacing all MLP components with KANs in HAR models often degrades accuracy and computation efficiency, highlighting an open challenge: how to combine KANs' precision with MLPs' noise robustness and efficiency. To address this, we systematically explore various placements of KAN modules within deep HAR networks and propose a hybrid architecture that strategically synergizes the strengths of both paradigms, which uses a KAN-based input embedding layer, retains MLP layers for intermediate feature mixing, and introduces a specialized LarctanKAN module for final activity classification. Across eight public HAR datasets, the hybrid KAN-MLP model achieves an average macro F1 score relative improvement of 5.33\% compared pure-MLP model, significantly outperforming standalone KAN and MLP baselines. Furthermore, integrating this hybrid strategy into other state-of-the-art HAR architectures consistently boosts their performance. Our findings demonstrate that a carefully orchestrated combination of KAN, MLP, or other conventional neural components yields more robust and accurate HAR models for real-world wearable sensing environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出KAN-MLP混合架构，结合KAN的精度与MLP的噪声鲁棒性，显著提升基于IMU的人体活动识别性能。
light_analysis.motivation: KAN在干净低维数据上表现优异，但在噪声真实世界数据中性能下降；而MLP对噪声容忍度高且计算高效。现有方法直接替换所有MLP为KAN会导致精度和效率下降，亟需探索如何有效结合两者优势以提升HAR模型的鲁棒性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: 系统探索KAN模块在深度HAR网络中的最佳放置位置，提出混合架构：使用KAN输入嵌入层，保留MLP层进行中间特征混合，并引入专门的LarctanKAN模块用于最终活动分类。在八个公开HAR数据集上进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 混合KAN-MLP模型相比纯MLP模型，平均宏F1分数相对提升5.33%，显著优于纯KAN和MLP基线。将该混合策略集成到其他SOTA HAR架构中，同样带来一致的性能提升，验证了其泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了精心设计的KAN、MLP及传统神经组件组合能构建更鲁棒、准确的HAR模型，适用于真实可穿戴传感环境。未来可探索更高效的KAN变体或自适应混合策略，以进一步优化计算成本。

title: ASRU: Activation Steering Meets Reinforcement Unlearning for Multimodal Large Language Models
abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) may memorize sensitive cross-modal information during pretraining, making machine unlearning (MU) crucial. Existing methods typically evaluate unlearning effectiveness based on output deviations, while overlooking the generation quality after unlearning. This can easily lead to hallucinated or rigid responses, thereby affecting the usability and safety of the unlearned model. To address this issue, we propose ASRU, a controllable multimodal unlearning framework that incorporates generation quality as a core evaluation objective. ASRU first induces initial refusal behavior through activation redirection, and then optimizes fine-grained refusal boundaries using a customized reward function, thereby achieving a better trade-off between target knowledge unlearning and model utility. Experiments on Qwen3-VL show that ASRU significantly improves unlearning effectiveness (+24.6%) on average and generation quality (5.8X) on average while effectively preserving model utility, using only a small amount of retained supervision data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ASRU框架，通过激活重定向和强化学习实现可控的多模态大语言模型遗忘，平衡遗忘效果与生成质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在预训练中可能记忆敏感跨模态信息，现有遗忘方法仅关注输出偏差而忽略生成质量，导致幻觉或生硬回应，影响模型可用性和安全性。因此，需要一种将生成质量作为核心目标的遗忘方法。
light_analysis.method: ASRU框架包含两阶段：首先通过激活重定向诱导对敏感信息的初始拒绝行为，然后利用定制奖励函数优化细粒度拒绝边界，从而在目标知识遗忘与模型效用间取得更好权衡。实验在Qwen3-VL上进行，仅使用少量保留监督数据。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen3-VL上，ASRU平均遗忘效果提升24.6%，平均生成质量提升5.8倍，同时有效保持模型效用。
light_analysis.conclusion: ASRU首次将生成质量纳入遗忘评估，实现了遗忘效果与生成质量的双重提升，为多模态遗忘提供了更可控且实用的方案。未来可扩展至更多模型和复杂遗忘场景。

title: On the Stability of Growth in Structural Plasticity
abstract: Standard deep-learning pipelines usually choose the network architecture before training and keep it fixed throughout optimization. In contrast, a model can also be adapted by editing its structure during training, for example by pruning existing hidden-neuron units or growing new ones. Although growth is appealing for adaptive and continual systems, we show that it is not simply the inverse of pruning. Pruning selects among units that have participated in training from the start, whereas growth inserts new units into an already specialized optimization trajectory. We isolate this insertion problem and show that newborn units are often forward-active but backward-starved: they participate in the forward computation, yet receive much weaker gradient signal than incumbent units. This disadvantage is minor in small MLP benchmarks, but becomes clear in harder image-classification settings with a convolutional trunk. In these settings, \textsc{Grow} can achieve high final accuracy during the structural-editing procedure, while \textsc{Prune} is stronger when performance is averaged over the training trajectory or when the final sparse network is retrained from scratch. Interventions targeting optimizer state, insertion, selection, and trainability show that improving the integration of newborn units can improve adaptive performance, but does not automatically produce better final subnetworks. In continual-learning benchmarks stressing plasticity loss, \textsc{Grow} becomes competitive mainly when new units have enough time to integrate. Together, these results suggest that \textsc{Grow} should be evaluated not only as an architecture-search operator, but as a time-sensitive optimization process whose success depends on insertion stability.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示人工神经网络中结构增长（Grow）的稳定性问题，指出新单元前向活跃但梯度信号弱，并证明增长应被视为时间敏感的优化过程。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准深度学习流程在训练前固定网络架构，而动态调整结构（如剪枝和增长）可增强适应性和持续学习能力。尽管增长具有吸引力，但现有研究忽视其与剪枝的本质差异：剪枝选择已参与训练的单元，增长则是在已专业化的优化轨迹中插入新单元。这种插入导致新生儿单元接收的梯度信号远弱于已有单元，尤其是在卷积主干的大规模图像分类任务中。因此，需要深入研究增长的稳定性问题及其对最终性能的影响。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过隔离插入问题，发现新生儿单元存在“前向活跃但反向饥饿”现象：参与前向计算但梯度信号弱。在小型MLP基准中差异较小，但卷积结构的大规模图像分类任务中明显。实验对比Grow和Prune，并干预优化器状态、插入策略、选择机制和可训练性。结果表明，改善新单元的整合能提升自适应性能，但不一定得到更好的最终子网络。
light_analysis.result: 在卷积主干的高难度图像分类设置中，Grow在结构编辑过程中能达到高最终准确率，但在训练轨迹平均性能或从头重新训练剪枝稀疏网络时，Prune更强。在强调塑性损失的持续学习基准中，Grow只有在足够时间让新单元整合时才具有竞争力。这意味着增长的成功取决于插入稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是揭示增长与剪枝的非对称性，并指出新单元插入稳定性是关键。研究显示增长应被视为时间敏感的优化过程，而非简单的架构搜索算子。这为自适应和持续学习系统设计提供了新视角。未来工作可进一步探索优化新单元梯度传播的方法，以增强增长在不同场景下的有效性。

title: TAPIOCA: Why Task- Aware Pruning Improves OOD model Capability
abstract: Recent work has promoted task-aware layer pruning as a way to improve model performance on particular tasks, as shown by TALE. In this paper, we investigate when such improvements occur and why. We show first that, across controlled polynomial regression tasks and large language models, such pruning yields no benefit on in-distribution (ID) data but consistently improves out-of-distribution (OOD) accuracy. We further show empirically that OOD inputs induce layerwise norm and pairwise-distance profiles that deviate from the corresponding ID profiles. This leads to a geometric explanation of task-aware pruning: each task induces a task-adapted geometry, characterized empirically by the representation profiles observed on ID inputs. OOD inputs can introduce a distorted version of the task-adapted geometry. Task-aware pruning identifies layers that create or amplify this distortion; by removing them, it shifts OOD representational norms and pairwise distances toward those observed on the adapted distribution. This realigns OOD inputs with the model's task-adapted geometry and improves performance. We provide causal evidence through controlled distribution shifts and residual-scaling interventions, and demonstrate consistent behavior across model scales.

light_analysis.overview: 探究任务感知剪枝为何提高模型对分布外数据的准确率，提出基于几何解释的理论。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有任务感知剪枝方法（如TALE）能提升特定任务性能，但原因不明。本文研究剪枝何时有效及为何有效，发现剪枝对分布内数据无提升，但对分布外数据一致提升，并提出几何解释。
light_analysis.method: 通过控制多项式回归任务和大型语言模型实验，观察分布外输入在层级的范数和距离分布与分布内不同。任务感知剪枝移除放大这种失真的层，使分布外表示向分布内靠拢。使用残余缩放干预提供因果证据。
light_analysis.result: 任务感知剪枝在分布内数据上无提升，但在分布外数据上准确率一致提升。通过控制分布偏移和残余缩放实验验证因果性，且结果在不同模型规模上一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 任务感知剪枝通过重新对齐分布外输入与任务自适应几何来提升分布外性能，解释剪枝机制，具有理论价值。局限性：需进一步探索其他剪枝策略，未来可扩展到更多任务。

title: Robust Instruction Compliance in Cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) in real-world use cases may need to adapt to external natural language instructions that interrupt ongoing behavior and conflict with long-horizon objectives. However, conditioning rewards on instructions introduces a fundamental failure mode as Bellman updates couple value estimates across instruction contexts, leading to inconsistent values when instructions interrupt macro-actions. We propose Macro-Action Value Correction for Instruction Compliance (MAVIC), which corrects Bellman backups at instruction boundaries by correcting the incoming instruction objective and restoring the continuation value under the current objective. Unlike reward shaping, MAVIC modifies the bootstrapping target itself, enabling consistent value estimation under stochastic instruction switching within a unified policy. We provide theoretical analysis and an actor-critic implementation, and show that MAVIC achieves high instruction compliance while preserving base task performance in increasingly complex cooperative multi-agent environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MAVIC方法，通过修正指令边界的贝尔曼备份，解决多智能体强化学习中自然语言指令中断导致的跨上下文值估计不一致问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实多智能体系统需适应外部自然语言指令，但指令可能中断当前行为并与长期目标冲突。现有基于指令奖励的方法导致贝尔曼更新耦合不同指令上下文的值估计，引发值不一致，尤其在指令中断宏动作时，限制了智能体动态适应能力。
light_analysis.method: MAVIC在指令边界修正贝尔曼备份：修正传入指令目标并恢复当前目标下的延续值，解耦指令上下文。不同于奖励塑造，它直接修改引导目标，在统一策略下实现随机指令切换的一致值估计。采用actor-critic架构实现。
light_analysis.result: 在日益复杂的合作多智能体环境中，MAVIC实现高指令遵从性，同时保持基础任务性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但理论分析和实验表明其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MAVIC为指令中断下的一致值估计提供理论基础和实践方法，适用于需灵活适应外部指令的协同任务。未来可探索自然语言理解模块的集成，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: TokenRatio: Principled Token-Level Preference Optimization via Ratio Matching
abstract: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) is a widely used RL-free method for aligning language models from pairwise preferences, but it models preferences over full sequences even though generation is driven by per-token decisions. Existing token-level extensions typically decompose a sequence-level Bradley-Terry objective across timesteps, leaving per-prefix (state-wise) optimality implicit. We study how to recover token-level preference optimality using only standard sequence-level pairwise comparisons. We introduce Token-level Bregman Preference Optimization (TBPO), which posits a token-level Bradley-Terry preference model over next-token actions conditioned on the prefix, and derive a Bregman-divergence density-ratio matching objective that generalizes the logistic/DPO loss while preserving the optimal policy induced by the token-level model and maintaining DPO-like simplicity. We introduce two instantiations: TBPO-Q, which explicitly learns a lightweight state baseline, and TBPO-A, which removes the baseline through advantage normalization. Across instruction following, helpfulness/harmlessness, and summarization benchmarks, TBPO improves alignment quality and training stability and increases output diversity relative to strong sequence-level and token-level baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TBPO方法，通过Bregman散度比率匹配从序列级偏好中恢复token级最优性，实现更精细的语言模型对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: DPO建模全序列偏好，忽略了逐token决策的局部最优；现有token级扩展隐式处理前缀最优性，缺乏理论基础。本文旨在仅用标准序列级成对比较，恢复token级偏好最优性，从而提升对齐质量与输出多样性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Token-level Bregman Preference Optimization (TBPO)，基于前缀下token级BT模型，推导Bregman散度密度比率匹配目标，泛化DPO损失。两个实例：TBPO-Q学习轻量基线，TBPO-A通过优势归一化移除基线。保持DPO简洁性同时确保token级最优策略。
light_analysis.result: 在指令遵循、有用性/无害性及摘要基准上，TBPO相比强基线（序列级和token级DPO变体）在对齐质量、训练稳定性和输出多样性上均有提升。具体指标摘要未说明，但整体优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: TBPO通过理论驱动的token级偏好优化，改进了对齐效果与模型多样性，为语言模型偏好学习提供了新框架。未来可探索扩展到多轮对话或更复杂偏好场景，但依赖成对偏好数据是其潜在局限。

title: Understanding Sample Efficiency in Predictive Coding
abstract: Predictive Coding (PC) is an influential account of cortical learning. Much of recent work has focused on comparing PC to Backpropagation (BP) to find whether PC offers any advantages. Small scale experiments show that PC enables learning that is more sample efficient and effective in many contexts, though a thorough theoretical understanding of the phenomena remains elusive. To address this, we quantify the efficiency of learning in BP and PC through a metric called ``target alignment'', which measures how closely the change in the output of the network is aligned to the output prediction error. We then derive and empirically validate analytical expressions for target alignment in Deep Linear Networks. We show that learning in PC is more efficient than BP, which is especially pronounced in deep, narrow and pre-trained networks. We also derive exact conditions for guaranteed optimal target alignment in PC and validate our findings through experiments. We study full training trajectories of linear and non-linear models, and find the predicted benefits of PC persist in practice even when some assumptions are violated. Overall, this work provides a mechanistic understanding of the higher learning efficiency observed for PC over BP in previous works, and can guide how PC should be parametrised to learn most effectively.

light_analysis.overview: 量化预测编码相对于反向传播的样本效率优势，通过目标对齐度量揭示其机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 预测编码（PC）作为皮层学习理论，近期研究关注其与反向传播（BP）的比较。小规模实验表明PC在样本效率和有效性上优于BP，但缺乏理论理解。因此，需要量化PC和BP的学习效率，解释PC为何更高效，并指导其参数设置。
light_analysis.method: 提出'目标对齐'度量，衡量网络输出变化与输出预测误差的匹配程度。推导并实验验证深度线性网络中目标对齐的解析表达式。分析关键因素：深度、宽度和预训练。推导PC保证最优目标对齐的精确条件。通过线性和非线性模型的完整训练轨迹验证。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明PC学习效率高于BP，在深、窄和预训练网络中优势尤为明显。验证了推导的目标对齐表达式，发现即使部分假设不成立，PC的预测优势依然存在。证明了PC在样本效率上的理论优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提供了PC学习效率更高的机制性理解，解释了前人观察到的现象。明确了PC参数化方式以最大化学习效果，具有理论指导价值。未来可扩展至更复杂架构。

title: A Resilient Solution for Sewer Overflow Monitoring across Cloud and Edge
abstract: Aging combined sewer systems in many historical cities are increasingly stressed by extreme rainfall events, which can trigger combined sewer overflows (CSO) with significant environmental and public health impacts. Forecasting the filling dynamics of overflow basins is critical for anticipating capacity exceedance and enabling timely preventive actions for CSO. We present a web-based demonstrator that integrates Deep Learning forecasting methods in both cloud and edge settings into an interactive monitoring dashboard for overflow monitoring, resilient to network outages. A video showcase is available online (https://cloud.bht-berlin.de/index.php/s/b9xt4T3SdiLBiFZ).
comment: 3 pages, 6 figures, accepted at 35th International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence 2026 (IJCAI-ECAI 2026), Demonstrations Track. URL: https://riwwer.demo.calgo-lab.de

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种结合云端与边缘计算的深度学习预测方法，用于合流制污水溢流监控，并构建具有网络中断鲁棒性的交互式仪表盘。
light_analysis.motivation: 许多历史城市的老化合流制污水系统在极端降雨事件下面临压力，容易引发合流制污水溢流（CSO），对环境和公共健康造成严重影响。预测溢流池的填充动态对于提前预警容量超限和采取预防措施至关重要。现有监控系统可能因网络中断而失效，亟需一种鲁棒的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种基于深度学习预测方法的解决方案，将预测模型同时部署在云端和边缘端，构建交互式监控仪表盘。通过云端和边缘的协同工作，在断网时边缘端仍可进行本地预测，保证系统鲁棒性。具体技术细节（如模型架构、数据集）摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验结果或性能指标。论文开发了网络演示器（视频展示），证明系统在实际场景中的可行性。与基线方法的对比数据未提及，但强调了在断网情况下的持续预测能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为城市污水处理系统提供了一种鲁棒的CSO监控方案，结合深度学习和边缘计算，增强了系统对网络故障的抵抗力。其学术价值在于探索了云边协同预测在基础设施监控中的应用；实际价值在于帮助城市管理者及时应对溢流风险。未来工作可包括更多实际部署验证和性能量化评估。

title: Litespark Inference For CPUs: Ultra-Fast SIMD Framework for Ternary (1.58-bit) Language Models
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have transformed artificial intelligence, but their computational requirements remain prohibitive for most users. Standard inference demands expensive datacenter GPUs or cloud API access, leaving over one billion personal computers underutilized for AI workloads. Ternary models offer a path forward: their weights are constrained to {-1, 0, +1}, theoretically eliminating the need for floating-point multiplication. However, existing frameworks fail to exploit this structure, treating ternary models as dense floating-point networks. We address this gap with custom SIMD kernels that replace matrix multiplication with simple addition and subtraction operations, targeting the integer dot product instructions available on modern CPUs. Our implementation, Litespark-Inference, is pip-installable and integrates directly with Hugging-Face, achieving 18.15x higher throughput, 7.15x faster time-to-first-token and 6.03x memory reduction compared to standard PyTorch inference on Apple Silicon, with comparable or higher throughput speedups up to 95.81x on Intel and AMD processors.

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用CPU SIMD整数指令加速三元语言模型推理的框架，消除浮点乘法，性能大幅提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型计算需求高，依赖昂贵的GPU或云API，而全球超过十亿台个人电脑的CPU未被充分利用。三元模型的权重限制在{-1,0,+1}，理论上可免去浮点乘法，但现有框架仍将其视为稠密浮点网络，未能利用其结构优势。因此需要一种专门针对CPU的推理框架，以释放三元模型的潜力，降低AI部署门槛。
light_analysis.method: 提出Litespark-Inference框架，利用自定义SIMD内核，将矩阵乘法替换为简单的加减法操作，并针对现代CPU的整数点积指令进行优化。该框架可直接通过pip安装，并与HuggingFace集成，支持Apple Silicon、Intel和AMD处理器。核心创新在于利用三元权重的离散特性，通过SIMD并行处理实现高效推理。
light_analysis.result: 在Apple Silicon上，相比标准PyTorch推理，吞吐量提升18.15倍，首令牌时间加快7.15倍，内存减少6.03倍。在Intel和AMD处理器上，吞吐量提升高达95.81倍。这些结果证明了SIMD优化对于三元模型在CPU上高效推理的有效性，显著扩大了LLM的可用硬件范围。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文展示了通过定制SIMD内核，三元语言模型可以在普通CPU上实现超高效推理，大幅降低计算成本和硬件依赖。该工作具有重要实践价值，使得个人电脑也能运行LLM，促进AI民主化。未来工作可扩展至更多三元模型架构和不同指令集，进一步优化跨平台性能。

title: Self-Attention as Transport: Limits of Symmetric Spectral Diagnostics
abstract: When a language model processes a hallucinated response, its attention routing tends to fail in one of two shapes: over-concentrating on a narrow set of positions, or spreading so diffusely that relevance is diluted, and the shape of the failure carries diagnostic signal. We study these shapes as a diagnostic characterization, computed from attention matrices under \emph{forced scoring} of benchmark-labeled responses rather than during live generation. A widely used family of spectral methods analyzes the symmetric component of the degree-normalized attention operator, which governs transport \emph{capacity}; we prove that every transpose-invariant spectral diagnostic of this operator is structurally \emph{orientation-blind} (it cannot distinguish an operator from its transpose, and therefore cannot detect information-flow direction), with a converse to the blindness theorem bounding any Lipschitz diagnostic's transpose sensitivity by the asymmetry coefficient $G$.   Pairing this with a closed-form bipartite-Cheeger landscape for canonical causal architectures, we show that uniform causal attention satisfies an $n$-independent floor $φ\ge 1/5$, while window attention pierces the floor as $O(w/n)$; failure modes are shape-different, not just value-different. This floor is an idealized-architecture benchmark, not an empirical attractor: the fraction of real attention heads that pierce it is itself an architectural signature. The resulting two-axis diagnostic ($φ$ for capacity, $G$ for direction) yields a falsifiable polarity prediction: bottleneck- and diffuse-dominated benchmarks should exhibit opposite polarity. Under length-controlled evaluation, transport features retain interpretable signal (0.62-0.84 LC-AUROC) across the tested decoder-only, encoder-only, and encoder-decoder models, with polarity reversing as predicted between HaluEval and MedHallu.
comment: 48 pages, 6 figures, 7 tables; 81-page online supplement (proofs, additional experiments, dataset statistics) as an ancillary file

light_analysis.overview: 证明对称谱诊断无法检测注意力方向，提出基于传输容量和方向的两轴诊断方法，实现可解释的幻觉检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言模型处理幻觉响应时，注意力路由呈现过度集中或过度扩散两种失败形状，但现有谱方法仅分析对称成分，忽略信息流动方向，限制了诊断能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出传输诊断轴：容量φ（Cheeger常数）和方向G（不对称系数）。证明所有转置不变谱诊断是方向盲的，且因果注意力满足φ≥1/5，窗口注意力可降至O(w/n)。通过强迫评分计算注意力矩阵，提取两轴特征。
light_analysis.result: 在长度控制评估下，传输特征在decoder-only、encoder-only和encoder-decoder模型上达到0.62-0.84 LC-AUROC。极性在HaluEval（正）与MedHallu（负）之间反转，验证了可证伪的预测。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该诊断框架揭示了对称谱诊断的根本局限，提供了可解释的两轴检测方法，可用于区分幻觉失败模式，并具有可证伪的极性预测能力，为幻觉检测提供新方向。

title: Hybrid Iterative Neural Low-Regularity Integrator for Nonlinear Dispersive Equations
abstract: We propose HIN-LRI, a hybrid framework that augments a classical numerical solver with a neural operator trained to correct the solver's structured truncation error. A base low-regularity integrator provides a consistent first-order approximation to nonlinear dispersive PDEs, while a lightweight neural network, operating on a low-dimensional latent manifold, learns the residual defect that analytical methods cannot close. An explicit time-step scaling on the neural correction ensures that its Lipschitz contribution remains $\mathcal{O}(τ)$, yielding a Gronwall stability factor bounded uniformly in the step size and independent of the spatial resolution. The network is trained end-to-end through a solver-in-the-loop objective that unrolls the full iteration and penalises trajectory error in a Bourgain-type norm, aligning learning with multi-step solver dynamics rather than isolated one-step targets. Under stated assumptions, the global error satisfies $C(\varepsilon_{net}+δ)\,τ^γ\ln(1/τ)$, where $\varepsilon_{net}$ measures the network approximation quality and $δ$ the training shortfall. Experiments on three dispersive benchmarks with rough data show that HIN-LRI improves accuracy over analytical integrators, splitting methods, and neural PDE surrogates, with stable spatial refinement, effective out-of-distribution transfer, and modest online overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HIN-LRI，一种混合数值-神经框架，通过轻量神经网络校正低规则性积分器的截断误差，实现高精度、稳定且高效的非线性色散方程求解。
light_analysis.motivation: 非线性色散方程在低规则性条件下，传统数值方法（如解析积分器、分裂方法）存在结构截断误差，精度受限；而纯神经代理缺乏可解释性和稳定性保证。现有方法难以同时满足高精度、稳定性和计算效率，尤其对于粗糙数据。
light_analysis.method: HIN-LRI以低规则性积分器为基础，提供一致一阶近似；轻量神经网络在低维潜在流形上学习残差缺陷。通过显式时间步长缩放确保Lipschitz贡献为O(τ)，获得独立于分辨率的稳定性因子。网络采用求解器循环训练，在Bourgain范数中惩罚轨迹误差，对齐多步动态而非单步目标。
light_analysis.result: 在三个粗糙数据色散基准上，HIN-LRI精度优于解析积分器、分裂方法和神经PDE代理，具有稳定的空间细化、有效的分布外转移和适度在线开销。全局误差界为C(ε_net+δ)τ^γ ln(1/τ)，其中ε_net和δ分别表示网络逼近与训练误差。
light_analysis.conclusion: HIN-LRI有效融合数值与学习方法，在低规则性粗糙数据场景下提供稳定高效的PDE求解方案。学术上建立了混合方法的误差理论，应用上适用于需要高精度和鲁棒性的科学计算。未来可扩展至其他类型PDE或更高阶格式。

title: Self-Prompting Small Language Models for Privacy-Sensitive Clinical Information Extraction
abstract: Clinical named entity recognition from dental progress notes is challenging because documentation is highly unstructured, domain-specific, and often privacy-sensitive.
