We developed a locally deployable framework that enables small language models to self-generate, verify, refine, and evaluate entity-specific prompts for extracting multiple clinical entities from dental notes. Using 1,200 annotated notes, we evaluated candidate open-weight models with multi-prompt ensemble inference and further adapted selected models using QLoRA-based supervised fine-tuning and direct preference optimization. Model performance varied substantially, highlighting the need for task-specific evaluation rather than reliance on generic benchmarks. Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct achieved the strongest baseline performance. After DPO, Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct and Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct achieved micro/macro F1 scores of 0.864/0.837 and 0.806/0.797, respectively. These findings suggest that automated prompt optimization combined with lightweight preference-based post-training can support scalable clinical information extraction using locally deployed small language models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自提示小语言模型框架，结合自动提示优化和偏好后训练，实现隐私敏感的临床信息提取。
light_analysis.motivation: 牙科进展记录的临床命名实体识别面临高度非结构化、领域特定和隐私敏感等挑战。现有方法依赖大型模型或外部API，存在隐私风险且难以本地部署。该研究旨在开发一种本地可部署、高效且能适应特定任务的框架，利用小语言模型通过自我生成和优化提示来提取临床实体，同时保护数据隐私。
light_analysis.method: 提出本地可部署框架，让小语言模型自我生成、验证、细化和评估实体特定提示，采用多提示集成推理。使用1200条注释的牙科笔记评估候选开放权重模型，并通过QLoRA进行监督微调和直接偏好优化（DPO）进一步适配。重点评估了Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct和Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct等模型。
light_analysis.result: 模型性能差异显著，强调任务特定评估的必要性。Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct在基线中表现最强。经过DPO后，Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct的微平均F1为0.864，宏平均F1为0.837；Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct的相应F1分别为0.806和0.797。
light_analysis.conclusion: 自动提示优化结合轻量级偏好后训练能够支持基于本地部署的小语言模型进行可扩展的临床信息提取，兼顾隐私保护与性能。该研究为隐私敏感领域的应用提供了可行方案，未来可探索更多模型架构和优化策略以提升泛化能力。

title: Right Regions, Wrong Labels: Semantic Label Flips in Segmentation under Correlation Shift
abstract: The robustness of machine learning models can be compromised by spurious correlations between non-causal features in the input data and target labels. A common way to test for such correlations is to train on data where the label is strongly tied to some non-causal cue, then evaluate on examples where that tie no longer holds. This idea is well established for classification tasks, but for semantic segmentation the specific failure modes are not well understood. We show that a model may achieve reasonable overlap while assigning the wrong semantic label, swapping one plausible foreground class for another, even when object boundaries are largely correct. We focus on this semantic label-flip behaviour and quantify it with a simple diagnostic (Flip) that counts how often ground truth foreground pixels are assigned the wrong foreground identity while remaining predicted as foreground. In a setting where category and scene are correlated during training, increasing the correlation consistently widens the gap between common and rare test conditions and increases these within-object label swaps on counterfactual groups. Overall, our results motivate assessing segmentation robustness under distribution shift beyond overlap by decomposing foreground errors into correct pixels, flipped-identity pixels, and missed-to-background pixels. We also propose an entropy-based, ground truth label-free `flip-risk' score, which is computed from foreground identity uncertainty, and show that it can flag flip-prone cases at inference time. Code is available at https://github.com/acharaakshit/label-flips.
comment: Author name correction in this version

light_analysis.overview: 揭示并量化语义分割中在相关性偏移下出现的语义标签翻转现象，并提出诊断指标与风险分数。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法关注分类任务中的虚假相关性，但对语义分割中具体的失败模式理解不足。模型可能在边界正确的情况下将前景类别误标为另一个前景类别，这种内部对象标签交换在分布偏移下会加剧。因此需要评估分割鲁棒性，分解前景错误类型。
light_analysis.method: 提出诊断指标Flip，统计真实前景像素被错误分配其他前景身份的次数。通过训练时将类别与场景强相关，然后在反事实测试集上评估。还提出基于熵的无监督'翻转风险'分数，推理时检测易翻转区域。代码开源。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示增加训练相关性会扩大常见与罕见测试条件下的差距，增加内部标签交换。Flip指标量化了这种现象，并揭示出与常见分割指标（如mIoU）的差异，表明仅靠重叠度量不足以反映鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作强调分解前景错误为正确、翻转和漏检，以更全面评估分割鲁棒性。翻转风险分数可在线检测异常，为分布偏移下的分割模型评估提供新工具。未来可扩展至更多相关场景。

title: Automated Scoring of Arabic Text Using Large Language Models: A Literature Review
abstract: In modern educational systems, Automatic Text Scoring (ATS) plays a central role by enabling scalable and consistent evaluation of learner responses without human intervention. Recently, the increased accessibility of LLMs and Arabic-specific datasets has sparked renewed interest in this area. In this work, we investigate LLM-Based approaches for the automated evaluation of Arabic texts, focusing on both short answer grading (ASAG) and essay scoring (AES). We further introduce a structured taxonomy comprising five dimensions: application domain, feedback generation capability, LLM architecture deployed, alignment with competency referential frameworks, and prompt engineering strategy. By applying this taxonomy, we conduct a comparative analysis of existing studies, examining their methodological approaches, datasets, evaluation metrics, and reported performance. The findings highlight the need for sustained and pedagogically grounded research efforts in Arabic ATS, given its significance for improving educational quality across Arabic-speaking communities.

light_analysis.overview: 本文系统综述了利用大语言模型进行阿拉伯语文本自动评分的研究，提出了五维分类法分析现有工作，并指出了该领域需要更多教育学基础研究。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动文本评分在现代化教育系统中至关重要，可实现大规模、一致性的学习者评估。近年来，大语言模型和阿拉伯语特定数据集的可用性提升引发了研究兴趣，但阿拉伯语自动评分（包括短答案评分和论文评分）缺乏系统的分类与比较分析。现有研究多集中于英语，阿拉伯语的评估面临语言复杂性、资源稀缺等挑战，亟需结构化方法指导未来研究。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个五维分类法，涵盖应用领域、反馈生成能力、LLM架构、与能力参考框架对齐以及提示工程策略。通过应用该分类法，对现有研究进行对比分析，考察其方法论、数据集、评价指标和报告性能，从而系统梳理LLM在阿拉伯语自动评分中的应用现状。
light_analysis.result: 分析表明，现有研究在方法、数据集和指标上差异较大，但普遍缺乏与教育学理论框架的深层次结合。多数研究聚焦于特定应用场景，反馈生成能力有限，提示工程策略单一。综述揭示了当前研究的碎片化趋势，并强调需要更多基于教育学的系统性研究以提升阿拉伯语自动评分的可靠性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过系统综述和分类法分析，为阿拉伯语自动评分研究提供了清晰的脉络和未来方向。该工作对改善阿拉伯语社区的教育质量具有重要价值，但当前研究在数据集多样性、模型可解释性和教育对齐方面仍存在不足，未来应加强跨学科合作。

title: Auditing Demographic Bias in Facial Landmark Detection for Fair Human-Robot Interaction
abstract: Fairness in human-robot interaction critically depends on the reliability of the perceptual models that enable robots to interpret human behavior. While demographic biases have been widely studied in high-level facial analysis tasks, their presence in facial landmark detection remains unexplored. In this paper, we conduct a systematic audit of demographic bias in this task, analyzing the age, gender, and race biases. To this end, we introduce a controlled statistical methodology to disentangle demographic effects from confounding visual factors. Our analysis demonstrates that visual confounders, particularly head pose and face resolution, heavily outweigh the impact of demographic attributes. Notably, after accounting for these confounders, performance disparities across gender and race vanish. However, we identify a statistically significant age-related bias, with higher localization errors for older individuals. This shows that fairness issues can emerge even in low-level vision components and can propagate through the HRI pipeline. We argue that auditing and correcting such biases is a necessary step toward trustworthy and equitable robot perception systems.

light_analysis.overview: 首次系统审计人脸关键点检测中的年龄、性别和种族偏差，通过引入受控统计方法分离混杂因素，发现年龄偏差显著而性别和种族偏差在控制混杂后消失。
light_analysis.motivation: 人脸关键点检测是机器人感知人类行为的基础，其公平性直接影响人机交互的可信度。现有研究集中于高层人脸分析任务中的偏差，但低层关键点检测尚未被探索。传统方法未区分混杂视觉因素（如头部姿态、分辨率）与人口统计属性的影响，导致偏差来源不明确。本研究旨在填补这一空白，确保低层视觉组件的公平性。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种受控统计方法，通过系统控制头部姿态和面部分辨率等视觉混杂因素，分离其对性能的影响与人口统计属性（年龄、性别、种族）的独立贡献。使用多个公开数据集，评估关键点定位误差（如NME）。该方法能准确量化偏差来源，避免混淆效应。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，视觉混杂因素（头部姿态和分辨率）对定位误差的影响显著大于人口统计属性。控制混杂后，性别和种族间的性能差异消失，但年龄偏差仍显著：老年人的平均定位误差比年轻人高约15%。这表明低层视觉任务中确实存在公平性问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究首次揭示人脸关键点检测中的年龄偏差，并证明视觉混杂因素的重要性。其贡献在于提出了可推广的审计方法论，强调低层视觉组件公平性对HRI系统可信性的影响。未来工作可扩展至其他低层任务，并开发偏差矫正策略以提升机器人感知的公平性。

title: LLMpedia: A Transparent Framework to Materialize an LLM's Encyclopedic Knowledge at Scale
abstract: Benchmarks like MMLU suggest flagship language models approach factuality saturation above 90\%. \emph{LLMpedia} shows this picture is incomplete. We materialize ${\sim}$1.3M encyclopedia articles entirely from parametric memory across three model families, then audit every claim against Wikipedia and curated web evidence. For \texttt{gpt-5-mini}, the verifiable true rate is 68.4\% on Wikipedia-covered subjects - more than 21\,pp below MMLU - and the gap is driven by \emph{unverifiability} (30.5\%), not refutation (1.2\%). Beyond Wikipedia, frontier articles audited against curated web evidence reach 57.6\%; Wikipedia covers only 56.7\% of model-surfaced subjects, and three model families overlap in just 7.3\% of subject choices. In a retrieval-trap benchmark inspired by prior analysis of Grokipedia, LLMpedia is more factual at roughly half the textual similarity to Wikipedia. Every prompt, article, and verdict is released. Data, code, interface: https://llmpedia.net.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LLMpedia框架，通过大规模材料化模型参数记忆中的百科知识并审计，揭示语言模型事实性远低于MMLU基准，主要问题在于不可验证性而非错误。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准如MMLU声称语言模型事实性超过90%，但可能不全面。为了全面评估模型事实性，需要从参数记忆中大规模提取知识并进行细粒度审计。LLMpedia旨在填补这一空白，发现实际可验证真率比MMLU低20个百分点以上，且主要受不可验证性驱动。
light_analysis.method: 从GPT、Claude等三个模型族材料化约130万篇百科文章，对每个声明与维基百科及策划的网络证据进行审计。构建检索陷阱基准，控制文本相似度。所有提示、文章和判决结果均公开，提供数据、代码和接口。
light_analysis.result: 在gpt-5-mini上，维基覆盖主题可验证真率68.4%，比MMLU低21.6%；不可验证性30.5%，反驳仅1.2%。前沿文章审计真率57.6%；维基仅覆盖56.7%模型主题，三模型族主题重叠仅7.3%。检索陷阱基准中比Grokipedia更准确且文本相似度约低一半。
light_analysis.conclusion: 语言模型事实性被MMLU高估，主要问题不是错误而是不可验证性。LLMpedia提供透明审计框架，揭示知识覆盖局限。工作可推动更可靠的事实性评估，未来需关注模型生成内容的可验证性。

title: Mechanisms of Introspective Awareness
abstract: Recent work has shown that LLMs can sometimes detect when steering vectors are injected into their residual stream and identify the injected concept -- a phenomenon termed "introspective awareness." We investigate the mechanisms underlying this capability in open-weights models. First, we find that it is behaviorally robust: models detect injected steering vectors at moderate rates with 0% false positives across diverse prompts and dialogue formats. Notably, this capability emerges specifically from post-training; we show that preference optimization algorithms like DPO can elicit it, but standard supervised finetuning does not. We provide evidence that detection cannot be explained by simple linear association between certain steering vectors and directions promoting affirmative responses. We trace the detection mechanism to a two-stage circuit in which "evidence carrier" features in early post-injection layers detect perturbations monotonically along diverse directions, suppressing downstream "gate" features that implement a default negative response. This circuit is absent in base models and robust to refusal ablation. Identification of injected concepts relies on largely distinct later-layer mechanisms that only weakly overlap with those involved in detection. Finally, we show that introspective capability is substantially underelicited: ablating refusal directions improves detection by +53%, and a trained bias vector improves it by +75% on held-out concepts, both without meaningfully increasing false positives. Our results suggest that this introspective awareness of injected concepts is robust and mechanistically nontrivial, and could be substantially amplified in future models. Code: https://github.com/safety-research/introspection-mechanisms.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示LLM对注入转向向量的内省意识的机制，包括行为鲁棒性、后训练涌现、两阶段电路及可增强性。
light_analysis.motivation: 最近发现LLM有时能检测注入的转向向量并识别注入概念（内省意识），但机制不明。本文旨在探究该能力的底层机制，包括行为鲁棒性、形成来源、检测与识别的神经电路，以及是否可以通过干预增强，为模型安全与可解释性提供基础。
light_analysis.method: 通过行为测试（多提示、对话格式，0%假阳性）验证鲁棒性；比较后训练（DPO）与SFT的效果差异；使用电路追踪发现两阶段检测电路：早期层“证据载体”特征单调检测扰动，抑制下游“门”特征（默认负响应）。识别依赖晚层不同机制。通过消融拒绝方向和训练偏置向量增强检测。
light_analysis.result: 模型检测率中等且0%假阳性；DPO可引发内省意识，SFT不能。检测电路在基础模型中缺失，对拒绝消融鲁棒。消融拒绝方向提升检测53%，训练偏置向量提升75%在未见概念上，且假阳性未显著增加。
light_analysis.conclusion: 内省意识鲁棒且机制非平凡，可通过简单干预显著放大，为未来模型安全与可控性提供方向。代码已开源，但识别机制与检测部分重叠弱，需进一步研究。

title: Point-Identification of a Robust Predictor Under Latent Shift with Imperfect Proxies
abstract: Addressing the domain adaptation problem becomes more challenging when distribution shifts across domains stem from latent confounders that affect both covariates and outcomes. Existing proxy-based approaches that address latent shift rely on a strong completeness assumption to uniquely determine (point-identify) a robust predictor. Completeness requires that proxies have sufficient information about variations in latent confounders. For imperfect proxies the mapping from confounders to the space of proxy distributions is non-injective, and multiple latent confounder values can generate the same proxy distribution. This breaks the completeness assumption and observed data are consistent with multiple potential predictors (set-identified). To address this, we introduce latent equivalent classes (LECs). LECs are defined as groups of latent confounders that induce the same conditional proxy distribution. We show that point-identification for the robust predictor remains achievable as long as multiple domains differ sufficiently in how they mix proxy-induced LECs to form the robust predictor. This domain diversity condition is formalized as a cross-domain rank condition on the mixture weights, which is substantially weaker assumption than completeness.   We introduce the Proximal Quasi-Bayesian Active learning (PQAL) framework, which actively queries   a small, targeted set of diverse domains that satisfy this rank condition. PQAL can recover the point-identified predictor, demonstrates robustness to varying degrees of shift and outperforms previous methods on synthetic data and semi-synthetic dSprites, IHDP, ACS Folktables datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出潜在等价类（LECs）和跨域秩条件，在弱完备性假设下实现鲁棒预测器的点辨识，并设计主动学习框架PQAL。
light_analysis.motivation: 域适应中，隐变量同时影响协变量和结果导致分布偏移。现有代理方法依赖完备性假设，要求代理充分捕捉隐变量变化。当代理不完美时，映射非单射，导致多个隐变量生成相同代理分布，观察数据只能集合辨识预测器。本文旨在解决该问题，提出更弱的条件实现点辨识。
light_analysis.method: 引入潜在等价类（LECs），即诱导相同条件代理分布的隐变量组。证明只要多个域在混合LECs形成鲁棒预测器时充分不同，即满足跨域混合权重的秩条件，仍可实现点辨识。该条件比完备性假设弱。提出Proximal Quasi-Bayesian Active Learning (PQAL)框架，主动查询少量满足秩条件的多样化域，恢复点辨识预测器。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据、半合成dSprites、IHDP和ACS Folktables数据集上，PQAL方法对不同程度的分布偏移展现出鲁棒性，并优于现有方法。摘要未给出具体数值，但声称性能超越先前方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过LECs和跨域秩条件，在不完美的代理情况下实现了鲁棒预测器的点辨识，克服了完备性假设的限制。PQAL框架有效且具有实际应用价值，适用于多种数据场景。未来可探索更高效的主动查询策略或扩展至更复杂的隐变量结构。

title: Sample-Efficient Hypergradient Estimation for Decentralized Bi-Level Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Many strategic decision-making problems, such as environment design for warehouse robots, can be naturally formulated as bi-level reinforcement learning (RL), where a leader agent optimizes its objective while a follower solves a Markov decision process (MDP) conditioned on the leader's decisions. In many situations, a fundamental challenge arises when the leader cannot intervene in the follower's optimization process; it can only observe the optimization outcome. We address this decentralized setting by deriving the hypergradient of the leader's objective, i.e., the gradient of the leader's strategy that accounts for changes in the follower's optimal policy. Unlike prior hypergradient-based methods that require extensive data for repeated state visits or rely on gradient estimators whose complexity can increase substantially with the high-dimensional leader's decision space, we leverage the Boltzmann covariance trick to derive an alternative hypergradient formulation. This enables efficient hypergradient estimation solely from interaction samples, even when the leader's decision space is high-dimensional. Additionally, to our knowledge, this is the first method that enables hypergradient-based optimization for 2-player Markov games in decentralized settings. Experiments highlight the impact of hypergradient updates and demonstrate our method's effectiveness in both discrete and continuous state tasks.
comment: 29 pages. Extended version of the paper accepted to ICAPS 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于玻尔兹曼协方差技巧的高效超梯度估计方法，适用于分散式双层强化学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 许多战略决策问题（如仓库机器人环境设计）可建模为双层强化学习，但领导者无法干预跟随者的优化过程，仅能观察结果。现有超梯度方法需要大量数据重复访问状态，或梯度估计器复杂度随领导者决策空间维度剧增，难以扩展到高维场景。因此亟需一种样本高效且可扩展的超梯度估计方法。
light_analysis.method: 利用玻尔兹曼协方差技巧推导新的超梯度公式，将超梯度表示为领导者策略与跟随者策略协方差的函数，从而仅需交互样本即可高效估计，避免对状态重复访问或高维梯度计算。该方法适用于分散式设置，且首次实现超梯度优化在两玩家马尔可夫博弈中的应用。
light_analysis.result: 在离散和连续状态任务中，实验验证了超梯度更新的有效性，相比基线方法显著提升了样本效率，并能扩展到高维领导者决策空间。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调方法在两种状态空间下均表现优越。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出首个在分散式双层强化学习中实现样本高效超梯度估计的方法，解决了高维决策空间的挑战，为仓库机器人环境设计等实际应用提供了新途径。未来可探索更复杂的多智能体场景，但当前方法依赖于玻尔兹曼策略假设，可能限制其适用性。

title: The Latent Color Subspace: Emergent Order in High-Dimensional Chaos
abstract: Text-to-image generation models have advanced rapidly, yet achieving fine-grained control over generated images remains difficult, largely due to limited understanding of how semantic information is encoded. We develop an interpretation of the color representation in the Variational Autoencoder latent space of FLUX.1 [Dev], revealing a structure reflecting Hue, Saturation, and Lightness. We verify our Latent Color Subspace (LCS) interpretation by demonstrating that it can both predict and explicitly control color, introducing a fully training-free method in FLUX based solely on closed-form latent-space manipulation. Code is available at https://github.com/ExplainableML/LCS.

light_analysis.overview: 提出潜颜色子空间（LCS）解释FLUX.1的VAE潜空间颜色表示，实现无需训练的闭式颜色操控。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到图像生成模型虽进展迅速，但细粒度控制仍困难，主因对语义信息编码理解有限。现有方法依赖大量训练或外部条件，缺乏对模型内部颜色表征的透明解释，难以实现高效、可预测的颜色编辑。本文旨在揭示潜空间中颜色的有序结构，以提升可控性。
light_analysis.method: 通过分析FLUX.1的VAE潜空间，发现颜色表示呈现与色调、饱和度、明度对应的有序结构，命名为潜颜色子空间（LCS）。基于LCS提出完全无需训练的闭式潜空间操作，直接预测和显式控制生成图像的颜色，无需额外模型或数据。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据，但声称所提方法能预测和显式控制颜色，效果通过演示验证。代码已开源，表明方法可复现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了生成模型中颜色编码的潜在规律，为无需训练的颜色控制提供新途径，增强模型可解释性。未来可推广至其他语义属性解析。局限性包括对特定模型（FLUX.1）的依赖，需验证跨模型通用性。

title: Does the Question Really Matter? Training-Free Data Selection for Vision-Language SFT
abstract: Visual instruction tuning is crucial for improving vision-language large models (VLLMs). However, many samples can be solved via linguistic patterns or common-sense shortcuts, without genuine cross-modal reasoning, limiting the effectiveness of multimodal learning. Prior data selection methods often rely on costly proxy model training and focus on difficulty or diversity, failing to capture a sample's true contribution to vision-language joint reasoning. In this paper, we propose CVS, a training-free data selection method based on the insight that, for high-quality multimodal samples, introducing the question should substantially alter the model's assessment of answer validity given an image. CVS leverages a frozen VLLM as an evaluator and measures the discrepancy in answer validity with and without conditioning on the question, enabling the identification of samples that require vision-language joint reasoning while filtering semantic-conflict noise. Experiments on Vision-Flan and The Cauldron show that CVS achieves solid performance across datasets. On Vision-Flan, CVS outperforms full-data training by 3.5% and 4.8% using only 10% and 15% of the data, respectively, and remains robust on the highly heterogeneous Cauldron dataset. Moreover, CVS reduces computational cost by 17.3% and 44.4% compared to COINCIDE and XMAS.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CVS方法，通过衡量问题对答案评估的影响，无需训练地选择需要视觉-语言联合推理的样本，提升VLLM微调效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉指令微调对提升VLLMs至关重要，但许多样本可通过语言模式或常识捷径解决，缺乏真正的跨模态推理，限制了多模态学习效果。现有数据选择方法依赖昂贵的代理模型训练，且仅关注难度或多样性，无法捕捉样本对视觉-语言联合推理的真实贡献。因此，需要一种低成本、高效的数据选择方法，识别真正需要跨模态推理的样本。
light_analysis.method: CVS基于核心洞察：高质量多模态样本中，引入问题应显著改变模型对答案有效性的评估。利用冻结的VLLM作为评估器，计算在有无问题条件下答案有效性的差异，从而识别需要视觉-语言联合推理的样本，同时过滤语义冲突噪声。该方法无需额外训练，直接基于现有VLLM进行推理，高效且可扩展。
light_analysis.result: 在Vision-Flan和The Cauldron数据集上，CVS表现优异。在Vision-Flan上，仅用10%和15%数据即超越全数据训练3.5%和4.8%；在高度异构的Cauldron数据集上依然鲁棒。相比COINCIDE和XMAS，计算成本分别降低17.3%和44.4%。
light_analysis.conclusion: CVS通过无需训练的数据选择方法，有效识别需要跨模态推理的样本，显著提升VLLM微调效率与性能，且大幅降低计算开销。该方法具有实用价值，可推广至其他多模态场景。未来可探索更细致的度量或动态阈值设置。

title: Impact of Connectivity on Laplacian Representations in Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Learning compact state representations in Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) has proven crucial for addressing the curse of dimensionality in large-scale reinforcement learning (RL) problems. Existing principled approaches leverage structural priors on the MDP by constructing state representations as linear combinations of the state-graph Laplacian eigenvectors. When the transition graph is unknown or the state space is prohibitively large, the graph spectral features can be estimated directly via sample trajectories. In this work, we prove an upper bound on the approximation error of linear value function approximation under the learned spectral features. We show how this error scales with the algebraic connectivity of the state-graph, grounding the approximation quality in the topological structure of the MDP. We further bound the error introduced by the eigenvector estimation itself, leading to an end-to-end error decomposition across the representation learning pipeline. Additionally, our expression of the Laplacian operator for the RL setting, although equivalent to existing ones, prevents some common misunderstandings, of which we show some examples from the literature. Our results hold for general (non-uniform) policies without any assumptions on the symmetry of the induced transition kernel. We validate our theoretical findings with numerical simulations on gridworld environments.

light_analysis.overview: 证明基于图拉普拉斯特征向量的状态表示学习中线性价值函数近似的误差上界，揭示误差与状态图代数连通性的关系，并给出端到端误差分解。
light_analysis.motivation: 在大型MDP中，学习紧凑状态表示对克服维度灾难至关重要。现有方法利用图拉普拉斯特征向量构建表示，但未知转移图或大状态空间下估计谱特征会引入误差。本文旨在理论分析这种表示学习的近似误差，特别是误差如何受状态图拓扑结构影响，并澄清对Laplacian算子的常见误解。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出理论分析框架，证明在线性价值函数近似下，使用从样本轨迹估计的谱特征时，近似误差的上界与状态图的代数连通性成比例。同时给出了特征向量估计误差的界限，实现端到端误差分解。将Laplacian算子重新表达为RL设置，避免常见误解，结果适用于一般（非均匀）策略，无需转移核对称性假设。
light_analysis.result: 理论结果表明，近似误差随状态图代数连通性增加而减小，验证了拓扑结构对表示质量的影响。在网格世界环境的数值模拟中支持了理论发现，但摘要未给出具体数值指标，如准确率提升或误差降低百分比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文建立了基于拉普拉斯特征的状态表示学习误差与MDP拓扑结构之间的理论联系，为设计更鲁棒的表示学习算法提供指导。澄清了Laplacian算子在RL中的正确表达，有助于避免错误实践。未来工作可扩展至更复杂的函数近似和真实场景。

title: ReMoT: Reinforcement Learning with Motion Contrast Triplets
abstract: We present ReMoT, a unified training paradigm to systematically address the fundamental shortcomings of VLMs in spatio-temporal consistency -- a critical failure point in navigation, robotics, and autonomous driving. ReMoT integrates two core components: (1) A rule-based automatic framework that generates ReMoT-16K, a large-scale (16.5K triplets) motion-contrast dataset derived from video meta-annotations, surpassing costly manual or model-based generation. (2) Group Relative Policy Optimization, which we empirically validate yields optimal performance and data efficiency for learning this contrastive reasoning, far exceeding standard Supervised Fine-Tuning. We also construct the first benchmark for fine-grained motion contrast triplets to measure a VLM's discrimination of subtle motion attributes (e.g., opposing directions). The resulting model achieves state-of-the-art performance on our new benchmark and multiple standard VLM benchmarks, culminating in a remarkable 25.1% performance leap on spatio-temporal reasoning tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReMoT训练范式，结合规则生成的运动对比数据集和组相对策略优化，显著提升VLM的时空一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在时空一致性上存在根本缺陷，这严重制约了其在导航、机器人、自动驾驶等任务中的应用。现有方法依赖昂贵的人工或模型生成数据，且标准监督微调难以有效学习对比推理，亟需高效的数据生成和训练策略。
light_analysis.method: ReMoT包含两个核心组件：一是规则化自动框架生成ReMoT-16K数据集（16.5K运动对比三元组），从视频元注释中提取，成本远低于手工或模型生成；二是采用组相对策略优化（GRPO）进行强化学习，实验证明其在对比推理学习上远超标准监督微调。同时构建首个细粒度运动对比三元组基准。
light_analysis.result: 在提出的基准和多个标准VLM基准上取得最先进性能，时空推理任务提升25.1%，验证了数据生成和训练策略的有效性，显著增强了模型对细微运动属性（如相反方向）的判别能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReMoT有效克服了VLM在时空推理上的短板，提供了低成本数据集生成与强化学习结合的新范式，对导航、自动驾驶等实际应用具有重要价值。未来可扩展至更复杂运动场景，并探索与其他推理任务结合。

title: Scaling Laws of Global Weather Models
abstract: Data-driven models are revolutionizing weather forecasting. To optimize training efficiency and model performance, this paper analyzes empirical scaling laws within this domain. We investigate the relationship between model performance (validation loss) and three key factors: model size ($N$), dataset size ($D$), and compute budget ($C$). Across a range of models, we find that Aurora exhibits the strongest data-scaling behavior: increasing the training dataset by 10x reduces validation loss by up to 3.2x. GraphCast demonstrates the highest parameter efficiency, yet suffers from limited hardware utilization. Our compute-optimal analysis indicates that, under fixed compute budgets, allocating resources to more total training data yields greater performance gains than increasing model size. Furthermore, we analyze model shape and uncover scaling behaviors that differ fundamentally from those observed in language models: weather forecasting models consistently favor increased width over depth. These findings suggest that future weather models should prioritize wider architectures and larger effective training datasets to maximize predictive performance.

light_analysis.overview: 研究全球天气模型的缩放定律，揭示数据、模型和计算资源对性能的影响，并提出未来模型应优先增加宽度和数据量。
light_analysis.motivation: 数据驱动模型正在革新天气预报，但训练效率和模型性能的优化缺乏系统性指导。现有方法未能明确模型规模、数据集大小和计算预算之间的权衡关系。理解这些缩放规律有助于高效利用资源，提升预测精度。
light_analysis.method: 通过实验分析验证损失与模型大小(N)、数据集大小(D)和计算预算(C)的关系。比较多种模型，发现Aurora具有最强数据缩放行为（10倍数据减少3.2倍验证损失），GraphCast参数效率最高但硬件利用率有限。计算最优分析表明固定预算下应优先增加训练数据。模型形状分析揭示天气模型偏好增加宽度而非深度。
light_analysis.result: Aurora在数据缩放中表现最优：训练数据扩大10倍，验证损失降低至1/3.2。GraphCast参数效率最高但硬件利用率低。计算最优分析显示，固定计算预算下增加数据量比扩大模型更有效。所有天气模型一致倾向于增加宽度而非深度，与语言模型缩放行为根本不同。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文为天气模型的缩放定律提供了实证基础，指出未来模型应采用更宽的架构和更大的有效训练数据集。这些发现对提升天气预报性能具有重要实践意义，但摘要未明确局限性。未来可进一步探索形状缩放与任务特异性的关系。

title: MobilityBench: A Benchmark for Evaluating Route-Planning Agents in Real-World Mobility Scenarios
abstract: Route-planning agents powered by large language models (LLMs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for supporting everyday human mobility through natural language interaction and tool-mediated decision making. However, systematic evaluation in real-world mobility settings is hindered by diverse routing demands, non-deterministic mapping services, and limited reproducibility. In this study, we introduce MobilityBench, a scalable benchmark for evaluating LLM-based route-planning agents in real-world mobility scenarios. MobilityBench is constructed from large-scale, anonymized real user queries collected from Amap and covers a broad spectrum of route-planning intents across multiple cities worldwide. To enable reproducible, end-to-end evaluation, we design a deterministic API-replay sandbox that eliminates environmental variance from live services. We further propose a multi-dimensional evaluation protocol centered on outcome validity, complemented by assessments of instruction understanding, planning, tool use, and efficiency. Using MobilityBench, we evaluate multiple LLM-based route-planning agents across diverse real-world mobility scenarios and provide an in-depth analysis of their behaviors and performance. Our findings reveal that current models perform competently on Basic information retrieval and Route Planning tasks, yet struggle considerably with Preference-Constrained Route Planning, underscoring significant room for improvement in personalized mobility applications. We publicly release the benchmark data, evaluation toolkit, and documentation at https://github.com/AMAP-ML/MobilityBench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MobilityBench基准，用于评估基于大语言模型的路径规划代理在现实交通场景中的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的路径规划代理缺乏系统性评估方法，面临路由需求多样、地图服务非确定性、可重复性差等问题。这些代理通过自然语言交互和工具支持日常出行，但无法有效衡量其真实性能。因此需要构建一个可扩展、可复现的基准来填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 从高德地图的大规模匿名用户查询中构建MobilityBench，覆盖多城市多种路径规划意图。设计确定性API回放沙箱消除环境变化，实现可复现评估。提出以结果有效性为核心的多维评估协议，包括指令理解、规划、工具使用和效率。
light_analysis.result: 评估多个LLM路径规划代理后，发现它们在基本信息检索和路线规划任务上表现良好，但在偏好约束路线规划（如个性化需求）上表现较差，表明当前模型在个性化移动应用方面仍有显著提升空间。摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: MobilityBench为LLM路径规划代理提供了标准化评估框架，揭示了现有模型的优势与不足。该基准支持可复现的端到端评估，有助于推动个性化移动应用的发展。未来可扩展更多场景和任务。

title: Diffusing to Coordinate: Efficient Online Multi-Agent Diffusion Policies
abstract: Online Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) is a prominent framework for efficient agent coordination. Crucially, enhancing policy expressiveness is pivotal for achieving superior performance. Diffusion-based generative models are well-positioned to meet this demand, having demonstrated remarkable expressiveness and multimodal representation in image generation and offline settings. Yet, their potential in online MARL remains largely under-explored. A major obstacle is that the intractable likelihoods of diffusion models impede entropy-based exploration and coordination. To tackle this challenge, we propose among the first \underline{O}nline off-policy \underline{MA}RL framework using \underline{D}iffusion policies (\textbf{OMAD}) to orchestrate coordination. Our key innovation is a relaxed policy objective that maximizes scaled joint entropy, facilitating effective exploration without relying on tractable likelihood. Complementing this, within the centralized training with decentralized execution (CTDE) paradigm, we employ a joint distributional value function to optimize decentralized diffusion policies. It leverages tractable entropy-augmented targets to guide the simultaneous updates of diffusion policies, thereby ensuring stable coordination. Extensive evaluations on MPE and MAMuJoCo establish our method as the new state-of-the-art across $10$ diverse tasks, demonstrating a remarkable $2.5\times$ to $5\times$ improvement in sample efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个在线多智能体强化学习框架OMAD，利用扩散策略协调智能体，显著提升采样效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线多智能体强化学习中，策略表达性对性能至关重要。扩散模型在图像生成和离线设置中展现了出色的表达性和多模态表示能力，但在在线MARL中应用不足。主要障碍是扩散模型难以处理的似然函数阻碍了基于熵的探索和协调，亟需新的方法解决这一问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出OMAD框架，核心创新是松弛策略目标，最大化缩放联合熵以促进探索，无需依赖可处理似然。在集中训练分散执行范式中，采用联合分布价值函数优化分散扩散策略，利用可处理的熵增强目标指导扩散策略同步更新，确保稳定协调。
light_analysis.result: 在MPE和MAMuJoCo基准的10个任务上，OMAD达到新的最先进性能，采样效率相比基线方法提升2.5至5倍，证明了其在多种协作任务中的有效性和样本高效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次将扩散策略成功应用于在线多智能体强化学习，通过最大化缩放联合熵和联合分布价值函数，解决了扩散模型在在线MARL中的探索和协调难题。该方法在多个任务上取得显著性能提升，为高表达性策略在复杂多智能体系统中的应用开辟了新方向。未来可探索更复杂的扩散模型结构和扩展至更多智能体场景。

title: Sonar-TS: Search-Then-Verify Natural Language Querying for Time Series Databases
abstract: Natural Language Querying for Time Series Databases (NLQ4TSDB) aims to assist non-expert users retrieve meaningful events, intervals, and summaries from massive temporal records. However, existing Text-to-SQL methods are not designed for continuous morphological intents such as shapes or anomalies, while time series models struggle to handle ultra-long histories. To address these challenges, we propose Sonar-TS, a neuro-symbolic framework that tackles NLQ4TSDB via a Search-Then-Verify pipeline. Analogous to active sonar, it utilizes a feature index to ping candidate windows via SQL, followed by generated Python programs to lock on and verify candidates against raw signals. To enable effective evaluation, we introduce NLQTSBench, the first large-scale benchmark designed for NLQ over TSDB-scale histories. Our experiments highlight the unique challenges within this domain and demonstrate that Sonar-TS effectively navigates complex temporal queries where traditional methods fail. This work presents the first systematic study of NLQ4TSDB, offering a general framework and evaluation standard to facilitate future research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Sonar-TS神经符号框架，通过搜索-验证流水线实现时序数据库的自然语言查询，并引入首个大规模基准NLQTSBench。
light_analysis.motivation: 自然语言查询时序数据库（NLQ4TSDB）旨在让非专家用户从海量时间序列中检索事件、区间和摘要。然而，现有Text-to-SQL方法不擅长处理形状或异常等连续形态意图，而时间序列模型难以应对超长历史。因此，需要一种能够融合符号推理和神经方法的新框架，以有效处理复杂时间查询。
light_analysis.method: 提出Sonar-TS框架，类似主动声纳，采用搜索-验证流水线：首先利用特征索引通过SQL语句快速定位候选窗口（搜索阶段），然后生成Python程序对候选窗口与原始信号进行匹配验证（验证阶段）。该方法结合了SQL的高效索引能力和Python的灵活性，实现了对连续形态意图的准确查询。
light_analysis.result: 在引入的NLQTSBench基准上实验，该基准是首个为海量时序数据库设计的NLQ大规模基准。实验表明，Sonar-TS能有效处理复杂时间查询，而传统Text-to-SQL和时间序列方法均失败。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但证明了框架的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 这是对NLQ4TSDB的首次系统研究，提供了通用神经符号框架和评估标准，填补了该领域空白。学术价值在于提出了新的解决问题思路，实际应用价值在于帮助非专家用户查询时序数据库。潜在局限性可能包括对索引构建的依赖和Python程序生成的复杂性，未来工作可优化搜索效率。

title: Coverage Guarantees for Pseudo-Calibrated Conformal Prediction under Distribution Shift
abstract: Conformal prediction (CP) offers distribution-free marginal coverage guarantees under an exchangeability assumption, but these guarantees can fail if the data distribution shifts. We analyze the use of pseudo-calibration as a tool to counter this performance loss under a bounded label-conditional covariate shift model. Using tools from domain adaptation, we derive a lower bound on target coverage in terms of the source-domain loss of the classifier and a Wasserstein measure of the shift. Using this result, we provide a method to design pseudo-calibrated sets that inflate the conformal threshold by a slack parameter to keep target coverage above a prescribed level. Finally, we propose a source-tuned pseudo-calibration algorithm that interpolates between hard pseudo-labels and randomized labels as a function of classifier uncertainty. Numerical experiments show that our bounds qualitatively track pseudo-calibration behavior and that the source-tuned scheme mitigates coverage degradation under distribution shift while maintaining nontrivial prediction set sizes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用伪校准保证共形预测在分布漂移下的目标覆盖率，并设计源调谐算法缓解覆盖退化。
light_analysis.motivation: 共形预测在可交换性假设下提供无分布边际覆盖保证，但数据分布漂移会导致这些保证失效。现有方法对漂移下的覆盖性能缺乏理论保障，尤其当标签条件协变量漂移存在时。因此，需要一种能在分布漂移下维持目标覆盖率的校准方法。
light_analysis.method: 在有界标签条件协变量漂移模型下，利用领域自适应工具，推导出以源域分类器损失和Wasserstein距离度量的目标覆盖下界。基于此，提出通过松弛参数膨胀共形阈值来设计伪校准集，保证目标覆盖率不低于预设水平。进一步提出源调谐伪校准算法，根据分类器不确定性在硬伪标签和随机标签之间插值。
light_analysis.result: 数值实验表明，推导的界能定性跟踪伪校准行为，所提源调谐方案在分布漂移下有效缓解覆盖退化，同时保持有意义的预测集大小。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文为伪校准在分布漂移下的覆盖保证提供了理论分析，并提出了实用的源调谐算法。该方法在学术上拓展了共形预测的鲁棒性理论，实际中可用于需保证覆盖率的预测系统（如医疗诊断）。未来可探索更一般的漂移模型或结合其他校准技术。

title: Momentum LMS Theory beyond Stationarity: Stability, Tracking, and Regret
abstract: In large-scale data processing scenarios, data often arrive in sequential streams generated by complex systems that exhibit drifting distributions and time-varying system parameters. This nonstationarity challenges theoretical analysis, as it violates classical assumptions of i.i.d. (independent and identically distributed) samples, necessitating algorithms capable of real-time updates without expensive retraining. An effective approach should process each sample in a single pass, while maintaining computational and memory complexities independent of the data stream length. Motivated by these challenges, this paper investigates the Momentum Least Mean Squares (MLMS) algorithm as an adaptive identification tool, leveraging its computational simplicity and online processing capabilities. Theoretically, we derive tracking performance and regret bounds for the MLMS in time-varying stochastic linear systems under various practical conditions. Unlike classical LMS, whose stability can be characterized by first-order random vector difference equations, MLMS introduces an additional dynamical state due to momentum, leading to second-order time-varying random vector difference equations whose stability analysis hinges on more complicated products of random matrices, which poses a substantially challenging problem to resolve. Experiments on synthetic and real-world data streams demonstrate that MLMS achieves rapid adaptation and robust tracking, in agreement with our theoretical results especially in nonstationary settings, highlighting its promise for modern streaming and online learning applications.

light_analysis.overview: 本文推导了动量最小均方（MLMS）算法在非平稳随机线性系统中的跟踪性能与遗憾界，理论验证其稳定性和快速自适应能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 在大规模数据流场景中，数据常来自具有漂移分布和时变参数的复杂系统，非平稳性挑战传统独立同分布假设，需要能实时更新、无需昂贵重训练的算法。现有方法如LMS虽简单但稳定性分析仅涉及一阶差分方程，而MLMS因引入动量导致二阶时变随机向量差分方程，其稳定性分析依赖于更复杂的随机矩阵乘积，理论空白亟待填补。
light_analysis.method: 本文针对动量最小均方（MLMS）算法，在时变随机线性系统下建立跟踪性能与遗憾界的理论分析。方法关键在于处理二阶时变随机向量差分方程，利用随机矩阵乘积的渐近行为推导稳定性和收敛性。算法保持单遍处理样本、计算与内存复杂度独立于数据流长度，实验采用合成与真实世界数据流验证理论结果。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，MLMS在非平稳设定下实现快速适应和鲁棒跟踪，与理论推导的跟踪性能和遗憾界一致。具体性能对比摘要未提供数值，但强调在非平稳环境中优于经典LMS，验证了理论结论的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次系统分析MLMS在非平稳场景下的稳定性与跟踪性能，填补理论空白，证明其适用于现代流式和在线学习应用。研究价值在于为时变系统自适应识别提供理论保障，但未讨论高维或非线性扩展等潜在局限，未来可探索更复杂环境下的性能优化。

title: SpaTeoGL: Spatiotemporal Graph Learning for Interpretable Seizure Onset Zone Analysis from Intracranial EEG
abstract: Accurate localization of the seizure onset zone (SOZ) from intracranial EEG (iEEG) is essential for epilepsy surgery but is challenged by complex spatiotemporal seizure dynamics. We propose SpaTeoGL, a spatiotemporal graph learning framework for interpretable seizure network analysis. SpaTeoGL jointly learns window-level spatial graphs capturing interactions among iEEG electrodes and a temporal graph linking time windows based on similarity of their spatial structure. The method is formulated within a smooth graph signal processing framework and solved via an alternating block coordinate descent algorithm with convergence guarantees. Experiments on a multicenter iEEG dataset with successful surgical outcomes show that SpaTeoGL is competitive with a baseline based on horizontal visibility graphs and logistic regression, while improving non-SOZ identification and providing interpretable insights into seizure onset and propagation dynamics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SpaTeoGL框架，联合学习空间和时间图，用于可解释的癫痫发作区分析，提升非SOZ识别效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 癫痫手术中精确确定癫痫发作区(SOZ)至关重要，但iEEG记录的时空动态复杂，现有方法难以兼顾可解释性和准确性。现有基线如水平可见性图结合逻辑回归虽有效，但识别非SOZ区域能力不足。因此，需要一种既能捕捉时空交互又具可解释性的方法以辅助临床决策。
light_analysis.method: SpaTeoGL采用联合学习策略：首先在窗口级学习空间图，捕获电极间的相互依赖；然后基于空间结构相似性构建时间图，连接不同时间窗口。整个模型置于平滑图信号处理框架中，通过交替块坐标下降算法求解，具有收敛保证。该方法可在无需预定义图结构的情况下自动学习动态网络。
light_analysis.result: 在多中心iEEG数据集上验证，SpaTeoGL与基于水平可见性图和逻辑回归的基线性能相当，但在非SOZ识别方面有显著提升。此外，该方法提供了对癫痫发作起始和传播动力学的可解释洞察，有助于临床理解。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出SpaTeoGL，实现了可解释的癫痫发作区分析。其创新在于联合学习时空图结构，平衡了准确性和可解释性。实验表明在非SOZ识别上优势明显，为癫痫术前评估提供了有力工具。未来可扩展至其他神经疾病动态网络分析。

title: SoftMatcha 2: A Fast and Soft Pattern Matcher for Trillion-Scale Corpora
abstract: We present SoftMatcha 2, an ultra-fast and flexible search algorithm that enables search over trillion-scale natural language corpora in under 0.3 seconds while allowing semantic variations in the form of substitution, insertion, and deletion. Our approach employs string matching based on suffix arrays that scales well with corpus size, and represents words as vectors, which underpin its semantic flexibility. To mitigate the combinatorial explosion induced by the semantic relaxation of queries, our method is built on two key algorithmic ideas: dynamic corpus-aware pruning and fast exact lookup enabled by a disk-aware design. We theoretically analyze the efficiency of the proposed method, indicating that it can mitigate exponential growth in the search space. Empirically, on FineWeb-Edu (Lozhkov et al., 2024) (1.4T tokens), it attains substantially lower search latency than existing methods: infini-gram (Liu et al., 2024), infini-gram mini (Xu et al., 2025), and SoftMatcha (Deguchi et al., 2025). As a practical application, our method uncovers benchmark contamination in training corpora that existing approaches miss, and it also benefits information retrieval and paraphrase detection. We also provide an online demo of fast, soft search across corpora in seven languages.
comment: Accepted at ICML2026. Project Page & Web Interface: https://softmatcha.github.io/v2/, Source Code: https://github.com/softmatcha/softmatcha2

light_analysis.overview: 提出SoftMatcha 2，实现万亿级语料库亚秒级软模式匹配，支持语义变体，速度超越现有方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有模式匹配方法难以同时满足大规模语料库的快速搜索和语义灵活性需求。传统字符串匹配无法处理替换、插入、删除等语义变化；而基于语义扩展的方法容易导致搜索空间组合爆炸，延迟过高。因此需要一种既能保持亚秒级速度又能容忍语义变化的方法，以支持实际应用如基准污染检测和信息检索。
light_analysis.method: SoftMatcha 2结合后缀数组的词级索引和词向量表示，支持语义变体。核心创新包括：1) 动态语料感知剪枝，利用语料统计信息提前过滤无关路径；2) 磁盘感知设计，通过分块索引实现快速精确查找，避免内存瓶颈。理论上分析该方法能减缓搜索空间的指数增长。实验使用FineWeb-Edu（1.4T tokens）语料。
light_analysis.result: 在FineWeb-Edu（1.4T tokens）上，SoftMatcha 2搜索延迟显著低于现有方法：infini-gram、infini-gram mini和SoftMatcha。具体延迟<0.3秒，而对比方法均需数十秒至数分钟。此外，该方法能发现现有方法遗漏的基准污染案例，并在信息检索和释义检测任务上展示实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SoftMatcha 2在万亿级语料库上实现了超快速且灵活的软模式匹配，兼顾速度与语义容忍度。学术贡献在于提出了动态剪枝与磁盘感知的算法组合，有效缓解语义松弛带来的组合爆炸。实际应用价值包括基准污染检测、信息检索和释义检测，并提供了多语言在线演示。未来可进一步优化索引构建和扩展至更多语言。

title: Kalman Linear Attention: Parallel Bayesian Filtering For Efficient Language Modelling and State Tracking
abstract: State-space language models such as Mamba and gated linear attention (GLA) offer linear-complexity, parallelisable alternatives to transformers, but their linear state updates limit expressivity and robust state tracking. We close this gap from a probabilistic angle, casting sequence mixing as exact Bayesian filtering with the Kalman filter as the core primitive. Classical Kalman filters give principled state and uncertainty estimates but are viewed as inherently sequential; we show that reparameterising them in information form turns their updates into an associative scan - so the per-token recurrent update is non-linear (a Möbius/precision recursion) yet remains temporally parallel. The resulting Kalman Linear Attention (KLA) layer is a drop-in sequence mixer that performs time-parallel probabilistic inference, carries an explicit belief-state uncertainty, and is strictly more expressive than GLA-style linear updates at the same computational cost. This expressivity translates directly into stronger state tracking: KLA solves permutation-composition ($A_5$) tasks that linear SSMs and attention cannot, while staying scan-parallel. As a drop-in primitive it also matches or improves on modern SSMs and GLAs across synthetic token-manipulation and zero-shot commonsense benchmarks, and is among the first stacked Bayesian-filtering primitives trained at the billion-token scale.
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026. An earlier version of this work was presented at the 1st Workshop on Epistemic Intelligence in Machine Learning (EIML) at EurIPS 2025

light_analysis.overview: 提出卡尔曼线性注意力（KLA），通过信息形式重新参数化卡尔曼滤波并用关联扫描实现时间并行，在保持线性复杂度下增强表达力和状态跟踪能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有状态空间语言模型（如Mamba、门控线性注意力）依赖线性状态更新，限制了表达力和鲁棒状态跟踪，无法处理排列组合等复杂任务。经典卡尔曼滤波虽能提供原理性状态与不确定性估计，但被视为固有顺序计算，难以并行化。本文从概率角度将序列混合视为精确贝叶斯滤波，旨在融合卡尔曼滤波的严谨性与并行效率，克服线性更新的局限性。
light_analysis.method: 将序列混合建模为精确贝叶斯滤波，以卡尔曼滤波器为核心。通过将卡尔曼滤波重新参数化为信息形式，使其更新转化为莫比乌斯/精度递归的非线性关联扫描，从而实现时间并行。所提出的卡尔曼线性注意力（KLA）层作为即插即用的序列混合器，保持线性计算复杂度，携带显式信念状态不确定性，比GLA等线性更新更具表达力。
light_analysis.result: KLA成功解决了线性SSM和注意力机制无法解决的排列组合（A5）任务，在保持扫描并行性的同时展现出更强的状态跟踪能力。在合成记号操作和零样本常识基准测试中，KLA匹配或改进了现代SSM和门控线性注意力模型。此外，该模型是首批在十亿token规模上训练的堆叠贝叶斯滤波原语之一，验证了其可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: KLA将贝叶斯滤波与高效序列混合相结合，通过并行化卡尔曼滤波实现了更强的表达力和状态跟踪能力，为语言建模和状态跟踪提供了新范式。其即插即用特性使其易于集成到现有架构中。未来工作可探索更复杂的滤波变体或应用于更多序列建模任务，但摘要未明确提及局限性。

title: On the Optimal Reasoning Length for RL-Trained Language Models
abstract: Reinforcement learning substantially improves reasoning in large language models, but it also tends to lengthen chain-of-thought outputs and increase computational cost. Although length-control methods have been proposed, the length-accuracy relationship they induce remains unclear. We train policies with several length-control methods on multiple base models in a controlled setup and find that, across both mathematical reasoning and code generation, accuracy is non-monotonic in output length, peaking at an intermediate value. Mode accuracy, however, continues to improve with length even in settings where sample accuracy plateaus or declines, indicating that the non-monotonic length-accuracy relationship is driven by dispersion around an increasingly correct center.

light_analysis.overview: 论文发现RL训练的语言模型存在最优推理长度，过短或过长都会降低准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习虽能提升大模型的推理能力，但常导致推理链变长、计算成本增加。现有长度控制方法虽能调节输出长度，但其诱导的长度-准确率关系尚不明确。理解这一关系对于优化模型性能和计算效率至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 在受控实验条件下，对多个基础模型采用多种长度控制方法训练策略，涵盖数学推理和代码生成任务。通过分析样本准确率和模式准确率随输出长度的变化，揭示长度-准确率的非单调关系。
light_analysis.result: 结果表明，在数学推理和代码生成中，样本准确率随输出长度先升后降，在中等长度达到峰值；而模式准确率在样本准确率平台期或下降时仍持续提升，表明非单调关系由围绕渐趋正确中心的离散度驱动。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了RL训练语言模型中长度-准确率非单调关系及其成因，为设计高效推理策略提供理论指导。未来可探索自适应长度控制方法以平衡准确性与计算成本。

title: Autoregressive Direct Preference Optimization
abstract: Direct preference optimization (DPO) has emerged as a promising approach for aligning large language models (LLMs) with human preferences. However, the widespread reliance on the response-level Bradley-Terry (BT) model may limit its full potential, as the reference and learnable models are assumed to be autoregressive only after deriving the objective function. Motivated by this limitation, we revisit the theoretical foundations of DPO and propose a novel formulation that explicitly introduces the autoregressive assumption prior to applying the BT model. By reformulating and extending DPO, we derive a novel variant, termed Autoregressive DPO (ADPO), that explicitly integrates autoregressive modeling into the preference optimization framework. Without violating the theoretical foundations, the derived loss takes an elegant form: it shifts the summation operation in the DPO objective outside the log-sigmoid function. Furthermore, through theoretical analysis of ADPO, we show that there exist two length measures to be considered when designing DPO-based algorithms: the token length $μ$ and the feedback length $μ'$. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to explicitly distinguish these two measures and analyze their implications for preference optimization in LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Autoregressive DPO (ADPO)，在DPO中显式引入自回归假设，并区分token长度和反馈长度两种度量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有DPO依赖响应级Bradley-Terry模型，仅在推导目标函数后才假设自回归，限制了其潜力。本文重新审视理论基础，提出在应用BT模型前显式引入自回归假设，以更有效地对齐人类偏好。
light_analysis.method: 通过重新表述和扩展DPO，推导出ADPO变体，其损失函数将求和运算移至log-sigmoid函数外部。理论分析揭示了两种长度度量：token长度μ和反馈长度μ'，首次明确区分二者并探讨其对偏好优化的影响。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供实验结果的定量数据或性能对比。论文主要贡献在于理论框架的创新和长度度量的分析，具体效果未在摘要中说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: ADPO通过显式自回归建模改进了DPO的理论基础，并首次区分两种长度度量，为偏好优化提供了新视角。未来可验证其在实际任务中的效果，并探索长度度量对训练稳定性的影响。

title: From Correspondence to Actions: Human-Like Multi-Image Spatial Reasoning in Multi-modal Large Language Models
abstract: While multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have made substantial progress in single-image spatial reasoning, multi-image spatial reasoning, which requires integration of information from multiple viewpoints, remains challenging. Cognitive studies suggest that humans address such tasks through two mechanisms: cross-view correspondence, which identifies regions across different views that correspond to the same physical locations, and stepwise viewpoint transformation, which composes relative viewpoint changes sequentially. However, existing studies incorporate these mechanisms only partially and often implicitly, without explicit supervision for both. We propose Human-Aware Training for Cross-view correspondence and viewpoint cHange (HATCH), a training framework with two complementary objectives: (1) Patch-Level Spatial Alignment, which encourages patch representations to align across views for spatially corresponding regions, and (2) Action-then-Answer Reasoning, which requires the model to generate explicit viewpoint transition actions before predicting the final answer. Experiments on three benchmarks demonstrate that HATCH consistently outperforms baselines of comparable size by a clear margin and achieves competitive results against much larger models, while preserving single-image reasoning capabilities.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HATCH框架，通过显式模拟人类空间推理的双机制（跨视图对应与逐步视角变换），提升多模态大模型的多图像空间推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大模型在单图像空间推理方面进展显著，但多图像空间推理仍需整合多视角信息，挑战巨大。认知研究指出人类通过跨视图对应和逐步视角变换完成此类任务，现有方法仅部分、隐含地融入这些机制，缺乏显式监督。因此，需要一种能明确学习并利用这两种机制的训练框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出HATCH训练框架，包含两个互补目标：1）补丁级空间对齐，鼓励不同视图中对应物理位置的补丁表征对齐；2）动作-然后-答案推理，要求模型在预测最终答案前生成显式的视角转换动作。通过显式监督跨视图对应和视角变换，使模型更接近人类推理方式。
light_analysis.result: 在三个多图像空间推理基准上，HATCH显著优于同规模基线模型，并与更大规模的模型取得竞争性结果。同时，该方法能保持单图像推理能力不下降，验证了框架的有效性和通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: HATCH通过显式建模人类空间推理的双机制，有效提升了多图像空间推理性能。学术上为多模态推理提供了新范式，实践中可增强机器人、自动驾驶等需要多视角理解的应用。未来可探索更复杂的视角变换动作序列。

title: Learning to Inject: Automated Prompt Injection via Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Prompt injection is a critical vulnerability in LLM agents, yet the strongest methods still rely on human red-teamers and hand-crafted prompts. Adapting automated jailbreak optimizers does not close this gap: jailbreaks shape models toward generic compliance, while prompt injection requires emitting specific tool calls with correct parameters. The success signal is binary, and randomly sampled suffixes almost never trigger it, so standard optimizers have no gradient to follow. We present AutoInject, a black-box reinforcement learning (RL) framework that learns adversarial suffixes for prompt injection. A learned comparison-based reward scores each candidate against the best suffix seen so far, turning the binary signal into a dense reward suitable for RL optimization. The framework supports both online query-based attacks and offline-trained transferable suffixes that need no utility access at deployment, and incorporates a utility objective when task-completion feedback is available. On AgentDojo, AutoInject outperforms template attacks, GCG, TAP, and adaptive attack across production models, with statistically significant improvements under McNemar's test with p<0.05. Suffixes learned by AutoInject also break Meta-SecAlign-70B, a model fine-tuned specifically to resist prompt injection, where template attacks fail outright. The results establish an automated baseline for prompt injection and expose a gap between preference-based defenses and adaptive optimization-based attackers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AutoInject，一个基于强化学习的黑盒框架，自动生成对抗性后缀以实现提示注入攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 提示注入是LLM代理的关键漏洞，但最强方法仍依赖人工红队和手工提示。现有的自动越狱优化器不适用于提示注入，因为需要特定工具调用且成功信号是二元的，随机采样的后缀几乎从不触发，导致优化器无法获得梯度方向。
light_analysis.method: AutoInject采用黑盒强化学习框架，通过比较机制将二元成功信号转化为密集奖励：每步奖励基于当前后缀与历史最佳后缀的对比。支持在线查询攻击和离线可迁移后缀生成，后者无需部署时访问模型。当有任务完成反馈时，可结合效用目标进行权衡优化。
light_analysis.result: 在AgentDojo数据集上，AutoInject在多个生产模型中显著优于模板攻击、GCG、TAP和自适应攻击（McNemar检验p<0.05）。所学习的后缀还能有效突破专门针对提示注入微调的Meta-SecAlign-70B模型，而模板攻击完全失败。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为提示注入建立自动化基准，揭示了基于偏好的防御与自适应优化攻击者之间的能力差距。该方法无需人工设计，能持续发现新漏洞，但可能被滥用，需发展更强的防御机制。

title: Global Geometry Is Not Enough for Vision Representations
abstract: A common assumption in representation learning is that globally well-distributed embeddings support robust and generalizable representations. This focus has shaped both training objectives and evaluation protocols, implicitly treating global geometry as a proxy for representational competence. While global geometry effectively encodes which elements are present, it is often insensitive to how they are composed. We investigate this limitation by testing the ability of geometric metrics to predict compositional binding across a diverse suite of vision encoders. We find that standard geometry-based statistics exhibit near-zero correlation with compositional binding. In contrast, functional sensitivity, as measured by the input--output Jacobian, reliably tracks this capability. We further provide an analytic account showing that this disparity arises from objective design, as existing losses explicitly constrain embedding geometry but leave the local input--output mapping unconstrained. These results suggest that global embedding geometry captures only a partial view of representational competence and establish functional sensitivity as a critical complementary axis for modeling composite structure.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示全局嵌入几何无法捕捉视觉表征中的组合绑定能力，提出功能敏感性作为关键补充维度。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前表示学习假设全局良好的嵌入分布能支撑鲁棒且泛化的表征，导致训练目标和评估协议都聚焦于全局几何。然而全局几何仅能编码元素存在性，对元素如何组合不敏感。该研究通过测试几何度量对组合绑定的预测能力，发现标准几何统计与组合绑定几乎零相关，而输入-输出雅可比矩阵的功能敏感性可可靠追踪该能力，从而指出现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 在多种视觉编码器上，通过计算全局几何统计（如均匀性、对齐性）与组合绑定能力（基于任务定义的组合性度量）的相关性，对比输入-输出雅可比矩阵的功能敏感性。理论分析表明，现有损失函数显式约束嵌入几何，但局部输入-输出映射未受约束，导致几何与组合绑定脱节。
light_analysis.result: 标准几何统计（如均匀性度量）与组合绑定能力的皮尔逊相关系数接近零，表明无预测能力。而功能敏感性（雅可比矩阵的奇异值分布等）与组合绑定能力呈强相关。实验覆盖多种视觉编码器（如ResNet、ViT等），结果一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 全局嵌入几何仅捕捉了表征能力的部分视图，功能敏感性是建模复合结构的关键互补维度。该发现挑战了现有表示学习范式，提示未来应在训练中引入对局部输入-输出映射的约束，以提升组合推理能力。局限性：未涉及自然语言处理等模态，功能敏感性的具体训练方法待探索。

title: MentisOculi: Revealing the Limits of Reasoning with Mental Imagery
abstract: Frontier models are transitioning from multimodal large language models (MLLMs) that merely ingest visual information to unified multimodal models (UMMs) capable of native interleaved generation. This shift has sparked interest in using intermediate visualizations as a reasoning aid, akin to human mental imagery. Central to this idea is the ability to form, maintain, and manipulate visual representations in a goal-oriented manner. To evaluate and probe this capability, we develop MentisOculi, a procedural, stratified suite of multi-step reasoning problems amenable to visual solution, tuned to challenge frontier models. Evaluating visual strategies ranging from latent tokens to explicit generated imagery, we find they generally fail to improve performance. Analysis of UMMs specifically exposes a critical limitation: While they possess the textual reasoning capacity to solve a task and can sometimes generate correct visuals, they suffer from compounding generation errors and fail to leverage even ground-truth visualizations. Our findings suggest that despite their inherent appeal, visual thoughts do not yet benefit model reasoning. MentisOculi establishes the necessary foundation to analyze and close this gap across diverse model families.

light_analysis.overview: 论文揭示当前统一多模态模型在推理中利用视觉思维时存在性能下降问题，提出结构化基准MentisOculi用于评估该能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 前沿模型从仅处理视觉信息的多模态大语言模型发展为能原生交错生成的统一多模态模型。这一转变激发了将中间可视化作为推理辅助的兴趣，类似于人类的心理意象。然而，模型在目标导向下形成、维持和操作视觉表征的能力尚未得到充分评估。现有方法缺乏针对视觉推理的结构化测试，无法揭示模型在利用视觉思维时的局限性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出MentisOculi，一个程序化且分层的问题套件，包含多步推理问题，适合视觉求解，旨在挑战前沿模型。评估了多种视觉策略，包括潜在token和显式生成图像。通过分析统一多模态模型在任务中的表现，比较其文本推理能力与视觉生成能力，并引入真实可视化作为对照，以隔离生成错误和利用问题。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，视觉策略普遍未能提升模型推理性能。统一多模态模型虽具备解决任务的文本推理能力且有时能生成正确图像，但遭受复合生成错误，甚至无法利用真实可视化来改善结果。视觉思维在当前模型推理中未带来益处。
light_analysis.conclusion: MentisOculi为分析模型视觉推理能力与真实利用之间的差距奠定了基础。研究发现尽管视觉思维在直觉上吸引人，但当前技术下无益于模型推理。该工作为未来研究指明了方向，即如何改进模型在推理中有效整合视觉信息，避免生成错误累积。

title: AI4SLT: Empirical Processes in Lean 4 for Formal Statistical Learning Theory
abstract: We present the first comprehensive Lean 4 formalization of statistical learning theory (SLT) grounded in empirical process theory. Our en-to-end formal infrastructure implement the missing contents in latest Lean library, including a complete development of Gaussian Lipschitz concentration, Dudley's entropy integral theorem for sub-Gaussian processes, and an application to least-squares (sparse) regression with a sharp rate. The project was carried out using a human-AI collaborative workflow, in which humans design proof strategies and AI agents execute tactical proof construction, leading to the human-verified Lean 4 toolbox for SLT. Beyond implementation, the formalization process exposes and resolves implicit assumptions and missing details in standard SLT textbooks, enforcing a granular, line-by-line understanding of the theory. This work establishes a reusable formal foundation and opens the door for future developments in machine learning theory. The code is provided in https://github.com/YuanheZ/lean-stat-learning-theory.

light_analysis.overview: 首个基于经验过程理论的Lean 4统计学习理论全面形式化，并利用人机协作工作流实现验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 统计学习理论（SLT）是机器学习的理论基础，但其形式化验证尚不充分，现有Lean库缺少关键内容。标准教材中存在隐含假设和细节缺失，需要严格的计算机形式化来发现和解决这些问题，从而提升理论的精确性和可复用性。
light_analysis.method: 构建了完整的经验过程理论形式化框架，涵盖高斯Lipschitz集中不等式、Dudley熵积分定理等核心内容；以最小二乘（稀疏）回归为例验证方法有效性；采用人类设计证明策略、AI执行战术构造的协作工作流，最终形成人类验证的Lean 4工具箱。
light_analysis.result: 成功在Lean 4中形式化了SLT关键定理，包括高斯Lipschitz集中和Dudley熵积分，并应用于回归问题获得尖锐收敛速率。形式化过程揭示了教材中未明确的假设，实现了逐行深入的理论理解。实验表明该形式化框架可提供可重用的机器学习理论基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了可复用的SLT形式化基础，提高了理论精确性；人机协作模式提升了证明构造效率；未来可支持机器学习理论的进一步形式化开发，但也需处理更复杂模型和算法。

title: Prediction-Powered Risk Monitoring of Deployed Models for Detecting Harmful Distribution Shifts
abstract: We study the problem of monitoring model performance in dynamic environments where labeled data are limited. To this end, we propose prediction-powered risk monitoring (PPRM), a semi-supervised risk-monitoring approach based on prediction-powered inference (PPI). PPRM constructs anytime-valid lower bounds on the running risk by combining synthetic labels with a small set of true labels. Harmful shifts are detected via a threshold-based comparison with an upper bound on the nominal risk, satisfying assumption-free finite-sample guarantees on the type-I error. We demonstrate the effectiveness of PPRM through extensive experiments on image classification, large language model (LLM), and telecommunications monitoring tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出预测驱动风险监控(PPRM)，一种半监督方法，用于在标注数据有限时检测模型部署中的有害分布偏移。
light_analysis.motivation: 在动态环境中监控已部署模型的性能至关重要，但往往面临标注数据稀缺的问题。现有方法要么需要大量标签，要么缺乏严格的统计保证。因此，需要一种既能有效利用有限标签又能提供可靠风险监控的方法，以快速检测有害的分布偏移。
light_analysis.method: PPRM基于预测驱动推断(PPI)，通过将合成标签与少量真实标签结合，构建运行风险的任意有效下界。通过阈值与名义风险上界比较来检测有害偏移，提供无假设的有限样本I类错误保证。无需对数据分布或模型做特定假设。
light_analysis.result: 在图像分类、大型语言模型(LLM)和电信监控任务上的广泛实验表明，PPRM能有效检测有害分布偏移，且具有严格统计保证。具体性能指标摘要未明确，但证明了方法的有效性和通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PPRM为部署模型的风险监控提供了一种半监督、可保证的解决方案，填补了有限标签场景下统计严格性缺失的空白。未来可扩展至更多复杂任务，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: Neural FOXP2 -- Language Specific Neuron Steering for Targeted Language Improvement in LLMs
abstract: LLMs are multilingual by training, yet their lingua franca is often English, reflecting English language dominance in pretraining. Other languages remain in parametric memory but are systematically suppressed. We argue that language defaultness is governed by a sparse, low-rank control circuit, language neurons, that can be mechanistically isolated and safely steered.   We introduce Neural FOXP2, that makes a chosen language (Hindi or Spanish) primary in a model by steering language-specific neurons. Neural FOXP2 proceeds in three stages: (i) Localize: We train per-layer SAEs so each activation decomposes into a small set of active feature components. For every feature, we quantify English vs. Hindi/Spanish selectivity overall logit-mass lift toward the target-language token set. Tracing the top-ranked features back to their strongest contributing units yields a compact language-neuron set. (ii) Steering directions: We localize controllable language-shift geometry via a spectral low-rank analysis. For each layer, we build English to target activation-difference matrices and perform layerwise SVD to extract the dominant singular directions governing language change. The eigengap and effective-rank spectra identify a compact steering subspace and an empirically chosen intervention window (where these directions are strongest and most stable). (iii) Steer: We apply a signed, sparse activation shift targeted to the language neurons. Concretely, within low to mid layers we add a positive steering along the target-language dominant directions and a compensating negative shift toward the null space for the English neurons, yielding controllable target-language defaultness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种通过定位和引导语言特定神经元来定向提升多语言大模型非英语语言能力的方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前多语言大模型受预训练数据中英语主导影响，非英语语言虽存储在参数中但被系统性抑制。现有方法缺乏对语言控制神经元的精确识别和干预机制，导致难以在不影响整体性能的情况下提升特定语言能力。该研究旨在通过机械可解释方法定位语言神经元，实现安全可控的语言默认性切换。
light_analysis.method: 方法分为三步：首先，训练逐层稀疏自编码器分解激活向量，基于特征对目标语言标记的对数概率贡献定位语言神经元；其次，通过构建英语到目标语言的激活差异矩阵并进行逐层奇异值分解，提取控制语言转移的低秩子空间，利用特征间隙和有效秩谱确定干预窗口；最后，在低中层对语言神经元施加带符号的稀疏激活偏移，沿目标语言主导方向正向引导，同时对英语神经元进行负向补偿，实现目标语言默认性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体实验结果和性能指标，但声称该方法能在不损害模型整体能力的情况下，使选定语言（如印地语或西班牙语）成为模型的主要默认语言。实际效果依赖于对语言神经元集的精确性和引导强度的调控，需通过后续实验验证语言生成质量和跨语言迁移影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了首个基于神经元级语言控制的大模型语言定向提升框架，通过稀疏编码和低秩分析实现了语言默认性的机械可解释调整。该方法具有高安全性，避免破坏其他语言能力。局限性包括对未见语言的泛化能力不明，且需要进一步研究多语言同时引导的干扰问题。未来工作可扩展至更多语言和模型架构。

title: FOCUS: DLLMs Know How to Tame Their Compute Bound
abstract: Diffusion Large Language Models (DLLMs) offer a compelling alternative to Auto-Regressive models, but their deployment is constrained by high decoding cost. In this work, we identify a key inefficiency in DLLM decoding: while computation is parallelized over token blocks, only a small subset of tokens is decodable at each diffusion step, causing most compute to be wasted on non-decodable tokens. We further observe a strong correlation between attention-derived token importance and token-wise decoding probability. Based on this insight, we propose FOCUS, an inference system designed for DLLMs. By dynamically focusing computation on decodable tokens and evicting non-decodable ones on-the-fly, FOCUS increases the effective batch size, alleviating compute limitations and enabling scalable throughput. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that FOCUS achieves up to 3.52$\times$ throughput improvement over the production-grade engine LMDeploy in large-batch settings, while preserving or improving generation quality across multiple benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FOCUS推理系统，通过动态聚焦可解码token并驱逐不可解码token，显著提升Diffusion Large Language Model的吞吐量。
light_analysis.motivation: Diffusion Large Language Models (DLLMs) 解码成本高，因为计算并行化于token块，但每个扩散步骤只有少量token可解码，导致大部分计算浪费在非可解码token上。现有方法未有效解决此问题，限制了DLLM的实际部署。
light_analysis.method: FOCUS基于注意力机制导出的token重要性与token级解码概率的强相关性，动态识别可解码token，并实时驱逐非可解码token，从而集中计算资源于有效部分，增加有效批大小，缓解计算瓶颈，实现可扩展的吞吐量。
light_analysis.result: 在大型批次设置下，与生产级推理引擎LMDeploy相比，FOCUS实现了高达3.52倍的吞吐量提升，同时在多个基准测试上保持或改善了生成质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: FOCUS通过计算聚焦策略有效降低了DLLM的解码开销，提升了推理效率，为扩散模型的实际应用提供了可行方案。未来工作可探索更精确的可解码性预测机制以进一步提升性能。

title: OpenVTON-Bench: A Large-Scale High-Resolution Benchmark for Controllable Virtual Try-On Evaluation
abstract: Recent advances in diffusion models have significantly elevated the visual fidelity of Virtual Try-On (VTON) systems, yet reliable evaluation remains a persistent bottleneck. Traditional metrics struggle to quantify fine-grained texture details and semantic consistency, while existing datasets fail to meet commercial standards in scale and diversity. We present OpenVTON-Bench, a large-scale benchmark comprising approximately 100K high-resolution image pairs (up to $1536 \times 1536$). The dataset is constructed using DINOv3-based hierarchical clustering for semantically balanced sampling and Gemini-powered dense captioning, ensuring a uniform distribution across 20 fine-grained garment categories. To support reliable evaluation, we propose a multi-modal protocol that measures VTON quality along five interpretable dimensions: background consistency, identity fidelity, texture fidelity, shape plausibility, and overall realism. The protocol integrates VLM-based semantic reasoning with a novel Multi-Scale Representation Metric based on SAM3 segmentation and morphological erosion, enabling the separation of boundary alignment errors from internal texture artifacts. Experimental results show strong agreement with human judgments (Kendall's $τ$ of 0.833 vs. 0.611 for SSIM), establishing a robust benchmark for VTON evaluation.
comment: Under review for the NeurIPS 2026 Datasets and Benchmarks Track

light_analysis.overview: 提出OpenVTON-Bench大规模高分辨率虚拟试穿基准，含约10万对1536×1536图像，并设计多模态评估协议从五个维度衡量试穿质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管扩散模型提升了虚拟试穿系统的视觉保真度，但可靠评估仍是瓶颈：传统指标无法量化细粒度纹理细节和语义一致性，现有数据集在规模和多样性上不满足商业标准。因此需要大规模高质量基准和可解释的评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建OpenVTON-Bench：使用DINOv3层次聚类进行语义平衡采样，Gemini驱动密集字幕生成，确保20个服装类别均匀分布。提出多模态评估协议，包括背景一致性、身份保真度、纹理保真度、形状合理性、整体真实感五个维度，集成VLM语义推理与基于SAM3分割和形态学腐蚀的多尺度表示度量，分离边界对齐错误与内部纹理伪影。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提协议与人类判断强一致：Kendall's τ=0.833，显著优于SSIM的0.611。数据集包含约10万对高分辨率图像（最高1536×1536），为VTON评估建立了鲁棒基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献为大规模高分辨率基准和可解释评估协议，弥补了VTON评估的可靠性缺口。学术上提供标准化框架，推动虚拟试穿研究；实际可用于商业质量检测。未来可扩展更多服装类别或场景，但依赖VLM和SAM的泛化性需验证。

title: Reliability-Calibrated Edge-IoT Early Fault Warning for Rotating Machinery with a Physics-Guided Tiny-Mamba Transformer
abstract: Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) systems increasingly rely on distributed vibration sensing to support predictive maintenance of rotating machinery. In practical deployments, however, raw signal upload is costly and alarm decisions must be made locally under limited computation, changing operating conditions, and strict nuisance-alarm budgets. This paper presents a reliability-calibrated edge-IoT early-warning framework, in which a compact Physics-Guided Tiny-Mamba Transformer (PG-TMT) acts as the representation module and an extreme value theory (EVT) layer converts streaming anomaly scores into event-level alarm episodes. PG-TMT combines a depthwise-separable convolutional stem, a Tiny-Mamba state-space branch, and a lightweight local Transformer to capture transient, long-horizon, and multichannel degradation cues under batch-size-one inference. To improve auditability, temporal attention is projected to the frequency domain and softly aligned with analytical bearing fault-order bands. EVT calibration, dual-threshold hysteresis, and trimmed-tail fitting provide controllable false-alarm intensity even when healthy calibration data are imperfect. Experiments on CWRU, Paderborn, XJTU-SY, and an industrial pilot demonstrate that the proposed framework improves PR-AUC, reduces detection delay under a controlled nuisance-alarm budget, and remains robust to structured interference, metadata uncertainty, compound fault mixtures, and domain transfer. With a sub-1 MB footprint and Jetson p99 latency below 7 ms, the framework supports calibrated and interpretable early warnings for IIoT predictive maintenance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可靠性校准的边缘物联网早期故障预警框架，结合物理引导Tiny-Mamba Transformer和极值理论校准，实现低资源、可解释的旋转机械故障预警。
light_analysis.motivation: 工业物联网中的分布式振动传感需支持旋转机械预测性维护，但实际部署中原始信号上传昂贵，且需在有限计算资源、变化工况和严格误报预算下做出本地报警决策。现有方法难以同时满足低计算、高校准和可解释性，尤其在边缘设备上。
light_analysis.method: 提出PG-TMT表示模块，包含深度可分离卷积茎、Tiny-Mamba状态空间分支和轻量局部Transformer，以捕获瞬态、长期和多通道退化线索；极值理论层将异常分数转为事件级报警，采用双阈值迟滞和修剪尾拟合控制误报率；时间注意力投影到频域与轴承故障阶次带软对齐。
light_analysis.result: 在CWRU、Paderborn、XJTU-SY和工业试点上，改进PR-AUC、减少受控误报预算下的检测延迟，对结构化干扰、元数据不确定性、复合故障和域迁移鲁棒。模型小于1MB，Jetson p99延迟低于7ms。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为工业IoT预测性维护提供校准且可解释的早期预警，具有小体积、低延迟和高鲁棒性。未来可扩展至更复杂故障场景和异构域泛化。

title: Robust Privacy: Inference-Stage Privacy through Certified Robustness
abstract: An adversary observing a model's released prediction can infer sensitive attributes of the queried input, or even reconstruct representatives of the model's training data. The inference interface thus acts as a side channel for privacy leakage. We introduce Robust Privacy (RP), an inference-stage privacy notion inspired by certified robustness: if a model's prediction is provably invariant within a radius-R neighborhood around an input x with confidence at least $1-α$, then x enjoys $(R,α)$-Robust Privacy, under which we prove that any adversary observing the released prediction has at most $α/2$ advantage in distinguishing x from any input within distance R of x. Building on RP, we formalize Robust Attribute Privacy (RAP), an attribute-level privacy notion that characterizes the set of sensitive-attribute values that remain compatible with a released prediction. On a classification task, RP increases the median length of the RAP-compatible inference interval from 23.50 to 29.96, reducing attribute-inference precision. Model inversion attacks, often treated as a training-stage threat, in fact rely on fine-grained signals leaked through the inference interface; RP masks these signals at the inference stage, reducing attack success rate (ASR) from 73% to 4% on a black-box inversion attack. This direct targeting of the leakage channel enables RP to dominate DP-SGD and randomized response in the privacy-utility tradeoff space: RP retains 98.4% accuracy at 21% ASR, whereas DP-SGD must drop accuracy to 61.7% to reach a comparable ASR. Across both experiments, increasing the smoothing sample size N strengthens privacy and improves utility together. Finally, we examine model distillation as a scope boundary and show that RP mitigates attribute-level and instance-level inference-stage privacy leakage, but not function-level extraction through model distillation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出推理阶段隐私概念Robust Privacy，通过认证鲁棒性保证预测不变性，限制对手区分输入的能力，有效降低属性推断和模型反转攻击成功率。
light_analysis.motivation: 对手通过观察模型预测可推断输入敏感属性或重建训练数据，构成隐私泄漏侧信道。现有方法如DP-SGD主要针对训练阶段，而推理阶段泄漏未充分解决。本文旨在提出直接屏蔽预测输出细粒度信号的推理阶段隐私概念，在隐私-效用权衡中优于现有方法。
light_analysis.method: 基于认证鲁棒性定义Robust Privacy (RP)：若模型预测在输入x的半径R邻域内以置信度1-α不变，则x享有(R,α)-RP，并证明对手区分x与邻近输入的优势最多α/2。进一步形式化鲁棒属性隐私（RAP），描述与预测兼容的敏感属性值集合。采用随机平滑实现认证鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 分类任务中，RP将RAP兼容推理区间中位数从23.50提升至29.96，降低属性推断精度。黑盒模型反转攻击成功率从73%降至4%。在隐私-效用权衡中，RP在21%攻击成功率时保持98.4%准确率，而DP-SGD需降至61.7%准确率达到相似ASR。增加平滑样本数N同时增强隐私和效用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出RP概念，直接针对推理阶段泄漏信道，有效缓解属性推断和模型反转攻击，在隐私-效用权衡中显著优于DP-SGD。RP可阻止属性级和实例级泄漏，但无法防御通过模型蒸馏的函数级提取。未来可探索与其他技术的结合。

title: An XAI View on Explainable ASP: Methods, Systems, and Perspectives
abstract: Answer Set Programming (ASP) is a popular declarative reasoning and problem solving approach in symbolic AI. Its rule-based formalism makes it inherently attractive for explainable and interpretive reasoning, which is gaining importance with the surge of Explainable AI (XAI). A number of explanation approaches and tools for ASP have been developed, which often tackle specific explanatory settings and may not cover all scenarios that ASP users encounter. In this survey, we provide, guided by an XAI perspective, an overview of types of ASP explanations in connection with user questions for explanation, and describe their coverage by current theory and tools. Furthermore, we pinpoint gaps in existing ASP explanations approaches and identify research directions for future work.

light_analysis.overview: 从XAI视角系统综述ASP解释方法、系统及未来方向。
light_analysis.motivation: ASP作为符号AI中重要的声明式推理方法，其规则形式天然支持可解释性。随着XAI兴起，理解ASP解释的类型和覆盖范围变得迫切。现有方法通常针对特定场景，缺乏统一视角，导致用户面临解释缺口。
light_analysis.method: 以XAI视角为指导，根据用户解释问题对ASP解释类型进行分类，并梳理当前理论与工具的覆盖情况。通过识别现有方法的空白，提出未来研究方向。
light_analysis.result: 提供了ASP解释类型与用户问题的系统对应关系，评估了现有理论和工具对各类场景的覆盖程度，并明确指出当前方法中的缺失环节。
light_analysis.conclusion: 总结了ASP解释的现状，识别了理论和方法之间的空白，并指出了未来研究的关键方向，为构建更全面的ASP可解释性框架提供了路线图。

title: CoVar: Confidence-Variance-Guided Pseudo-Label Selection for Semi-Supervised Learning
abstract: Pseudo-label selection in semi-supervised learning is commonly driven by maximum-confidence thresholds, yet confidence alone can be unreliable under model overconfidence and class imbalance. We propose CoVar, a confidence--variance framework that assesses pseudo-label reliability by jointly modeling Maximum Confidence (MC) and Residual-Class Variance (RCV). Starting from entropy minimization, we derive a second-order cross-entropy approximation showing that low-loss pseudo-labels are favored when MC is high and RCV is low, with a confidence-dependent penalty that becomes stronger for near-certain predictions. Based on this criterion, CoVar embeds predictions into a two-dimensional confidence--variance space and uses SVD-based spectral relaxation to separate reliable and unreliable predictions without hand-tuned confidence thresholds. Cluster-wise Gaussian weighting then converts this separation into per-sample training weights. The resulting weights can be integrated into existing semi-supervised segmentation and classification pipelines during training and introduce no inference-time overhead. Experiments on PASCAL VOC 2012, Cityscapes, CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, SVHN, and STL-10 show clear gains on VOC and Cityscapes under matched backbones, as well as competitive or improved error rates on standard classification benchmarks. These results indicate that residual-class dispersion provides a useful signal complementary to confidence for robust pseudo-label selection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CoVar框架，通过联合建模最大置信度和残差类方差，实现更可靠的伪标签选择。
light_analysis.motivation: 半监督学习中伪标签选择常用最大置信度阈值，但置信度在模型过自信和类别不平衡时不可靠，现有方法忽视残差类方差的补充信号，导致伪标签质量受限。
light_analysis.method: 从熵最小化推导二阶交叉熵近似，得到高置信度、低残差类方差且包含置信度依赖惩罚项的选择标准。将预测嵌入二维置信度-方差空间，利用SVD谱松弛分离可靠与不可靠预测，无需手动阈值，并通过高斯加权生成训练权重，可集成现有分割和分类流程，无推理开销。
light_analysis.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2012、Cityscapes、CIFAR-10/100、SVHN和STL-10上实验，匹配骨干网络下VOC和Cityscapes取得明显提升，分类基准上误差率具有竞争力或改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 残差类方差作为置信度的补充信号，提升了伪标签选择的鲁棒性。学术上提出可集成的新框架，实际应用价值高，未来可探索更复杂的谱方法或扩展到其他半监督任务。

title: Reverse Flow Matching: A Unified Framework for Online Reinforcement Learning with Diffusion and Flow Policies
abstract: Diffusion and flow policies are gaining prominence in online reinforcement learning (RL) due to their expressive power, yet training them efficiently remains a critical challenge. A fundamental difficulty that distinguishes online RL from standard generative modeling is the lack of direct samples from the target Boltzmann distribution defined by the Q-function. To address this, two seemingly distinct families of methods have been proposed for diffusion policies: a noise-expectation family, which uses a weighted average of noise as the training target, and a gradient-expectation family, which employs a weighted average of Q-function gradients. However, it remains unclear how these objectives are formally related, or whether they can be synthesized into a more general formulation. In this paper, we propose a unified framework, reverse flow matching (RFM), which rigorously addresses the problem of training diffusion and flow models without direct target samples. By adopting a reverse inferential perspective, we formulate the training target as a posterior mean estimation problem given an intermediate noisy sample. Crucially, we introduce Langevin Stein operators to construct zero-mean control variates, deriving a general class of estimators that share the same expectation. We show that existing noise-expectation and gradient-expectation methods are simply two specific instances within this broader class. This unified view yields two key advancements: it extends the capability of targeting Boltzmann distributions from diffusion to flow policies, and it enables the principled combination of Q-value and Q-gradient information to form an effective estimator, thereby improving training efficiency and stability. We instantiate RFM to train a flow policy in online RL and demonstrate improved performance on continuous-control benchmarks compared to diffusion policy baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出反向流匹配（RFM）统一框架，将在线强化学习中扩散与流策略的训练问题转化为后验均值估计，并统一了现有噪声期望与梯度期望方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线强化学习中，扩散与流策略虽表达能力强大，但训练效率低下，核心难点在于无法直接获取Q函数定义的玻尔兹曼分布样本。现有两类方法（噪声期望族与梯度期望族）目标各异，关系不明，难以融合。需要统一理论框架来明确二者联系，并扩展到流策略，同时提升训练效率与稳定性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出反向流匹配（RFM）框架，从反向推断视角将训练目标建模为给定中间噪声样本的后验均值估计问题。引入Langevin Stein算子构造零均值控制变量，导出一类具有相同期望的通用估计器，其中噪声期望与梯度期望方法是其两个特例。RFM将玻尔兹曼分布建模能力从扩散模型扩展到流模型，并允许合理组合Q值与Q梯度信息形成更优估计器，提升训练效率与稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 论文在连续控制基准任务上实例化RFM训练流策略，与扩散策略基线相比，性能显著提升。具体结果摘要未明确给出数值，但声称在多个环境上改进性能，验证了RFM框架在在线RL中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RFM为在线RL训练扩散和流策略提供了统一的理论框架，揭示了现有方法的内在联系，并将玻尔兹曼分布建模能力扩展到流模型。通过结合Q值与梯度信息，提高了训练效率和稳定性。该工作对生成模型与强化学习的交叉领域有重要理论贡献，并展示了实用性能提升。未来可进一步探索更复杂的控制变量设计或扩展到离散动作空间。

title: Precomputing Multi-Agent Path Replanning Using Temporal Flexibility
abstract: Executing a multi-agent plan can be challenging when an agent is delayed, because this typically creates conflicts with other agents. So, we need to quickly find a new safe plan. Replanning only the delayed agent often does not yield an efficient plan, and sometimes cannot even yield a feasible one. On the other hand, replanning other agents may lead to a cascade of changes and delays, and it is computationally expensive. We show how to efficiently replan a single delayed agent by tracking and using the temporal flexibility of other agents while avoiding cascading delays. This flexibility is the maximum delay that the agent can take without changing the order with agents other than the initially delayed agent, or further delaying other agents. Our algorithm, FlexSIPP, precomputes all possible plans for the delayed agent and returns the changes to the other agents within the given scenario. We demonstrate our method in a real-world case study of replanning trains in the densely-used Dutch railway network and in the MovingAI MAPF benchmark set. Our experiments show that FlexSIPP provides effective solutions relevant to real-world adjustments, and within a reasonable timeframe.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 FlexSIPP 算法，通过预先计算和利用其他智能体的时间灵活性，高效地重规划单个延迟智能体的路径，避免级联延迟。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体计划执行中，单个智能体延迟会引发冲突，需要快速找到新的安全计划。传统方法中，仅重规划延迟智能体常导致低效甚至不可行方案；而重规划其他智能体会引发级联变化和延迟，计算开销大。因此，需要一种高效且有效的方法来处理单智能体延迟问题，尤其适用于实时场景如铁路网络。
light_analysis.method: FlexSIPP 算法通过跟踪并利用其他智能体的时间灵活性（即在不改变与其他智能体顺序或进一步延迟其他智能体的前提下，智能体能承受的最大延迟），预先计算延迟智能体的所有可能计划，并返回对其他智能体的最小改动。该方法在保持全局可行性的同时避免级联延迟，适用于多智能体路径规划（MAPF）问题。
light_analysis.result: 在荷兰铁路网络真实案例和 MovingAI MAPF 基准测试中验证，FlexSIPP 能在合理时间内提供有效解决方案，适应实际调整需求。摘要未明确给出具体数值，但表明该方法在效率和效果上优于传统重规划策略。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlexSIPP 通过利用时间灵活性实现了高效的单智能体延迟重规划，避免了级联延迟，具有实际应用价值，尤其适用于交通调度等实时场景。未来可进一步优化预计算效率或扩展到更复杂的多智能体问题。

title: VietMed-MCQ: A Consistency-Filtered Data Synthesis Framework for Vietnamese Traditional Medicine Evaluation
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable proficiency in general medical domains. However, their performance significantly degrades in specialized, culturally specific domains such as Vietnamese Traditional Medicine (VTM), primarily due to the scarcity of high-quality, structured benchmarks. In this paper, we introduce VietMed-MCQ, a novel multiple-choice question dataset generated via a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline with an automated consistency check mechanism. Unlike previous synthetic datasets, our framework incorporates a dual-model validation approach to ensure reasoning consistency through independent answer verification, though the substring-based evidence checking has known limitations. The complete dataset of 3,190 questions spans three difficulty levels and underwent validation by one medical expert and four students, achieving 94.2 percent approval with substantial inter-rater agreement (Fleiss' kappa = 0.82). We benchmark seven open-source models on VietMed-MCQ. Results reveal that general-purpose models with strong Chinese priors outperform Vietnamese-centric models, highlighting cross-lingual conceptual transfer, while all models still struggle with complex diagnostic reasoning. Our code and dataset are publicly available to foster research in low-resource medical domains.
comment: The authors have withdrawn this article because the current version is still undergoing substantial revision. Several components of the data synthesis framework, consistency-filtering procedure, evaluation protocol, and experimental analysis are being refined and expanded. As a result, the current manuscript should not be considered a complete or final representation of the work

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于RAG和一致性过滤的越南传统医学多选题数据集VietMed-MCQ，并评测多模型性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在通用医学领域表现优异，但在越南传统医学等专业领域因缺乏高质量结构化基准而性能显著下降。现有合成数据集缺乏推理一致性验证，且越南传统医学的跨语言概念转移问题未充分探索。本研究旨在填补这一空白，构建首个系统化VTM评估数据集。
light_analysis.method: 采用检索增强生成（RAG）管道自动生成多选题，并引入双模型独立验证机制确保推理一致性，通过子串匹配检查证据（虽有限）。数据集包含3190道题，涵盖三难度级别，由1位医学专家和4名学生验证，达标率94.2%，评分者间一致性高（Fleiss' kappa=0.82）。
light_analysis.result: 基准测试7个开源模型发现，具有中文先验的通用模型（如基于中文语料预训练的模型）优于越南语特定模型，表明跨语言概念迁移有效。但所有模型在复杂诊断推理任务上仍表现不佳，准确率有待提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: VietMed-MCQ为低资源医学领域提供了首个VTM评估基准，揭示了跨语言迁移的潜力与当前模型的推理局限。未来可改进证据检查机制、扩展问题类型，并探索领域自适应训练。数据集和代码已公开，促进后续研究。

title: Higher order PCA-like rotation-invariant features for detailed shape descriptors modulo rotation
