abstract: PCA can be used for rotation invariant features, describing a shape with its $p_{ab}=E[(x_i-E[x_a])(x_b-E[x_b])]$ covariance matrix approximating shape by ellipsoid, allowing for rotation invariants like its traces of powers. However, real shapes are usually much more complicated, hence there is proposed its extension to e.g. $p_{abc}=E[(x_a-E[x_a])(x_b-E[x_b])(x_c-E[x_c])]$ order-3 or higher tensors describing central moments, or polynomial times Gaussian allowing decodable shape descriptors of arbitrarily high accuracy, and their analogous rotation invariants. Its practical applications could be rotation-invariant features to include shape modulo rotation e.g. for molecular shape descriptors, or for up to rotation object recognition in 2D images/3D scans maybe also for 3D scene understanding, or shape similarity metric allowing inexpensive comparison of objects modulo rotation avoiding costly optimization over rotations.

light_analysis.overview: 将PCA扩展到高阶矩或多项式乘高斯，提出可解码的高精度旋转不变形状描述符。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统PCA通过协方差矩阵将形状近似为椭球，但真实形状复杂度远超椭球，导致描述精度有限。现有方法难以兼顾旋转不变性与高精度形状重构，需要更强大的特征表示来捕捉细节。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出将PCA推广到高阶张量，如三阶中心矩p_abc，或采用多项式乘高斯函数，构造任意精度的可解码形状描述符，并推导相应的旋转不变量。该方法在保持旋转不变性的同时，显著提升形状描述的细节保真度。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但指出该方法适用于分子形状描述、2D/3D目标识别、形状相似性度量等场景，可避免旋转优化带来的计算开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究通过引入高阶矩和多项式高斯特征，突破了PCA的椭球近似限制，为旋转不变形状分析提供了通用框架，在物体识别、分子建模等领域具有应用潜力。未来可能需验证实际精度与计算效率。

title: Geometry of Reason: Spectral Signatures of Valid Mathematical Reasoning
abstract: Verifying whether a language model is genuinely reasoning or pattern-matching remains an open problem: learned verifiers are expensive, and output-based heuristics are brittle. We show that valid mathematical reasoning induces a measurable, training-free spectral signature in transformer attention. By treating each attention matrix as a weighted token graph, we extract four diagnostics: Fiedler value, High-Frequency Energy Ratio (HFER), spectral entropy, and smoothness, that require no learned parameters. Experiments across seven models from four architectural families yield effect sizes up to Cohen's $d = 3.30$ ($p < 10^{-116}$), enabling $85$--$96\%$ single-threshold classification accuracy. Two findings sharpen the interpretation. First, \emph{Platonic validity}: the spectral signal tracks logical coherence rather than compiler acceptance, proofs rejected for timeouts or missing imports are correctly classified as valid, a distinction confirmed by a manual audit ($κ= 0.82$, $n = 51$). Second, \emph{architectural determinism}: Sliding Window Attention shifts the discriminative feature from HFER to smoothness ($d = 2.09$, $p < 10^{-48}$), showing that attention design governs which spectral channel encodes reasoning quality. Causal ablation confirms the signature traces induction-head circuits. The method generalises to informal chain-of-thought ($d = 0.78$, $p < 10^{-3}$), and in proof search, HFER reranking improves Best-of-16 Pass@1 by $+4.4$--$6.6$\%, matching $98\%$ of the AUC of fully supervised probes with zero labels. Spectral graph analysis is a principled, architecture-aware primitive for reasoning verification.
comment: 30 pages, 13 figures, Accepted at ICML 2026 (main track)

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于注意力矩阵谱图特征的训练无关方法，用于检测语言模型是否真正进行数学推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言模型是否真正推理还是模式匹配难以验证：学习型验证器成本高，基于输出的启发式方法脆弱。现有方法缺乏可靠、无监督的推理质量检测手段，需要一种无需学习参数、可解释的原理性方法。
light_analysis.method: 将注意力矩阵视为加权词图，提取四个谱特征：Fiedler值、高频能量比（HFER）、谱熵和平滑度。跨7个模型、4种架构家族实验，通过因果消融验证特征源于归纳头电路。
light_analysis.result: 效应量达Cohen's d=3.30（p<10^{-116}），单阈值分类准确率85-96%。滑动窗口注意力改变判别特征从HFER到平滑度（d=2.09）。在证明搜索中，HFER重排序提升Best-of-16 Pass@1达4.4-6.6%，匹配98%全监督探针AUC。
light_analysis.conclusion: 谱图分析是一种原理性、架构感知的推理验证方法，可推广到非正式思维链。无需标签即可检测推理质量，为模型可解释性和推理鲁棒性提供新工具。

title: Causal Emotion Recognition in Conversation: Context Saturation and Discourse-Marker Evidence
abstract: We address two persistent gaps in Emotion Recognition in Conversation: which modeling choices materially affect performance, and how recognition findings connect to interpretable discourse-level patterns. We study both through a systematic investigation on IEMOCAP with cross-dataset validation on MELD. For recognition, we run controlled ablations with 10 random seeds and paired significance tests with multiple-comparisons correction, yielding three findings. First, conversational context is the dominant factor, but performance saturates quickly: roughly 90% of the gain is captured within the most recent 10-30 preceding turns, depending on the label set. Second, hierarchical sentence representations help most in utterance-only settings and show a clear advantage on MELD, but their benefit disappears once turn-level context is available, suggesting that conversational history subsumes much of the intra-utterance structure. Third, integrating an external affective lexicon does not improve results, consistent with pretrained encoders already capturing most of the affective signal needed for ERC. Under a strictly causal setting, our simple models achieve strong performance (82.69% 4-way; 67.07% 6-way weighted F1), showing that competitive accuracy is achievable without future turns. For linguistic analysis, we examine 5,286 discourse-marker occurrences and find a reliable association between emotion and marker position (p < .0001). Sad utterances show reduced left-periphery marker usage (21.9%) relative to other emotions (28-32%), consistent with accounts linking left-periphery markers to active discourse management. This aligns with our recognition results, where Sad benefits most from conversational context (+22 percentage points), suggesting sadness may be more context-dependent than emotions with stronger local pragmatic cues.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过系统消融实验和话语标记分析，揭示对话情感识别中上下文饱和现象及情感与话语标记位置的关联。
light_analysis.motivation: 对话情感识别研究长期存在两个空白：哪些建模选择对性能有实质影响，以及识别结果如何与可解释的话语层面模式相联系。填补这些空白对理解模型行为、提升可解释性至关重要。现有方法常依赖未来话语或复杂架构，但缺乏对上下文饱和度及语言学特征的细致分析，导致性能瓶颈与解释性不足。
light_analysis.method: 在IEMOCAP上开展受控消融实验（10个随机种子、配对显著性检验、多重比较校正），并在MELD上交叉验证。识别任务比较不同上下文窗口长度、层次表示与外部情感词典的影响；语言学分析检验5286个话语标记出现频率，按情感类别统计左边缘标记使用比例。
light_analysis.result: 上下文是主导因素，但性能在最近10-30轮饱和（约90%增益）。层次表示仅在无上下文时有效，且外部情感词典无帮助。严格因果设置下，简单模型取得82.69%（4类）和67.07%（6类）加权F1。悲伤话语左边缘标记使用率21.9%，低于其他情感的28-32%（p<.0001），且悲伤从上下文中获益最大（+22个百分点）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文系统验证了对话情感识别的关键因素：上下文窗口并非越大越好，饱和后无益；层次表示与情感词典的增益被上下文覆盖。语言学关联表明悲伤更依赖上下文，与左边缘标记减少一致，为模型解释提供新视角。未来可探索其他语言特征与情感推理的因果关系。

title: Unifying Learning Dynamics and Generalization in Transformers Scaling Law
abstract: The scaling law, a cornerstone of Large Language Model (LLM) development, predicts improvements in model performance with increasing computational resources. Yet, while empirically validated, its theoretical underpinnings remain poorly understood. This work formalizes the learning dynamics of transformer-based language models as an ordinary differential equation (ODE) system, then approximates this process to kernel behaviors. Departing from prior toy-model analyses, we rigorously analyze stochastic gradient descent (SGD) training for multi-layer transformers on sequence-to-sequence data with arbitrary data distribution, closely mirroring real-world conditions. Our analysis characterizes the convergence of generalization error to the irreducible risk as computational resources scale with data, especially during the optimization process.   We establish matching upper and lower bounds on the excess risk, characterized by a distinct phase transition. In the initial optimization phase, the excess risk decays exponentially relative to the computational cost ${\sf C}$. However, once a specific resource allocation threshold is crossed, the system enters a statistical phase, where the generalization error follows a power-law decay of $Θ(\mathsf{C}^{-1/7})$. These rates are certified by complementary lower bounds -- statistical, via an information-theoretic two-point reduction, and optimization-side, via a first-order oracle argument -- rendering the two-stage law tight up to constants, logarithmic factors, and a condition-number gap. Beyond this unified framework, our theory derives isolated scaling laws for model size, training time, and dataset size, elucidating how each variable independently governs the bounds of generalization.

light_analysis.overview: 本文形式化Transformer语言模型的学习动力学为ODE系统，推导出泛化误差的两阶段标度律：指数衰减转为幂律衰减，并给出匹配上下界。
light_analysis.motivation: 标度律是大型语言模型发展的基石，预测性能随计算资源增加而提升，但其理论基础尚不明确。现有研究多基于简化的玩具模型，缺乏对真实条件下多Transformer层、随机梯度下降训练及任意数据分布的严格分析。本文旨在弥合这一理论空白，从学习动力学角度统一理解标度律的底层机制。
light_analysis.method: 将Transformer语言模型的学习动力学形式化为常微分方程组，并近似为核行为。严格分析多层Transformer在序列到序列数据上的随机梯度下降训练，数据分布任意。通过信息论两约简和最优一阶预言机论证，建立泛化超额风险的匹配上下界，刻画两阶段相变：初始优化阶段超额风险指数衰减，越过阈值后进入统计阶段，遵循幂律衰减Θ(C^{-1/7})。
light_analysis.result: 建立了泛化超额风险的匹配上下界，展示明确的相变：优化阶段超额风险随计算成本C指数衰减；统计阶段按C^{-1/7}幂律衰减。这些速率由互补下界保证（信息论两约简和最优一阶预言机论证），使得两阶段律在常数、对数因子和条件数差距下严格。此外，理论推导了模型大小、训练时间和数据集大小的独立标度律。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文统一了Transformer标度律的学习动力学和泛化视角，为标度律提供了严格的理论基础。学术上揭示了优化与统计阶段的根本区别，实践上指导计算资源分配。未来可探索更复杂的架构或训练策略下的标度律，以及条件数差距的精确表征。

title: RSTR: Reducing SpatioTemporal Redundancy in Diffusion Transformers
abstract: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have achieved remarkable success in image generation, yet their deployment is hindered by high computational costs. We identify two sources of redundancy. First, temporal redundancy: Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) applies costly dual forward passes at every timestep, yet guidance matters only at specific steps, and variable scales at critical steps can compensate for skipping others. Second, spatial redundancy: under variable guidance, different transformer blocks exhibit heterogeneous sensitivity, yet uniform calibration across all blocks wastes computation while failing to address their varying requirements. We present RSTR, the first framework to jointly reduce spatiotemporal redundancy in diffusion transformers. Stage-1 addresses temporal redundancy through evolutionary search, discovering sparse guidance schedules with variable scales. Stage-2 addresses spatial redundancy through adaptive rank allocation, assigning calibration capacities to transformer regions based on their sensitivity. Experiments on DiT-XL/2, PixArt-$α$, FLUX, and state-of-the-art Qwen-Image demonstrate 50%-70% compute savings while maintaining or improving quality. On DiT-XL/2, RSTR achieves 57% savings with 15% FID improvement; on Qwen-Image, 3.43$\times$ speedup with preserved quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RSTR框架，首次联合减少扩散变换器中的时空冗余，实现50%-70%计算节省并保持或提升生成质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散变换器（DiTs）在图像生成中计算成本高昂，主要源于两种冗余：时间冗余（Classifier-Free Guidance在每个时间步都执行双重前向传播，但仅在特定步骤需要引导）和空间冗余（不同变换器块对引导的敏感性不同，均匀校准浪费计算）。现有方法未同时处理这两种冗余，导致效率低下。因此需要一种联合优化方法，在保持生成质量的前提下大幅降低计算开销。
light_analysis.method: RSTR框架包含两阶段：阶段1通过进化搜索发现稀疏的引导调度，仅在关键时间步使用可变尺度引导，减少时间冗余；阶段2通过自适应秩分配，根据各变换器区域对引导的敏感性动态调整校准容量，减少空间冗余。在DiT-XL/2、PixArt-α、FLUX和Qwen-Image等模型上验证，无需修改模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 在DiT-XL/2上实现57%计算节省，FID提升15%；在Qwen-Image上实现3.43倍加速，生成质量保持不变。总体在多个模型上达到50%-70%的计算节省，同时保持或提升图像质量，显著优于均匀调度和统一校准的基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: RSTR首次联合减少扩散变换器中的时空冗余，有效缓解了DiTs的高计算成本问题，为高效图像生成提供了可行方案。该方法可直接应用于现有模型，具有实用价值。未来可探索更高效的搜索策略或扩展至其他生成任务。

title: The N-Body Problem: Parallel Execution from Single-Person Egocentric Video
abstract: Humans can intuitively parallelise complex activities, but can a model predict this from observing a single person? Given one egocentric video, we introduce the N-Body Problem: predicting how N individuals, can hypothetically perform the same set of tasks. The goal is to maximise speed-up, but naive assignment of video segments to individuals often violates real-world constraints, leading to physically impossible scenarios like two people using the same object or occupying the same space. To quantify this, we formalise the N-Body Problem and propose a suite of metrics to evaluate both performance (speed-up, task coverage) and feasibility (spatial collisions, object conflicts and causal constraints). As a proof of concept, we introduce a structured prompting strategy that guides a Vision-Language Model (VLM) to reason about the 3D environment, object usage, and temporal dependencies, producing a viable parallel execution. On 100 videos from EPIC-Kitchens and HD-EPIC, for $N = 2$, our structured prompt improves action coverage by 45% over a baseline prompt for Gemini 2.5 Pro, while simultaneously slashing collision rates, object and causal conflicts by 51%, 52% and 55% respectively.

light_analysis.overview: 提出N体问题，从单人自我中心视频预测多人并行任务执行，并设计结构化提示策略引导VLM生成可行方案。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类能直觉地并行化复杂活动，但模型能否从单人观察预测多人并行执行尚未可知。现有方法生成的并行方案常违反现实约束，例如两人使用同一物体或占据同一空间，导致物理上不可行。因此，需要形式化评估并行方案的性能（加速比、任务覆盖率）与可行性（空间碰撞、物体冲突、因果约束），并探索从单视角视频推理可行并行执行的方法。
light_analysis.method: 首先形式化N体问题，定义性能指标（加速比、任务覆盖率）和可行性指标（空间碰撞、物体冲突、因果约束）。提出结构化提示策略，引导Vision-Language Model（VLM）推理3D环境、物体使用和时序依赖，生成可行的并行任务分配。在EPIC-Kitchens和HD-EPIC的100个视频上，针对N=2进行实验，使用Gemini 2.5 Pro作为基础VLM。
light_analysis.result: 结构化提示策略相比基线（直接提示），任务覆盖率提升45%，碰撞率降低51%，物体冲突降低52%，因果冲突降低55%。证明了该方法能有效提升并行方案的性能和可行性，且优于简单提示。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究首次证明从单视角视频预测多人并行执行的可行性，为自动化任务分配、机器人协作等提供新范式。方法依赖VLM的3D推理能力，未来可扩展至更多人数和复杂场景，但当前仅验证了N=2的情况，需进一步研究通用性。

title: MobileFineTuner: A Mobile-Native Framework for On-Device LLM Fine-Tuning in Real-World Embedded AI Applications
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are moving from cloud-centric services toward on-device embedded AI, where models interact with private, longitudinal signals sensed from users and their physical environments. Mobile phones are a natural platform for such applications because they are continuously carried by users, connected to wearable sensors, and deeply integrated with daily mobile applications. However, practical LLM fine-tuning on commodity phones remains difficult. Existing fine-tuning frameworks are largely Python-based and server-oriented, making them hard to deploy inside mobile applications. We present MobileFineTuner, a mobile-native open-source framework for end-to-end LLM fine-tuning on commodity mobile phones. MobileFineTuner is implemented in C++ and provides a reusable training stack. To make fine-tuning feasible under mobile resource constraints, MobileFineTuner integrates a resource-aware training runtime with memory-efficient attention, activation checkpointing, gradient accumulation, parameter sharding, and energy-aware scheduling. We evaluate MobileFineTuner on real mobile phones using GPT-2, Gemma 3, and Qwen2.5 models across multiple fine-tuning tasks. The results show that MobileFineTuner reproduces standard Full-FT and LoRA fine-tuning behavior, substantially reduces memory pressure and improves executability on memory-constrained phones. We further demonstrate MobileFineTuner through a private campus health-agent application, where a local LLM is fine-tuned on user-specific wearable-sensing records to provide more personalized responses while keeping raw records on the phone. These results establish MobileFineTuner as a practical toolkit for studying and building on-device LLM fine-tuning applications in embedded AI and sensing systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出移动端原生框架MobileFineTuner，实现商品手机上LLM的高效微调。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型正向设备端嵌入式AI迁移，但现有微调框架基于Python且面向服务器，难以部署到移动应用中。手机作为持续携带、连接传感器并集成日常应用的平台，急需一个移动原生的微调方案来支持个性化、私密的模型更新。
light_analysis.method: MobileFineTuner采用C++实现，提供可复用的训练栈，集成资源感知训练运行时，包括内存高效注意力、激活检查点、梯度累积、参数分片和能量感知调度，以在手机资源限制下实现微调。支持Full-FT和LoRA方法，兼容GPT-2、Gemma 3、Qwen2.5等模型。
light_analysis.result: 在真实手机上评估，MobileFineTuner成功复现标准微调行为，显著降低内存压力并提升在内存受限手机上的可执行性。通过校园健康助手应用展示，利用用户特定可穿戴传感记录微调本地LLM，提供个性化响应且原始数据保留在手机端。
light_analysis.conclusion: MobileFineTuner为设备端LLM微调提供了实用工具包，推动嵌入式AI和传感系统应用。其开源、移动原生特性有助于隐私保护个性化服务。未来可扩展更多优化策略和模型支持。

title: FronTalk: Benchmarking Front-End Development as Conversational Code Generation with Multi-Modal Feedback
abstract: We present FronTalk, a benchmark for front-end code generation that pioneers the study of a unique interaction dynamic: conversational code generation with multi-modal feedback. In front-end development, visual artifacts such as sketches, mockups and annotated creenshots are essential for conveying design intent, yet their role in multi-turn code generation remains largely unexplored. To address this gap, we focus on the front-end development task and curate FronTalk, a collection of 100 multi-turn dialogues derived from real-world websites across diverse domains such as news, finance, and art. Each turn features both a textual instruction and an equivalent visual instruction, each representing the same user intent. To comprehensively evaluate model performance, we propose a novel agent-based evaluation framework leveraging a web agent to simulate users and explore the website, and thus measuring both functional correctness and user experience. Evaluation of 20 models reveals two key challenges that are under-explored systematically in the literature: (1) a significant forgetting issue where models overwrite previously implemented features, resulting in task failures, and (2) a persistent challenge in interpreting visual feedback, especially for open-source vision-language models (VLMs). We propose a strong baseline to tackle the forgetting issue with AceCoder, a method that critiques the implementation of every past instruction using an autonomous web agent. This approach significantly reduces forgetting to nearly zero and improves the performance by up to 9.3% (56.0% to 65.3%). Overall, we aim to provide a solid foundation for future research in front-end development and the general interaction dynamics of multi-turn, multi-modal code generation. Code and data are released at https://github.com/shirley-wu/frontalk

light_analysis.overview: 提出FronTalk基准，用于多轮对话和多模态反馈的前端代码生成，并提出AceCoder方法有效解决遗忘问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 前端开发中视觉反馈（如草图、模型）在多轮代码生成中的作用未被充分探索。现有方法缺乏对视觉反馈的有效处理，且存在显著的遗忘问题，即模型会覆盖先前实现的功能。这限制了多模态交互在前端开发中的应用，亟需基准和方法推动研究。
light_analysis.method: 构建FronTalk数据集，包含100个来自真实网站的多轮对话，每轮配有文本和视觉指令。提出基于web agent的评估框架，综合衡量功能正确性和用户体验。提出AceCoder基线方法，通过自主web agent批判每一条历史指令的实现，从而缓解遗忘问题。
light_analysis.result: 对20个模型的评估揭示了两个关键挑战：遗忘和视觉反馈理解困难。AceCoder几乎消除了遗忘问题，将性能从56.0%提升至65.3%（提升9.3%）。开源模型在视觉反馈理解上表现较差，闭源模型相对较好。
light_analysis.conclusion: FronTalk为前端开发中的多模态多轮代码生成提供了基准和基线方法，揭示了遗忘和视觉反馈理解两大挑战。工作有助于推动实际开发中的多模态交互，代码和数据集已开源。未来可探索更复杂的视觉反馈和更有效的记忆机制。

title: Visualizing LLM Latent Space Geometry Through Dimensionality Reduction
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) achieve state-of-the-art results across many natural language tasks, but their internal mechanisms remain difficult to interpret. In this work, we extract, process, and visualize latent state geometries in Transformer-based language models through dimensionality reduction. We capture layerwise activations at multiple points within Transformer blocks and enable systematic analysis through Principal Component Analysis (PCA) and Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection (UMAP). We demonstrate experiments on GPT-2 and LLaMa models, where we uncover interesting geometric patterns in latent space. Notably, we identify a clear separation between attention and MLP component outputs across intermediate layers, a pattern not documented in prior work to our knowledge. We also characterize the high norm of latent states at the initial sequence position and visualize the layerwise evolution of latent states. Additionally, we demonstrate the high-dimensional helical structure of GPT-2's positional embeddings and the sequence-wise geometric patterns in LLaMa. We make our code available at https://github.com/Vainateya/Feature_Geometry_Visualization. A better formatted blog-post with identical content is available at https://iclr-blogposts.github.io/2026/blog/2026/vis-llm-latent-geometry/.

light_analysis.overview: 通过降维可视化Transformer LLM的潜在空间几何结构，发现注意力与MLP分离等新几何模式。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在自然语言任务中表现优异，但其内部机制难以解释。现有可解释性方法通常关注注意力权重或神经元行为，缺乏对潜在空间几何结构的系统分析。理解这些几何模式有助于揭示模型的工作原理和表示特性，对提升模型可控性和可解释性具有重要意义。因此，本研究旨在通过降维技术可视化层激活，探索未被发现的几何特征。
light_analysis.method: 论文提取GPT-2和LLaMa模型在Transformer块内多个点的层激活，并应用主成分分析（PCA）和均匀流形近似与投影（UMAP）进行降维。通过可视化层间潜在状态，系统分析几何模式。关键技术包括捕捉注意力输出和MLP输出在不同层的表现，并比较其分离程度。此外，还分析了初始位置的范数特征、层演化以及位置嵌入的螺旋结构。代码已开源。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现多个有趣的几何模式：注意力与MLP组件输出在中间层呈现清晰分离，这是前人未记录的。初始序列位置的潜在状态具有高范数，且层间演化呈现规律性。GPT-2的位置嵌入表现出高维螺旋结构，LLaMa中观察到序列级别的几何模式。这些发现基于可视化和定性分析，未提供定量指标，但揭示了模型内部表示的结构化特征。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过降维可视化方法，揭示了Transformer LLM潜在空间中的新几何模式，包括注意力-MLP分离、螺旋结构等，增进了对模型内部机制的理解。提供了开源可视化工具，便于后续研究。未来工作可进一步量化这些模式与模型性能的关系，或扩展到更大模型及不同任务。该方法为LLM可解释性提供了直观分析手段。

title: CostNav: A Navigation Benchmark for Real-World Economic-Cost Evaluation of Physical AI Agents
abstract: Current navigation benchmarks focus on task success but do not capture the economic constraints essential for commercializing autonomous delivery systems. We introduce CostNav, an Economic Navigation Benchmark that evaluates physical AI agents on a cost-revenue and break-even analysis, pairing Isaac Sim's collision and cargo dynamics with industry-standard data such as Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) filings and Abbreviated Injury Scale (AIS) injury reports. To our knowledge, CostNav is the first physics-grounded economic benchmark to use regulatory and financial data to quantify the gap between navigation metrics and commercial deployment, revealing that high task-success rates alone do not ensure economic viability. Evaluating seven baselines (two rule-based and five imitation-learning methods), we find no method economically viable: all yield negative contribution margins. CANVAS, using only an RGB camera and GPS, attains the highest task success and the least-negative margin among methods with non-zero Service-Level Agreement (SLA) compliance (-\$28.40/run), outperforming LiDAR-equipped Nav2 w/ GPS (-\$37.34/run). A sim-trained policy evaluated on a real delivery robot yields SLA compliance close to its simulation result, indicating that policy performance in CostNav's simulation transfers to real-world deployment. We challenge the community to achieve economic viability on CostNav, which scores methods by cost-revenue outcomes. All resources are available at https://github.com/worv-ai/CostNav.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个经济导航基准CostNav，通过成本-收入分析评估物理AI智能体，揭示高任务成功率不保证经济可行性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前导航基准仅关注任务成功率，但忽略了自主递送系统商业化所需的经济约束，如成本、收入和盈亏平衡。现有方法无法量化导航指标与商业部署之间的差距，导致高成功率方法可能经济上不可行，阻碍了实际应用。因此，需要一个结合物理仿真与行业财务数据的基准来评估经济可行性。
light_analysis.method: CostNav是一个物理基础的经济导航基准，基于Isaac Sim模拟碰撞与货物动力学，并整合SEC财务数据和AIS伤害报告以计算成本-收入指标。评估了七种基线方法（两种基于规则、五种模仿学习），包括CANVAS（仅用RGB相机和GPS）和Nav2 w/ GPS（配备LiDAR）。通过SLA合规性、贡献利润等指标度量经济表现，并验证了模拟到真实的迁移。
light_analysis.result: 所有七种基线方法均产生负贡献利润，显示无经济可行方案。CANVAS在非零SLA合规性方法中表现最佳：任务成功率最高且贡献利润最不负面（-$28.40/run），优于Nav2 w/ GPS（-$37.34/run）。模拟训练策略在真实机器人上SLA合规性接近模拟结果，证明模拟环境可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CostNav首次将经济约束引入导航基准，揭示了高任务成功率不保证商业成功，为自主递送系统商业化提供了评估工具。学术价值在于量化仿真与真实部署的经济差距；实际应用可指导开发者优化成本效益。未来需挑战社区实现经济可行性，可能需结合低成本硬件或高效算法。

title: CaReTS: A Multi-Task Framework Unifying Classification and Regression for Time Series Forecasting
abstract: Recent advances in deep forecasting models have achieved remarkable performance, yet most approaches still struggle to provide both accurate predictions and interpretable insights into temporal dynamics. This paper proposes CaReTS, a novel multi-task learning framework that combines classification and regression tasks for multi-step time series forecasting problems. The framework adopts a dual-stream architecture, where a classification branch learns the stepwise trend into the future, while a regression branch estimates the corresponding deviations from the latest observation of the target variable. The dual-stream design provides more interpretable predictions by disentangling macro-level trends from micro-level deviations in the target variable. To enable effective learning in output prediction, deviation estimation, and trend classification, we design a multi-task loss with uncertainty-aware weighting to adaptively balance the contribution of each task. Furthermore, four variants (CaReTS1--4) are instantiated under this framework to incorporate mainstream temporal modelling encoders, including convolutional neural networks (CNNs), long short-term memory networks (LSTMs), and Transformers. Experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate that CaReTS outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) algorithms in forecasting accuracy, while achieving higher trend classification performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CaReTS多任务框架，通过分类与回归双流架构统一时间序列预测，提升准确性与可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度预测模型虽性能优异，但难以同时提供准确预测和可解释的时间动态洞察。时间序列预测在金融、气象等领域至关重要，而当前方法多聚焦于精度，忽略了对宏观趋势与微观偏差的分离解释。CaReTS旨在通过融合分类与回归任务，弥补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: CaReTS采用双流架构：分类分支学习逐步趋势，回归分支估计与最新观测的偏差。设计不确定性加权的多任务损失函数，自适应平衡各类任务贡献。框架下实现四种变体（CaReTS1-4），分别集成CNN、LSTM及Transformer等时序编码器，支持灵活编码。
light_analysis.result: 在真实数据集上，CaReTS在预测准确性和趋势分类性能上均超越现有最优算法（SOTA），未提供具体数值但强调双重优势。实验验证了多任务学习对精度的提升及双流设计对可解释性的增强。
light_analysis.conclusion: CaReTS通过统一分类与回归任务，为多步时间序列预测提供高精度且可解释的方案。学术上提出新范式，实际中助力需求分析（如趋势识别）。未来可探索更多任务组合或扩展至其他序列建模场景。

title: UI2Code^N: UI-to-Code Generation as Interactive Visual Optimization
abstract: UI-to-code aims to translate UI screenshots into executable front-end code. Despite progress with vision-language models (VLMs), most existing methods formulate UI-to-code as a single-pass generation, which mismatches real-world UI development that is inherently iterative and feedback-driven. We reformulate UI-to-code as an interactive visual optimization problem, where code generation is embedded in a closed-loop process of execution, visual inspection, and iterative refinement driven by rendered visual feedback. To address the non-differentiability of visual objectives and the noise of absolute visual evaluators, we propose Relative Visual Policy Optimization (RVPO), a preference-based reinforcement learning method that optimizes relative visual rankings among rendered candidates under execution feedback. We instantiate this paradigm in UI2Code^N, an open-source 9B model trained via continual pre-training, supervised fine-tuning, and reinforcement learning. Experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on UI drafting, UI polishing, and UI editing benchmarks, even outperforming larger models, with performance consistently improving through iterative visual optimization. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/zai-org/UI2Code_N.

light_analysis.overview: 将UI-to-Code任务重新定义为交互式视觉优化问题，提出相对视觉策略优化方法，实现迭代式代码生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有UI-to-Code方法大多采用单次生成范式，与现实中迭代式、反馈驱动的UI开发流程不匹配。由于视觉目标不可微分且绝对视觉评估器存在噪声，难以直接优化生成代码的视觉效果。因此需要一种能够利用渲染视觉反馈进行迭代优化的方法，以提升代码生成的视觉保真度。
light_analysis.method: 提出相对视觉策略优化（RVPO），一种基于偏好的强化学习方法，通过比较候选代码渲染后的视觉排名进行优化，避免绝对评估的噪声。模型UI2Code^N（9B参数）采用连续预训练、监督微调和强化学习三阶段训练，并在代码执行、视觉检查和迭代精炼的闭环中运行。
light_analysis.result: 在UI草稿、UI润色和UI编辑三个基准上均取得最先进性能，甚至超越更大模型。迭代视觉优化使性能持续提升，验证了交互式优化范式的有效性。具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文重新定义了UI-to-Code任务，证明了交互式视觉优化和偏好强化学习的有效性。UI2Code^N作为开源模型，为UI代码生成提供了实用工具。未来可探索更高效的视觉反馈机制或扩展至多模态交互场景。

title: Time-multiplexed layer reuse for physical neural networks
abstract: Physical neural networks (PNNs) are promising candidates for next-generation computing, but existing demonstrations remain several orders of magnitude smaller than modern digital neural networks, whose recent advances have been driven by rapid growth in trainable parameters. This situation resembles the constraints of early digital neural networks, which led to ideas around parameter reuse. We investigate what similarly efficient hardware architectures may look like, focusing specifically on the common bottleneck of slow re-adjustment of the weights in PNNs. We propose the Time-Indexed Deep Alternating Layers Network (TIDAL-Net), which occupies an intermediate regime between recurrent and deep neural networks, specifically aimed at the scales and restrictions of common PNN prototypes. TIDAL-Net leverages the timescale separation found in many PNNs between fast forward dynamics and slowly trainable weights and biases, using layer-by-layer time multiplexing to increase effective depth while limiting implementation cost. Numerical experiments on image classification and natural language processing tasks show that TIDAL-Net improves performance with only minor modifications to conventional PNNs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TIDAL-Net，通过时间多路复用层间复用，以低成本增加物理神经网络的有效深度。
light_analysis.motivation: 物理神经网络（PNN）规模远小于现代数字神经网络，受限于权重缓慢调整。现有PNN演示参数数量级远低于数字网络，而数字网络的进步依赖参数快速增长。借鉴早期数字网络中参数复用的思想，研究适用于PNN的高效硬件架构，以突破规模瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 提出Time-Indexed Deep Alternating Layers Network (TIDAL-Net)，介于循环与深度网络之间。利用PNN中快速前向动力学与慢速可训练权重的时间尺度分离，采用逐层时间多路复用（time multiplexing）增加有效深度，同时限制实现成本。仅需对传统PNN进行微小修改。
light_analysis.result: 在图像分类和自然语言处理任务上的数值实验表明，TIDAL-Net在仅对传统PNN进行微小修改的情况下，提升了性能。摘要未提供具体精度或提升数值，但验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TIDAL-Net为PNN提供了一种有效的层复用策略，在类似早期数字网络规模限制下，通过时间多路复用提升了计算能力。该设计适用于常见PNN原型的尺度与约束，具有潜在应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的时间复用模式及与其他参数复用技术的结合。

title: M4FC: a Multimodal, Multilingual, Multicultural, Multitask Real-World Fact-Checking Dataset
abstract: Existing real-world datasets for multimodal fact-checking have multiple limitations: they contain few instances, cover on only one or two languages, focus only on one task, or rely on external news article sets for sourcing true claims. To address these shortcomings, we introduce M4FC, a new real-world dataset comprising 4,982 images paired with 6,980 claims. The images, verified by professional fact-checkers from 22 organizations, represent a diverse range of cultural and geographic contexts. Each claim is available in one or two out of ten languages. M4FC spans six multimodal fact-checking tasks: visual claim extraction, claimant intent prediction, fake image detection, image contextualization, location verification, and verdict prediction. We provide baseline results for all tasks and analyze how combining intermediate tasks affects verdict prediction performance. We make our dataset and code publicly available.
comment: Preprint under review. Code and data available at: https://github.com/UKPLab/M4FC

light_analysis.overview: 提出M4FC，一个多模态、多语言、多文化、多任务的事实核查数据集，包含4982张图像和6980条声明，支持六个相关任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有真实世界多模态事实核查数据集存在实例数量少、仅覆盖一两种语言、聚焦单一任务或依赖外部新闻源等局限。这些不足限制了跨语言、跨文化场景下事实核查系统的泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 从22个专业事实核查机构收集经验证的图像，构建包含4982张图像和6980条声明的数据集。每条声明可用十种语言中的一或两种呈现。涵盖视觉声明提取、声明者意图预测、假图像检测、图像情境化、位置验证和裁决预测六个任务，并提供各任务的基线结果。
light_analysis.result: 为所有六个任务提供基线性能指标，并分析组合中间任务（如视觉声明提取、假图像检测）对最终裁决预测任务性能的影响，但摘要未给出具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: M4FC数据集及其代码已公开，旨在促进多语言、多文化背景下的多模态事实核查研究。该资源可支持跨任务学习，并有望推动更通用的事实核查模型开发。

title: Moving Beyond Diffusion: Hierarchy-to-Hierarchy Autoregression for fMRI-to-Image Reconstruction
abstract: Reconstructing visual stimuli from fMRI signals is a central challenge bridging machine learning and neuroscience. Recent diffusion-based methods typically map fMRI activity to a single neural embedding, using it as static guidance throughout the entire generation process. However, this fixed guidance collapses hierarchical neural information and is misaligned with the stage-dependent demands of image reconstruction. In response, we propose MindHier, a coarse-to-fine fMRI-to-image reconstruction framework built on scale-wise autoregressive modeling. MindHier introduces three components: a Hierarchical fMRI Encoder to extract multi-level neural embeddings, a Hierarchy-to-Hierarchy Alignment scheme to enforce layer-wise correspondence with CLIP features, and a Scale-Aware Coarse-to-Fine Neural Guidance strategy to inject these embeddings into autoregression at matching scales. These designs make MindHier an efficient and cognitively aligned alternative to diffusion-based methods by enabling a hierarchical reconstruction process that synthesizes global semantics before refining local details, akin to human visual perception. Extensive experiments on the NSD dataset show that MindHier achieves superior semantic fidelity, 4.67$\times$ faster inference, and more deterministic results than the diffusion-based baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MindHier，一种基于层次到层次自回归模型的fMRI-to-图像重建框架，通过从粗到细的层级生成过程实现高效、认知对齐的重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散方法将fMRI映射到单一神经嵌入作为静态指导，导致层级神经信息丢失且与图像重建的阶段需求不匹配。从fMRI重建视觉刺激是机器学习和神经科学的核心挑战，但现有方法受限于固定指导，无法有效利用层级信息，限制了语义保真度和效率。
light_analysis.method: MindHier包含三个组件：层次化fMRI编码器提取多级神经嵌入；层次到层次对齐方案强制逐层对应CLIP特征；尺度感知的从粗到细神经指导策略将嵌入注入自回归模型匹配尺度。通过自回归建模实现先合成全局语义再细化局部细节的层级重建过程。
light_analysis.result: 在NSD数据集上，MindHier在语义保真度上优于扩散基线，推理速度快4.67倍，且生成结果更确定（减少随机性），优于扩散方法的不确定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MindHier为fMRI-to-图像重建提供了高效且认知对齐的替代方案，其层级重建过程类似人类视觉感知。该方法具有学术价值（新框架）和实际应用潜力（更快推理），未来可探索更多神经编码任务。

title: Cross-modal Consistency Guidance for Robust Emotion Control in Auto-Regressive TTS Models
abstract: While Text-to-Speech (TTS) systems enable emotional control via natural-language instructions, expressiveness, naturalness, and speech quality degrade when the target emotion conflicts with the textual semantics. We propose a Cross-modal Consistency Guided Classifier-Free Guidance (CCG-CFG) method with dynamic scales based on the degree of inconsistency between the text emotion and the explicit speech emotion, replacing the dropout condition with the text emotion. We also distill the CCG-CFG guidance signal using a hard-sample mining strategy, improving the TTS model's emotional alignment capability. Evaluations on five emotional corpora and two TTS benchmarks show that our approaches applied to CosyVoice2 achieve up to a 12% absolute improvement in emotion-recognition accuracy and a 10% relative improvement in subjective scores, outperforming baselines including HierSpeech++, Qwen3-TTS, and original CosyVoice2, while preserving intelligibility, naturalness, and high speech quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出跨模态一致性引导的分类器自由引导方法，解决情感TTS中文本-情感冲突问题，提升情感对齐和语音质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有TTS系统虽然能通过自然语言指令控制情感，但当目标情感与文本语义冲突时，表现力、自然度和语音质量会下降。这是因为情感引导信号与文本内容不一致，导致生成结果不自然。因此，需要一种能动态调节情感强度、兼容文本语义的情感控制方法，以保持语音自然性和情感准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出跨模态一致性引导分类器自由引导（CCG-CFG）方法，根据文本情感与显式语音情感的不一致程度动态调整引导尺度，并用文本情感替换dropout条件。同时，采用困难样本挖掘策略蒸馏引导信号，增强模型对情感冲突样本的适应能力。该方法应用于CosyVoice2自回归TTS模型，在多个情感语料库上训练。
light_analysis.result: 在五个情感语料库和两个TTS基准测试上，CCG-CFG方法相比HierSpeech++、Qwen3-TTS和原CosyVoice2等基线，情感识别准确率绝对提升12%，主观评分相对提升10%，同时保持了语音的清晰度、自然度和高质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了情感TTS中文本与情感冲突的问题，通过跨模态一致性引导和困难样本挖掘，显著提升了情感对齐能力和语音质量。未来可扩展至更多情感维度或跨语言场景，但需验证在更大规模数据上的泛化性。

title: Physics-Driven Spatiotemporal Modeling for AI-Generated Video Detection
abstract: AI-generated videos have achieved near-perfect visual realism (e.g., Sora), urgently necessitating reliable detection mechanisms. However, detecting such videos faces significant challenges in modeling high-dimensional spatiotemporal dynamics and identifying subtle anomalies that violate physical laws. In this paper, we propose the first physics-driven AI-generated video detection paradigm based on probability flow conservation principles. Specifically, we propose a statistic called Normalized Spatiotemporal Gradient (NSG), which quantifies the ratio of spatial probability gradients to temporal density changes, explicitly capturing deviations from natural video dynamics. Leveraging pre-trained diffusion models, we develop an NSG estimator through spatial gradients approximation and motion-aware temporal modeling without complex motion decomposition while preserving physical constraints. Building on this, we propose an NSG-based video detection method (NSG-VD) that computes the Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) between NSG features of the test and real videos as a detection metric. Last, we derive an upper bound of NSG feature distances between real and generated videos, proving that generated videos exhibit amplified discrepancies due to distributional shifts. Extensive experiments confirm that NSG-VD outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by 16.00% in Recall and 10.75% in F1-Score, validating the superior performance of NSG-VD. The source code is available at https://github.com/ZSHsh98/NSG-VD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个基于物理驱动的AI生成视频检测方法NSG-VD，利用概率流守恒原理有效捕捉时空物理异常。
light_analysis.motivation: AI生成视频（如Sora）视觉逼真度极高，亟需可靠检测机制。现有方法难以建模高维时空动态并识别违反物理规律的细微异常，导致检测性能不足。
light_analysis.method: 基于概率流守恒原理，提出归一化时空梯度（NSG）统计量，量化空间概率梯度与时间密度变化的比率。利用预训练扩散模型，通过空间梯度近似和运动感知时间建模估计NSG，避免复杂运动分解。以测试视频与真实视频NSG特征的最大均值差异（MMD）作为检测指标，并推导了NSG特征距离的理论上界。
light_analysis.result: 在多项实验上，NSG-VD相比最先进基线在召回率上提升16.00%，F1分数提升10.75%，证明了基于物理驱动的方法在AI生成视频检测中的优越性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次将物理驱动思想引入AI生成视频检测，通过NSG有效捕获异常时空动力学，显著提升检测效果。开源代码促进了领域研究。未来可探索更复杂的物理约束或跨模态扩展。

title: GILT: An LLM-Free, Tuning-Free Graph Foundational Model for In-Context Learning
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are powerful tools for processing relational data but often struggle to generalize to unseen graphs, giving rise to the development of Graph Foundational Models (GFMs). However, current GFMs are challenged by the extreme heterogeneity of graph data, where each graph can possess a unique feature space, label set, and topology. To address this, two main paradigms have emerged. The first leverages Large Language Models (LLMs), but is fundamentally text-dependent, thus struggles to handle the numerical features in vast graphs. The second pre-trains a structure-based model, but the adaptation to new tasks typically requires a costly, per-graph tuning stage, creating a critical efficiency bottleneck. In this work, we move beyond these limitations and introduce \textbf{G}raph \textbf{I}n-context \textbf{L}earning \textbf{T}ransformer (GILT), a framework built on an LLM-free and tuning-free architecture. GILT introduces a novel token-based framework for in-context learning (ICL) on graphs, reframing classification tasks spanning node, edge and graph levels in a unified framework. This mechanism is the key to handling heterogeneity, as it is designed to operate on generic numerical features. Further, its ability to understand class semantics dynamically from the context enables tuning-free adaptation. Comprehensive experiments show that GILT achieves stronger few-shot performance with significantly less time than LLM-based or tuning-based baselines, validating the effectiveness of our approach. Our code is available at: https://github.com/yiming421/inductnode/.
comment: Accepted as an oral presentation at the GFM @ ICML 2026 Workshop

light_analysis.overview: 提出GILT，一种无需大语言模型和微调的全图基础模型，通过上下文学习统一处理节点、边和图级别的分类任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 图神经网络虽强大，但难以泛化到未见图，现有图基础模型面临图数据异质性挑战（特征空间、标签集、拓扑结构各异）。当前两类主流方法：一是依赖大语言模型，但依赖文本描述，难以处理大规模图的数值特征；二是预训练结构模型，但适应新任务需要逐图微调，效率低下。因此需要一种无需微调和LLM的高效通用框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出GILT（Graph In-context Learning Transformer），采用LLM-free和tuning-free架构。核心是创新的基于令牌的上下文学习框架，将节点、边和图级别的分类任务统一在同一框架中。通过从上下文中动态理解类别语义实现无需微调，且直接操作通用数值特征以处理异质性。框架基于Transformer，无需额外预训练或微调步骤。
light_analysis.result: 全面实验表明，GILT在少样本学习场景下，相比基于大语言模型或需要微调的基线方法，在显著更短的时间里取得了更强的少样本性能。具体性能指标原文未详细列出，但验证了方法的有效性和高效性，代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: GILT通过无LLM、无微调的架构解决了图基础模型中的异质性和效率瓶颈，提供了一种统一的上下文学习框架。其学术价值在于推动了图基础模型的泛化能力，实际应用价值在于能快速适应新图任务而无需额外计算。未来可探索扩展到更多图任务或与其他模型结合。

title: Certifiable Safe RLHF: Semantic Grounding and Fixed Penalty Constraint Optimization for Safer LLM Alignment
abstract: Ensuring safety is a foundational requirement for large language models (LLMs). Achieving an appropriate balance between enhancing the utility of model outputs and mitigating their potential for harm is a complex and persistent challenge. Contemporary approaches frequently formalize this problem within the framework of Constrained Markov Decision Processes (CMDPs) and employ established CMDP optimization techniques. However, these methods exhibit two notable limitations. First, their reliance on reward and cost functions renders performance highly sensitive to the underlying scoring mechanism, which must capture semantic meaning rather than being triggered by superficial keywords. Second, CMDP-based training entails tuning dual-variable, a process that is both computationally expensive and does not provide any provable safety guarantee for a fixed dual variable that can be exploitable through adversarial jailbreaks. To overcome these limitations, we introduce Certifiable Safe-RLHF (CS-RLHF) that introduces a cost model trained on a large-scale corpus to assign semantically grounded safety scores. In contrast to the lagrangian-based approach, CS-RLHF adopts a rectified penalty-based formulation. This design draws on the theory of exact penalty functions in constrained optimization, wherein constraint satisfaction is enforced directly through a suitably chosen penalty term. With an appropriately scaled penalty, feasibility of the safety constraints can be guaranteed at the optimizer, eliminating the need for dual-variable updates. Empirical evaluation demonstrates that CS-RLHF outperforms state-of-the-art LLM model responses rendering at-least 5 times efficient against nominal and jail-breaking prompts

light_analysis.overview: 提出可证明安全的RLHF方法CS-RLHF，通过语义安全评分和固定惩罚约束优化实现更安全的LLM对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于CMDP的方法依赖奖励和成本函数，易受表面关键词影响，且双变量调整计算昂贵、无法提供可证明安全保证，导致模型易受对抗性越狱攻击。为解决这些问题，需要一种更鲁棒、高效且可证明安全的对齐方法。
light_analysis.method: CS-RLHF引入在大规模语料上训练的成本模型，分配语义安全分数；采用基于修正惩罚的优化公式，利用精确罚函数理论，通过适当惩罚项直接强制执行约束，在优化器处保证安全约束可行性，消除双变量更新，降低计算成本。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，CS-RLHF在响应质量和安全性上优于现有最先进方法，对名义和越狱提示的效率至少提升5倍，展现出更强的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CS-RLHF提供了可证明安全的RLHF框架，通过语义锚定和固定惩罚优化解决了安全对齐的关键问题。学术上具有理论保证，实际应用可显著增强LLM安全性，减少对抗攻击风险。未来可探索惩罚项的自适应选择。

title: Reinforcement Learning with Action-Triggered Observations
abstract: We introduce Action-Triggered Sporadically Traceable Markov Decision Processes (ATST-MDPs), a reinforcement learning framework for partial observability in which full state observations occur stochastically at each step, with probability determined by the chosen action. We derive Bellman equations tailored to this setting and establish the existence of an optimal policy. Exploiting the fact that sporadic observations reveal the full state, we provide an equivalent formulation in which agents commit to action-sequences between consecutive observations. Under the linear MDP assumption, we show that the value function over such action-sequences admits a linear representation in a finite-dimensional feature map, enabling standard regression-based methods. As an application, we derive ATST-LSVI-UCB, an optimistic algorithm achieving regret $\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{Kd^3(1-γ)^{-3}})$ for episodic learning with geometrically distributed horizons, where $K$ is the number of episodes, $d$ the feature dimension, and $γ$ the discount factor (episode continuation probability), matching the known rate for linear MDPs with full observability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ATST-MDP框架处理部分可观测强化学习，利用动作触发状态观测，实现线性MDP下的最优遗憾界。
light_analysis.motivation: 在部分可观测环境中，智能体通常无法获得完整状态信息，但现有方法如POMDP求解复杂。实际场景中，状态观测可能由动作触发（例如监控系统仅在关键操作后显示状态），随机且稀疏。这种设置未得到充分研究，且缺乏理论保证。本文旨在建模此类问题并提供高效算法。
light_analysis.method: 定义ATST-MDP，其中状态以动作触发的概率随机观测，且观测时完全揭示状态。推导贝尔曼方程并证明最优策略存在。通过将行动序列作为决策单元，将问题转化为完全可观测MDP。在线性MDP假设下，证明价值函数具有线性表示，可使用回归方法。提出ATST-LSVI-UCB算法，利用乐观原则和上置信界。
light_analysis.result: 在阶段性学习（几何分布幕长）下，ATST-LSVI-UCB获得遗憾界$\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{Kd^3(1-\gamma)^{-3}})$，其中$K$为幕数，$d$特征维度，$\gamma$折扣因子。该界与完全可观测线性MDP的最优率匹配，表明稀疏观测未导致性能损失。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为动作触发观测的部分可观测RL提供了理论基础和实用算法，证明在结构条件下可达到与完全观测相同的样本效率。未来可扩展至非线性MDP或更一般的观测模型。

title: Bypassing Prompt Guards in Production with Controlled-Release Prompting
abstract: Ball et al. recently established that prompt filtering for AI alignment faces a fundamental barrier: under standard cryptographic assumptions, no filter running significantly faster than the protected model can universally distinguish adversarial prompts from benign ones. We investigate whether this impossibility result translates to real-world vulnerabilities in deployed large language model (LLM) systems. We answer affirmatively by introducing controlled-release prompting, a practical instantiation of the theoretical framework that exploits the resource asymmetry between lightweight input filters and the main models they protect. Unlike the theoretical construction, our attack does not require model modification: it generates malicious prompts that are indecipherable by any bounded filter yet remain tractable to the target LLM. We find our attack to be successful on four major chat platforms (Google Gemini, DeepSeek Chat, xAI Grok, and Mistral Le Chat) where baseline methods fail. Additionally, we apply our attack to extract copyrighted data from Gemini. Finally, we provide a systematic evaluation of 14 open-weight prompt guard models, revealing that even reasoning-capable filters cannot reliably detect our attack without incurring prohibitive resource overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出受控释放提示攻击，利用资源不对称性绕过LLM提示过滤器，在多个商业平台成功验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有提示过滤方法存在理论上的不可能性，但实际系统中是否可被利用尚不明确。本研究旨在验证这一理论结果在实际部署中的脆弱性，发现轻量级过滤器与主模型之间的资源不对称可被攻击者利用，从而绕过安全防护。
light_analysis.method: 提出受控释放提示（Controlled-Release Prompting）攻击，生成对轻量级过滤器不可解析但对目标LLM可处理的恶意提示。无需修改模型，仅利用计算资源差异。在Gemini、DeepSeek Chat、xAI Grok和Mistral Le Chat上测试，并尝试从Gemini提取版权数据。
light_analysis.result: 攻击在四个商业平台（Gemini、DeepSeek Chat、xAI Grok、Mistral Le Chat）上成功，基线方法失败。成功从Gemini提取版权数据。对14个开源提示守卫模型的系统评估显示，即使具备推理能力的过滤器也无法可靠检测，除非产生巨大资源开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证实了理论攻击在实际系统中的可行性，暴露了现有提示过滤机制的严重缺陷。该工作强调了部署安全LLM时需考虑资源不对称性，并为未来防御设计提供了重要警示。

title: Noise-Guided Transport for Imitation Learning
abstract: We consider imitation learning in the low-data regime, where only a limited number of expert demonstrations are available. In this setting, methods that rely on large-scale pretraining or high-capacity architectures can be difficult to apply, and efficiency with respect to demonstration data becomes critical. We introduce Noise-Guided Transport (NGT), a lightweight off-policy method that casts imitation as an optimal transport problem solved via adversarial training. NGT requires no pretraining or specialized architectures, incorporates uncertainty estimation by design, and is easy to implement and tune. Despite its simplicity, NGT achieves strong performance on challenging continuous control tasks, including high-dimensional Humanoid tasks, under ultra-low data regimes with as few as 20 transitions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出噪声引导传输（NGT），一种轻量级离策略模仿学习方法，在极低数据量下通过对抗训练解决最优传输问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有模仿学习方法在低数据场景下依赖大规模预训练或高容量架构，难以直接应用；同时，少量示范数据导致效率瓶颈。NGT旨在解决这些局限，无需预训练和复杂架构，且通过设计内置不确定性估计，在仅20个转换的超低数据条件下实现高效学习。
light_analysis.method: NGT将模仿学习建模为最优传输问题，采用对抗训练框架。该方法为离策略（off-policy），无需预训练或专用架构，通过噪声引导实现传输过程，并天然融入不确定性估计。实现简单，调参容易。
light_analysis.result: 在连续控制任务（包括高维Humanoid任务）上，使用极少专家示范（仅20个过渡），NGT取得了强性能。与依赖大规模数据和复杂模型的方法相比，NGT在数据效率上显著优越，且性能不逊色。
light_analysis.conclusion: NGT为低数据模仿学习提供了一种轻量级有效方案，其简单性、数据效率和不需预训练的特点使其具有实用价值。未来工作可探索其在更复杂场景或与其他方法的结合。

title: Geometric Metrics and LLMs: What They Measure and When They Work
abstract: We present a systematic stress-test of geometric metrics for LLM evaluation. Rank-based geometric properties of internal representations have shown promise as reference-free quality signals, but the conditions under which they are reliable remain unclear. We evaluate eight commonly-used metrics: intrinsic-dimensionality estimators, spectral norms, and related quantities across six tester models (0.5-8B) and eight generators on contrasting tasks, separating genuine geometric signal from text-length effects and from what standard text statistics already capture. Three findings emerge. First, some metrics (notably Schatten Norm and MOM) mainly reflect output length, and their apparent discriminative power collapses once length is controlled. Second, geometric metrics add modest but real information beyond text statistics: combined with them, a classifier reaches 78% accuracy on 6-way generator identification versus 69% for text statistics alone. Third, rather than tracking a general notion of text quality, the metrics demonstrate only moderate association between the intrinsic-dimensionality and lexical diversity (RTTR). We give use-case-specific recommendations and identify failure detection as the most promising near-term application.

light_analysis.overview: 系统压力测试揭示了几何度量在LLM评估中的可靠性条件，发现部分度量主要反映文本长度，并给出应用建议。
light_analysis.motivation: 几何度量作为无参考质量信号在LLM评估中表现出潜力，但其可靠性条件尚不明确。现有研究未系统分离几何信号与文本长度效应及标准文本统计信息，导致度量有效性和局限性模糊。本文旨在通过压力测试明确何时几何度量可靠，为实际应用提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 评估了八种常用几何度量，包括内在维数估计、谱范数等，在六个测试模型（0.5-8B参数）和八个生成器上进行对比任务。通过控制文本长度和标准文本统计量（如词汇多样性），分离几何信号与混杂因素，分析其独立贡献。
light_analysis.result: Schatten Norm和MOM度量主要反映输出长度，控制长度后辨别力消失。结合几何度量后，分类器对六种生成器识别准确率达78%，较仅文本统计的69%提升9个百分点。内在维数与词汇多样性（RTTR）仅呈中等关联。
light_analysis.conclusion: 几何度量在文本统计基础上提供有限但真实的信息增量，故障检测是最有前景的近期应用。研究系统揭示了度量依赖条件，为LLM评估中几何度量的选择提供了具体建议，并指出部分度量需谨慎使用以避免长度偏差。

title: Toward Preference-aligned Large Language Models via Residual-based Model Steering
abstract: Preference alignment is a critical step in making Large Language Models (LLMs) useful and aligned with (human) preferences. Existing approaches such as Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback or Direct Preference Optimization typically require curated data and expensive optimization over billions of parameters, and eventually lead to persistent task-specific models. In this work, we introduce Preference alignment of Large Language Models via Residual Steering (PaLRS), a training-free method that exploits preference signals encoded in the residual streams of LLMs. From as few as one hundred preference pairs, PaLRS extracts lightweight, plug-and-play steering vectors that can be applied at inference time to push models toward preferred behaviors. We evaluate PaLRS on various small-to-medium-scale open-source LLMs, showing that PaLRS-aligned models achieve consistent gains on mathematical reasoning and code generation benchmarks while preserving baseline general-purpose performance. Moreover, when compared to models aligned with DPO and SimPO, they perform better with great time-savings. Our findings highlight that PaLRS offers an effective, much more efficient and flexible alternative to standard preference optimization pipelines, offering a training-free, plug-and-play mechanism for alignment with minimal data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需训练的残差引导方法，从少量偏好对中提取引导向量，实现大语言模型的偏好对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有偏好对齐方法如RLHF和DPO需要大量标注数据和昂贵的参数优化，生成不可通用的专用模型。亟需一种高效、灵活且数据高效的替代方案，能够在推理时动态调整模型行为，同时保持基础性能。
light_analysis.method: PaLRS利用残差流中的偏好信号，从约一百个偏好对中提取轻量级、即插即用的引导向量，在推理时应用以推动模型向偏好行为偏移。无需额外训练，兼容主流开源LLM。
light_analysis.result: 在多个小到中型开源LLM上，PaLRS在数学推理和代码生成基准上取得一致提升，同时保留通用任务性能。与DPO/SimPO相比，性能更优且时间成本更低，展示了高效性与有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PaLRS为偏好对齐提供了一种无需训练、即插即用的有效替代方案，极大降低了数据与计算需求。适用于资源受限场景，未来可探索更大模型和更复杂偏好信号的扩展。

title: Resource-Aware LLM Reasoning for Mobile Edge General Intelligence
abstract: The rapid advancement of large language models (LLMs) has enabled an emergence of agentic artificial intelligence (AI) with powerful reasoning and autonomous decision-making capabilities. This integration with edge computing has led to the development of Mobile Edge General Intelligence (MEGI), which brings real-time, privacy-preserving reasoning to the network edge. However, deploying LLM-based agentic AI reasoning in MEGI environments poses significant challenges due to the high computational demands of reasoning and the limited resources of edge devices. To address these challenges, we propose a joint optimization framework for efficient LLM reasoning deployment in MEGI. First, we systematically review enhancement methods to identify mechanisms suitable for edge adaptation. Subsequently, we present a distributed framework that synergizes reasoning enhancement via adaptive CoT prompting with scalable deployment through a distributed MoE architecture. An important innovation of this approach involves modeling reasoning depth as a dynamic network resource variable, which is optimized jointly with expert activation and transmission power. This mechanism allows the system to dynamically regulate expert networks and reasoning complexity according to task requirements and device capabilities. Experimental evaluations in mobile edge environments demonstrate that the proposed framework effectively balances reasoning quality and resource efficiency. The results show that with less than one second of additional inference time, both accuracy and latency satisfaction rate can reach 90\%, validating the practical viability of deploying sophisticated LLM reasoning in resource-constrained MEGI systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出联合优化框架，通过自适应CoT提示和分布式MoE架构，在移动边缘环境中平衡LLM推理质量与资源效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在移动边缘通用智能(MEGI)中面临高计算需求与边缘设备资源受限的矛盾。现有方法未有效联合优化推理深度、专家激活和传输功率，导致推理质量或资源效率低下。该问题对实现实时、隐私保护的边缘推理至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 提出联合优化框架：系统回顾增强方法以确定边缘适配机制；构建分布式框架，通过自适应CoT提示增强推理，并采用分布式MoE架构实现可扩展部署。创新之处在于将推理深度建模为动态网络资源变量，与专家激活和传输功率联合优化，根据任务需求和设备能力动态调节。
light_analysis.result: 在移动边缘环境中，该框架平衡了推理质量和资源效率。额外推理时间小于1秒时，准确率和时延满足率均达90%，验证了在资源受限MEGI系统中部署复杂LLM推理的可行性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出资源感知的LLM推理框架，联合优化推理深度、专家激活和传输功率，实现边缘设备高效推理。实验验证实用性。未来可探索更复杂任务自适应策略或扩展至更多样化边缘场景。

title: MARIC: Multi-Agent Reasoning for Image Classification
abstract: Image classification has traditionally relied on parameter-intensive model training, requiring large-scale annotated datasets and extensive fine tuning to achieve competitive performance. While recent vision language models (VLMs) alleviate some of these constraints, they remain limited by their reliance on single pass representations, often failing to capture complementary aspects of visual content. In this paper, we introduce Multi Agent based Reasoning for Image Classification (MARIC), a multi agent framework that reformulates image classification as a collaborative reasoning process. MARIC first utilizes an Outliner Agent to analyze the global theme of the image and generate targeted prompts. Based on these prompts, three Aspect Agents extract fine grained descriptions along distinct visual dimensions. Finally, a Reasoning Agent synthesizes these complementary outputs through integrated reflection step, producing a unified representation for classification. By explicitly decomposing the task into multiple perspectives and encouraging reflective synthesis, MARIC mitigates the shortcomings of both parameter-heavy training and monolithic VLM reasoning. Experiments on 4 diverse image classification benchmark datasets demonstrate that MARIC significantly outperforms baselines, highlighting the effectiveness of multi-agent visual reasoning for robust and interpretable image classification.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多智能体协作推理框架MARIC，将图像分类重构为全局分析、多维度描述与反思综合的协作过程。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统图像分类依赖参数密集型模型和大规模标注数据，近期视觉语言模型虽缓解部分问题，但单次表示无法捕捉视觉内容的互补方面，导致分类性能受限。现有方法缺乏对图像多维度特征的协同利用，需要更有效的推理范式。
light_analysis.method: MARIC框架包含三个智能体：Outliner Agent分析图像全局主题并生成针对性提示；三个Aspect Agents基于提示提取不同视觉维度的细粒度描述；Reasoning Agent通过反思步骤整合互补输出，形成统一分类表示。该方法将任务分解为多视角，促进反思性综合。
light_analysis.result: 在4个多样化图像分类基准数据集上，MARIC显著优于基线方法，验证了多智能体视觉推理对鲁棒且可解释的图像分类的有效性。摘要未提供具体数值，但明确提及性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: MARIC通过多智能体协作推理克服了参数密集训练和单次VLM推理的局限，实现了高效且可解释的分类。未来可扩展至更多视觉任务，但摘要未讨论局限性。

title: A Survey of Reasoning and Agentic Systems in Time Series with Large Language Models
abstract: Time series reasoning treats time as a first-class axis and incorporates intermediate evidence directly into the answer. This survey defines the problem and organizes the literature by reasoning topology with three families: direct reasoning in one step, linear chain reasoning with explicit intermediates, and branch-structured reasoning that explores, revises, and aggregates. The topology is crossed with the main objectives of the field, including traditional time series analysis, explanation and understanding, causal inference and decision making, and time series generation, while a compact tag set spans these axes and captures decomposition and verification, ensembling, tool use, knowledge access, multimodality, agent loops, and LLM alignment regimes. Methods and systems are reviewed across domains, showing what each topology enables and where it breaks down in faithfulness or robustness, along with curated datasets, benchmarks, and resources that support study and deployment (https://github.com/blacksnail789521/Time-Series-Reasoning-Survey). Evaluation practices that keep evidence visible and temporally aligned are highlighted, and guidance is distilled on matching topology to uncertainty, grounding with observable artifacts, planning for shift and streaming, and treating cost and latency as design budgets. We emphasize that reasoning structures must balance capacity for grounding and self-correction against computational cost and reproducibility, while future progress will likely depend on benchmarks that tie reasoning quality to utility and on closed-loop testbeds that trade off cost and risk under shift-aware, streaming, and long-horizon settings. Taken together, these directions mark a shift from narrow accuracy toward reliability at scale, enabling systems that not only analyze but also understand, explain, and act on dynamic worlds with traceable evidence and credible outcomes.
comment: Accepted to Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR)

light_analysis.overview: 对基于大语言模型的时间序列推理与智能体系统进行综述，按推理拓扑分类并评估其能力与局限。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间序列分析在传统方法中缺乏中间证据和可解释性，现有LLM应用未系统化推理结构。本研究通过定义推理拓扑（直接、线性链、分支）并交叉分析目标（分析、解释、因果推断、生成），以解决鲁棒性和忠实性不足问题，推动从窄精度向可靠性的转变。
light_analysis.method: 基于推理拓扑（直接、线性链、分支）对文献进行组织，交叉时间序列分析目标；引入紧凑标签集（分解、验证、集成、工具使用、知识访问、多模态、智能体循环、LLM对齐）。跨领域综述方法，强调证据可视化和时间对齐的评估实践，匹配拓扑与不确定性、接地、流式处理等指导。
light_analysis.result: 系统展示了各拓扑在不同域中实现的能力（如分支推理在探索与修正上的优势）及其在忠实性和鲁棒性上的失效模式。提供 curated 数据集、基准和资源库（GitHub链接）。指出评估需保持证据可见和时间对齐，成本与延迟作为设计预算。
light_analysis.conclusion: 推理结构需平衡接地能力、自校正与计算成本、可重复性。未来依赖于将推理质量与效用关联的基准，以及在漂移感知、流式、长时域下的闭环测试平台。标志着从准确度向规模化可靠性的转变，实现可追踪证据和可信结果的分析、理解与行动系统。

title: Generalizing Beyond Suboptimality: Offline Reinforcement Learning Learns Effective Scheduling through Random Solutions
abstract: Online reinforcement learning (RL) approaches have demonstrated strong performance on Job Shop Scheduling (JSP) and Flexible JSP (FJSP) problems by learning scheduling policies through direct interaction with simulated environments. However, these methods often require extensive training interactions, limiting their sample efficiency and practical applicability. Motivated by this challenge, we introduce Conservative Discrete Quantile Actor-Critic (CDQAC), an offline RL algorithm that learns effective scheduling policies directly from static, suboptimal datasets. CDQAC couples a quantile-based critic with delayed policy updates to estimate the return distribution of machine-operation pairs. Extensive experiments on JSP and FJSP benchmarks demonstrate that CDQAC consistently outperforms the data-generating heuristics, surpasses state-of-the-art offline and online RL baselines, and is highly sample efficient, requiring only 1 to 5% of the original dataset to learn high-quality policies. Our analysis suggests that, in scheduling, offline RL performance is governed mainly by state-action coverage rather than the quality of individual trajectories. Scheduling couples a dense reward aligned with the makespan objective with equal-length trajectories across heuristics, enabling effective learning from a broad range of behaviors. Consistent with this observation, datasets generated by a simple random heuristic with broader coverage let it outperform policies trained on datasets produced by stronger heuristics such as Genetic Algorithms.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CDQAC算法，在离线强化学习框架下利用次优数据集学习有效调度策略，显著提升样本效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线强化学习在作业车间调度中表现优异，但需要大量交互，样本效率低且实际部署困难。离线强化学习可利用静态数据集，但现有方法对数据质量要求高。本文旨在解决从次优离线数据中学习高性能调度策略的问题，实现样本高效且无需在线探索。
light_analysis.method: 提出Conservative Discrete Quantile Actor-Critic (CDQAC)算法，结合分位数估计的critic与延迟策略更新，从机器-操作对的回报分布中学习。使用固定长度的轨迹和密集奖励（与makespan对齐），在静态次优数据集上训练。关键创新在于利用状态-动作覆盖而非轨迹质量，并通过随机启发式生成具有更广覆盖的数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在JSP和FJSP基准上，CDQAC一致优于生成数据的启发式方法，并超越现有离线与在线强化学习基线。仅需原始数据集的1%到5%即可学习高质量策略。分析表明，离线调度性能主要取决于状态-动作覆盖，随机启发式生成的数据集甚至优于遗传算法等强启发式生成的数据集。
light_analysis.conclusion: CDQAC证明了从次优离线数据学习有效调度策略的可行性，具有高样本效率。揭示了调度问题中离线强化学习的关键因素在于覆盖而非最优性，为实际应用提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的调度场景和动态环境。

title: Synthetic Homes: A Multimodal Generative AI Pipeline for Residential Building Data Generation under Data Scarcity
abstract: Computational models have emerged as powerful tools for multi-scale energy modeling research at the building and urban scale, supporting data-driven analysis across building and urban energy systems. However, these models require large amounts of building parameter data that is often inaccessible, expensive to collect, or subject to privacy constraints. We introduce a modular, multimodal generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) framework that integrates image, tabular, and simulation-based components and produces synthetic residential building datasets from publicly available county records and images, and present an end-to-end pipeline instantiating this framework. To reduce typical Large Language Model (LLM) challenges, we evaluate our model's components using occlusion-based visual focus analysis. Our analysis demonstrates that our selected vision-language model achieves greater visual focus than a GPT-based alternative for building image processing. We also assess realism of our results against a national reference dataset, finding that our synthetic data overlaps more than 95% for three of the four selected variables. This work reduces dependence on costly or restricted data sources, lowering barriers to building-scale energy research and Machine Learning (ML)-driven urban energy modeling, and therefore enabling scalable downstream tasks such as energy modeling, retrofit analysis, and urban-scale simulation under data scarcity.
comment: 37 pages; 2 appendices; 6 figures; 2 tables. Code available at https://github.com/Lafayette-EshbaughSilveyra-Group/synthetic-homes

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个多模态生成AI框架，从公开的县记录和图像生成合成住宅建筑数据集，解决数据稀缺问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 建筑能量模型需要大量参数数据，但这些数据通常难以获取、昂贵或受隐私限制，阻碍了数据驱动的建筑能源研究。现有方法依赖受限数据源，无法在数据稀缺条件下有效支撑能量建模和城市规模仿真。本文旨在降低数据获取门槛，促进建筑尺度的能源分析和机器学习驱动的城市能量建模。
light_analysis.method: 提出模块化多模态生成AI框架，整合图像、表格和仿真组件，利用公开的县记录和建筑图像生成合成住宅数据集。具体采用视觉-语言模型处理图像，结合遮挡视觉焦点分析评估模型专注度，优于GPT替代方案。框架通过端到端流水线实现，减少大型语言模型的常见问题。
light_analysis.result: 与全国参考数据集对比，合成数据在四个选定变量中有三个重叠超过95%。视觉焦点分析表明，所选视觉-语言模型比基于GPT的替代方案在建筑图像处理中具有更优的视觉专注度。摘要未明确说明其他性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作减少了对昂贵或受限数据源的依赖，降低了建筑尺度能源研究和机器学习驱动城市能量建模的门槛。在数据稀缺条件下，可支持能量建模、改造分析和城市规模仿真等下游任务。未来可扩展至更多建筑类型或区域。

title: The Algorithm Is Not the Behavior: Learned Priors Override Look-Ahead in a Chess-Playing Neural Network
abstract: Recent mechanistic work has uncovered learned algorithms within neural networks, from modular arithmetic to search and planning in game-playing agents. But does algorithmic structure guarantee algorithmic behavior? We investigate this in Leela Chess Zero, the strongest neural chess engine, where prior work identified learned look-ahead. By extending the logit lens to its move-selecting policy network, we discover that correct puzzle solutions-including immediate checkmates-often appear in intermediate layers but are systematically overridden in the final output, a phenomenon we term "forgotten puzzles". Replicating prior analyses on these positions, we find that look-ahead operates normally-future moves of the correct continuation are represented, causally important, and linearly decodable-ruling out a failure of the algorithm itself. Instead, late layers increasingly shift toward prioritizing safe play over aggression. To test whether this shift drives the override, we steer the model against these preferences and recover 61.7% of forgotten puzzles, providing causal evidence that safety priors override algorithmically computed solutions. These findings demonstrate that algorithmic structure does not guarantee algorithmic behavior: a model can internally solve a problem and still output the wrong answer.

light_analysis.overview: 发现神经象棋引擎中安全先验覆盖了内部前瞻算法计算的正确解，导致最终输出错误。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究在神经网络中发现学习算法（如搜索和规划），但算法结构是否保证算法行为？该研究以Leela Chess Zero为例，探讨为什么即使内部前瞻算法正常运作，最终输出仍可能错误，揭示算法与行为的不一致。
light_analysis.method: 扩展logit lens至策略网络，发现“遗忘的谜题”现象。复制先前分析证明前瞻算法正常（表示未来走法、因果重要、线性可解码）。晚期层转向安全偏好，通过激活引导对抗安全偏好，恢复61.7%的遗忘谜题。
light_analysis.result: 在Leela Chess Zero中，内部前瞻算法可正确计算解，但最终输出被安全先验覆盖。通过引导恢复61.7%的遗忘谜题，提供因果证据证明安全先验是覆盖原因。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明算法结构不保证算法行为：模型能内部解决问题仍输出错误答案。强调学习先验（安全性）对行为的决定性影响，为神经网络可解释性和鲁棒性研究提供新视角。

title: RelayFormer: A Unified Local-Global Attention Framework for Scalable Image and Video Manipulation Localization
abstract: Visual manipulation localization (VML) aims to identify tampered regions in images and videos, a task that has become increasingly challenging with the rise of advanced editing tools. Existing methods face two central issues. The first is resolution diversity. Resizing or padding can distort subtle forensic cues and introduce unnecessary computational cost. The second is the difficulty of extending spatial models for images to spatio-temporal inputs in videos, which often results in maintaining separate architectures for the two data types. To address these challenges, we propose RelayFormer, a unified framework that adapts to varying resolutions and naturally handles both static and temporal visual data. RelayFormer partitions inputs into fixed-size sub-images and introduces Global Local Relay (GLR) tokens that propagate structured context through a relay-based attention mechanism. This design enables efficient exchange of global cues, such as semantic or temporal consistency, while preserving fine-grained manipulation artifacts. Unlike prior approaches that depend on uniform resizing or sparse attention, RelayFormer scales to variable resolutions and video sequences with minimal overhead. Experiments across diverse benchmarks demonstrate superior performance and strong efficiency, combining resolution adaptivity without interpolation or excessive padding, unified processing for images and videos, and a favorable balance between accuracy and computational cost. Code is available at~\href{https://github.com/WenOOI/RelayFormer}{https://github.com/WenOOI/RelayFormer}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RelayFormer，一种统一局部-全局注意力框架，通过中继注意力机制适应不同分辨率并统一处理图像和视频篡改定位。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉篡改定位中，现有方法面临分辨率多样性和视频扩展两大难题：调整尺寸或填充会破坏细微篡改线索并增加计算成本；图像模型难以扩展至时空输入，导致图像和视频架构分离。这些问题限制了方法的实用性和统一性。
light_analysis.method: RelayFormer将输入划分为固定大小的子图像，引入Global Local Relay (GLR) tokens，通过中继注意力机制在局部和全局之间高效交换结构化上下文，既捕获全局语义或时间一致性，又保留精细篡改伪影。无需统一调整大小或稀疏注意力，可自然扩展到任意分辨率和视频序列。
light_analysis.result: 在多个篡改定位基准上，RelayFormer相比依赖调整大小或稀疏注意力的方法表现出优越性能，实现了分辨率自适应、统一图像视频处理，并在准确性和计算成本间取得良好平衡，同时具备强效率和可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RelayFormer统一了图像和视频篡改定位，解决了分辨率和时空扩展问题，具有高适应性和效率。其设计为未来研究提供了新范式，代码已开源。局限性可能在于处理极长视频时的计算量，但中继机制已最小化开销。

title: Continual Learning with Support Boundary Experience Blending
abstract: Continual learning (CL) seeks to mitigate catastrophic forgetting when models are trained with sequential tasks. A common approach, experience replay (ER), stores past exemplars but only sparsely approximates the data distribution, yielding fragile and oversimplified decision boundaries. We address this limitation by introducing Support Boundary Data (SBD), generated via differential-privacy-inspired noise into latent features to create boundary-adjacent representations that implicitly regularize decision boundaries. Building on this idea, we propose Experience Blending (EB), a framework that jointly trains on exemplars and SBD through a dual-model aggregation strategy. EB has two components: (1) latent-space noise injection to generate support boundary data, and (2) end-to-end training that jointly leverages exemplars and SBD. Unlike standard experience replay, SBD enriches the feature space near decision boundaries, leading to more stable and robust continual learning. Extensive experiments on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, Tiny ImageNet, and ImageNet1K demonstrate consistent accuracy improvements of 10%, 6%, 13%, 2%, respectively.

light_analysis.overview: 提出支持边界数据(SBD)和经验混合(EB)框架，通过差分隐私噪声注入生成边界邻近表示，提升持续学习鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 持续学习面临灾难性遗忘，经验回放(ER)虽存储过去样本但稀疏近似数据分布，导致决策边界脆弱和过度简化，需要更鲁棒的决策边界正则化方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出支持边界数据(SBD)，通过差分隐私启发的噪声注入潜在特征生成边界邻近表示，隐式正则化决策边界。基于此构建经验混合(EB)框架，包括潜在空间噪声注入和端到端联合训练样本与SBD，采用双模型聚合策略。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、Tiny ImageNet和ImageNet1K上，准确率分别提升10%、6%、13%和2%，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过生成边界数据隐式正则化决策边界，增强了持续学习的稳定性和鲁棒性，实验显示显著性能提升。未来可探索更复杂的噪声生成或聚合策略。

title: Sustainability assessment using multimodal AI agents
abstract: Reducing the rapidly growing environmental impact of the computing industry requires assessing the emissions of electronics at scale. However, a traditional life cycle assessment (LCA) of an electronic device, which maps materials and processes to environmental impacts, often requires proprietary or unavailable data. Here, we reimagine conventional sustainability assessment by introducing a multimodal multi-agent AI system that emulates the collaborative process between LCA professionals and stakeholders (such as product managers and engineers) to automatically estimate the carbon footprint of electronic devices. The agents iteratively construct a complete life-cycle inventory by leveraging a structured data abstraction and software tools that mine information from the public internet, including repair communities and government regulatory databases. This reduces data gaps and data collection from weeks or months of expert time to under one minute. The system can calculate carbon footprint within 19% of expert LCAs with zero proprietary data (typical of the variation between human LCAs). We also show that by encoding domain-specific knowledge, environmental impact estimation can be reframed as a data-driven prediction task, in which both unknown products and emission factors are represented as weighted combinations of similar ones with known emissions.
comment: This article is published in Nature Electronics, and is available online at: https://www.nature.com/articles/s41928-026-01653-w

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种多模态多智能体AI系统，模仿LCA专家与利益相关者协作过程，自动估算电子设备碳足迹，将数据收集时间从数周缩短至一分钟内。
light_analysis.motivation: 计算行业的环境影响日益增长，需大规模评估电子设备排放。传统生命周期评估（LCA）依赖专有或不可得数据，耗时数周甚至数月，且存在数据缺口。现有方法难以快速、低成本地估算碳足迹，亟需自动化解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 构建多模态多智能体AI系统，模拟LCA专家与产品经理、工程师的协作。代理通过结构化数据抽象和软件工具，从公共互联网（如维修社区、政府监管数据库）挖掘信息，迭代构建完整生命周期清单。关键创新在于将环境影响估计重构为数据驱动预测任务，用已知产品的加权组合表示未知产品与排放因子。
light_analysis.result: 系统可在零专有数据下计算碳足迹，结果与专家LCA的偏差在19%以内（典型人类LCA变异范围）。数据收集时间从数周或数月缩短至不到一分钟。展示了通过编码领域知识，将环境影响估计转化为数据驱动预测的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文重新构想了传统可持续性评估，通过多模态AI代理实现自动化碳足迹估算，显著降低对专有数据的依赖和时间成本。该方法具有学术价值（将LCA转化为预测任务）和实际应用价值（快速评估电子设备环境影响），但可能受限于公共数据质量和代理协作的鲁棒性。

title: Persistent Homology as a Theory of Emergent Structure
abstract: Why do some macroscopic structures remain identifiable even though their microscopic constituents continually change? Vortices persist while fluid parcels turn over, neural memories persist while spikes and synapses fluctuate, and institutions persist while individuals enter and leave. We propose a scale-relative answer: an emergent property is a persistent nontrivial homology class $[z]\in H_p=\ker\partial_p/\im\partial_{p+1}$, a macro-feature that is closed but not exact across a filtration of descriptions. This identification turns emergence into a \emph{measurement} problem. Persistent bars detect stable macro-features, and we introduce a contractive-similarity (CS) graph operator to supply scaffold spectral gaps that predict robustness. Hodge decomposition separates harmonic macro-scaffold from exact and co-exact micro-flow; and functorial condensation explains when one level's emergent class becomes a unit for the next. The resulting scaffold-flow framework expresses six familiar signatures of emergence (i.e., inevitability, coherence, irreducibility, complementarity, robustness, and hierarchy) within one mathematical language. It also yields falsifiable predictions across atmospheric, neural, and social systems: genuine emergent structures should persist across filtrations, remain spectrally stable, respond disproportionately to harmonic interventions, and require timescale separation for hierarchical autonomy.

light_analysis.overview: 将涌现属性定义为持久非平凡同调类，提出基于持久同调的理论框架量化涌现现象。
light_analysis.motivation: 宏观结构（如涡旋、记忆、制度）在微观成分持续变化中保持可识别性，现有方法缺乏统一的数学语言描述其涌现机制。本文旨在解决如何严格定义、测量并预测涌现结构的鲁棒性与层级自主性问题。通过拓扑数据分析提供尺度相对的解释，将涌现转化为可计算的测量问题。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法是将涌现属性建模为持久同调类，即闭合但非精确的宏特征。引入收缩相似图算子构建谱间隙以预测鲁棒性，利用霍奇分解分离谐波宏支架与精确/协精确微流，并通过函子凝聚揭示层级间涌现类的单元转化。该框架统一了涌现的六种特征（必然性、相干性等）。
light_analysis.result: 该理论在天气、神经和社会系统中生成可证伪的预测：真实涌现结构应在过滤下持久存在、谱稳定，对谐波干预产生不成比例响应，且层级自主需时间尺度分离。摘要未提供具体数值结果，但强调数学框架的通用性与预测能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了一个跨学科涌现理论，将哲学概念转化为可计算的拓扑测量，为大气科学、神经科学和社会系统分析提供量化工具。潜在局限在于需要验证实际数据中的谱间隙与持久性条件，未来可扩展至更复杂网络的涌现层级分析。

title: Towards Conditional Feature Alignment for Cross-Domain Counting
abstract: Object counting models often degrade under cross-domain deployment because density composition varies across domains and is itself task-relevant. Standard feature alignment methods tend to suppress such variation by encouraging global domain invariance, which can be harmful when source and target domains contain different proportions of background, sparse foreground, and dense foreground. We propose Conditional Feature Alignment (CFA), a cross-domain counting framework that aligns representations within label-induced conditions rather than across full marginal feature distributions. Given density annotations or pseudo-density predictions, CFA constructs foreground/background or density-level conditions and aligns only features belonging to matching conditions. We formalise this idea through a conditional divergence perspective, showing that conditional alignment removes within-condition discrepancy while preserving condition-marginal density shift. For unsupervised domain adaptation, CFA estimates source conditions from annotations and target conditions from detached pseudo-density maps, then performs condition-wise adversarial alignment with full-image consistency regularisation. For source-domain generalisation, we instantiate the same principle with MPCount by enforcing condition-wise memory-consistency between generated source-domain views. Experiments on crowd and cell counting benchmarks show competitive or improved performance across diverse UDA and DG settings. For example, on JHU-CROWD++ FH$\rightarrow$SN, CFA-DG reduces MAE/RMSE from MPCount's 216.3/421.4 to 90.5/169.9, indicating that condition-wise alignment is especially effective under large weather- and density-induced shifts. These results suggest that condition-wise alignment is a promising design principle for domain-adaptive counting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出条件特征对齐（CFA）框架，通过标签诱导的条件对齐实现跨域目标计数，避免全局域不变性对密度分布的抑制。
light_analysis.motivation: 目标计数模型在跨域部署时性能下降，因为密度组成在不同域间变化且与任务相关。标准特征对齐方法通过鼓励全局域不变性会抑制这种变化，当源域和目标域包含不同比例的背景、稀疏前景和密集前景时尤其有害。现有方法无法处理条件相关的密度偏移。
light_analysis.method: 提出条件特征对齐（CFA）框架，利用密度标注或伪密度预测构建前景/背景或密度等级条件，仅对齐匹配条件的特征。形式化为条件散度视角，移除条件内差异同时保留条件边缘密度偏移。无监督域自适应中，从标注估计源域条件，从分离的伪密度图估计目标域条件，进行条件对抗对齐与全图一致性正则化。源域泛化中，通过MPCount实例化同一原则，在生成的源域视图间强制执行条件记忆一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在人群和细胞计数基准上的实验表明，CFA在多种无监督域自适应和源域泛化设置中性能有竞争力或提升。例如，在JHU-CROWD++的FH→SN任务中，CFA-DG将MAE/RMSE从MPCount的216.3/421.4降至90.5/169.9，表明条件对齐在大的天气和密度偏移下特别有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 条件对齐是域适应计数的有前景设计原则。CFA通过保留密度相关变化提升了跨域泛化能力。实验证明了在人群和细胞计数任务上的有效性。未来工作可探索更细粒度的条件构建或其他任务的应用。

title: AsFT: Anchoring Safety During LLM Fine-Tuning Within Narrow Safety Basin
abstract: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) improves performance but introduces critical safety vulnerabilities: even minimal harmful data can severely compromise safety measures. We observe that perturbations orthogonal to the alignment direction - defined by weight differences between aligned (safe) and unaligned models - rapidly compromise model safety. In contrast, updates along the alignment direction largely preserve it, revealing the parameter space as a "narrow safety basin". To address this, we propose AsFT (Anchoring Safety in Fine-Tuning) to maintain safety by explicitly constraining update directions during fine-tuning. By penalizing updates orthogonal to the alignment direction, AsFT effectively constrains the model within the "narrow safety basin," thus preserving its inherent safety. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets and models show that AsFT reduces harmful behaviors by up to 7.60%, improves task performance by 3.44%, and consistently outperforms existing methods across multiple tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AsFT方法，通过约束微调更新方向保持LLM安全，利用窄安全盆地特性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型微调提升性能但引入严重安全漏洞，即使少量有害数据也会破坏安全措施。现有方法缺乏对更新方向的有效约束，导致模型易受正交扰动影响而偏离安全状态。需要一种能保持模型固有安全性的微调方法。
light_analysis.method: AsFT通过惩罚与对齐方向正交的更新，将模型参数约束在窄安全盆地内。对齐方向定义为对齐（安全）与未对齐模型权重的差异。在微调时，显式限制更新方向沿对齐方向，从而保留模型固有安全性。实验使用多个数据集和模型进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集和模型上，AsFT将有害行为减少高达7.60%，任务性能提升3.44%，并一致优于现有安全微调方法。表明该方法在保持安全性的同时还能提升任务表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: AsFT有效解决微调LLM的安全问题，通过约束更新方向保持模型安全性。学术上揭示了窄安全盆地的特性，实践上提供了一种简单有效的安全微调方案。未来可探索更精细的方向约束或自适应机制。

title: Diffusion-based Cumulative Adversarial Purification for Vision Language Models
abstract: Vision Language Models (VLMs) have shown remarkable capabilities in multimodal understanding, yet their susceptibility to adversarial perturbations poses a significant threat to their reliability in real-world applications. Despite often being imperceptible to humans, these perturbations can drastically alter model outputs, leading to erroneous interpretations and decisions. This paper introduces DiffCAP, a novel diffusion-based purification strategy that can effectively neutralize adversarial corruptions in VLMs. We theoretically establish a provable recovery region in the forward diffusion process and meanwhile quantify the convergence rate of semantic variation with respect to VLMs. These findings manifest that adversarial effects monotonically fade as diffusion unfolds. Guided by this principle, DiffCAP leverages noise injection with a similarity threshold of VLM embeddings as an adaptive criterion, before reverse diffusion restores a clean and reliable representation for VLM inference. Through extensive experiments across six datasets with three VLMs under varying attack strengths in three task scenarios, we show that DiffCAP outperforms existing defense techniques by a substantial margin. Notably, DiffCAP significantly reduces both hyperparameter tuning complexity and the required diffusion time, thereby accelerating the denoising process. Equipped with theorems and empirical support, DiffCAP provides a robust and practical solution for securely deploying VLMs in adversarial environments. The source code is available at https://github.com/JasonFu1998/DiffCAP.
comment: Accepted to Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出DiffCAP，一种基于扩散的累积对抗净化方法，有效中和视觉语言模型中的对抗扰动，并理论证明对抗效应随扩散过程单调衰减。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在多模态理解中表现出色，但其易受对抗扰动影响，这些扰动虽人眼不可见，却能严重改变模型输出，导致错误解释和决策。现有防御技术存在局限性，如复杂调参或净化效率低。因此，需要一种高效、鲁棒的净化策略来确保VLM在实际部署中的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: DiffCAP基于扩散模型，首先在正向扩散过程中注入噪声，利用VLM嵌入的相似性阈值作为自适应标准，确定净化终止点。然后通过反向扩散恢复干净表示。理论推导了可证明的恢复区域，并量化了语义变化收敛率，表明对抗效应随扩散单调衰减。该方法减少了超参数调优和扩散时间，加速去噪。
light_analysis.result: 在三个任务场景下，使用六种数据集和三种VLM，在不同攻击强度下进行实验。DiffCAP显著优于现有防御技术，大幅降低了超参数调优复杂度和所需扩散时间，加速了去噪过程。摘要未提供具体性能指标数值，但明确表示超越现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiffCAP提供了一种鲁棒且实用的对抗净化方案，结合理论保证和实验支持，为VLM在对抗环境中的安全部署提供了有效工具。未来可进一步优化扩散效率或扩展至其他多模态模型。代码已开源。

title: MLaGA: Multimodal Large Language and Graph Assistant
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated substantial efficacy in advancing graph-structured data analysis. Prevailing LLM-based graph methods excel in adapting LLMs to text-rich graphs, wherein node attributes are text descriptions.
